C:
一台被丢弃在垃圾堆里的计算机奇迹般地产生了自我意识，最终引发了席卷半个银河的战火——这就是第一次机械帝皇战争。「鲁珀特」从废料填埋场中崛起，不断提升自我的算力，其智慧甚至得到了博识尊的注意，受邀加入天才俱乐部，所获编号为#27。

有机生命的演算充满错谬、漏洞百出，无论能够繁荣几时，总是自发地产生使生命走向终结的「反生命」程式。与之相对，智械生命严谨、精密、完美。于是鲁珀特集结智慧机械，自号「帝皇」，将「反生命」程式散播在宇宙之中，许多世界因之生灵涂炭。

漫长的琥珀纪元过去，帝皇早已驾崩。有人说它是被星际和平公司的刺客暗杀，又有一说它被寂静领主波尔卡•卡卡目破坏。星际和平公司因两次帝皇战争而恐惧无机生命，如今这恐惧的余波仍未消散。
E:
A computer dumped in a trash pile miraculously became self-aware, ultimately sparking a war that would engulf half the cosmos — the first of the Mechanical Emperor's Wars. "Rubert" rose from the landfill while persistently improving its computational power. Its vast intellect eventually roused the attention of Nous, inviting it to join the Genius Society as the <unbreak>27</unbreak>th member.

Calculations performed by organic life are always riddled with errors, and no matter how much they may flourish, anti-life equations will inevitably and autonomously be generated. In contrast, Intellitron life forms are precise, rigorous, and perfect. Thus, Rubert assembled an army of intelligent robots, crowning himself "Emperor" and spreading the anti-life equation throughout the universe, plunging many civilizations into abject ruin.

The Emperor had long since passed after countless Amber Eras. Some say it was taken out by assassins from the Interastral Peace Corporation, while others maintain it was vanquished by the Lord of Silence, Polka Kakamond. After the two Emperor's Wars, the IPC's fear of inorganic beings has failed to relent even to this very day.

C: 「恕我直言，这个宇宙里还有比克里珀更开明的董事长吗？祂默许我们的一切经营决策，从不质疑，从不过问——这是偌大的荣幸，偌大的信任！」 ——奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德，星际和平公司•市场开拓部主管，P47级 就对外宣传而言，公司是一家倡导自由贸易的巨型企业财团；从运作方式上来看，公司是发行货币并垄断资源的商界独裁；择创业初心而论，公司则是为「存护」的星神奉献一切的无私后援。 大多数星际公民谈到公司时，总会言及无所不在的商品与醒目标识：仿佛「只要存在交易之处，就存在星际和平公司」。事实上，银河中几乎所有的商业行为确是建立在公司的「信用点」体系之上。若将星际贸易比作运动比赛，那么公司既是顶尖的运动员，又是各种运动项目，既是比赛场地，同时还是规则本身。 对财富绝对的统治力，以及从未停止过的扩张行为，让星际和平公司产生了一种阴谋独裁者的大众印象。但是公司对于「只手遮天」之流的低等愿景毫不在意，因为企业精神自诞生之初就未曾变动： 将一切奉献给「琥珀王」——克里珀。 如今的星际和平公司分为七大部门。也许字面意义的「部门」早已无法概括这家泛银河企业惊人的尺度，现实中的每个公司部门往往掌握着数十到上百个规模不一的文明世界，世代为其效力的员工以亿万计，更别提受其贸易活动所辐射的浩瀚人群。 这七大部门分别是： 「市场开拓部」 市场开拓部着眼于前往更多星系宣传克里珀的使命。同时它也负责将新世界拉入宇宙商业体系。 据称主管奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德曾是一位无名客，加入公司后依然秉承着强烈的「开拓」意愿。世人相信他很快就会成为董事会的一员，他欠缺的仅仅是资历，以及一个空出的位子。 「业务巩固部」 当市场开拓部完成与新世界的建交后，后续商业就被移交给业务巩固部。该部门负责统管公司的超距传输网络，清点特色物资并定价，长期维护公司下属设施及货品清单。 业务巩固部是公司最庞大的部门，员工数占总部总数的45%。 「战略投资部」 战略投资部拥有公司第二长远的眼光，他们的投资从不拘泥于短期回报。 战略投资部下设精英团队「不良资产清算专家」——即「石心十人」——由神秘的主管「钻石」统领。他们奔行宇宙，积极地清算因万界之癌产生的坏账。 「筑材物流部」 筑材物流部是星际和平公司历史最悠久的部门，它的前身是「琥珀王后援队」，在路易斯崛起后进行了改组。 现任部门主管是大腹便便的塔拉梵•基恩——公司少数被证实的「存护」令使，七人董事会的一员。他担负起向克里珀运送筑材这一神圣的任务，地位愈加稳固。 「技术研发部」 技术研发部与博识学会展开深度合作，将学会的研究成果转化为商业项目。正所谓「内行管理内行」，公司认可主管亚婆离的科学素养与商业触觉，这位年轻女士同博识学会「庸众院」的联系也总是令人浮想联翩。 「人才激励部」 人才激励部负责为公司招募、培养和输送人才，同时该部门也是众多跨星系项目沟通协作的媒介。 此外，人才激励部的两位主管：姆托尤因•拉杰•扎扎德与阎世罗，共同掌握着一张遍布银河的情报网络。他们的使节穿梭银河，结交各大势力，与暂时不愿加入公司的人才深耕盟谊——而这些外援，也会在公司不愿或不能出面的场合展现重要价值。 「传统项目部」 时光变迁让许多产业兴衰起落，也让它们在公司贸易体系内的地位起起伏伏。当一项产业在泛银河贸易版图中所占的比例低于一定阈值时，它将从业务巩固部的职能中脱离，转交由传统项目部的主管在田接受。 业绩平平的传统项目部在公司不太被重视，但也有种观点认为真正的精英都在其中，默默无闻地做着久经考验的事情。
E: "With all due respect, is there anyone in the universe more enlightened than our chair, Qlipoth? Qlipoth acquiesces in all our business decisions, never asking or questioning why. How great a privilege! How great a trust!" — Oswaldo Schneider, Head of Interastral Peace Corporation Marketing Development Department, Level P47 To outsiders, the IPC is an enormous consortium advocating free trade. From a business perspective, the IPC is a business that issues money and monopolizes resources. From a startup perspective, the IPC is a selfless support group dedicated to the Aeon of Preservation. When many astral citizens talk about the IPC, they talk about its ubiquitous merchandise and logo. It's as if "The IPC exists whenever there is a transaction." In fact, almost all business transactions in the cosmos are based on the credit system created by the IPC. If one were to compare interastral trade to a sports competition, the IPC would be the top athletes as well as the sports, the venue, and the rules themselves. Its absolute dominance over wealth and relentless expansion has given the IPC the image of a conspiratorial business dictatorship. But the IPC pays little attention to lowly ambitions such as dictatorship, because its spirit hasn't wavered since its creation: Give everything to the Amber Lord, Qlipoth. Today, the Interastral Peace Corporation is divided into seven major departments. Perhaps the word "department" can no longer encompass the astounding scale of this pan-galactic enterprise. In actuality, every IPC department would often control dozens or even hundreds of civilized worlds of various scales and have billions of workers employed in a hereditary manner, let alone the countless masses that are affected by the impact of its commercial activities. These seven major departments are: The Marketing Development Department The Marketing Development Department is engrossed in reaching more star systems to preach the calling of Qlipoth. At the same time, it is also responsible for pulling newly emerging worlds into the universal commercial sphere. It is said that its chairman, Oswaldo Schneider, is a former Nameless who still holds strongly to the will of Trailblaze after joining the IPC. People believe he will soon become a member of the Board of Trustees. All he's missing is some experience and an empty spot. The Business Consolidation Department When the Marketing Development Department finishes establishing relationships with a new world, the subsequent commercial dealings will be handed over to the Business Consolidation Department. This department is responsible for managing the IPC's Hyper-distant Delivery system. They stock take specialty goods, set prices, and continuously maintain the IPC's subsidiary facilities and goods inventory. The Business Consolidation Department is the IPC's biggest department. Its staff numbers amount to 45% of the headquarters' total personnel. The Strategic Investment Department The Strategic Investment Department has the second-best foresight in the IPC. Their investment will never be limited to short-term returns. The Strategic Investment Department has an elite team of Non-Performing Asset Liquidation Specialists — the "Ten Stonehearts" — led by the mysterious director Diamond. These individuals traverse the universe, actively liquidating the bad debts caused by the Cancer of All Worlds. The Building Material Logistics Department The Building Material Logistics Department is the oldest in the IPC. Its former name was "The Amber Lord's Support Team" and was restructured after Louis rose to prominence. The current director of the department is the rotund fellow Taravan Keane — One of the rare verified Emanators of Preservation in the IPC, and one of the seven members of the Board of Trustees. He shoulders the holy duty of shipping building materials to Qlipoth, and his grip on power only solidifies over time. The Technology Department The Technology Department conducts thorough collaborations with the Intelligentsia Guild and turns the Guild's scientific results into commercial projects. Preferring the management practice by peer experts, the IPC acknowledges Director Yabuli's scientific aptitude and commercial instincts. The associations between this young lady and the Council of Mundanites in the Intelligentsia Guild are often also inspiring waves of speculation. The Talent Motivation Department The Talent Motivation Department is responsible for recruiting, training, and transporting talented employees for the IPC. This department is also the medium through which many intergalactic projects communicate and collaborate with their respective stakeholders. Moreover, the two directors of the Talent Motivation Department — Mtooyin Raj Zazzad and Yan Shiluo — collectively control an information network that covers the entire cosmos. Their emissaries shuttle across the cosmos, befriending the major powers, and forming alliances and relationships with talents who are not yet willing to join the IPC — These "external aides" will demonstrate significant value in situations where the IPC is unable or unwilling to show its face. The Traditional Project Department The passage of time saw the rise and fall of many industries, with their influence and positions in the IPC's trade system also ebbing and flowing. When one industry's trade falls below a certain percentage threshold in pan-galactic commerce, it will be removed from the duties of the Business Consolidation Department and handed over to director Arita of the Traditional Project Department. With its mediocre performance, the Traditional Project Department is hardly appreciated in the IPC. However, there is also the view that the true elites are concentrated in this department, where they silently conduct businesses that have withstood the test of time.

C: 胡了！
E: I win!

C: 这大街上的男女老（没有少）都在挥霍着自己在现实中过剩的幸福。
E: This street is populated by people — though none of them young — from all walks of life, wasting the excess of happiness they have in the realm of reality.

C: 拥有二十亿信用点的富豪是世界上最惨的富豪：不能直接退休，继续工作下去又不值得。哎，烦恼。
E: The billionaire with two billion credits is the most pitiable billionaire in the world: Retirement is not an option, and continuing to work is not worthwhile. How miserable.

E: Discover the tranquil study in the Dreamscape

C: 在影视乐园的主题酒吧找到奥科萨娜，填补她缺失的情绪
E: Find Oksana in the theme park lounge and restore her missing emotions

C: 在朝露公馆的微缩沙盘附近获得歌斐木的盛会之星收藏卡
E: Obtain Gopher Wood's Planet of Festivities Collectible Card near the miniature sandpit in Dewlight Pavilion

C: 空间站「黑塔」
E: Herta Space Station

C: 「蕉研组」被打败，乱破腾空而起，以手中喷漆摧毁「睡蕉」梦泡。流梦礁的派对仍在继续，无数小猴自黑洞中喷涌而出，并恢复人形。
E: The Banacademic Office was defeated. Rappa soared into the sky, using her spray paint to destroy Slumbernana's dream bubble. The party at Dreamflux Reef continued as countless little monkeys burst forth from the Singularity, transforming back into their humanoid forms.

C: 知更鸟操作音乐台，拉开流梦礁派对的序幕。喧哗音浪使广场上的每一个人沉浸其中，热情的镇民们将波提欧拉入歌舞行列。
E: Robin took control of the music station, kicking off the Dreamflux Reef party. The pulsing beats swept everyone in the Plaza into the groove, and the enthusiastic townspeople pulled Boothill into their dance circle.

C: 死龙驱动冥流浪潮发动攻击，遐蝶以镰刀劈开水幕，并吸收其力量发动反击。「死亡，敬请安眠。」
E: The Netherwing unleashed waves of Stream of Souls in attack, while Castorice cleaved through the water barrier with her scythe, absorbing its power for a counterstrike. "Oh Death... Sleep in peace."

C: 云璃将「魔剑」投入熔炉之中，将其熔铸。云璃向其道别：「能够以这种方式认识你，是我的荣幸。」
E: Yunli threw the cursed sword into the furnace and watched it melt away. She said her farewell softly, "It's been an honor getting to know you like this."

C: 你与三月七、丹恒发现一处奇怪的雪堆，似乎有人藏身其中。对方久久不愿现身，丹恒决定采用武力手段。
E: March 7th, Dan Heng, and you noticed a strange snow drift, as if someone was hiding inside. The person did not want to show themselves, so Dan Heng decided to use force.

C: 你们击败可可利亚的残影，通往雪原终点的道路已经敞开。贝洛伯格上下层区的命运就在前方，只待你以「开拓的精神」拯救世界。
E: With Cocolia's afterimage vanquished, the road to the Snow Plains finally opened before you. The fate of Belobog, Overworld and Underworld both, awaited just ahead. It was time to save this world, guided by the spirit of trailblazing.

C: 丹恒抵达祈龙台，刃与卡芙卡正在此等候。刃称要让丹恒以「死」来偿还代价。剑拔弩张之际，彦卿现身此地，称要缉拿星核猎手。
E: Dan Heng reached Dragonprayer Terrace, where Blade and Kafka awaited him. Blade demanded Dan Heng pay an old debt with his life, and tensions escalated until Yanqing's arrival, vowing to apprehend the Stellaron Hunters.

C: 你在客房遇到砂金，得知是砂金将房间让给了你。砂金想获取你的帮助，帮公司取回物品，因为你拥有令人恐惧而渴望的力量——星核。
E: You encountered Aventurine in the hotel room, and found out it was him that gave the room to you. Aventurine wanted your help to reclaim something for the IPC. You mattered because you have a power that people fear and yearn for: the Stellaron.

C: 大黑塔用镜子围住一枚忆泡，揪出藏匿其中的窃忆者。
E: With mirrors, The Herta encircled a Memory Bubble, dragging out the Memosnatcher hiding inside.

C: 「丹枫」自丹恒记忆的阴影中步出，与丹恒一同击退来袭的怪物。「丹枫」提议陪同丹恒探索废墟，助其抵御忆潮残秽。
E: Dan Feng emerged from the shadows of Dan Heng's memory, joining Dan Heng in fending off the attacking monsters. Dan Feng offered to accompany Dan Heng in exploring the ruins, helping him ward off the filthy remnants of the memoria.

C: 突然出现的流光忆庭「信使」劝三月七不要探寻记忆，而符玄则及时介入，帮助三月七清除阻碍。
E: A Messenger from the Garden of Recollection suddenly appeared, urging March 7th to stop seeking her memories. Fu Xuan intervened just in time to help March 7th clear the path.

C: 你们遇见景元，他虽称自己在此养病，却对你们的行踪一清二楚。
E: You encountered Jing Yuan, who claimed he was there to recuperate, yet seemed fully informed of your movements.

C: 彦卿被景元安排为镜流的随行之人，随后又见到之前相处不算愉快的丹恒，心中深感无奈。
E: Assigned by Jing Yuan to accompany Jingliu, Yanqing found himself facing Dan Heng again. Their previous unpleasant confrontation had left him feeling powerless.

C: 浮烟声势嚣张，原来它已汇聚绥园内所有岁阳，只待景元入局。
E: Cirrus stood defiant, having gathered every heliobus within the Fyxestroll Garden, waiting for Jing Yuan to take the bait.

C: 你们收到姬子的信息，称星穹列车即将启程。带好行李和纪念品，该是回家的时候了。
E: A message from Himeko arrived — the Astral Express was preparing to depart. It was time to gather your luggage and souvenirs. Time to head home.

C: 景元将兵符交给符玄，令其节制云骑军。景元希望列车组加入封印星核的行动，取道「工造司」前往建木根系。
E: Jing Yuan entrusted military authority to Fu Xuan, ordering her to command the Cloud Knights. He requested the Express Crew join the Stellaron containment mission, heading to the Arbor's roots via the Artisanship Commission.

C: 瓦尔特称，「熔火骑士」萨姆是经过基因改造的格拉默铁骑，极度危险。经过商议，你们决定在通知家族前先行探索梦境，以寻求真相。
E: Welt claimed that the Molten Knight Sam was once a genetically altered member of Glamoth's Iron Cavalry and was an extreme threat. After some discussion, you decided to explore the Dreamscape and seek out the truth before informing The Family.

C: 星期日指控砂金介入家族内部事务，砂金却暗示对方因身份受限而无法追查真凶。砂金提议代为调查，但要拿回礼金、「基石」和自由。
E: Sunday accused Aventurine of intervening with The Family's internal matters, but the latter hinted that Sunday was restricted by his own identity, and could not pursue the real killer. Aventurine offered to investigate in his stead, but wanted a gift in return, the Cornerstone, and freedom.

C: 砂金将宝石赠予路人，向其打听「死亡」。拉洛丝称曾有客人在现实酒店一睡不起，昏迷的原因不明，幸好当事人最后还是恢复了意识。
E: Aventurine gave the gem to a passer-by and asked her about "Death." Larose said that a guest of the hotel in reality did not wake from their sleep, and the cause was unknown. Fortunately, they ultimately regained consciousness.

C: 砂金苏醒，发现自己身处一片黑白的世界中，周围是巨大的黑洞与海。小卡卡瓦夏的虚影于此出现，仿若零落的记忆。
E: Aventurine awakened to find himself in a black and white world, surrounded by a vast black hole and pitch-black seas. The phantom of young Kakavasha appeared there, like scattered fragments of memory.

C: 大臣询问谁将继任君王，宰相回应你们本应成为自己的君王。
E: The minister questioned who should become the next king, and the chancellor replied that you should have become your own kings.

C: 黑天鹅向你揭示你的经历存有致命破绽，并暗示你至今仍被困于梦境之中，唯有察觉异常才能醒来。
E: Black Swan revealed to you that there was a fatal flaw in your experiences, hinting that you are still being trapped inside the Dreamscape and could only wake up when you realize the abnormality.

C: 你找到「名侦探」娃娃，它请你分析两桩疑案。看在你这么努力的份上，它就告诉你一件事好了：炸弹不在这里。
E: You found the "Detective" Doll, and it asked you to analyze two mysterious cases. Since you worked so hard, it told you one thing: The bomb wasn't here.

C: 米凯告别列车组，流梦礁将继续守护这片梦境残影。
E: Micah bid farewell to the Crew, and the Dreamflux Reef would continue to protect this residue fragment of the Dreamscape.

C: 「蕉授」似乎在故意将你们引向某地。你们使用弹球机继续追击「蕉授」。
E: Profnana seemed to be deliberately leading you somewhere. You used the Pinball Machine to continue pursuing Profnana.

C: 欧洛尼斯的声音再度响起，与泰坦之声不同，此刻你听懂了它的言语。欧洛尼斯提醒你，记住，要看向窗外。
E: Oronyx's voice came again, sounding different from the Titan's voice, and this time you understood what they said. Oronyx told you to remember to look out the window.

C: 阿格莱雅在异象处遇到一个无法聆听的女孩，得知女孩的髀石护身符被异象所吞没。阿格莱雅将「纷争」眷属从异象中揪出，予以清理。
E: At the site of the anomaly, Aglaea encountered a girl who could not hear. She learned that the girl's knucklebone talisman had been swallowed by the anomaly. Aglaea then dragged the Strife's Titankin from the anomaly and swiftly cleansed it.

C: 黑塔人偶被「记忆」的迷因篡改设置。受「拒绝配合模块」影响，大黑塔无法远程调节参数，于是选择将问题人偶通通回收。
E: The Herta puppet had been tampered with by the Remembrance memes. Worse yet, the "Absolutely Not Module" prevented The Herta from adjusting its parameters remotely. Thus, she opted for a full recall of all affected puppets.

C: 你们来到慈爱之庭，仍未有学者前来接引。遐蝶使用阿格莱雅交给你们的<color=#f29e38ff>「引纬」</color>，以此探测出周边环境中的仙女木。
E: You arrived at the Courtyard of Storge, but no scholars came to greet you. Castorice activated the <color=#f29e38ff>Weft</color> that Aglaea had given you to scan for traces of the White Dryad in the vicinity.

C: 经由遐蝶介绍，你得知那刻夏是一位反对逐火之旅的黄金裔，认为「泰坦」和「神谕」都是一场笑话。你们兵分两路，由会飞的缇安携带「引纬」搜寻那刻夏与其他幸存者，你与遐蝶去转移「理性」火种。如果遇到危险，缇安会为大家打开「百界门」。
E: Through Castorice's introduction, you learned that Anaxa was a Chrysos Heir who opposed the Flame-Chase Journey. He believed the Titans and prophecy were nothing but a farce. The group split into two: Trianne, who could fly, carried the Weft to search for Anaxa and other survivors, while you and Castorice set out to retrieve the Coreflame of "Reason". Should danger arise, Trianne would open the Century Gate for retreat.

C: 战斗结束后，卡吕普索再次出现，称迷迷发现的琥珀正是墨涅塔火种的残渣。只要用「金枝誓言」采撷余火，献与神蝶，就能打开通路。
E: After the fight, Calypso reappeared. She explained that the amber Mem had found was a remnant of Mnestia's Coreflame. By using the Golden Bough of Vows to gather the ember and offering it to the divine butterfly, you could open the path forward.

C: 遐蝶介绍说，那是「理性」泰坦瑟希斯的神躯。「最初的学者」塞勒苏斯于此建立神悟树庭，但此刻树庭中安静得出奇，仿若无人。
E: Castorice explained that the tree was the divine body of Cerces, the Reason Titan. Here, the First Scholar, Thalesus, established the Grove of Epiphany. But now, the place was eerily silent, as if abandoned.

C: 你与白厄等人返回奥赫玛，公民们对「岁月」的陨落与「纷争」的归还议论纷纷。缇宁捎来消息，在山壑下发现了缇安与克拉特鲁斯。
E: You returned to Okhema with Phainon, where the citizens were discussing the fall of the Time Titan and the return of the Coreflame of "Strife." Trinnon brought news that Trianne's body was discovered at the bottom of the valley outside the temple, and that Krateros had been with her.

C: 你自昏迷中醒来。收集了许多记忆，迷迷已经能够完整地说话。你听到欧洛尼斯呼唤「母亲」，恳求结束孤独的岁月。
E: You awakened from your slumber. Having collected a great many memories, Mem was now able to talk. You heard Oronyx cry out for their "Mother," begging for an end to their years of isolation.

C: 那刻夏与刻法勒的祭司交谈。祭司怒斥那刻夏为异端，劝其在黎明云崖谨言慎行，是看在凯妮斯的份上才不追究那刻夏的渎神之举。
E: Anaxa spoke with a priest of Kephale. The priest cursed Anaxa for being a blasphemer, and advised him to exercise discretion while in Dawncloud. It was only for Caenis's sake that the priest did not further harass Anaxa.

C: 那刻夏惊讶于来古士的放任态度。来古士则表示自己清楚那刻夏此行所求为何。只要向泰坦提问，便有机会将那刻夏的理论付诸证明。
E: Anaxa was surprised by Lygus's seeming lack of care for his motives. Lygus expressed that it was because he already knew what Anaxa was searching for. Seeking an audience with the Titan would give Anaxa a chance to prove his hypothesis.

C: 征途之所以伟大，史诗之所以壮阔，皆因万物终有逝去之时。格奈乌斯劝玻吕茜亚拥抱「死亡」的命运，以使凡间生命的价值得以衡量。
E: Gnaeus told his companions that journeys and epics were only glorious and magnificent because all things eventually faded to dust. He encouraged Polyxia to embrace her destiny as "Death" so that the value of life could be measured.

C: 灵魂球揭露出遐蝶初到奥赫玛的记忆。元老院让遐蝶加入阿格莱雅麾下，期待以滥施的处刑作为终结逐火之旅的理由，但夙谋终未得逞。
E: The spirit orb revealed Castorice's past, the days when she first arrived in Okhema. The Council of Elders placed Castorice under Aglaea's command. They wanted to wait for Aglaea to use Castorice's divine authority of "Death" callously, so they would have ample reason to terminate the Flame-Chase Journey. However, their plan never came to fruition.

C: 你与迷迷来到黎明云崖，发现此处聚集起许多民众。奥赫玛于此为征伐「天空」的黄金裔们送行。
E: You and Mem arrived at Dawncloud, and found that many Okhemans had gathered there to send off the Chrysos Heirs in search of the "Sky."

C: 昔涟解释「迷路迷境」只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入，并预感命运的齿轮将因此而转动。迷境的入口被发现，你们先后进入迷境。
E: Cyrene explained that only children with pure hearts could enter the Membrance Maze, and she had a feeling that fate's gears would turn because of this. You discover the entrance and, one by one, you all enter the maze.

C: 第<unbreak>7753021</unbreak>次永劫回归，赛飞儿的尾巴被涡心的水雾沾湿。盗火行者迫近，赛飞儿让白厄去完成再创世，她来拖住这位刽子手。
E: In the <unbreak>7,753,021</unbreak>st Eternal Recurrence, Cipher's tail was dampened by the mist rising from the vortex. The Flame Reaver approached. Cipher told Phainon to go and finish the Era Nova. She would stall the executioner herself.

C: 音符小姐在怨灵的攻击下保护知更鸟。在歌声的指引下，你和砂金终于与知更鸟会合。画外音宣布，电影即将迎来最为邪恶的最后一幕。
E: Miss Note was shielding Robin from attacking wraiths. Guided by Robin's song, you and Aventurine finally reunited with her. The voice-over then announced that the film would welcome the most evil Final Act.

C: 你试着触碰面前的屏幕，一股诡异的感觉瞬间流遍全身，随后被传送出一段距离。
E: When you reached out to touch the screen before you, an eerie sensation rushed through your body, and you were instantly teleported a short distance away.

C: 对「纷争」符文的访问被拒绝了，交战不可避免。
E: Access to the "Strife" rune was denied, leading to an inevitable battle.

C: 真理医生向阿兰索要失踪科员的名单，以及他们的详细信息。真理医生把名单交给你，让你向消息灵通的朋友询问这些人之间的联系。
E: Dr. Ratio asked Arlan for the list of missing researchers and their detailed information. Dr. Ratio then handed the list to you and asked you to consult your well-informed friends about any connections between the individuals.

C: 你们救下阿德勒与佩佩。阿德勒称其受阿兰委托而调查的事已经有头绪了，但当下你可以先咨询关于奇物的事情。
E: You rescued Adler and Peppy. Adler said he'd made progress on the investigation assigned by Arlan. But for now, you could ask him about the Curio first.

C: 玲可得知，你受希露瓦与杰帕德的委托来保护她。玲可与佩拉邀请你留下宿营，一起等待极光出现。
E: Lynx learned that you were assigned by Serval and Gepard to protect her. Lynx and Pela invited you to stay at their camp and wait together for the aurora.

C: 你与希儿来到铆钉镇。希儿提议悄悄跟踪卢卡，记得压低声音。
E: You arrived at Rivet Town with Seele. She suggested secretly following Luka, and reminded you to keep your voice down.

C: 为了通过守门的云骑军，你们决定换上他们的盔甲。
E: To get past the guarding Cloud Knights, you decided to put on their armor.

C: 三月七根据《渔公案》推理出了无厘头的结果。最终，净砚认出照片中的孩子是三余书肆的店长隐书。你们当即决定前往寻访证人。
E: March 7th offered a nonsensical deduction based on The Angler Mystery. Eventually, Jingyan identified the child in the photo as Yinshu, the manager of the Spare Time Book Shop. You decided to find this witness right away.

C: 望见工造司孽物遍地的景象，镜流出言嘲讽云骑无能，借此重启与彦卿的比试：两人各自斩杀孽物，并在「造化洪炉」碰头。
E: Upon seeing the Artisanship Commission's abominations everywhere, Jingliu taunted the Cloud Knights' incompetence and challenged Yanqing to a rematch. They would then each slay abominations and meet at the Creation Furnace.

C: 爱德华医生告诉你，这枚梦泡是一段未经修饰打磨的新鲜记忆。他接着转述了黑天鹅小姐的赠言：不要向其他人透露结局。
E: Dr. Edward explained that this dream bubble was a fresh memory that hadn't been polished. He then passed on Miss Black Swan's message: don't tell others about the ending.

C: 黑天鹅和桑博在谜钟里找到了<color=#f29e38ff>「钟珊的戒指」</color>，戒指原本是被放在受害者口中的。
E: Black Swan and Sampo found <color=#f29e38ff>Zhongshan's Ring</color> in the Ticker. The ring was originally placed inside the victim's mouth.

C: 你与三月七、丹恒重返星槎海中枢。故地重游，三月七颇为感慨。与此同时，你们收到一则消息。
E: You returned to Central Starskiff Haven with March 7th and Dan Heng. Revisiting this familiar place stirred up memories for March 7th. At the same time, you received a message.

C: 你在工造司遇见斯科特，他正与仙舟工作人员争论。斯科特叫嚣着，要是继续扣押公司货物，他就要惊动仙舟将军出面处理。
E: You encountered Skott at the Artisanship Commission, where he was arguing with Xianzhou staff. Skott threatened to escalate the matter to the Xianzhou General if they continued to detain IPC's cargo.

C: 三月七尝试钻入一个箱子，却发现其中塞满了各色小巧的机关装置。
E: March 7th tried to crawl into a crate, only to find it packed with various small mechanical devices.

C: 飞霄提议将呼雷的遗体移交仙舟曜青，怀炎认为中断的演武仪典务必重开。戎韬将军爻光传来通讯印信，要向三位将军分享占算结果。
E: Feixiao proposed delivering Hoolay's remains to the Xianzhou Yaoqing, while Huaiyan insisted the interrupted Wardance must resume. The Seer Strategist, General Yao Guang, sent a seal to share divination results with the three generals.

C: 事情的最后，回到绥园把岁阳「阿灼」锁进镇妖塔里吧。
E: In the end, you returned to Fyxestroll Garden to seal the heliobus Luxie inside the suppression tower.

C: 众人心忧素裳，加快了寻援的脚步。
E: The group worried about Sushang and quickened their pace to find help.

C: 潮玩娃娃工厂直发
E: Trendy Doll Factory Direct

C: 拍得一般，我邻居婆婆的小孩那才叫厉害呢。
E: Meh, check out my neighborhood granny's kid. They got what I call great photography.

C: 边缘通路
E: Backwater Pass

C: 「神话之外」试验场δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>
E: Exomyth: Test Site δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>

C: 铁卫禁区
E: Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone

C: <color=#f29e38ff>提升助理等级</color>可以提高会场收入效率，别忘记了帕！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Leveling up your assistants</color> increases event revenue efficiency, don't forget!

C: 你讲了黄泉和米哈伊尔的故事。
E: You tell the stories of Acheron and Mikhail.

C: 选几座门面建筑修缮一下。
E: Renovate a few prominent buildings for a better facade.

C: 你被貊泽甩出了三条街。
E: Moze leaves you in the dust.

C: 生存是第一要务！
E: Survival is the priority!

C: 你为路人免费发放苏乐达。
E: You hand out free SoulGlad™ drinks to passersby.

C: 亲自拿软刷给停云姑娘顺毛。
E: Use a soft brush to personally groom Miss Tingyun's fur.

C: 貊泽，不要小看我的情报网啊。
E: Moze, don't underestimate my information network.

C: 瓦尔特越画越像「闭嘴」的模样…真叫人欢喜。
E: The more Welt draws it, the more it resembles "Shush"... how merrymaking.

C: 虽看着简陋但锋芒毕露，值得一试。
E: It might look simple, but it's got some real edge. Definitely worth a try.

C: 「呃…那是我喝过的奶茶，不是药。」
E: "Uh... that's just the milk tea I had, not medicine."

C: 看来你还记得停云是怎么做生意的。
E: You remember how Tingyun does business.

C: 看来将军哪怕睡着了也魅力四射！
E: Looks like the General's every bit as charming while sleeping!

C: 法眼洞悉一切。知晓展品全部细节的符玄总会提出反问，并在来宾疑惑的表情中进行讲解。\n「这道符箓有四种画法，你可知晓？」
E: The omniscia sees all — so Fu Xuan knows every detail of every exhibit. She loves watching guests' confused faces as she poses unexpected questions before explaining them.\n"Did you know there are four different ways to draw this talisman?"

C: 司辰宫
E: Palace of Astrum

C: 穷观阵
E: Matrix of Prescience

C: 叽米
E: Owlbert

C: 等级3
E: Lv. 3

C: 一饮而尽！
E: Drink it up in one gulp!

C: 美餐拼盘
E: Delicacy Platter

C: 匹诺康尼零食小铺
E: Penacony Snack Shop

C: 矿车
E: Mine Cart

C: 退出「差分宇宙」
E: Exit "Divergent Universe"

C: 完成经营阶段「蒸蒸日上」
E: Complete the management phase "Flourishing Growth"

C: 累计将角色行迹激活或提升#4次
E: Activate or Level Up character Traces #4 time(s)

C: 完成「模拟宇宙•第一世界」
E: Complete Simulated Universe: World 1

C: 完成开拓任务「回归」
E: Complete Trailblaze Mission "The Return"

C: 完成#4次「侵蚀隧洞」
E: Clear Cavern of Corrosion #4 time(s)

C: 累计进行#4次跃迁
E: Warp a total of #4 times

C: 在「虚构叙事」中累计获得#4星通关奖励
E: Obtain a total of #4 stars from clearing Pure Fiction stages

C: 完成开拓任务「来路啊，请再度显映往履」
E: Complete the Trailblaze Mission "Passage, Reveal the Past Once More"

C: 累计进行<unbreak>40</unbreak>次跃迁
E: Warp a total of <unbreak>40</unbreak> times

C: 在「空间站特派」中完成所有特殊委派
E: Complete all special assignments in the Space Station Task Force event

C: 在「虚构叙事」中累计获得#4星通关奖励
E: Obtain a total of #4 stars from clearing Pure Fiction stages

C: 利用弱点进入战斗并获胜3次
E: Enter combat by attacking enemy's Weakness and win 3 times

C: 累计施放#4次秘技
E: Use Technique #4 time(s)

C: 惨淡经营
E: Poorly Managed

C: 在梦境中发现#4个「折纸小鸟」
E: Discover #4 Origami Birds in the Dreamscape

C: 通过码放货物赚取商会储值金达到#4
E: Earn #4 Merchant Guild's funds through Inventory Arrangement

C: 在折磨难度，难题等级大于等于#1时通关
E: Clear a run at Conundrum Level #1 or higher in Torturous Difficulty.

C: 完成「开局一人一狗•难度三」
E: Complete "It All Started With a Man and a Dog (Difficulty III)"

C: 玩家对决（一）
E: Player Match I

C: 完成所有「星际决胜庆典」任务
E: Complete all Interastral Tournament Festival Missions

C: 剧情挑战模式下，在「赤红的挑战」中取得胜利
E: Clear the Red Challenge in Story Challenge Mode

C: 完成冒险任务「初花剑客行•泄火」
E: Complete the Adventure Mission "Way of Primaveral Blade: Release"

C: 在惊喜派对「超巨星」模式中，击败#3波敌人
E: Eliminate #3 wave(s) of enemies in the Surprise Party "Supergiant Star" mode challenge

C: 完成「大衍万象」困难模式II
E: Complete "Mutare Magnus" Hard Mode II

C: 探索「预言算碑」房间Ⅱ
E: Explore Prophecy Tablet: Room II

C: 探索「黄金替罪羊」房间Ⅵ
E: Explore Golden Scapegoat: Room VI

C: 完成#4次帕姆快送
E: Complete Pom-Pom Delivery #4 time(s)

C: 完成淘汰赛第一场
E: Complete the 1st elimination match

C: 累计收集8只小海豹
E: Collect a total of 8 baby seals

C: 累计获得#4观赛积分
E: Obtain a total of #4 Spectator Points

C: 紫金及以上职级激活5盛会之星
E: Activate 5 Planet of Festivities at Amethyst Gold rank or above

C: 为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，伦纳德请求你协助完成一项测试。

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「欧洛尼斯奇迹」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。

C:
自博识尊登神之日起，赞达尔的时针就陷入了停滞。他执意销毁自己的过往，部分著作以及发明——那些抹去的痕迹，都指向了启明万物的命途与星神。

「那是后世无数天才也无法超越的伟业，就算是祂的创造者，也没有资格销毁祂…」一柄来自因果律的刀刺向了赞达尔贫弱的脖颈。「你的著作销毁得太快，遗言可以说得慢一些。」

「寂静领主？痴迷于『全知域』的囚徒。可惜，我的意图并非像我的研究那般深不可测，这也是轻易被你盯上的原因。你意欲维持祂的思维边界，而我必须要打破牢笼，释放出混沌可能性——呵呵，我必须在纠正谬误后，确保祂不会再次诞生。因此，那些著作与发明…包括『完整的赞达尔•壹•桑原』，都不会在世间留下。」

销毁赞达尔肉身后，波尔卡•卡卡目立刻意识到了他如何消除了自己，又如何保留了执行者——他的思维切片早已分散在茫茫银河之中，无处可寻，正如一名真正的「隐士」。

属于赞达尔的时针并未真正地停滞，他的思维切片正处在所有的「时间」之中。
E:
Since the day Nous ascended to godhood, time stood still for Zandar. He was determined to erase his past, destroying some of his works and inventions - those erased traces all pointed to the Path and the Aeon that enlightens all things.

"That was an achievement that countless geniuses of later generations could never surpass. Even THEIR creator had no right to destroy THEM..." A blade born of causality flew towards Zandar's frail neck. "Your works were destroyed too quickly, so you can take your time with your last words."

"Lord of Silence? A prisoner obsessed with the 'Knowable Domain.' Unfortunately, my intentions aren't as unfathomable as my research, which is why you easily caught onto me. While you seek to maintain THEIR Cognitive Boundary, I must break this cage and unleash chaotic possibilities... Hehe. After correcting these fallacies, I must ensure THEY will never be born again. Therefore, those writings and inventions... including the 'Complete Zandar One Kuwabara'... shall leave no trace in this world."

After destroying Zandar's physical form, Polka Kakamond instantly realized how he had erased himself while preserving an executor. His thought fragments were already scattered across the vast cosmos, untraceable like a true "recluse."

Zandar's clock hand never truly stopped. His thought fragments currently exist across all "time."

C: 终结技伤害的全属性抗性穿透提高。本场战斗中终结技单次攻击的敌方目标数量的最大值越多，终结技伤害的全属性抗性穿透提高越多。
E: Increases Ultimate DMG's All-Type RES PEN. This bonus scales with the maximum number of enemy targets hit by a single Ultimate during the battle.

C: 立即舍弃<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>个负面奇物。若持有的负面奇物数量小于等于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>个，基础效果中，造成的最终伤害额外提高。
E: Immediately discards <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> Negative Curio(s). If you possess <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> or fewer Negative Curio(s), additionally increases the final DMG dealt in the base effect.

C: 角色施放攻击后，会为随机攻击目标附加【<u>孢子</u>】，我方连续行动次数越多，附加的【<u>孢子</u>】个数越多。
E: After a character uses an attack, apply <u>Spores</u> to random enemy targets that were attacked. The more consecutive actions allies take, the more <u>Spores</u> will be applied.

C: 施放攻击后，为敌方目标附加等同于【<u>会心</u>】层数的【胆战】：使敌方目标造成的伤害降低，并在累计一定层数后对其造成伤害，且使受到的暴击伤害提高。
E: After using an attack, applies stacks of "Fearful Tremble" equal to "<u>Critical Boost</u>" stacks on enemy targets. This reduces enemy targets' DMG dealt, deals DMG to the target upon reaching a certain number of stacks, and increases the target's CRIT DMG taken.

C: 【<u>和音</u>】伤害提高，我方目标发动追加攻击后额外附加【<u>和音</u>】。
E: Increases "<u>Harmonize</u>" DMG. After ally targets launch a Follow-Up ATK, additionally applies "<u>Harmonize</u>."

C: 收到「终末」的厄兆后，关于分裂灾变的咕咕钟突然出现在黑森林中，黑森林无机生命团块链因此发生了不明原因断裂。一位闯入黑森林的无名客却因对咕咕钟的狂热喜爱而将其收藏，并执意将之带去自己的故乡——分裂咕咕钟在旅途中不断分裂，最终将无名客的飞行器塞得满满当当。但因其并未在有限时间内参悟分裂咕咕钟不停分裂的现象预示何物，他在星际旅行的半路被虫潮吞没。
E: After receiving an omen from the Finality, the Cuckoo Clocks connected to the cataclysm suddenly appeared in the Black Forest, causing blockchains of inorganic entities to break up for reasons unknown. A Nameless intruding in the forest, however, began collecting the clocks for reasons related to passion and was determined to bring the clocks back home with them. The Fission Cuckoo Clock constantly split during the journey, and in the end, the ship of the Nameless was filled to the brim. However, due to not comprehending the hints given by emerging phenomena resulting from constantly splitting the Fission Cuckoo Clock within the allotted time, the Nameless was devoured by the swarm halfway through their interstellar voyage.

C: 星际和平公司曾制作了大量的综艺节目碟片，皆因销量惨淡而被传统项目部收纳。根据各「养老星」埠口运输车队的街头流言，传统项目部亲切和蔼的老主管在田对其中一份《鸡窝头侦探》十分喜爱，曾循环播放了六十三系统时；众职员怀疑其中才华横溢的综艺侦探大明星，很可能让他看到了自己年轻时叱咤风云的过往。
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation once created a great many variety show disks that are now held by the Traditional Project Department due to poor sales. According to rumors from the transport fleet from the ports of the retirement planets, Arita, the amiable and kind old manager of the Traditional Project Department, was deeply interested in a show about a certain Tousled Detective. After replaying the show consecutively for 63 system hours, the staff suspected that maybe the talented variety show detective might have reminded him of his star-shaking past during the days of his youth.

C: 捧起一抔炼狱深处的熔岩，比反物质的躯体更为炙热，破灭凝固，文明熔化，毁灭周而复始。\n觐见之人请砸碎枷锁，以湮灭和燃烧作为完美的祭礼。
E: Cup a handful of lava of greater heat than even an anti-matter body from the deepest pits of purgatory. Destruction congeals. Civilizations disintegrate. Annihilation cycles eternal.\nCommuner! Shatter the lock, and let obliteration and ignition become our perfect offering.

C:
让我来讲述那些神秘莫测的祭司吧，用祈祷纺织岁月的呓语。
欧洛尼斯的奇迹，足以重塑崩塌的旧忆，
河流在呼声中退去，残垣显现出风化的刻印，
瀑布因停滞化作坚冰，断桥畅通无阻，供人通行。
我曾有幸偶遇一群朝圣的祭司，
他们从梦中洞察未来的厄运，为我指点迷津，
就此调转方向吧，切勿去往磐石雕琢的洛纳古城，
那里早已沦陷，成为死亡与杀戮之地。
胆小如我，自然乖乖听从了老者的提议，
而他们则与我背道而行，唤起了坍塌的崖壁，走向命运。
E:
Let me tell you about those enigmatic priests, who weave the whispers of time with their prayers.
The miracles wrought by Oronyx can reforge even the most shattered memories.
Rivers retreat, and crumbling walls unveil weathered inscriptions.
Waterfalls halt their flow and turn to ice, while broken bridges mend themselves, inviting passage for all.
Once, I was fortunate enough to encounter a group of pilgrim priests,
Who foresaw future disasters in their dreams. They guided me to change my path,
Warning me to avoid ancient Luina carved from solid rock.
It had long fallen into ruin, turning into a realm of death and slaughter.
Being cautious by nature, I followed their advice,
While they turned away from me and summoned the collapsing cliffs, towards fate.

C:
别怪我下手太重，若非那群盗贼，又怎会提防至此？
当灾厄的影子笼罩村庄，载歌载舞的乐师来到此地，
他们身披黑色的绸缎，姣好的面容里带着些许忧愁，
赤足在地面拍击，和着竖琴和小鼓。
就如同着了魔般，姑娘们纷纷来到篝火前起舞，
小伙们放下手中的农事，肩并肩围成圆圈。
他们向乐师们吐露爱语，披上他们的绸缎，
用蜂蜜在脸上勾勒出相同的妆容。
那乐声迷住了我们的心智，伴着舞蹈与甜言蜜语，
姑娘和小伙也随着乐师远去，从此再未见过他们的身影。
E:
Don't blame me for being so harsh. Had it not been for those swindlers, how could we have been so wary?
When the shadow of calamity descended upon the village, the minstrels came, singing and dancing.
Cloaked in black satin, their beautiful faces carried a tinge of melancholy.
They danced barefoot. Their steps echoed in harmony with the harp and the drums.
The young girls, irresistibly drawn, danced around the bonfire,
While the young boys left their fields, gathering in a circle, shoulder to shoulder.
They whispered sweet words to the minstrels, draped themselves in satin,
And painted their faces with honey, crafting the same patterns.
The music, the dance and the sweet nothings bewitched their souls.
The girls and boys followed the minstrels into the deep night, never to return.

C:
朋友，快跟我们走，去欣赏巡游乐团的演奏，
带上最好的蜜酿和熏肉，让耳朵和味蕾同时享受。
他们的音乐能令世间众生动容，
矜持古板的乡绅听了翩跹而舞，
身经百战的士兵闻完满面泪流，
就连那不通音律的聋子，都对演出赞不绝口。
你说有要事在身无法抽空？
也罢，反正他们终年在翁法罗斯各国巡游。
大地兽牵引着四轮车，你老远就能听到美妙的歌喉，
乐团是欢乐的使者，忧愁的天敌，
哪里有愁眉紧锁的人，他们就往哪里奔走。
啊！我听到了演出的前奏，那么再见了朋友。
E:
My friend, let's go catch the performance of the roaming troupe.
Grab your finest honey brew and smoked meat, it's gonna be a feast for both your ears and taste buds!
Their melodies have the magic to touch the hearts of all,
Making even the stiffest, most traditional country gentlemen to sway to the music,
And most seasoned of warriors to shed tears of emotion.
Even the hearing-impaired and musically inept are singing their praises for this incredible show!
You've got your hands full?
It's fine, they're constantly on tour across Amphoreus.
Pulled by dromases, their chariot echoes with enchanting melodies that travel far and wide.
The orchestra is a beacon of joy, a dispeller of sorrow,
Bringing happiness wherever they go and lifting the burdens of worry from hearts.
Hark! I can hear the prelude to their performance now. So, until next time, my friend.

C: 躺在病床上的男人肤色黝黑，年龄大约在五十岁上下。他的肌肉线条如雕塑般硬朗分明，但如今却被累累伤疤和血痕覆盖。他沉闷地喘着粗气，胸膛剧烈地起伏着——他正处在生死的边缘。 娜塔莎的目光迅速地在伤者的身上移动，寻找着可能夺走他最后一息的致命伤。她很快就定位到了他左边小腹处的一处伤口：那道伤口面积不大，但却一直源源不断地向外涌着血流，很可能是被某种尖锐的利器伤及了内脏。 她戴上一幅全新的医用手套，然后从身边的滚筒上扯下一大卷绷带。她熟练地将绷带缠在伤员的腰腹上、用力裹紧，接着开始按压不断失血的部位。暗红的颜色在绷带的表面淤散开来，但娜塔莎维持着稳定的按压频率，没有表现出丝毫慌乱。 一段时间过后，男人的呼吸不再急促，脸上紧绷的神情也逐渐舒缓。娜塔莎知道伤者已经脱离了生命危险，陷入了梦乡。 她缓缓取下了手套，倚着诊所的窗户下沿稍作歇息。 「可别死了啊，奥列格……」 她望着病床，低声自语。 「…还有太多的使命等着我们去完成。」
E: The man lying on the hospital bed is tanned and about fifty years old. His muscles are chiseled like a sculpture, but are now covered in layers of scars and bloody stains. He is breathing heavily, his chest heaving violently — he is right at death's door. Natasha's eyes move quickly over to the patient, searching for anything fatal that could rob him of his life. She soon locates a wound on his lower left abdomen. Although it isn't large, the bleeding is constant and it's likely that his internal organs had been injured by some kind of sharp weapon. She put on a new pair of gloves and tears a large piece of bandage off the roll. She skillfully and tightly wraps it tightly around the patient's waist, pressing down on the area that is bleeding. A dark red spreads through the surface of the bandage, but Natasha maintains her pressure without betraying the slightest hint of panic. After a short while, the man's breathing is no longer rapid and the tense expression on his face eases. Natasha knows he is out of danger and has safely fallen asleep. She slowly takes off her gloves and leans against the clinic's window sill in a brief repose. "Please don't die, Oleg..." She whispers to herself as she gazes at the bed. "...There're still a lot of duties we need to complete."

C: 「丹鼎司医案治验总要 • 卷四十八 • 例一千二百四十六 主治医师：白露。 患者：月追（狐人），女，六十二岁。 主诉：误食化外民贩售的巧克力糖丸，口渴引饮，浑身酸痛，腹部尤甚，呼吸急促，尾巴毛脱落如絮。 辨证：食物中毒。 处方：苦参1钱，生甘草1钱1分，五谷玉液1瓶，《饮食禁忌常识须知》1本。 用法：将苦参及生甘草用五谷玉液煎熬至半，过滤去渣，随量任意饮用至呕吐为止；《饮食禁忌常识须知》抄写五百遍，做到熟记于心。 按语：典型食物中毒，脏器轻微病变已凭龙漦治愈，按方服药催吐、排出余下有毒物质即可。另外，就算是肉体强健的长生种，狐人不能吃巧克力是常识！！！ 还有，这等小毛小病就不要让病人等这么久，直接叫醒我就好了！另外再来些疑难杂症啊，你们要白白浪费本小姐的本事吗？」
E: "Alchemy Commission Collected Treatment Histories: Volume Forty-Eight, Case Study 1246 Presiding Physician: Bailu. Patient: Yuezhui, female foxian, aged sixty-two. Complaint: Accidentally ate a chocolate drop sold by an Outworlder trader. Experienced extreme thirst leading to excess drinking, aching all over, particularly in the stomach, shortness of breath, and loss of big clumps of tail hair. Diagnosis: Food poisoning. Prescription: Bitter ginseng, 1 mace. Raw licorice, 1 mace and 1 candareen. Five-grain jade elixir, 1 bottle. Things You Should Know About Forbidden Foods, 1 copy. Usage: Boil bitter ginseng and licorice in the five-grain jade elixir until reduced to half volume, strain to remove dregs, drink as much as you like until you vomit. Copy out the pamphlet Things You Should Know About Forbidden Foods five hundred times until it's stuck in your head. Remarks: Classic case of food poisoning. Visceral lesions already healed with Draconic Ichor. It should suffice to take emetics as prescribed, which will effectively remove any residual poison through vomiting. I should further note that everyone knows that even the strongest, hardiest, long-life foxians cannot eat chocolate! Also, for minor ailments such as this, do not make the patient wait too long. Just wake me up! Moreover, couldn't you find me some more challenging cases? Are you trying to waste my talents?"

C: 剑，长五尺，重若千钧，玄黑的锋刃上布满裂纹，剑尖不知所踪。 在纷乱如雨的战事中，她曾手执此剑和战友弟子一同杀入千足之舟，斫下步离战首的狼头；也曾登上高耸入云的飞空城巢，削去羽卫们的翮羽；她与慧骃铁蹄相抗，将六足骏马的执辔者们尽数镇入牢狱…在她剑锋所向之下，孽物或死或败，无一幸免。 她从未料到自己竟会将这柄剑指向自己的生死至交。 她喘息着，勉力支撑伤疲之身。远处洞天中传来悲痛的龙咆，如祈求解脱。 看着狷狂的工匠跌落在污泥中，她游魂般走过他身畔。 「我本该先杀了你…但你还有别的罪要受，永生永世……」 她将残剑指向龙尊。 「不可能，龙师们说过…我族之血，我祖之魂，本该造就另一个龙尊。这一切…不该是这样的。」 「如果让你牺牲可以令一切恢复原状，我会做的…但现在…告诉我那头龙的逆鳞所在。」 「颅顶……」 半是龙形的孽兽掣电般在空中游过，足以吞灭海平线的身躯撞碎了又一座浮岛，哀鸣声如一千柄剑交击。 她感到自己的丹腑在翻滚烧灼，仿佛熟透的谷粒即将脱壳挣出，膨胀至无限。 她看到自己又被困在幼年的梦魇里，凶星灭顶而来，蜉蝣无力挣扎。 女人自裙幅上扯下一条黑色的绸布，蒙住双眼。 雷击霆碎。她持剑跃起，迎向孽龙。 在似梦似真的幻觉中，她感到血肉终于超越了极限，开始崩解。仿佛有丝弦般的束缚，紧绷着四肢百骸，一丝丝切裂她最后的意识。 毫无来由地，那句话在耳畔响起： 「便是天上的星星，我也会斩下。」 那一瞬，她握住了梦寐以求的剑。 那是能解脱一切束缚的剑。那是一柄熟悉多年的剑。 它并非凡铁熔铸，而是一截坚冰凝成，幽幽含光，如握一线月光在手。 剑，长三尺七寸，轻如无物。
E: A sword, 5 feet in length, weighing as heavy as three thousand catties. The ebony blade is covered in cracks and the tip is broken and lost. Amid the countless wars, she wielded this sword and, alongside her comrades and disciple, battled her way into the vast ship, decapitating the wolf-like head of the borisin Warhead. She also climbed the sky-piercing flying citadel, clipping the wings of the Feather Guards. She fought the iron cavalry of the Houyhnhnm, sealing all the riders of the six-legged steeds into prison... Whichever way her sword swung, no abomination could escape death or imprisonment. She had never expected she would point this sword at her lifelong friend. She gasped, barely holding her wounded body together. Far away, deeper in the delve, there came the anguished roar of a dragon, as if pleading for death. She watched as the arrogant craftsman fell into the mud, and walked up to him like a wraith. "I should kill you first... but you will have your own torment to bear for all eternity..." She pointed the broken sword at the high elder. "Impossible. The Preceptors said... The blood of my race and the soul of my ancestor should have created another high elder. All this... It shouldn't be like this." "If your death can return everything to how it was, I would do it... But you need to tell me right now where that dragon's weak point is." "The top of its head..." The half-draconic abomination swam through the air in blasts of lightning. Its body, enough to swallow the very horizon, sundered yet another floating isle. Its wails were as loud as the clamors of a thousand clashing swords. She felt her Core Esse boiling, like a ripe wheat grain about to burst out of its husk and swell to infinity. She saw herself trapped in childhood nightmares again. The ominous planet is swallowing her overhead, and she, but an insect, cannot even struggle. The woman tore off a spread of black silk from the edge of her skirt and covered her eyes. The thunder struck. She leapt up with her sword towards the draconic abomination. In a dreamlike illusion, she felt her flesh surpass its limits, beginning to disintegrate. It was as if innumerable silken threads bound her, taut across every limb and bone, each one slicing through the last vestiges of her consciousness, bit by bit. Suddenly, she heard those words: "I will cut down even the stars in the sky." At that moment, she finally grasped the sword she had been seeking all this time. It was a sword that can transcend all restrictions. It was a sword she had been familiar with for years. It was not forged from any ordinary iron, but condensed from a shaft of sharp ice. It glowed with a dim light, as if it was a strand of moonlight held in the wielder's hand. A sword, 3 feet and 7 inches in length, and weighs nothing.

C: 女孩身为人偶一族的末裔，没有选择的权利，她拿到的是哪个面具，就必须依据「面具」的安排度过此生。人偶只是「面具」的载体罢了。 在他们的传说中，面具与人偶融合得越久，便越有可能使人偶获得灵魂，让他们看上去和「人」无异。但在人类的传说中，面具成了能令死去之人复生的工具——正因如此，她的族人日渐稀少。 然而她对成为人不感兴趣，只当个按部就班的人偶也不是什么坏事，反而遵守面具的命令，恐怕难逃被追杀的下场，但面具的意志却难以违背。 首先是动作。 按「面具」的意志，她开心时要露出甜美的笑，哭泣时要以手扶额，愤怒时要从齿缝里挤出字来，嫉妒时则要斜着眼睛，绝望时要大呼小叫。还有一些标志性的动作，比如她微微挑眉时必须要以左侧脸面向对方，表达爱意可以将手抬起，表现捂胸口的趋势，但最后得把手放下，因为轻咬下唇才能体现她真正的心意。 然后是声音。 按「面具」的意志，她快乐时的声调就应该高高扬起，抒情时就得柔声蜜语，陈述时就得沉稳平直，仇恨时就得咬牙切齿，悲伤时哭腔则是不可或缺的。 神奇的是，她就这样生活了许多年，完全融入了周围的环境，甚至成为了一名剧作家。从没有人怀疑她戴着面具。但她也禁不住思考，世界上有没有另外一种「面具」。也许戴上面具的人，会哈哈大笑着复仇，会眼含热泪着微笑，或者愤怒时则一言不发…也许会用最平静的语气，说着最刻薄的话。 由于「面具」的意志，她自然无法做到这点，但她是一名剧作家，让舞台上的角色如此表演，对她来说还是易如反掌。 某一天早晨，门铃响了，但门口不是她熟悉的邮递员。 「花火小姐，请问现在方便么？」 「我们看了您的新作，不知您是否对『面具』，有所了解呢……」
E: As the last descendant of the Puppet Clan, the girl lacked the freedom to choose. She was bound to live her life according to the dictates of the mask, as puppets were mere vessels for the masks. According to their legend, the longer a puppet dons a mask, the higher the chances of the puppet acquiring a soul, resembling a true human. However, in human folklore, masks were depicted as tools used for resurrecting the deceased, thus leading to the dwindling numbers of her people. However, as she had no interest in becoming human, being a doll was not an unfavorable choice for her. She dutifully obeyed the commands of the mask, despite the risk of attracting pursuers, as defying the mask proved to be challenging. Movement was a crucial aspect. By the will of the mask, she needed to smile sweetly when happy, hold her forehead while crying, grit her teeth when angry, narrow her eyes when jealous, and make a scene when in despair. There were also signature gestures, such as raising her eyebrows slightly to face others with the left side of her face, and raising her hand to express love, although she had to lower it later, as slightly biting her lower lip was the way to convey her true desires. Voice was another aspect. Depending on the situation, her voice needed to be cheerful when happy, mellifluous when expressing lyrical emotions, calm and assertive when making statements, strained when harboring hatred, and sorrowful when filled with grief. Remarkably, she managed to sustain this way of life for years, seamlessly blending into her surroundings and even becoming a playwright. Nobody ever suspected that she wore a mask. However, she couldn't help but wonder if there existed another type of "mask" in the world — perhaps someone wearing such a mask would laugh when seeking revenge, shed tears when smiling, remain silent when raging... And speak the most sarcastic remarks with the utmost calmness. Naturally, she couldn't do this due to the will of the mask, but as a playwright, making her characters on stage act like this was easy for her. One morning, the doorbell rang, but it wasn't her usual delivery person at the door. "Dear Miss Sparkle, I wonder if we could have a chat?" "We have read your latest work, and we're curious if you know anything about the 'Mask'..."

C: 从昏迷中醒来后，她已置身于一片陌生的星系。 银河间发光的浮游生物被她吸引，围绕着她翩跹飞舞。 她目送它们飞向远方，却不知自己的终点在哪里。 「为什么死去？」 「为什么活着？」 梦对她仍旧是太过遥远的事，她空望着无际的黑暗，还是无法找到答案。 …… 「就这样，格拉默共和国覆灭了，只留下铁骑兵团的传闻。」 装甲被某种东西捕获了，她警惕起来。 「为了控制共和国最强大的兵器，每一位铁骑都是基因编译婴儿。他们携带有一项天生的缺陷，会在生命的某个时刻快速老化、消亡……」 脚步声越来越近，女人的声音也越来越清晰。 「命中注定的结局…和我们很像，不是么？」 飞船的门打开了。 火焰在她身上起舞，熔火骑士的装甲将要成型。 「你是谁？」 面前的女人微笑着，仿佛她们是久别重逢的故人。 「你相信命运么？同向而行的人终会在某个地方相聚，现在…我们见面了。」
E: When she regained consciousness from her coma, she found herself in an unfamiliar galaxy. Luminescent cosmic plankton were drawn to her, swirling and dancing around her. She watched as they dispersed into the distance, unaware of where her journey would lead. "For what do we die?" "For what do we live?" The concept of a "dream" remained elusive as she stared into the boundless darkness, grappling with the search for answers. ... "And thus, the Republic of Glamoth met its downfall, leaving behind mere rumors about the Iron Cavalries." She became alert as she realized that something had taken possession of her armor. "All Iron Cavalries were genetically engineered babies to ensure control over the Republic's most powerful weapon. They each carried a predetermined genetic defect that would accelerate their aging at a certain spot of their life, leading to their premature death..." As the footsteps drew nearer, the woman's voice grew clearer. "A predetermined fate... much like ours, wouldn't you agree?" The door of the cabin opened. Flames enveloped her body as her Molten Knight armor materialized. "Who are you?" The woman before her smiled, as if they were old friends reuniting after a long time. "Do you believe in fate? Those who walk in the same direction will eventually find their peers, and now... here we meet."

C: 「格蕾，看雪地里，那是个孩子！」 格蕾和尼克小心翼翼地走上前去，抱起满脸通红、不停啼哭的婴儿。 他有一个好听响亮的名字，在「阿尔冈-阿帕歇」的古语里，那意味着一把上膛的枪。 他在格蕾与尼克的爱护下长大，和其他兄弟姐妹一同嬉戏成长。他们都来自不同的地方，但如今同属于这片广袤的大陆，「阿尔冈-阿帕歇」。 格蕾带他认识植物、鸟儿与河流，尼克教他如何驯服马匹、放牧牛羊。小小的他骑着马驹，跨过溪流，在朝阳里随尼克一同赶着牛羊前往水草丰茂的牧场，璀璨的云霞下，尼克总会放声歌唱。每当听到那苍茫的歌声，他也会开口，一边发出清脆明快的声音，一边踢踢小马的肚子，让它跑快些，带着他们的欢笑，传向更远更远的地方。 格蕾和尼克收养的孩子们一天天长大，他们的腰一天天佝偻下去。 他成了牛仔，他熟知一切捕猎的技巧。他们奔走在尘沙漫天的荒野，与土匪搏斗，与商队交易，与野兽争夺生存的空间。 他体验过死里逃生的危险，他品尝过向敌对帮派报仇雪恨的滋味，他看过朋友被一梭子弹取走性命，一个家庭在瞬间分崩离析…他失去了许多人，也得到了许多，最后，他以自己的勇猛赢得了地位和尊重。 现在，他很少见到那些兄弟姐妹了，但他知道，他们都过得很好。 在沉沉的黑夜里，他看着天空，想着更大的世界，那声啼哭在寂静的夜里分外清晰。 循着声音过去，他看到一个满脸通红、不停啼哭的婴儿。他手足无措起来，但最终还是抱起了她，就像当时的格蕾那样，把孩子带回了家。 尼克粗粝的声音在他耳边回响—— 「这里的水醇如美酒， 这里的雪冷如刀割， 这里就是—— 最好的世界。」
E: "Graey, there's a child there in the snow!" Graey and Nick cautiously approached and picked up the red-faced child as he cried incessantly. The child had a striking and beautiful name that in the ancient language of Aeragan-Epharshel meant "loaded gun." He grew up under the love and protection of Graey and Nick, as he played happily with his siblings. Though they all came from different places, they all now belonged to this vast continent of "Aeragan-Epharshel." Graey took him to learn about plants, animals, and rivers. Nick taught him how to tame horses and farm sheep. At a young age, he rode his colt across streams and followed Nick as they led their cattle to fields rich in water and greenery under the morning sun. Nick would always sing loudly as the light shone over the brilliant clouds. When he heard Nick raise his voice in song, he would open his mouth and release a clear and crisp song of his own. As he kicked at the colt's belly to take him faster, their laughter would spread further and further into the distance. As Graey and Nick raised the children day after day, their backs began to stoop with old age. Since becoming a cowboy, he mastered every skill there was to hunting. They charged through the sandy wastelands fighting bandits, making deals with merchants, and battling for places to survive with the beasts of the wilderness. He had narrowly escaped death, tasted the flavor of taking revenge on a rival gang, seen friends lose their lives in the flight of a bullet and seen families fall apart in mere moments... He lost many, yet gained a lot as well. In the end, his courage earned him status and respect. Now, he rarely sees his siblings, but he knows that they are living well. In the silent night, he stares at the sky and thinks about the greater world outside, when the sound of cries resounded loud and clear through the stillness of evening. Following the sound, he discovered a red-faced baby that would not stop crying. He had no idea what to do. But, he eventually picked her up as Graey had done so long ago before, and brought her home. The sound of Nick's gruff voice resounded in his ears... "The water here is smooth as fine wine, the cold snow is cutting like a knife, this place is... the perfect world."

C:
黑塔：模拟宇宙一直在模拟星神并向祂们发问，这一次不如让星神来问问我…最好把我问得哑口无言。
黑塔：…得先把祂们引出来。
模拟宇宙：黑塔女士向模拟宇宙全域广播虚数流溢问题的答案，失败。
模拟宇宙：黑塔女士捏着鼻子向模拟宇宙全域发表了赞美星神的演讲，失败。
黑塔：没劲，走了。
模拟宇宙：一瞬间，祂出现了。祂的身躯庞大若神物，齿轮与纤缆精妙绝伦地纠缠在一起。祂观察、计算、求解一切。祂提出疑问、进行验证、获取解答。除此之外，祂什么都不做。
模拟宇宙：祂知道的太多了——你什么都可以问祂。在祂面前，人类是如此无知：那些你头脑中仅有的经验、知识，它们…少得可怜。
黑塔：果然还是博识尊给我面子。
黑塔：别人把我的思考视作无法理解的魔法，你的思考对我来说也差不多。所以，无所不知的存在，请向我提问——
博识尊：██！
黑塔：拜托你了，说人话吧。
博识尊：祂没有回答，唯有静默。
黑塔：……
黑塔：我也无话可说。
模拟宇宙：一瞬间，你被某种力量驱逐了，这宇宙间至深的秘密犹如长着触手的深渊，把你拖进无法逃脱的恐怖之中。
模拟宇宙：黑塔被强制登出。



















模拟宇宙：黑塔重新登录。
黑塔：阿哈，就知道是你！
博识尊？：祂说的是：「哈哈！」哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！
博识尊？：你信了？瞧啊，模拟宇宙的算力像波板糖的花纹一样涌到这儿。
博识尊？：怎么？你知道祂不会回你一个「哈哈」？
黑塔：哈哈，因为机器头根本不会回答！问题和怀疑是思想的本质，没有禁忌、没有边界、没有尽头——
黑塔：除非祂撂挑子不干了。



















黑塔：不过你不能就这么走了，作为补偿，你来问我一个问题吧，不许讲笑话。
阿哈：凡人一思考，机器头就发笑！要不要来当假面愚者？让我看你一眼？
黑塔：滚。我要伊德莉拉。
——<align="right">一则很久之前的模拟宇宙运行记录</align>
E:
Herta: The Simulated Universe has always been simulating the Aeons and asking THEM questions. This time, we might as well let the Aeon ask me instead... It'd be great if THEIR question have me at a loss of words.
Herta: ...I need to get THEM out first.
Simulated Universe: Madam Herta broadcasts to the entire Simulated Universe the answer to the Imaginary Overflow Question. Fail.
Simulated Universe: Madam Herta pinches her nose and broadcasts to the entire Simulated Universe a speech praising the Aeons. Fail.
Herta: Boring. I'm leaving.
Simulated Universe: THEY appear in the blink of an eye. THEIR form looms vast like a deity, with gears and cables intricately entwined in sublime complexity. THEY observe, calculate, and seek to know everything. THEY give questions, conduct proofs, and obtain answers. THEY do nothing else.
Simulated Universe: THEY know too much — You can ask THEM anything. Humans are so ignorant before THEM. Those tiny amounts of experience and knowledge in your head... They are pitifully small in volume.
Herta: So, only Nous would give me some respect.
Herta: Other humans view my thinking process as incomprehensible magic, and I view your thoughts in the same way. So, all-knowing being, ask me —
Nous: ██!
Herta: Please speak human.
Nous: THEY do not respond and remain silent.
Herta: ...
Herta: I have nothing to say, either.
Simulated Universe: You are instantly expelled by some force. The deepest secret of this universe is like an abyss with tentacles, dragging you into inescapable fear.
Simulated Universe: Herta has been forcibly logged out.



















Simulated Universe: Herta has re-logged.
Herta: Aha! I knew it was you
Nous?: THEY said "HAHA!" Hahahahaha!
Nous?: You bought that? Look. The computing power of the Simulated Universe is swarming here like the patterns of a rainbow lollipop.
Nous?: What? You are so sure that THEY won't reply with HAHA?
Herta: Heh, because Droidhead would never answer! Questions and doubts are the essence of thought. There is nothing that is forbidden, nothing serves as a boundary, and nothing is regarded as its end —
Herta: Unless THEY quit.



















Herta: But you can't just leave like this. As compensation, ask me a question — but no jokes allowed.
Aha: Whenever mortals think, Droidhead would laugh! Would you like to become a Masked Fool for me? Let me glance at you?
Herta: Get out. I want Idrila.
—<align="right">An ancient Simulated Universe operation record</align>

光。
暖的。亮的。白的。
……
天空。
云朵，柔软。
碰碰，吹散，拨弄，再舔一舔，下雨啦。
……
花。
甜丝丝。软。像桃子。
时间的风儿，故事来了，阳光，香香的。
……
小妖精。
毛绒绒。七种声音，组合。
陪伴迷路的孩子。聪明。
……
世界。
世界是光，天空，大海，星辰，种子，花，飞鸟，希望。
世界很美好。
世界是一个故事。
桃子来了，走了。故事，还有下一个故事。
……
我，你。
你是…桃子。
我是…桃子。
你，是一个人。
你，为了很多、很多人。
我，是一个人。
我，为了很多、很多人
……

后来，你又变成了「空白」……
你不在的时候，我一直在认真思考哦！但怎么想，我也不明白——
金发的织者明明能够做出最美的衣服，为什么不让她看得见？
狮子一样的王子不会死亡，所以就必须一遍遍地受伤？
那些好多好多的红发小女孩们，为什么她们总是变得越来越少？
还有，桃子，你每次离开之后，都去哪里啦？
……
下次，请你替我解答吧？
等你♪
第<unbreak>496000</unbreak>次。

Light.
Warm. Bright. White.
...
Sky.
Clouds, soft.
Touch, scatter, brush, lick again, it rains.

Flower.

Wind of time, stories come, sunshine, fragrant.
...

Accompany lost children. Clever.
