You, me.
You are... a peach.
I am... a peach.
You are a person.
You, for many, many people.
I am a person.
I, for many, many people.
...

Later, you became "Blank" again...
I was thinking hard about everything while you were gone! But no matter how much I think, I can't understand—
The golden-haired weaver can make the most beautiful clothes, but why won't the author make her see?
The leonine prince cannot die, but why must he get wounded over and over again?
All those many, many little red-haired girls, why do they keep getting fewer and fewer?
And Peach, where do you go every time you leave?
...
Next time, will you answer these questions for me?
Waiting for you ♪
For the <unbreak>496</unbreak>,<unbreak>000</unbreak>th time.
<align="right">— The Demiurge's Record</align>

C: 任务的最后，女人向「星核」缓缓伸出了手。\n她很清楚这个故事的主角并不是自己。\n那么，准备已经就绪。是时候醒过来了，即将踏上旅途的你。
E: In the end, the woman slowly reaches out her hand toward the Stellaron.\nShe is well aware she is not the protagonist of this story.\nWell then, the preparations have been made. It's time to wake up and set off on your journey.

C: 看来，只有乘坐电梯才能前往空间站的主控舱段——看着还挺近的。
E: It would seem that the only way to the space station's master control zone is through the elevator — it doesn't seem to be too far.

C: 经过一整天的游览，你们已经完全了解了这里的文化，距离成为贝洛伯格的公民恐怕只差去政务部摇个号了。\n终于到了睡觉时间，你感到自己无法抑制与宾馆的柔软床榻深情相拥的欲望。\n早些休息，保存精力吧，这是你应得的——列车要熄灯了！
E: After an entire day of sightseeing, you've got a complete understanding of the local culture and are just an appointment at Belobog's Administrative Department away from becoming its actual citizens.\nIt's finally time for sleep and you feel an uncontrollable urge to snuggle with the soft and fluffy hotel bed.\nGet some sleep and rest well, you deserve it — Express lights off!

C: 开拓之旅的第一晚，你睡得不似列车上那样安心。\n这倒不是因为你对列车单间有什么深厚感情，而是你总能在半梦半醒中听到军靴踢踏的声音。\n现在又一阵急促的敲门声传来——直觉告诉你似乎大事不妙…出门查看状况吧。
E: On the first night of the trailblazing expedition, you don't sleep as soundly and at ease as you did on the Express.\nIt's not because you have some kind of close bond with the Express but because you keep hearing the sound of troops moving around as you sleep.\nAnd now, you can hear frantic door-knocking — your instincts tell you that something's not right... Go and investigate.

C: 名叫娜塔莎的医生为你一五一十地讲解了事件经过，你至少由此确定了两件事：\n第一，丹恒被桑博拐走了；第二，三月七抛弃了你，自己出门逛大街去了。至于那位的布洛妮娅…现在的你暂时不是很在乎敌人的处境。\n不论如何，你还是决定先找到两位同伴，然后就他们为何要抛下你一事同两人进行深入交流。
E: The doctor named Natasha explained the entire incident to you. You now know two things:\nOne, Dan Heng has been grabbed by Sampo. And two, March 7th abandoned you to go shopping. As for Bronya... Well, you're not too concerned about the well-being of your enemies right now.\nWhatever the case, you decide to find your two companions first and have a deep conversation about why they left you behind.

C: 你不得不佩服桑博的油嘴滑舌。要不是丹恒不吃这一套，你们三人恐怕又要吃哑巴亏了。\n在丹恒的威逼下，桑博终于提出要将你们引荐给「地火」。\n你不清楚「地火」具体是怎样的组织，但听多了这地下的街谈巷议后，你凭本能觉得他们极有可能了解指向星核的线索…
E: You have to give credit to Sampo — no one can be quite the con man as he is. If it weren't for Dan Heng, the three of you would fall for Sampo's silver tongue again.\nSampo finally agrees to introduce all of you to Wildfire, thanks to Dan Heng's... persuasion.\nYou have no clue what Wildfire is up to, but judging from word on the street, you have a feeling that Wildfire may have leads on the Stellaron...

C:
你们修好了报废矿车，并将它从道路上移走，打通了继续向下的道路。
此处已近矿洞底部，你注意到希儿神色警惕，眼神也变得如尖刀般锐利…
她的眼神本来就吓人，是什么能让她露出比以往更甚的表情？你不知道，但你十分清楚一件事——
危险正在迫近，你应当做好万全准备。
E:
You fix the out of order mine cart and move it out of the way, opening the path continuing downward.
This is near the bottom of the mines and you notice Seele's cautious expression and sharp gaze...
Her expression is normally scary enough already, so what is it that would make her show an even more serious look? You're not sure, but there is one thing that you are certain of...
Danger is closing in and you should make yourself prepared.

C: 根据娜塔莎的说法，在已经废弃的「铆钉镇」或许还有剩余的医疗物资，而你们和希儿的任务就是把那些物资抢救回来，榨干它们的最后一点价值…呃，不对，是让它们在诊所里发光发热。\n希儿认为娜塔莎想要的物资很可能被堆放在了小镇的集市广场上，不妨先去那里看看。
E: According to Natasha, there may still be remaining medical supplies in the abandoned Rivet Town. The mission for you and Seele is to retrieve the supplies and deplete them of their final value... Erm, to let them shine and be useful in the clinic.\nSeele believes that the supplies Natasha is after are likely to be stocked up in the town's market square. Why don't you head over there and take a look?

C:
在和同伴充分交换意见之后，你们很快得出结论：当下最要紧之事务应是回到旅店房间好好睡一觉，回头再去请教「地火」的想法。
这听起来确实是有点扯，但你如何能拒绝长途跋涉和艰苦战斗之后的柔软床垫呢？
之前的你还对眼前的铺位有所嫌弃，可它现在简直是全世界最舒适的地方，没有之一。
晚安，也愿你不再从噩梦中惊醒。
E:
Having had a thorough discussion, you quickly conclude that the priority is to return to the hotel and get a good night's sleep. You will ask what Wildfire makes of this later.
It may sound outlandish, but how can one say no to a soft mattress after a long journey and harsh battle?
You toss all the complaints about your bed behind, thinking it must be the nicest thing this world has to offer.
Nighty-night. May you no longer be troubled by nightmares.

C: 克服千难万险之后，你们终于来到了寒潮肆虐的极北之地，百年来除大守护者外无人能够踏足的古代战场。\n可可利亚与布洛妮娅就在这里的某处…你们要做的就是深入禁域，找到她们。\n那灾难的源头「星核」也在前方——做好决一死战的准备吧。
E: After overcoming numerous difficulties and dangers, you have finally come to the Far North, where the Eternal Freeze is raging. For hundreds of years, no one except the Supreme Guardian could set foot upon this ancient battlefield.\nCocolia and Bronya are here somewhere... Your mission is to go deep into the forbidden zone and find them.\nStellaron, the source of disaster, also lies ahead. Get ready for a fight to the death!

C: 在与幻胧的那场大战结束后，符玄唤来星槎，将你们送回长乐天。\n但关于建木升起，以及此次仙舟之行的来去始末，你们仍觉得自己身处迷局之中。为此你们来到神策府探问情况。
E: After the end of the grand battle against Phantylia, Fu Xuan called for starskiffs and sent everyone back to Exalting Sanctum.\nHowever, all of you still struggle to see the full picture behind the rise of the Ambrosial Arbor and the details concerning your time spent on the Xianzhou. Therefore, you all head to the Seat of Divine Foresight to ask for answers.

C: 黄泉领你来到了一扇门前。这就是梦境的出口吗？
E: Acheron leads you to a door. Is this the dreamscape exit?

C: 流萤看起来似乎很愧疚。她希望带你再去一个地方——不是什么旅游景点，而是只属于她的「秘密据点」——她将在那里道出所有秘密。\n没走出多久，你就被一只会说话的钟表拦住了去路。他拜托你帮他解救米沙，酒店的门童。也许你应该去看看？
E: Firefly has an extremely guilty look on her. She wants to take you to another place — not a tourist spot, but her very own "secret stronghold." Once there, she will explain all the secrets to you.\nAs you go to follow her, you are stopped in your path by a talking clock. He begs you to help rescue Misha, the hotel bellboy. Perhaps you should go and take a look?

C: 黑天鹅带领你在忆域中前进。安全起见，或许你可以考虑唤醒三月七与你同行。
E: Black Swan leads you forward in the Memory Zone. For safety's sake, maybe you should consider waking up March 7th to travel with you.

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n跟随黑天鹅前往忆域的出口，同时调查这场凶杀案吧。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nFollow Black Swan to the Memory Zone's exit while investigating the murder scene.

C: 你们接受了星期日的决斗邀请，顺利抵达匹诺康尼大剧院，并将在此地决断匹诺康尼和宇宙的命运。然而，偌大的剧院如今空无一人，只余你们的脚步、呼吸和心跳在幽深的长廊中回荡。\n那位橡木家主究竟在打什么算盘？你们必须小心再小心，以免落入叛逆者的圈套。
E: You accepted Sunday's invitation to a duel and arrived safely at the Penacony Grand Theater, where the destiny of Penacony and the universe itself will be decided. However, you cannot see a single soul inside the vast theater. Only the sounds of your footsteps, breathing, and heartbeats echo through its long corridors.\nJust what is the Oak Family Head scheming? You must take absolute caution not to fall into this traitor's trap.

C:
……

管家：「欢迎来到这幢伟大的宅邸，外来的客人们。」
管家：「但很遗憾，我们的主人暂时不在。现在能招待三位的，只有我们几位仆人了。」

会计：「主人离开已久，这宅邸究竟该由何人掌管？」
参谋：「自然应属那至忠诚、至卑微，却至尊贵的仆人。」

……
E:
...

Butler: "Welcome to this great mansion, guests from afar."
Butler: "However, I regret to inform you that our master is not here at present. We three servants are the only people who can receive you currently."

Accountant: "The master has been gone for quite some time. Who is to take control of this great mansion?"
Advisor: "Naturally that must be the master's most loyal and humble, yet noble servant."

...

C: 考试结束，课程还未开始，现在是最令人欣喜的学院游览时间。一般来说，一段浪漫的邂逅、一场奇妙的冒险、一次世界毁灭的过程都是从学生在学校闲逛开始的。\n在校庆的创意集市逛逛吧，不保证有趣，但一定比上课轻松。
E: The test has concluded, and classes have yet to start. Now is the ideal time to explore the academy. Typically, a romantic encounter, a thrilling adventure, or the prelude to world destruction often begins with a leisurely stroll through the campus.\nEnjoy yourself in the anniversary's Creator's Market. While excitement is not guaranteed, it promises a more relaxed atmosphere than the classroom.

C: 叆叇馆主成为了新的宗师…然而她并不像苦茶大师所说的那样恪守忍理，你不明白她的行为，或许…这便是最严酷的试炼吧。\nAK-A-3，你知道这是什么情况，你也知道自己能捏死飞蝇一样捏死眼前的愚人…但你还要继续忍者的游戏，对吗？
E: Umbra Headmistress has assumed the mantle of new grandmaster... However, she doesn't follow the ninja tenets like Master Kucha. Her actions elude your comprehension... Perhaps this serves as the most rigorous trial.\nAK-A-3, you know what is happening here. You know you can easily crush those fools before you like insects... Yet you opt to continue your ninja game, right?

C: 可惜，从瓦尔特面前脱身已然无望，和他一同去见见列车上的同伴，争取自由行动的时间。
E: Unfortunately, there is no way to escape from Welt. Go with him to meet his Express companions and find a way to get some time to yourself.

C: 击败尼卡多利的一具分身后，黄金裔领袖阿格莱雅带我们来到云石天宫，用别样的方式为我们讲述了翁法罗斯的历史。
E: After defeating a manifestation of Nikador, Aglaea, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs, guided us to Marmoreal Palace. There, she revealed the history of Amphoreus to us in a new and enlightening way.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 借黄金狮首之口，{NICKNAME}一行人得知疯溃的尼卡多利正在酝酿针对奥赫玛的恐怖袭击。事已至此，唯有继续前进，挫败恶意的源头。
E: Through Chryseus Leo, {NICKNAME} and the party learned that the maddened Nikador is planning a devastating attack on Okhema. With events taking this dire turn, their only option is to press forward and eliminate the source of this malevolence.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: {NICKNAME}成功打开悬锋城的往世之门，来到过去的悬锋城。彼时正值悬锋祭典，尼卡多利的失神刚刚开始，悬锋城仍然喧嚣繁荣。
E: {NICKNAME} unlocked the door to the past in Castrum Kremnos, stepping into the city's former days. It was the time of the Kremnos Festival, and Nikador had just begun to lose their mind. Castrum Kremnos was still prosperous and vibrant with life.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: *我们*感知到，缇安又使用神力了，*我们*很担心她的情况…阿雅感觉到*我们*的忧虑，答应一起去趟浴场散心。
E: We sense that Trianne used her divine power again. We're worried about her... Agy noticed our concern and agreed to go to the baths together to unwind.

C: 结束了堪称荒唐的比赛，白厄与万敌一同稍事休息。两位战士聊起火种试炼，吐露出彼此不为人知的往事……
E: Following a ridiculous contest, Phainon and Mydei stop to rest. The two warriors discuss the Coreflame trial, revealing untold stories from their pasts...

C: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
E: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

C: 你前去断崖寻找那刻夏，那位专注灵魂研究的贤人存在着拯救{NICKNAME}的可能性，显然那刻夏对你的到来早有准备。\n「那诸位已陨的英雄，正是泰坦们成神前的模样」，那些陌生的记忆也许是找到塞纳托斯的线索。
E: You head to Titan Cliff in search of Anaxa. The Sage, expert in soul studies, might be able to save {NICKNAME}. And it seems Anaxa has been expecting your arrival.\n"Those fallen heroes are the mortal incarnations of the Titans before their ascensions to godhood." — these strange memories may point the way to Thanatos.

C: 你前去断崖寻找那刻夏，那位专注灵魂研究的贤人存在着拯救{NICKNAME}的可能性，显然那刻夏对你的到来早有准备。\n「那诸位已陨的英雄，正是泰坦们成神前的模样」，那些陌生的记忆也许是找到塞纳托斯的线索。
E: You head to Titan Cliff in search of Anaxa. The Sage, expert in soul studies, might be able to save {NICKNAME}. And it seems Anaxa has been expecting your arrival.\n"Those fallen heroes are the mortal incarnations of the Titans before their ascensions to godhood." — these strange memories may point the way to Thanatos.

C: 探索中，我们无意间瞥见了天空之民的往昔，带着肃杀氛围，似乎难以用和平来形容。一位奇兽在我们面前现身，它与那位英雄塞涅俄丝关系匪浅，我们决定跟上它的振翅，一同前行。
E: During our exploration, we caught glimpses of the Skyfolk's past, filled with a solemn atmosphere that could hardly be described as peaceful. Then, a mythical beast appeared before us, one deeply connected to the hero Seliose. We decided to follow its fluttering wings and continue forward together.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 击败塞涅俄丝的同时，风堇与迷迷不约而同地感应到奥赫玛发生的异变，留给我们思考的时间不多了。
E: At the moment of Seliose's defeat, both Hyacine and Mem sensed a strange happening in Okhema at the same time. Our window of consideration is narrowing by the second.

C: 看着眼前的圣杯，一段记忆正缓缓涌上心头。最近这么健忘，要不改天找个忆者朋友看看脑子好了——算了，那群家伙也挺不靠谱的。
E: As you stare into the Holy Grail, memories start to bubble up. You've been so forgetful lately. Maybe it's time to ask one of those Memokeepers to check your head? Eh, then again, most of them are pretty flaky anyway.

C: 实现的预言，和未能实现的愿望。
E: Prophecies fulfilled and wishes left behind.

C: 我不是烂片导演！我是匹诺康尼史上最伟大艺术家！听懂了吗？艺术家！
E: I'm not some third-grade director! I'm the greatest artist in Penacony's cinematic history! Got it? Artist!

C: 一场多么美的宴会，君王举起杯中的野心，令臣子与万民酣醉。但若细品蜜酿回味，甜中又夹杂了几分咸腥和苦涩，醉中难免伴着晕眩与痛楚——但在灵魂飞往高空的狂欢中，无人需要俯瞰大地。\n除非你飞到了最高、最高的地方，那里的寒风会让你清醒。\n继而咸腥、苦涩、晕眩、痛楚会如瀑布天降，抱着你下坠。
E: What a spectacle this banquet of power is, where the ruler's ambitious toast leaves everyone intoxicated with possibility. Beneath the sweet honey brew, though, salt and bitterness linger on the tongue.\nThe higher the revelry soars, the less anyone notices the world below. That's the trick of it all.\nOnly those who reach the absolute summit feel the sobering winds of truth. Then comes the inevitable fall. Salt, bitterness, vertigo, pain... all rushing up to embrace you as gravity collects its debt.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 天外之界的来客背负起世界的命运，用「开拓」为翁法罗斯写下新的起点。哀丽秘榭之外，是所有人愿望中的崭新纪元。\n而今你已抵达黎明，准备好迎接世人的召唤了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: A visitor from beyond the sky shoulders the world's destiny, writing a new beginning for Amphoreus through "Trailblaze." Beyond the Aedes Elysiae lies a new era that everyone wishes for.\nNow that you have arrived at the Dawn, {NICKNAME}, are you ready to answer the world's summon?

C: 在权杖身心合一的瞬间，藉由浮黎的瞥视，昔涟得以暂时保存受难者的记忆。在这刹那的永恒中，我必须不断奔跑，直至找到昔涟。
E: At the moment when the Scepter united its body and soul, Cyrene managed to temporarily preserve the memories of the victims thanks to Fuli's glimpse. In this eternal instant, I must keep running until I find Cyrene.

C: 据遐蝶和赛飞儿所说，黄金裔们在大战结束后便出现在星穹列车之中。或许，这就是史诗落幕前，最后的一次告别机会了。多和伙伴们聊聊天吧，这大概是他们此生唯一一次登上星穹列车的机会了。
E: According to Castorice and Cipher, the Chrysos Heirs appeared on the Astral Express after the great battle. Perhaps this is the last chance to say goodbye before the epic tale comes to an end. Take some time to chat with your companions, for this might be their only opportunity to ever board the Astral Express.

C: 前往监控室调取幕后黑手的影像， 一旦锁定目标，你将第一时间前去质问他的动机。
E: Go to the Monitoring Room and pull up videos of the hand behind it all. You will go and question his motives once a target is confirmed.

C: 从基座舱段到月台，空间站的复兴工作正在有条不紊地推进中。\n有几个科员似乎遇到了一些问题，去问问看究竟发生了什么吧。
E: Renovations aboard the space station are proceeding everywhere at a measured pace, be it in the base zone or on the railway platform.\nSeveral researchers seem to have encountered some issues. Go and find out what happened.

C: 击败被识别程序标记的怪物，收集信标数据。
E: Defeat enemies marked by the recognition system and collect beacon data.

C: 终端机上有着空间站所有人的数据记录，今天，你决定来查询克里斯的数据记录。
E: The terminal stores the data records of everyone in the space station. You decide to check Chris' record today.

C: 阮•梅的「生命造物」竟然是一群拥有了生命的糕点！它们甚至发展出了自己的「情绪」、「思考」及「意志」…\n现在你得想办法回收它们了。
E: Ruan Mei's "life creations" are actually pastries with a life of their own! They have even developed their own "emotions," "thoughts," and "will"...\nNow you have to find a way to recover them.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n看来就我们俩了，有点扫兴。不能让三月感觉出来。准备好了就出发。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nLooks like it's just us. Bummer. Can't let March know, get ready and get gone.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n还是平票。压力来到布洛妮娅这边了。回去给她汇报吧。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nStill a split vote. The pressure is now on Bronya. Should go back and report to her.

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了眼前的「矿车难题」——三下五除二地解决掉吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the Mine Cart Puzzle in front of you. Solve it promptly.

C: 你凭自己的聪明才智，很快便解决了矿车工老师傅布置的矿车难题。\n去问问他有何奖励吧——这种环节通常都会有奖励，不是吗？
E: With your ingenuity, you quickly solve the mine cart puzzle set up by the senior mine cart operator.\nGo ask him about the reward — there is usually a reward for this kind of task, isn't there?

C: 克拉拉发短信称营地里又出了怪事。这会和帕斯卡有关吗？
E: Clara sent a message claiming another weird occurrence happened in the camp. Would this have anything to do with Pascal?

C: 卢卡将他的「修炼计划」告知了你和希儿，并且希望你们能够全程陪同，见证他的成长。\n试炼的第二个目标简单粗暴——把渗透到机械聚落的裂界怪物清理干净。\n显然，在这个方面，没人比你更专业了——动手吧！
E: Luka tells you and Seele about his "trial plans" and wants you to accompany him the whole way to witness his improvement.\nThe second goal of the trial is simple and brutal... clear out all the Fragmentum monsters that have entered the Robot Settlement.\nObviously no one is more of an expert at this than you. Let's go!

C: 你终于获得了药王秘传的信任，得以见到他们在长乐天的负责人。你知道，这会是一次危险的会面。但自从走上了卧底的道路，你就已经别无选择了。
E: Finally earning the trust of Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, you are escorted to see the person in charge in their Exalting Sanctum chapter. You know that this will be a dangerous rendezvous. The moment you walk the path of a double agent, you have no other choice.

C: 那位「天才丹士长」竟然是药王秘传的「魁首」。该怎么说呢…她真是在每个领域都做到了顶尖水平。\n你没能抓住她，但这不是你的错。去通知青镞吧，接下来的事情都交给神策府就好…希望如此。
E: The Genius Chief Alchemist is a master primus in the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. What to say about her... she's at the top of everything she attempts to do.\nYou couldn't catch her, but this isn't your fault. Go and inform Qingzu, the Seat of Divine Foresight should be able to take care of the rest... hopefully.

C: 没想到陶德的「长生」竟出了意外，他现在竟然变成了一个可爱的小孩，难怪十王司的人找不到他。在陶德的要求下，你决定跟着陶德一起逛逛。
E: Something unexpected happened to Todd's "long life." He has now turned into a cute little child. No wonder the people from the Ten-Lords Commission couldn't find him. At Todd's request, you decide to go for a walk with him.

C: 一位是痴情医护，一位是寻药病患，若说没奇缘，今生偏又遇着他。总之再去下一处地点相会吧。\n这附近药王秘传的人也越来越多了，可得小心。
E: One is an obsessed nurse, and the other a patient seeking medicine. She bumped into him too many times to say that it isn't destiny. Meet up with him at the next location.\nThere are more and more Disciples of Sanctus Medicus around, be careful.

C: 根据名侦探三月七的推理，这种等级的门锁根本就拦不住罗刹。不过一想到罗刹这样一位风度翩翩的绅士，竟然蹲在黑暗的小角落溜门撬锁，还是有点令人忍俊不禁。噗。
E: According to Genius Detective March 7th's deduction, a door lock like this could not stop Luocha, but visualizing a gentlemanly Luocha picking the lock while squatting in a dark corner like this is pretty humorous. Heh.

C: 我才斩杀了一个孽物，镜流便已不见踪影了。速度也太快了吧？真是看走眼了。可我堂堂将军侍卫，岂能落于人后？看我追上她！
E: I have just killed an abomination, but Ms. Jingliu has already disappeared. That was quick! I didn't see it coming. As the general's retainer, how could I lose to her? I need to hurry.

C: 星槎的培育分为几个阶段，铖杰师傅想要见证的是，星槎从一枚种子长成一艘大船的过程。\n你也来过几次迴星港，说不定你从未注意过，星槎竟然是从培养舱里长出来的。
E: The cultivation of a starskiff is divided into several phases. Chengjie wanted to see the process between a starskiff seed and a fully cultivated vessel.\nYou have been to Stargazer Navalia a few times, but you probably haven't noticed that starskiffs are grown in an incubator.

C:
三月七离终点（或云起点）更近了一步，也总算是见到了那位一路上布设阻碍的幕后黑手——「信使」。
「信使」似乎将她和符玄困进了一处循环的记忆之中。那时三月七还是个漂流在宇宙中的无名女孩，直到星穹列车将她救起，使她第一次拥有了自己的「家人」。
如果这不是「信使」的诡计，那三月七还真愿意在这里多待一会儿——几乎人人都眷恋自己的家，并暗自希望自己与家人平凡的日常可以向着过去与未来无限延伸……
但很遗憾，这是不可能的。
E:
March 7th is now one step closer to the end (or the beginning) and finally sees the mastermind who has been placing obstacles along the way — It is the Messenger.
The Messenger seems to have locked March 7th and Fu Xuan into a memory that is an enclosed loop. March 7th was still a nameless girl drifting in space, until the Astral Express saved her, and she gained a "family" for the first time.
March 7th would love to stay in this memory for longer if this weren't a part of the Messenger's plot — Everyone misses their home and secretly wishes the peaceful everyday life they share with their family could last forever into the future and the past...
Unfortunately, that is simply not possible.

C: 在符玄大人的帮助下，三月七经历了一场记忆宫殿大冒险。只可惜，她似乎并没能从这场冒险中得到什么有价值的收获……\n不，也许并非毫无收获？去她房间看看吧。
E: With Lady Fu Xuan's help, March 7th experienced a memory palace adventure. Unfortunately, she didn't seem to have gained anything valuable from this adventure...\nNo, maybe it's not completely nothing? Go check it out in her room.

C: 地衡司勤务是一块砖，哪里需要哪里搬。广大的工作并不容易，现在他正在地衡司公廨前发愁呢……\n出于善意，你可以问问他，要不要帮他就另说了……
E: The duties of the Realm-Keeping Commission's orderlies are like bricks, to be moved wherever they are needed. The work of Guangda is not an easy one, and now he is worrying in front of the Realm-Keeping Commission chancery...\nOut of goodwill, you can ask him if he needs help, but whether you will help is a different matter...

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 云璃的爷爷怀炎将军似乎打算瞒着云璃接收异乡送回的宝剑。不管有没有什么隐情，云璃是不会错过「传奇宝剑」的。\n约好与云璃在司辰宫前碰头，可别忘记了。
E: Seems like General Huaiyan is planning to accept the repatriation of the sword while keeping it a secret from his granddaughter, Yunli. Even if there's a catch, Yunli would never miss an opportunity to lay her eyes upon the legendary sword.\nDon't forget that you've agreed to meet Yunli at the Palace of Astrum's entrance.

C: 竟然把玫瑰花瓣留在剑匣里，看上去就像是不会写推理的劣质电视剧桥段…纯美骑士银枝竟然能做出盗窃之事，你仔细想了想，其中必有隐情。\n去找到银枝吧，他肯定会有话要说。
E: Just what thief would leave a rose petal in the sword casket... This is the exact kind of badly written mystery you see in second-rate TV shows. But could Argenti, a Knight of Beauty, really be the thief? After some pondering, you're convinced that there's more to this matter than meets the eye.\nFind Argenti. He'll have something to say about this.

C: 时光流逝，转眼演武仪典即将召开在即。在即将登上擂台的时刻到来前，年轻的剑士们眺望空中的斗舰，与远来之客抒发己见。但关注此刻的并不只有他们，迴星港中，另有不速之客图谋不轨……
E: Time goes by, and the moment of the Wardance has arrived once more. Right before the young swordmasters are about to step into the ring, they look up at the fighter jet in the sky and start expressing their opinions to the visitors from afar. But they are not the only ones focused on this moment, for in Stargazer Navalia, certain uninvited guests weave their schemes...

C: 幽囚狱中，来历不明的机械与劫狱者横行无忌，意在救出步离战首。而曜青的使节生死不明。受寒鸦请托，你们不得不深入幽囚狱之底，确认犯人是否依然在押……
E: In the Shackling Prison, unidentified machines and prison breakers wreak chaos with impunity. Their goal is to rescue the borisin Warhead. Meanwhile, the Yaoqing messenger's fate is unknown. At the behest of Hanya, you all have no choice but to delve deeper into the Shackling Prison to confirm if the convict is still behind bars...

C: 莱斯利•迪恩的心绪表盘上缺少了某种情绪。\n补全它，帮他找回完整的自我吧。
E: Lesley Dean's Emo Dial lacks a specific emotion.\nComplete it and help Lesley rediscover his true self.

C: 触碰柯柯娜留下的记忆，你感觉到自己离她很近了。
E: Touch the memory left behind by Cocona. You have a feeling that you're already very close to her.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 谈话接近尾声时，苏克提瑞斯的弟子来报：有一伙受伤的外邦人躲进了重渊。你想起和缇宝他们收留的那批难民…重渊可不是个适合生活的地方。
E: As your discussion was coming to an end, Soctires' disciple came with word: A group of wounded outlanders has hidden themselves away in the Abyss. You cannot help but think of the refugees that Tribbie and the others accepted into their land... The Abyss is no place to live.

C: 发现了一只看上去很担忧的呜呜伯，去问问它发生了什么要紧事吧。
E: You come across a Wubbaboo that looks distressed. Go and ask what's going on.

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n为了交到朋友，他想出了一个策略——策略的第一步是为他拍摄一张照片。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nHe has a plan to make more friends, and the first step is to have a photo taken.

C: 出于一些原因，费尔多并不想和华劳斯做朋友。\n真是糟糕的消息…回去和华劳斯说明情况吧。
E: Furdo does not want to be Wallace's friend due to reasons.\nWhat a piece of bad news... Go back to Wallace to explain the situation.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望能把他的「大宇宙时间隧道」论文递交给大守护者。\n没想到，曼娅居然出了一道难题来阻拦递交流程。\n那道题可真是太难了，聪颖如你居然都选错了答案——事已至此，把这个坏消息告诉雷金吧。
E: The Civilian Scientist Regin hopes to submit his thesis on the big universe time tunnel to the Supreme Guardian.\nHowever, Manya tries to interrupt the submission process by demanding you to pass a quiz.\nThe question is so difficult that even someone as clever as you chose the wrong answer. Since it has come to this, tell Regin the bad news.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望能把他的「大宇宙时间隧道」论文递交给大守护者。\n你答错了曼娅给你出的题目，但雷金一下就得出了答案。\n没办法，你只能厚着脸皮去求曼娅给你第二次机会了。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, hopes to submit his thesis about the big universe time tunnel to the Supreme Guardian.\nYou chose the wrong answer for Manya's quiz, but Regin worked out the correct answer within seconds.\nYou have no choice but to go beg Manya for a second chance.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望能把他的「大宇宙时间隧道」论文递交给大守护者。\n你答错了教育部官员给你出的题目，但雷金一下就得出了答案。\n没办法，你只能厚着脸皮去求教育部官员给你第二次机会了。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, hopes to submit his thesis about the big universe time tunnel to the Supreme Guardian.\nYou chose the wrong answer for the Ministry of Education officer's quiz, but Regin worked out the correct answer within seconds.\nYou have no choice but to go beg the Ministry of Education officer for a second chance.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望你能去帮他打探一下教育部的题库储备。\n答错或答对已经不重要了，你已经帮雷金打探到了他想要的消息——去找他回报情况吧。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, wants you to test the Ministry of Education's question bank reserves.\nIt no longer matters if you got it right or wrong. You have already gotten the information he needs. Find him and tell him your findings.

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 不甘落败的棋鬼又准备了新的「寻径指津」谜题，是时候让它输得心服口服了。
E: Unwilling to accept defeat, the Chess Ghost has prepared a new Pathfinder puzzle. It's time to make it acknowledge defeat gracefully.

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 你成功打开了火种匣。问问伊来内其中贮藏的是什么吧。
E: You successfully opened the Coreflame Casket. Ask Alain about its content.

C: 你为钟表小子雕像带去了足够多的「金表钞」——吸取了足够多美梦能量的钟表小子决定给你展露一手绝活。
E: You have brought enough Clock Credits to the Clockie Statue — Clockie, having absorbed enough dream energy, decides to showcase a signature trick to you.

C: 在风堇的委托下，你答应去拜访那些树庭牺牲者的家属，了解一下他们的近况。\n但或许除此以外，你能做的还有很多。
E: You promised to visit the families of those who lost their lives at the Grove and find out about how they're doing at Hyacine's request.\nAside from this, however, you might be able to do something more...

C: 柯库翁提出可以用散落各处的盾牌先搭出街垒的雏形。四处看看，收集盾牌、搭建壁垒吧。
E: Glykon stated that you can use the scattered shields to create the shape of prototypical fortress. Look around, collect shields, and build a fortification.

C: 「选择」真的存在吗？在卡芙卡看来，一切选择都是虚假的，只是命中注定的可能性之一；自由意志根本不存在，你身在此处这一点就是明证。她的想法多少有些悲观和虚无了，而你可以接受，也可以否认。
E: Does "choice" really exist? From Kafka's perspective, all choices are illusions and merely represent predetermined possibilities. Free will does not exist, and your presence here is clear proof of that. Her ideas are somewhat pessimistic and nihilistic, and you can either accept or reject them.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往机械聚落，收集「自动机兵•战犬」的战斗数据，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to collect Automaton Hound combat data at the Robot Settlement to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了下层区的领导者娜塔莎。代她们前往磐岩镇诊所，了解娜塔莎是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on Natasha, leader of the Underworld. Head to the Boulder Town clinic in their stead, and see whether Natasha is interested in the position.

C: 照片拍摄好了，给三月七看看吧。
E: The photos are all done. Show them to March 7th.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是贝洛伯格上层区中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from the Belobog Overworld...

C: 由于争取到了会长的支持，原本支持会长的商户现在也放下心结，希望能和商会、码头建立合作。\n金人巷美食街的招牌「尚滋味」也提出想要和商会合作，去问问小秘书具体的情况吧。
E: After obtaining the president's support, the merchants who once supported him have also let go of their worries and now hope to establish partnerships with the merchant guild and the docks.\nSpices Supreme, the crowning jewel of Aurum Alley's food street, also wishes to work with the merchant guild. Go ask Miss Secretary about the details.

C: 拍摄完绘影图形之后，需要和素裳讨论一下「商业宣传」的方向，并决定下一处拍摄主题。\n你当然可以相信素裳的商业直觉，不过，有没有一种可能，直接问问小秘书会更有效率？
E: After shooting the visiograph, you need to discuss with Sushang about what direction the "business promotion" is supposed to take, and decide the theme for the next promo.\nYou can definitely choose to trust Sushang's business instincts, but might it be wiser and more efficient to directly ask Miss Secretary Mingxi?

C: 信念与希望足以构成通往胜利的桥梁。在踏上擂台之前，你还有时间从朋友的支持中汲取力量。
E: Faith and hope are more than sufficient materials to build a bridge toward eventual success. Before you rise to the arena, you still have time to draw strength from the support of your friends.

C: 「云骑失控」…若非堕入魔阴身，便是有岁阳妖异作乱。顺着求助帖所言，你们来到丹鼎司查探情况。
E: A Cloud Knight out of control... if it isn't a case of mara-struck, then it would be the work of a heliobus. Following the description in the post, you make your way to the Alchemy Commission to investigate.

C: 亡妻离世多年，倦鸟孤飞的丈夫面对突然归来的妻子怀着何等的心情？而这死而复生，幽明难辨的「妻子」又是为何而归来呢？
E: How will a husband, who has been immersed in eternal mourning, react to the sudden return of his long-deceased wife? And why has this reborn "wife," whom you can't tell if she is actually human, returned from the underworld?

C: 以帮助房东取回房产证为前提，捉鬼小队得到调查凶宅的许可。跟桂乃芬和素裳谈谈，接下来该如何探查凶宅。
E: The ghost-hunting squad obtained the permission to investigate the haunted residence in order to help the landlord recover the deed. Speak with Guinaifen and Sushang on how you should go about investigating the haunted residence.

C: 十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
E: The only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Towers in Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 桂乃芬好像有什么事情要和捉鬼小队的各位商量……\n不妨听她讲讲，到底发生了什么新鲜事吧。
E: Guinaifen seems to have something she wants to discuss with the ghost-hunting squad...\nListen to her and find out what new incident has gone down.

C: 自绥园一夜惊魂冒险后，你都不想再提起那地方。但该来的总会来，上一次的冒险始于你误信小桂子一通短信，而这一次也一样。
E: The harrowing adventure in Fyxestroll Garden is an experience you hesitate to recount, but you simply cannot escape the mischievous hand of fate. Your next adventure begins with your blind faith in Little Gui's message, just as it did before.

C: 「罗浮杂俎」，原本只是个灵异爱好者们聚集的网站，却最终成了罗浮上平民茶余饭后交换流言蜚语的大型网络社区。\n努力拓展你的影响力吧，它不仅会将情报汇聚你手中，更能让你以「捉鬼小队」的名义正大光明地行动。
E: Ghostly Grove, once a modest gathering website for supernatural enthusiasts, has now become a thriving community where denizens of the Luofu Xianzhou exchange tales and rumors.\nTry to expand your sphere of influence, as this not only helps you get the information you need, but also allows you to operate openly in the name of the respected ghost-hunting squad.

C: 黑塔等人给「扩展装置」加了一个新的演算分支：这一次他们培育了模拟「博识尊」，并选取了#27 帝皇鲁珀特死亡前的时间……
E: Herta and others have added a new algorithmic branch to the Expansion Module. This time, they have simulated Nous and selected the time before the demise of #27 Emperor Rubert...

C: 混乱的梦境卷走了你的同伴们，你必须深入其中、将失散的大伙重新集结起来。
E: The chaotic Dreamscape has swept away your companions. You have to delve into the dream to reunite with your lost companions.

C: 帮助辛格勒收集线索——它们应该就散落在神秘空间的战利品宝箱中。
E: Help Singler search for clues — they should be scattered in the mysterious space's treasure chest.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 轮到你请客了，挑选些吃的吧。
E: It's your turn to buy. Pick out some food.

C: 终极挑战就在眼前，但周围似乎发生了一些奇怪的事情。
E: The final showdown is just ahead. But strange things are happening around you.

C: 你在终端上体验了一次「星芒烁变」，这下可以拿着数据跟布凯辛她们交差了。
E: You've experienced Stellar Shimmer on the terminal 1 time. Now you can take the data and report back to Grumpy.

C: 走进他们的故事，见证他们的人生，铭记他们的存在。
E: Step into their story, witness their lives, and remember their existence.

C: 银狼对三月七的剑斗不以为意，就当是连日来帮忙的回馈，她给三月七的剑植入了「内部攻破公司机甲」的手段。\n银狼的手段大发神威，接下来就该听听斯科特如何狡辩了。
E: Silver Wolf pays no heed to March 7th's swordplay duel, but she implants a little something into March 7th's sword to repay her for her help in the last few days: A code that'll breach the inner defenses of an IPC Mech.\nSilver Wolf's trick worked exceptionally well! Let's hear what excuses Skott can come up with.

C: 协助见习医生伦道夫进行拍摄，以便让他去捕获这些离散忆质。
E: Help Trainee Healer Randolph with the filming so that he can capture these scattered memoria.

C:
来到罗浮以后，我总觉得有什么压在身上，令我喘不过气。
最初，我以为是运动损伤。后来，又担心是不适应重力。最后，我终于为自己找到了病因——
我是贝洛伯格<unbreak>700</unbreak>年来第一位去天上打比赛的运动员。
我背负着我的整个故乡。
E:
I've felt there's a weight pressing down on me and making it hard to breathe ever since I arrived on the Luofu.
Initially, I thought it might have been an injury, then I was worried it might be my body not adapting to this gravity. At the end, I finally found the cause of the symptoms —
I'm the first athlete in Belobog in <unbreak>700</unbreak> years to go fight a competition in sky.
I'm carrying my entire home planet on my shoulders.

C: 尾巴大爷真是太强了！简直是仙舟特供版钟表小子！\n希望他能顺利帮卢卡摆脱战败的阴影……
E: Mr. Tail is so awesome! He's basically a Xianzhou-version Clockie!\nHopefully he can get Luka out of the shadow of defeat...

C: 紧张刺激的比赛暂告一段落，可以暂时休息一下了…但卢卡都被淘汰了，你们也没什么「休息」的雅兴。
E: The tense and exciting match draws to a temporary close. It's time to have a quick breather... But with Luka eliminated, you don't really have the desire to "rest."

C: 紧张刺激的比赛暂告一段落，可以暂时休息一下了。\n利用这段时间，为接下来的比赛做好准备吧。
E: The tense and exciting match draws to a temporary close. It's time to have a quick breather.\nUse this time to prepare for the upcoming match.

C: 完成「大衍万象」简单模式II
E: Complete Mutare Magnus Easy Mode II

C: 完成「大衍万象」困难模式I
E: Complete Mutare Magnus Hard Mode I

C: 花园里可不能允许有人胡闹！和风堇一同去阻止那位发脾气的男性吧。
E: Someone is causing a scene in the Garden! Join Hyacine in stopping the furious man.

C: 大家都在忙着为宴会做准备，你和昔涟当然也不能闲着，去看看有什么能帮忙的。\n就先用美味的菜品把桌面摆满吧！
E: Everyone's busy preparing for the feast, so you and Cyrene certainly can't just sit around. Go see what you can help out with.\nLet's start by filling the table with delicious dishes!

C: 为了复原「特调配方」，你受邀成为「惊梦酒吧」的特邀调饮师。在黑塔的协助下，你完成了第一份配方。接下来，又会有怎样的客人不期而至呢？
E: To restore the "Special Recipe," you've been invited as a guest drinksmith at the Dreamjolt Hostelry. With Herta's help, you've completed the first recipe. Now, what unexpected guests will walk through the door next?

C: 为了复原「特调配方」，你受邀成为「惊梦酒吧」的特邀调饮师。在托帕的帮助下，你完成了第三份配方。接下来，又会有怎样的客人不期而至呢？
E: To restore the "Special Mix Recipe," you've been invited as a guest drinksmith at the Dreamjolt Hostelry. With Topaz's help, you've completed the third recipe. Now, what unexpected guests will walk through the door next?

C: 利用假身份信息通过安全验证
E: Use a fake identity to get past security check

C: 前往中庭处的中央电梯
E: Go to the elevator in the central area

C: 找到神秘空间的出口，回归现实
E: Find a way to escape this strange space and return to reality

C: 与姬子交谈
E: Talk to Himeko

C: 找到第三处建木缠结
E: Find the third Ambrosial Arbor coil

C: 查看战斗的幸存者
E: Check on the survivors

C: 乘坐星槎进入鳞渊境
E: Take the starskiff and enter Scalegorge Waterscape

C: 跟随流萤，游览匹诺康尼
E: Follow Firefly and explore Penacony

C: 与流萤会合
E: Meet with Firefly

C: 利用梦境的特性构筑通路
E: Use the characteristics of the Dreamscape to construct a path

C: 前往「黄金的时刻」，与列车组会合
E: Head to Golden Hour and meet with the Crew

C: 与瓦尔特交谈
E: Talk to Welt

C: 跟上█ ██年幼█自█ █埃维金██ 男孩 █
E: Cat█h up ███th██You█g Avgin b█y

C: 登上舞台，不要害怕，不要回头
E: Get onstage. Fear not. Never look back

C: 在列车指定位置继续故事
E: Continue the story from the designated Express location

C: 向星期日了解星核的下落
E: Learn the whereabouts of the Stellaron from Sunday

C: 收集筑梦碎片
E: Collect Jigsaw Fragments

C: 将甜品交给三月七
E: Deliver the dessert to March 7th

C: 看看「显圣」是在搞什么香蕉
E: See what the fudge the "theophany" is all about

C: 跟米凯和知更鸟唠唠接下来的计划
E: Hit up Micah and Robin about what's next

C: 与摄影机交互，进入「睡蕉的时刻」
E: Interact with the camera and enter the Moment of Slumbernana

C: 与聚集的群众交谈
E: Talk with the gathered crowd

C: 使用扎格列斯之手将剑皿归位
E: Use the Hand of Zagreus to return the sword to its place

C: 抓回贼灵巴特鲁斯
E: Recapture Spirithief Bartholos

C: 前往云石市集，寻找并清除三处异常
E: Go to Marmoreal Market, then find and clear three anomalies

C: 探望三月七
E: Visit March 7th

C: 与终端交互，尝试与博识尊对话
E: Interact with the terminal and try to speak with Nous

C: 与遐蝶和那刻夏交谈
E: Speak with Castorice and Anaxa

C: （可选）告别缇宝、遐蝶和大工匠
E: (Optional) Bid farewell to Tribbie, Castorice, and the Grand Craftsman

C: 与遐蝶对话，了解事情经过
E: Speak to Castorice and learn about what happened

C: 出发前，再与缇安娃娃说说话
E: Speak with the Trianne Doll again before heading out

C: 见证塞涅俄丝的真相
E: Witness the truth about Seliose

C: 继续前进，与索拉比斯汇合
E: Continue forward and join up with Solabis

C: 接受塔兰顿的称量
E: Accept the test of Talanton

C: 与心中的故乡道别
E: Bid farewell to The Homeland Within

C: 和知更鸟谈谈
E: Talk with Robin

C: 去见见星穹列车的「老朋友」
E: Meet an old friend from the Astral Express

C: 逃出Assassin的宝具
E: Escape Assassin's Noble Phantasm

C: 用哈努电视机变回原样
E: Use Hanu TV to return to your normal form

C: 利用祷言神龛，强化祷言
E: Use the Shrine of Prayers to enhance prayers

C: 沿着命途长河逆流而上
E: Travel upstream along the currents of the Path

C: 操作「扎格列斯之手」，清除障碍
E: Control the Hand of Zagreus to clear obstacles

C: 深入时光归墟，来到权杖的核心
E: Delve into the Ruins of Time and reach the Scepter's core

C: 用仪式剑锚定最初的因果
E: Anchor the original causality with the ceremonial blade

C: 击败铁墓，将宇宙存续的答案归还群星
E: Defeat Irontomb and return the answer to the universe's survival to the stars

C: 劝诱受挫的拉明娜回头是岸
E: Persuade Lamina to repent

C: 告知那少年真相还是谎言
E: Tell the young man the truth or a lie

C: 找到希拉记忆中的监视屏
E: Find the security monitor in Sheila's memory

C: 向「重新上线」的希拉发布指令
E: Give instructions to Sheila, who is back online

C: 重新通过身份校验程序
E: Run the identity verification program again

C: 继续追踪银狼的入侵路线
E: Continue to track Silver Wolf's infiltration pathway

C: 前往主控室
E: Head to the main control room

C: 与姬子讨论线索
E: Talk the clues over with Himeko

C: 收集下层区居民对托帕提议的看法
E: Compile opinions held by Underworld residents regarding Topaz

C: 通过矿车工老师傅的测试
E: Pass the senior mine cart operator's test

C: 与矿车工老师傅交谈，看看他是否准备了新谜题
E: Talk to the senior mine cart operator and see if he has come up with a new test

C: 去磐岩镇，向巴列维咨询。
E: Go to Boulder Town and consult Balaway

C: 和诊所内的病患谈话
E: Talk to the patients in the clinic

C: 向娜塔莎汇报你的发现
E: Report what you found to Natasha

C: 帮虎克找到她的宝贝
E: Help Hook find her treasure

C: 问问拍卖会的具体情况
E: Ask about the details of the auction

C: 调查废弃的实验现场
E: Investigate the abandoned lab

C: 前往雪原寻找玲可
E: Head to the Snow Plains and find Lynx

C: 与玲可一起等待极光
E: Wait for the aurora with Lynx

C: 和斯薇塔聊聊，了解情况
E: Chat with Swetta about the situation

C: 与奇怪的云骑「决斗」
E: "Battle" with the strange Cloud Knight

C: 前往神策府，将丹枢的研究成果交给青镞
E: Head to the Seat of Divine Foresight and pass Dan Shu's report to Qingzu

C: 到鳞渊境的海边，与陶德对话
E: Head to the Scalegorge Waterscape coast and talk with Todd

C: 向周围人打听「美丽狐仙聊天」
E: Ask the people around about the Foxian Beauty Chat

C: 与队友谈谈，了解现状
E: Talk to your teammates and gain an understanding of the situation

C: 修理自动机兵•蜘蛛
E: Repair Automaton Spider

C: （可选）与浮烟对话
E: (Optional) Talk with Cirrus

C: 与桑博一起整理线索
E: Sort through the clues with Sampo

C: 与孤云对话，了解它逃走的原因
E: Talk to Guyun and learn why it fled

C: 离开迴星港，返回练剑处
E: Leave Stargazer Navalia and return to the sword practicing area

C: 汇总情报，分析疑点
E: Consolidate intel and review the suspicious points

C: 赶赴演武擂台，阻止步离人的袭击
E: Hurry to the Wardance arena and stop the borisin's attack

C: 和「四尺圣堂」对峙
E: Confront the Four-Foot Hall

C: 向艾丝妲推荐《如我所书》
E: Recommend As I've Written to Asta

C: 寻找走失的呜呜伯
E: Find the lost Wubbaboo

C: 告诉阿德勒真相
E: Tell Adler the truth

C: 将「七彩虹」带给莉拉
E: Bring the "Rainbows" to Lila

C: 和黄金歌剧院前的塞琳聊聊
E: Speak with Celine in front of the Golden Theater

C: 前往丹鼎司，与跃渊对话
E: Speak with Yueyuan at the Alchemy Commission

C: 品尝茶庄新品「忘情茶」
E: Taste the teahouse's new Unsen-tea-mental Tea

C: 与伊来内对话
E: Speak with Alain

C: 和帕姆交谈
E: Talk to Pom-Pom

C: 让帕姆和你聊聊
E: Chat with Pom-Pom

C: 与「副官」交谈，完成禁区演练
E: Talk to the aide and complete the restricted zone training

C: 询问西塔罗斯关于宁芙的下落
E: Ask Theodoros about Nympha's whereabouts

C: 深入黎明云崖，朝刻法勒的神体前进
E: Continue deeper into Dawncloud toward Kephale's divine vessel

C: 与卡芙卡谈谈
E: Speak with Kafka

C: 向布凯辛汇报「星芒战幕」的测试结果
E: Report the test result of Stellar Flare to Grumpy

C: 调查奇怪的显示器
E: Investigate the strange display monitor

C: 修复藏品
E: Restore exhibits

C: 将藏品放置于指定位置
E: Place the exhibit at the specified spot

C: 与明曦对话
E: Speak with Mingxi

C: 前往指定地点接受考验
E: Go to the indicated area and pass the trial

C: 与捉鬼小队讨论求助帖

E: Progression

E: Time to First Sword Trial

E: Second Sword Trial

C: 几千年过去，雅利洛-Ⅵ已经变成这样了吗……
E: After all those millennia... is this what Jarilo-VI has become?

C: 「星核」究竟是什么呢？
E: What exactly is a Stellaron?

C: 怎么样？你跟丹恒聊过了吗？
E: Did you talk to Dan Heng? How'd it go?

C: 不过，当时困住我的是一种叫「六相冰」的稀有物质…一般的星球上恐怕很难找到吧？
E: Still, the ice that trapped me was Six-Phased Ice — a very rare substance. I don't think you can find it on your average planet...

C: 好久不见，星穹列车上的各位。我是卡芙卡。
E: Long time no see, Astral Express crew. It's Kafka.

C: 事关重大，这次我也要参与行动。
E: This is big. I'm coming with you this time.

C: 暂时无法离开当前场景，需要完成开拓任务「旅进青霄，不速之邀」
E: Unable to leave the current area, please complete Trailblaze Mission "An Invitation Without Proffer"

C: 想摧毁「星核」几乎是不可能的任务。连黑塔也没能找到彻底破坏「星核」结构的方法，只能创造条件抑制它的能量漫溢。
E: It's virtually impossible to destroy a Stellaron. No one, not even Herta, has found a way to break its structure. The best we can do at this stage is to prevent its energy from overflowing.

C: 这儿？一个空间站，不重要。
E: A space station, but that's not important.

C: 没见过这么活泼的姑娘。
E: I've never met a more lively girl in my life.

C: 你们经过的收容舱段收藏着诸多「奇物」和「遗器」，是最核心的研究场所。
E: The storage zone you passed through contains all our inventory, and is the main research center.

C: 做得很好，同行者！跟着我的节奏，声音再大一点，给气势加把柴。
E: You did well, friend! Follow my rhythm, and say it loud, with conviction!

C: 「无法测定！」眼珠在转动了三圈后突然瞪大，在僵持了片刻后，它疲惫地合上了眼皮。
E: "Rating invalid!" Its eyeball swivels around three times before suddenly widening. After a brief impasse, its eye shuts, wearily.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着刃：「<unbreak>42</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Blade: "<unbreak>42</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着丹恒•腾荒：「<unbreak>88</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae: "<unbreak>88</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 要么上列车，要么留下…
E: Get on the Express, or stay behind...

C: 比如去沙漠里捉一种名为「沙鱼」的动物，或者是矫正重力场，把一座上下颠倒的城堡恢复原貌，以及为了避开在路间睡觉的驯鹿，差点被一个从天而降的方铅矿球砸中脑袋——
E: For example, going to the desert to catch something called a "sandfish," correcting a gravitational field to flip an upside-down castle, or almost getting my head cracked open by a galena ball falling from the sky while trying to avoid a sleeping reindeer on the road—

C: 列车接下来会去哪里？
E: What's the next stop for the Express?

C: 好～我去忙啦，再见！
E: Okay, off I go. Bye!

C: 一切的故事都从她遇见星穹列车开始，从那以后，他们几乎没有分开过。
E: It all started with her encounter with the Astral Express, and they haven't been apart since then.

C: 不管是谁想要伤害丹恒，我们是不会答应的。丹恒是列车组的一员，敢招惹星穹列车的人，就要准备好承受我和姬子的怒火。
E: Don't worry, no matter who or what wants to hurt Dan Heng, we won't let them. Those who dare attack members of the Astral Express should be prepared to suffer the wrath of me and Himeko.

C: 「裂界」是一种侵蚀的现象。
E: The Fragmentums are a phenomenon of corrosion.

C: （…他说话好奇怪噢。）
E: (...He's sure saying some weird stuff.)

C: 在希露瓦的指导下修好了发热装置……
E: You fix the heater with Serval's help...

C: 啊，那边就是杰帕德说的，被裂界污染的巷子吧？
E: Ah, that's the alley that Gepard mentioned — the one contaminated by the Fragmentum, right?

C: 要是放任不管的话，这附近的商铺和旅店用不了多久就要关门大吉了吧？
E: If they hadn't identified it, I bet all the shops and hotels in the vicinity would have had to close down by now.

C: 要不是大部队都被调去前线了，这种小阵仗算什么！现在连攻打的兵力都没有。
E: If it weren't for most of our forces being deployed to the front line, situations like this wouldn't amount to anything! We can't even go on the offensive.

C: 不行啦！歌德老板认识我们，铁卫的驻扎点就在旁边一百米不到，你这是送货上门啊！
E: No way! The boss will recognize us, plus Silvermane Guards are stationed nearby. We'd be offering ourselves up on a silver platter!

C: 嘁，别挡我们的路！
E: Tsk, don't stand in our way!

C: 我们……
E: Oh, we just—

C: 对。那是银鬃铁卫主力部队的驻扎地，他们在那里整顿部队，抵抗裂界的入侵。
E: Yes. That's where the main force of the Silvermane Guards is stationed. They've consolidated their position there in order to resist the encroaching Fragmentum.

C: 唉，可能铁卫全军里只有我一个人整天和同事怄气了。
E: *sigh* Maybe I'm the only one in the Guards who spends all day sulking.

C: 嘿嘿，怎么啦？佩拉小姐～
E: Yes? How can I help, Miss Pela~

C: 我刚才正在军火仓库等你的消息，结果就被那帮人找上门了。他们说，我这次做得太过火了，所以要给我一个警告…我立马意识到事情不对，就拼命跑回家——
E: I was waiting for your update at the arsenal just now, and those people came to me. They said that I went too far this time, so they gave me a warning... I realized something was wrong, so I ran home as fast as I could —

C: 那你首先得过杰帕德这关……
E: Well, you have to get Gepard's approval first...

C: 我支持你！
E: I support you!

C: 咦？你是下层区人？
E: Huh? You're from the Underworld?

C: ——对啊，当时可真是千钧一发！好在我桑博灵机一动：嘿！我又没必要去担任那个主角，是不是？咱们当好戴面具的丑角就对了嘛。
E: Aw, it was a close thing alright! Good thing it dawned on me: Hey, Sampo doesn't have to be a protagonist, right? The likes of us are better suited to... shadowy comic relief, huh?

C: 拍照？我还以为只有粉丝见面会才有这个环节呢——看在你们仨的面子上，我可以帮你们免费签名哦！
E: Photo? ...This feels like one of my fan meet-ups, haha. Anyway, for you guys, I'd do autographs for free.

C: 哇，这张「照片」…太厉害啦！可以送给虎克吗？
E: Wow! Photos are awesome! ...Can Hook have it?

C: 啊…我明白了。还有人在等着你们回去，然后才好继续旅行，对吧？
E: Ahh... I get it. People are waiting for you to go back so you can keep traveling, right?

C: 希露瓦姐姐…很酷，很厉害，而且还很开朗……
E: Miss Serval is cool, strong, and... carefree...

C: 布洛妮娅就开朗得多。
E: Bronya is far more optimistic.

C: 那，阿丽娜也能住吗？
E: So can Alina stay here too?

C: 行动？哦～懂了，我等会儿再给你加碟小零食吧！
E: ...Actions? Ohhhh, I get you! Another plate of delicious snacks, coming right up!

C: 姬子小姐。
E: Himeko.

C: 那个…我想想。啊，对了——是铁卫制式的随身暖炉来着，不过已经坏了。
E: Well... let's see. Ah, yes — a Silvermane Guard standard issue portable heater. I—It's broken, though.

C: 尽管你从未看过这个童话剧，你却觉得它似曾相识。也许在不同世界不同剧作家的笔下，童话其实讲的是同一个故事。
E: Even though you have never seen this play before, you feel a sense of déjà vu. Perhaps the same fairy tale is being written by different playwrights from different worlds.

C: 车牌上画着奇特的符记，你相信这个世界里并没有限号这回事。
E: Peculiar marks are drawn on the license plates. You start to think traffic regulations here must be pretty loose.

C: 这只垃圾桶的内部光洁如新，一尘不染，你从没见过这么干净的垃圾桶——
E: The inside of this trashcan is good as new. You've never seen a trashcan this clean before...

C: 仔细端详。
E: Investigate carefully.

C: 再说了，「地火」又怎么…没准我带来的这几位人物能捞「地火」一把呢，这可不好说嘛。
E: And another thing! Where does Wildfire get off... assuming that these fine folks won't come in useful to them, huh? I mean, you never know.

C: 我是怎么昏倒的？
E: Why did I pass out?

C: 他的对手是——没得感情，易燃易爆的机器小分队！赞美史瓦罗大佬！
E: And his opponent is... none other than the unfeeling, incendiary, explosive might of Team Robomatic! All praise to Boss Svarog!

C: 我想回家！
E: I just want to go home!

C: 说得好！姑娘深明大义啊！
E: Well said! The young lady is wise and righteous!

C: 你认识头儿？我怎么不认识你……
E: You know the chief? Then why don't I know you...

C: 他们去了有一阵子了。哼…要不是「地火」不在，那群混混哪敢这么嚣张。
E: They've been gone for a while now. Hmph, if Wildfire was around, those thugs wouldn't have dared.

C: 说得轻巧。事情还没解决，首领他们还在下面呢。一堆破铜烂铁机器人而已，咱们可不怕它。
E: Easy for you to say. This isn't over — the chief and the others are still down there. It's only a bunch of scrap metal. What are we afraid of?

C: 你居然懂成语…
E: Doesn't sound like something you'd say...

C: 你们见过那家气派的歌德宾馆吗？严格来说，那其实是咱们「大饭店」的分店哦。
E: Have you seen that stylish Goethe Hotel? Strictly speaking, it's a branch of this Grand Hotel.

C: 骄傲吧？{NICKNAME}说话已经有你的范儿了。
E: *sigh* Happy now? {NICKNAME} is even starting to sound like you.

C: 不是信不过你哈，但让你守夜，我还不大放心…你一个铁卫军官跑到地下来，出事的可能性比我们还大吧。
E: I doubt I'll be able to sleep either... not that I don't trust you! It's just... you're a Silvermane Guard officer in the underground. There might be people looking to harm you.

C: 你没有失去她…她在另一头等着和你团聚。
E: You did not lose her... She waits to be reunited with you on the other side.

C: 我知道她不是第一次应付这种事，但一想到她要对付那些畸形的怪物…我总是止不住会担心。
E: I know it's not her first rodeo, but the thought of her taking on those horrid monsters... I can't help but worry.

C: 谢谢你，希儿。你的信任对我来说很重要。
E: Thank you, Seele. Your trust is very important to me.

C: 你的关注点好奇怪啊！
E: Hey, stay on track!

C: 桑博，你了解朗道姐弟吗？
E: Sampo, do you know the Landau siblings?

C: 你们年纪轻还好点，对我这种老年人来说，爬趟炉心膝盖都要废喽。
E: ...It's easier for you youngsters. For this old guy, the steps of the Furnace Core are a nightmare on the knees!

C: 你们生日是同一天？这么巧？
E: You two share a birthday? What a coincidence!

C: 这样就算事后被老巫婆发现，她也不会只批评虎克一个人了——嘿嘿！
E: That way, even if the old witch finds out later, I won't be the only one getting a scolding, hehe!

C: 你也太不小心了吧！
E: Were you distracted or something?

C: 你和娜塔莎的关系…
E: About you and Natasha...

C: 盔甲对人可能有不良影响…
E: The armor may have adverse effects on people...

C: 为什么要去铆钉镇？
E: Why go to Rivet Town?

C: 我记得，之前帮他做过诊断，当时他已经被那套盔甲折磨得十分虚弱了。
E: Oh, I remember helping him with the diagnosis when he was so weakened by that suit of armor.

C: 你有见过他的妻儿吗？
E: Have you met his wife and children?

C: 突然感觉…我这所谓的内心斗争有些儿戏，哈哈。
E: Y'know... maybe I need to put my "inner struggles" in a broader context, hehe...

C: 嗯？是老弟的声音？
E: Is that Gepard?

C: 他现在正在镇上调度人员和物资，准备进一步的善后工作，所以暂时没办法回到诊所。
E: He's arranging for rescue teams and supplies to be sent over. He won't be back for a while.

C: 我超喜欢的！
E: I love it!

C: 嗯？{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}不会想问我如何找到剩下的书页吧？既然{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}诚心诚意地发问了，那就别怪我胡说八道了。
E: Hmm? So you wanna know where you can find the rest of the missing pages? Well, since you asked nicely, I'll tell you all about it. But don't come blame me if I get anything wrong.

C: 这些都是真实存在的。
E: These actually do exist.

C: 路灯，价值<unbreak>700</unbreak>冬城盾。
E: A street lamp, costs <unbreak>700</unbreak> shield.

C: 你是不可阻挡的，好吗？你的意志是绝对的。只是给你一个建议：不——要——打开这座垃圾箱，让它就这样安静地、拥有尊严地待在那儿。
E: You are unstoppable, alright? Your will is absolute. This is just a piece of advice: Please refrain from uncovering the dumpster's contents and just let it stand here with the silence and dignity it deserves.

C: 话音的背后，是某种装置运转的声响。
E: That's the sound of a device.

C: 尤其是丹恒，嘿嘿，你问他在干嘛，然后告诉他我们这儿可好玩了！
E: More importantly, let's see how Dan Heng's doing! Hee-hee, ask him what he's up to — then tell him we're having loads of fun!

C: 请您让我过去吧，我家闺女还在家等我。
E: Please let me through. My daughter's waiting for me at home.

C: 好久没出这么大的事…
E: It's been a long time since something this serious happened...

C: 恩公且宽心。既然符太卜胸有成竹，您就瞧她表演便是。
E: Don't worry, Diviner Fu seems confident about getting Kafka to talk. If I were you I'd just sit back and watch her do her thing.

C: 卡芙卡就可以知道秘密了？
E: How come Kafka gets to know their secrets?

C: 将军之所以请太卜审问犯人，正是因为相信她能掌控局面呀。能登上「六御」之位，总有些厉害本事。
E: The general entrusted the master diviner with the interrogation of the fugitive because he has faith in her ability to manage the situation. As one of the Six Charioteers, she is certainly capable.

C: 要不然在迴星港，那位星核猎手也不会一见她就缴枪投降啦。
E: Why do you think Kafka surrendered at the mere sight of her back in Stargazer Navalia?

C: 那儿妥妥就是广场了。
E: That's the plaza...

C: 哼哼……
E: Hmmmm...

C: 把大家叫到这里，就为这事啊？
E: Did you bring us here just for this?

C: 天舶司的人也对历史这么有研究吗？厉害啊，新生代几乎都说不出它的来历了。据说这建木是上古仙舟遨游天外时所遗留的残迹。
E: I didn't know the Sky-Faring Commission were history buffs! Not bad, younger generations usually don't know much about it. It's said that the Ambrosial Arbor is an ancient remnant from when the Xianzhou roamed the ether.

C: 啊，那是一段孽缘。我不小心卷入一场争斗，平白无故担了人情，只好帮忙把一具遗体送还仙舟。
E: Ah, a story of ill luck. I found myself embroiled in a conflict and ended up owing a favor... Now I must assist in delivering these remains back to the Xianzhou.

C: 你是「曜青」人？
E: You're from the Yaoqing?

C: 你接下来有什么打算？
E: What are your plans from here?

C: 没事，叨扰了。
E: Never mind. Excuse me.

C: 不知道耶…我想应该不要紧吧，总之先出去，到了安全的地方怎么都好说。
E: I dunno... I think we should be okay. Let's get out of here first and talk about it when we're in the clear.

C: 是个…漂亮姑娘。
E: She's... pretty.

C: 这儿是典当铺，专供周转济急之用。不过您要找的人嘛……
E: Well, we're a pawn shop — we see plenty of customers. But let me see if I can recall the lady you're looking for...

C: 貘馍卷——
E: Tuskpir wraps —

C: 当务之急，是先找到可能是由卡芙卡行动留下的线索。
E: Our priority now is to find anything that could lead us to Kafka.

C: 好大的丹炉，还在冒烟呢。
E: What huge elixir crucibles. There's still smoke coming out of them.

C: 「绝灭大君」也该兑现承诺…快！就是现在！
E: You, Lord Ravager, must do the same... Now! Quickly!

C: 他自从在穷观阵与我通话后，便再也没有音信，说是「有机缘要事，必须亲至」。
E: He made no further contact after we communicated at the Matrix of Prescience. He said he had "important matters to personally attend to."

C: 一群疯子。你瞧见「建木」了对吧？听说这便是那些妖人干的好事。事关军机，我也不便多谈。
E: Lunatics — all of them. You saw the Ambrosial Arbor, I assume? I heard that's the work of those sorcerers. Still, I can't say too much — military secrets.

C: 您独当一面的时候，我怕是看不到了…
E: I doubt I will be here to see you take charge...

C: 看，你的朋友正在和军团的爪牙作战…
E: Look, your friends are taking the fight to the Legion as we speak...

C: 哈，少许相似罢了，那是很久以前的事啦。硬要说起来，历代龙尊的形象确实相差无几——本代除外。现在持明龙尊的继任者只是个袭名的小娃娃，没有继承全部的力量。
E: Ha, I see why you might think so. These events occurred a long time ago, yet successive generations of high elders have not differed greatly in their appearance... that is, until the current generation. The most recent successor did not inherit the same level of power, and their appearance is that of a child.

C: 这台阶跨度还挺大，哎嘿，让我找个台阶下……
E: Phew, these steps are so far apart. Gotta find a way down...

C: …让开！
E: Out of the way!

C: 但你很享受吧？
E: But you're enjoying yourself, right?

C: 我正想请求太卜这么做呢。建木复生，联盟高层不会轻视，多半会审查各个环节。多一事不如少一事。星穹列车如果牵扯进其中，恐怕一时也难以离开。
E: I was about to make the same request, Master Diviner. Since the Arbor's resurrection, I'm sure the Alliance will be poring over every detail of the report. I fear that if the Astral Express gets dragged into matters, leaving will not be an easy task.

C: 我们来送停云小姐的礼物…
E: We're here to pass on a gift from Miss Tingyun...

C: 不过，{RUBY_B#万界之癌}星核{RUBY_E#}爆发后，它投入了{RUBY_B#同谐}希佩{RUBY_E#}的怀抱，据说被改造成的无比繁荣的梦之国度。
E: However, following a {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellaron{RUBY_E#} burst, the planet fell into the arms of {RUBY_B#the Harmony}Xipe{RUBY_E#}. They say it's been transformed into a prosperous and ethereal realm.

C: 「家族」正在那儿举办一场宴会，他们向列车发来了请柬。我很好奇那儿究竟发生了什么，所以我接受了邀请。
E: The Family is throwing a banquet there, and they sent invitations to the Express. I was curious about what was happening there, so I accepted.

C: 你知不知道尚滋味这家店？
E: Have you heard of Spices Supreme?

C: 放松之余，也别忘了帕姆的请求——列车长为我们做了许多，现在是时候回报它了。
E: Rest and recuperation aside, don't forget Pom-Pom's request. The conductor has done plenty for us, and it's time to return that favor.

C: 巡海游侠，黄泉…这是他们称呼我的方式，你随意使用吧。
E: Galaxy Ranger, Acheron... This is what they call me. You can call me whatever you want.

C: 我已上墙，感觉良好。
E: Now I Am Become Trailblaze, the Perambulator of Walls.

C: {M#<color=#ff3a3e>你让我想起一位故人。在朦胧的记忆中，他与我刀剑相向…正如这光怪陆离的梦境，近在咫尺却不可触及。</color>}{F#<color=#ff3a3e>你让我想起一位故人。在朦胧的记忆中，她与我并肩而立…正如这光怪陆离的梦境，近在咫尺却不可触及。</color>}
E: {M#<color=#ff3a3e>You evoke memories of an old friend. In the haze of my recollections, he crossed blades with me, much like this surreal dreamscape where we stood close, yet forever out of reach.</color>}{F#<color=#ff3a3e>You evoke memories of an old friend. In the haze of my recollections, she stood shoulder to shoulder with me, much like this surreal dreamscape where we stood close, yet forever out of reach.</color>}

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>请问，你还会踏上这段旅途吗？</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>I would ask: Would you still embark on this journey?</color>

C: 同时，也是一位在你们身后等了好久的游客。
E: I also happen to be a traveler that's had to stand behind you for quite a while.

C: 小姐，你都看到了。看在我的面子上，让这位{M#先生}{F#女士}入住吧。
E: There you go, Miss. Please allow {M#him}{F#her} to check in on my account.

C: 星穹列车的各位，请来这边稍事休息。
E: Astral Express guests, please come this way and rest your feet.

C: 那位歌手，艾普瑟隆的超级巨星…《使一颗心免于哀伤》是您的作品，对吧？
E: The singer, Epsilon's superstar... If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking. That's your song, isn't it?

C: 真巧啊，咱们又见面了。
E: How fortuitous, we meet again.

C: 又见面了，朋友！
E: We meet again, friend!

C: 你想聊什么？
E: What do you want to talk about?

C: 你不用现在答复我，思考也需要时间。等时机成熟，我自然会来找你。
E: You don't have to answer me now. Sit on it for a while. When the time is right, I will look for you again.

C: 做梦不会很累吗？
E: Won't I get tired out from all that dreaming?

C: 这孩子是我们星穹列车的新乘客，我们可以为{M#他}{F#她}的身份作担保。
E: {M#He's}{F#She's} a new passenger aboard our Astral Express. We can vouch for {M#his}{F#her} status.

C: （出示漫游签证…）
E: (Show Trailblazer profile...)

C: （该回房间了…在正式入梦前，再和大家聊聊？）
E: (It's time to head back to my room... Before entering the dream, I should probably talk to the rest.)

C: 我还以为您会注意不到我呢……
E: Oh, I... I thought you wouldn't notice me...

C: 您问的是梦境中的「白日梦酒店」吗？具体细节我也不是很清楚，非常抱歉……
E: You're asking about The Reverie in the dreamscape, right? I'm not sure exactly either, I'm sorry...

C: 祝您在匹诺康尼享受一段难忘的美梦！
E: I wish you unforgettable dreams in Penacony!

C: 那会儿就有苏乐达了？
E: Did SoulGlad really exist in that era?

C: …不，你不是帕。
E: ...No, you are not.

C: 温馨提示，抢劫在匹诺康尼是极其严重的犯罪行为！
E: Please allow me to remind you that robbery is a serious offense in Penacony.

C: 我们边走边吃吧，去下一站～
E: Let's walk while we eat. It's time to head to the next stop!

C: 虽然动画里的「钟表小子」只是个冒冒失失的吹牛大王…不过，我还是最相信钟表匠是一位无名客的说法！毕竟开垦梦境这种事，听着就很「开拓」！
E: The cartoon character Clockie is portrayed as reckless and full of hot air, but I believe the real Watchmaker was a Nameless! After all, creating the Dreamscape sounds like just the kind of thing a Trailblazer would do.

C: 嗯…既然你没事，那我们就出发去下一站吧。离这里不远，跟我来～
E: Well... If you're okay, let's move on to the next stop, which is just a stone's throw away from here. Please follow me...

C: 姓名——{NICKNAME}…好了，请拿好您的护照和这些代币。祝您游戏愉快。
E: Name— {NICKNAME}... Here's your Dreamscape Pass and tokens — be sure to keep a good hold of them! Have a good time!

C: 这不是想让你亲自体验下，嘿嘿。
E: I want to let you enjoy this firsthand experience, hee-hee.

C: 看哪，你变得多么小啊——这下你肯定逃不出我的手掌心了！
E: Look how small you've become! You won't be able to escape this time!

C: 相信您已经准备好了材料，请将它们交给我吧。
E: I trust you have prepared all the necessary materials. Please hand them over to me.

C: …钟表小子？
E: ...Clockie?

C: 客气什么，都是自己人！
E: No need for such formalities. We're... a Family!

C: 噢，我的天啊！是你把他弄哭了吗？
E: Oh, goodness! Did you make him cry?

C: …谢谢你。
E: ...Thanks.

C: 「我梦见一片焦土，一株破土而生的新蕊，它迎着朝阳绽放，向我低语呢喃。」
E: In my dream, I saw a scorched earth, and a new sapling emerging from it. It bloomed against the morning sun, and whispered to me.

C: 唉…我怎么就成了这副德行呢？
E: Alas... How did I end up like this?

C: 苜蓿币、苜蓿币…该死的钟表小子！整天只会扮出一张傻兮兮的笑脸，逗那些不知匹诺康尼水深火热的观光客咯咯大笑，再骗他们像我一样留在这做牛做马……
E: Alfalfa coins, Alfalfa coins... Huh, that Clockie guy is a real piece of work! All he does is put on that goofy smile to crack up those ignorant guests and hoodwink people like me into working like a dog here...

C: 砰的一下就出来了，不管看多少次都觉得很梦幻。
E: Bam, and it comes out just like that. No matter how many times I've seen it, it still looks magical.

C: 不，不对——还记得吗，在我们不省人事前，你的那位「朋友」是这么说的——「真正的{RUBY_B#匹诺康尼}『梦境』{RUBY_E#}」……
E: No, that's not right. Do you remember, before we were unconscious, that friend of yours said: The real {RUBY_B#Penacony}Dreamscape{RUBY_E#}...

C: 糟了…最开始的门是哪一扇？
E: Uh oh... Which one was the original door?
(What...)

C: （…这是什么情况？！）
E: (...What's happening!?)

C: 我应该做什么？
E: What do I need to do?

C: 祝您成功。
E: I wish you success.

C: 没有忆者陪同，不要擅自模仿哦。那么……
E: Don't imitate the Memokeeper without the accompaniment of one! Well...

C: 我需要你的帮助，所以会等你——但也不会等太久。准备好了…就跟上来吧。
E: I need your help, so I'll wait — but not for long. Once you are ready... follow me.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>或许没有你们想的那么复杂，这全部归功于…一位假面愚者。也许是我的无心之言伤害了她…在一阵五光十色后，我就身处此地了。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>It's probably not as complicated as it sounds. It's all thanks to... a Masked Fool. Maybe I unwittingly hurt her... and then in a flash of kaleidoscopic light, I ended up here.</color>

C: 不，绝对不可以。
E: No, absolutely not.

C: 黑天鹅小姐，你不打算开个…传送门，之类的吗？
E: Miss Black Swan, do you not intend to open some sort of... teleporter?

C: 还残留着些微火星，始作俑者大概率还没走远。
E: They're still smoldering — the culprit can't have gotten far.

C: 这里…是死路吧。
E: This is... a dead end.

C: 侦探游戏结束了，你们不该出现在这里。
E: The detective game is over. You shouldn't be here.

C: 你没看错，就是她，那位声名显赫的歌者「知更鸟」。
E: Your eyes aren't deceiving you — it's her, the famous singer Robin.

C: …好吧，我答应你。
E: ...Alright. I accept.

C: 或许我可以帮你。
E: Maybe I can help.

C: 「所谓的不可能之事，只是尚未到来之事」……
E: "The so-called impossible is merely something that has yet to happen"...

C: 砂金对她投入了相当多的关注。但对这位巡海游侠…我们目前知之甚少，做不出什么判断。
E: Aventurine has devoted considerable attention to her. But this Galaxy Ranger... we know hardly anything about her and can't rush to any conclusions.

C: …我也在考虑这个可能性，尤其是…他对你格外看重，屡次刻意接近。或许他也不清楚你的虚实，还在反复试探。
E: ...I was also considering this possibility, especially... because he respects you so much, and has sought you out before a few times. Perhaps he's also unsure of your intentions, and is probing you.

C: …就到这里吧。我暂且相信你没有敌意。
E: ...Let's leave it at that. For now, I'll choose to believe that you bear no hostility.

C: 姐姐，不要怕。卡提卡人很笨，但我很聪明，和他们玩「游戏」，赢的一定是我。
E: Sister, don't be afraid. The Katicans are fools, but I'm smart. I played a "game" with them, and I won.

C: 好了，快过去吧，别让星期日先生等急了。
E: Enough, get going. Don't keep Mr. Sunday waiting.

C: 看来我布置的谜题对你还是太简单了，公司的使节。
E: It seems my puzzles are too effortless for you, IPC Ambassador.

C: 但有一件事，我是要质问你的，那就是你的才智偏偏用错了地方，令你约见不该约见的人，出现在不该出现的场合…目睹了不应发生的{RUBY_B#知更鸟案}惨剧{RUBY_E#}。
E: But there's one thing I must ask you — that is, you've used your wisdom at the wrong place to meet the wrong person and put yourself in a situation where you shouldn't be... witnessing a {RUBY_B#Robin's Case}tragedy{RUBY_E#} that shouldn't have happened.

C: …行吧，只拿回礼金也可以，这你总该给我了。一个商人如果没有交易的筹码，恐怕寸步难行啊。
E: ...Sure. The gift money is good enough. I suppose you wouldn't mind that? After all, a merchant can't function without a bargaining chip.

C: ——请你个大头鬼！这群记吃不记打的家伙，都说了工作时间不要乱喝东西！
E: I'll request a beating for you lot! You've been told not to drink during work hours!

C: 怎、怎么又是你…又想来找茬？这次我们可不怕你！
E: I—It's you again... Back for more trouble? We're not afraid of you this time!

C: 无名客竟也和家族搅和在一起了…天意弄人啊。
E: The Nameless involved with The Family... What an unpredictable twist of fate.

C: 潮湿的海风里，她谈起自己的青春——就像许多渴望财富与机遇的人们，他们为了追逐梦想来到匹诺康尼，他的意识却消失在了梦海深处。
E: In the humid sea breeze, she spoke of her own youth — like many who desired wealth and love, they came to Penacony to pursue their dreams. Alas, her lover's consciousness was lost in the dark depths of the Sea of Dreams.

C: …很符合无名客的「开拓」精神。
E: ...A fitting metaphor for the Nameless' Trailblazing spirit.

C: …哈哈哈哈哈，可以！没想到是友军，他宝贝了个腿的，看来我真是撞大运了。
E: Hahahaha, sure! Never thought I'd come across an ally. Fudge, what a stroke of luck!

C: ——敬已死的和将死的人。
E: ...To the dead and the dying.

C: 要是你们真想深入这起案子，就得先搞明白家族真正的「难处」。
E: If you really want to delve deeper into this case, you need to understand the true "problem" with The Family.

C: 原来如此，很有趣的技艺。
E: I see. What an interesting technique.

C: …伟大的揭幕表演，你真觉得自己能做到吗？
E: ...A grand unveiling. You really think you can pull it off?

C: 可以为我拍张照吗？就当是留个纪念。
E: Can you take a photo for me? I want a memento.

C: 那我一定会非常乐意赌一把的。
E: Then, I would be quite happy to make that wager.

C: 哈努兄弟！你…要去哪儿？
E: Brother Hanu! Where... are you going?

C: {NICKNAME}说得也有道理，毕竟完全猜不透接下来会发生什么……
E: {NICKNAME} also makes a good point. We're completely in the dark on what's going to happen next...

C: 主角就是为此刻而存在的！
E: I Am the Bone of My Bat. Stellaron Is My Body and Trailblaze Is My Blood.

C: 女士们，先生们，各位逐梦客，富豪，「钟表匠」和家族的贵宾——
E: Ladies, gentlemen, dream seekers, tycoons, esteemed guests of the Watchmaker and The Family...

C: 而后，在安眠者的摇篮中，在「盛会之星」的美梦深处——
E: Thereafter, in the cradle of slumberers, deep within the sweet dream of the Planet of Festivities —

C: 笑死了，这帮傻宝编的故事越来越离谱，还说巡海游侠全都被原始博士变成长臂猿了，正在哪个山沟里荡秋千呢。
E: This is hilarious. The tale that this bunch of fools spin is getting out of hand — there's even a bit about the Galaxy Rangers being turned into gibbons by Dr. Primitive, and they're in some valley screwing around on swings.

C: 知道么？第一次来到梦想之地的人，会下意识地停下脚步，确认自己仍站在坚实的土地上。然后，他们会不约而同地抬头望向天空。
E: Did you know? People who come to the land of dreams for the first time, they'll subconsciously stop to reaffirm that they're still walking on solid ground. And then, they will unanimously raise their heads to gaze at the sky.

C: 不用紧张，你们执勤辛苦了。现在情况还好吗？
E: Hey, don't sweat it. You guys have a tough job, I know how it is. How's the situation looking?

C: 唔，这就没有了…但请放心，流梦礁不大，也不像美梦那样繁华，但安全保障可是一等一的。
E: Oh, I haven't... But please rest assured — Dreamflux Reef is a small place, and it's not as bustling as the beautiful dream, but its safety is unmatched.

C: 放过我吧，放过我吧…我一生积德行善，怎么死了还不得安息……
E: Let me go. Let me go... I've only done good in my life. Why can't I rest in peace after death...

C: 星核已经被封印了？
E: The Stellaron has been completely sealed?

C: 我就当这是个美好的愿景吧。若果真如此，我也不必向各位发出邀请了。
E: I wish that were the truth! But, if that were the case, I wouldn't have invited all of you.

C: 「罪罚」？开始装圣人了，哈？告诉你，家族没资格审判我，你更不行。
E: My "sins"!? Starting to sound like a saint, eh? Let me tell you something — Neither The Family nor you have the right to judge me.

C: 当然有啊。只是…那其中也包含了你的愿望，大家的愿望。那会是一片真正的乐园，所有人都能从中获得安宁。
E: Of course, I do. It's just that... it includes your wish and everyone else's. I long for a true paradise where everyone can find peace.

C: 然后，我们就在其中搭一个舞台，邀请所有人来看我们的演出，这样我和哥哥的愿望都能实现了，就用「齐响诗班」的力量。
E: Then let's build a stage there and invite everyone to our performance so that both our wishes come true, through the power of the Harmonious Choir.

C: 正是，梦主大人。一旦谐乐大典开始，星核的力量将随着歌声传遍整个匹诺康尼…届时，梦中的所有人都将无法从梦中醒来。
E: Indeed, Dreammaster. Once the Charmony Festival begins, the Stellaron's powers, along with the song will be broadcast across the entire planet of Penacony... And then, everyone in their dreams will be unable to awaken.

C: 对不起，知更鸟，唯独你…我不想你知道这一切。可惜，事与愿违。
E: Sorry, Robin, it's just you... I did not wish for you to know this. It's a pity that things have turned out this way.

C: 呃…啊？
E: Umm... what do you mean?

C: 没错。
E: That's right.

C: 嘿，送的不喝白不喝……
E: Hah, it's on the house anyway...

C: 没准这一切就是「同谐」希佩的指示呢。你觉得这事不合理，那是因为人做不出来。
E: Maybe it's Xipe the Harmony pulling the strings. You find it beyond human understanding because it wasn't arranged by humans at all.

C: 唯有如此，我才能保障各位的安全……
E: This is the only way I can ensure everyone's safety...

C: 你的备用计划真不少。
E: You sure have a lot of cards up your sleeve.

C: 现在向我们走来的，是匹诺康尼十大富豪之一，苏乐达™商业帝国的缔造者——艾迪恩先生！
E: Coming towards us now, is one of Penacony's top ten wealthiest tycoons, and the SoulGlad™ business empire's founder — Mr. Aideen!

C: 三月七小姐，你呢？
E: Miss March, how about you?

C: 我穷困潦倒，她生活平凡。
E: I fell into poverty, while she's leading a normal life.

C: 哼，哼，哼——
E: Hmph, hmph, hmph...

C: 星期日先生，就算橡木家系的诸位不能完全同意有关星核的安排，现在恐怕也不是对匹诺康尼的过去和未来高谈阔论的时候吧？
E: Mr. Sunday, even if the members of the Oak Family can't fully agree on what to do about the Stellaron, now's not exactly the time to be holding an extensive discourse about Penacony's past and future, is it?

C: 这是因为那家伙偷走了迷钟先生的零件啾！我想帮它拿回来，结果不小心把自己送进烤炉了啾…你们拿去吧，小心烫手啾！
E: Because that fella stole one of Mr. Big Ticker's parts, tweet! I wanted to help retrieve it, but I accidentally got myself stuck in the oven, tweet... Go ahead and get it, but be careful, it's hot, tweet!

C: 事已至此，只好使用「钟表把戏」了——
E: Since it's come down to this, I'll have to use Clockwork...

C: …不，不行。海选规则亦神圣不可侵犯，一如「纯美」本身。
E: ...No, that won't do. The rules of the contest are sacred and inviolable, just like the Beauty.

C: 现在，我将把选择的权利交给各位。面对此情此景，你们会如何抉择？
E: Now, I pass the power of choice to you all. Faced with this situation, what choice would you make?

C: 做出选择。
E: Make the decision.

C: 提出这些问题，只是为了阐明一件事：匹诺康尼的困境无法由「同谐」拯救，真正能建立起美梦乐园的——唯有以强制弱的「秩序」。
E: Raising these questions merely serves to illustrate one point: The plight of Penacony cannot be salvaged by the Harmony. The true foundation for a Sweetdream Paradise can only be established through the Order where the strong govern the weak.

C: 唔，梦泡的事我懂的不多。但如果各位想弄明白这幢大房子是什么…我会努力试试的！
E: Hmm, I don't know much about dream bubbles, but if you want to figure out what this mansion is... I'll do my best!

C: 也许每个远离家乡的冒险者心中都会有这么一座喷泉。纵使大海的那一头充满未知，家门口的喷泉却是爷爷的罗盘，总能引领他回到思念的亲人身边。
E: Perhaps every adventurer far from home carries a fountain within their soul. Even though the other side of the sea remains shrouded in the unknown, the fountain in front of his house serves as a compass, leading him back to his cherished ones.

C: 嗯，从米沙的描述来看，梦泡里的场景也都是他童年时的回忆。
E: Yeah, based on Misha's recollections, the scenes in the dream bubble appear to be his childhood memories.

C: 当然，都走到这一步了，还有「前进」以外的选项吗？
E: Of course. We've come this far. Surely there's no other option than moving forward.

C: 你这是打算和家族破罐子破摔？
E: So? A desperate struggle against The Family?

C: 我怕会忘记和她一起走过的三十天，就像我生命中的每个三十一天。它们中的大部分已经同雨水一起逝去，消失在看不见的彼岸。
E: I'm afraid I'll forget the thirty days I spent with her, just like all the other days in my life. Most of them have already washed away with the rain, disappearing into an unseen realm.

C: 可匹诺康尼并未出现「繁育」的子嗣。我可否理解为是「天外合唱班」的残党潜伏于家族中，并且想要复活一位陨落的星神？
E: But I don't see any descendants of the Propagation in Penacony. Could it be that the remnants of Beyond the Sky Choir are hiding within The Family, trying to resurrect a fallen Aeon?

C: 可计划有变。身为她的兄长，我知道为「秩序」献唱必不是她的本愿。这里有我足矣。
E: But the plan has changed. As her brother, I know she doesn't want to sing for the Order, so I'll take her place.

C: 「这便是头一日。」
E: "That marked the first day."

C: 「非<color=#dbc291ff>宁静</color>无以于死去的幻影中解放。」新至的主人如是说。
E: "In the absence of <color=#dbc291ff>calmness</color>, there exists no path to liberation from the clutches of death," proclaimed the new master.

C: 走吧。幕前剧结束后…就该是谐乐大典的重头戏了。
E: Let's go. Once this stage play concludes... it'll be time for the main event — the Charmony Festival.

C: 看来你状态不错，还能记住这种细枝末节的事…那我放心咯。
E: Looks like your mind's still in one piece, if you're able to remember such details... Well that's reassuring.

C: 呃…其实我一个人就可以收拾好啦……
E: What? I can pack it myself, you know...

C: 你在碎碎念什么？
E: What are you mumbling about?

C: 不行！我们是<unbreak>12</unbreak>+列车！
E: No way! Our express is only rated <unbreak>12</unbreak>+!

C: 谢了！{M#哥们}{F#姐们}！来点便宜的就行，我不挑嘴的。
E: Thanks, {M#brother}{F#sister}! Any low-cost swill will do, I ain't fussy.

C: ——<color=#dbc291ff>忆域中诞生的生命绝无可能出现在现实中</color>。那么，他又为何会在现实的「白日梦」酒店里与你相遇？
E: ...<color=#dbc291ff>A life born in the Memory Zone could never manifest in reality</color>. So, why did he appear in The Reverie Hotel in reality?

C: 被假扮成桑博的花火袭击…
E: I was attacked by Sparkle disguised as Sampo...

C: 首先，列车长要好好感谢大家。如果不是你们挖掘出了匹诺康尼的真相，我可能再也没法得知米哈伊尔他们的下落了……
E: Firstly, Pom-Pom wishes to thank everyone. If it weren't for you all unearthing the truth about Penacony, Pom-Pom would have never known where Mikhail and the rest had gone...

C: 流萤，萨姆
E: Firefly, SAM

C: 永远纪念
E: In Loving Memory

C: 我们就必须让匹诺康尼的所有人<color=#dbc291ff>「想要从梦中醒来」</color>。
E: We must make everyone in Penacony <color=#dbc291ff>want to wake up</color>.

C: 我…已经死了啊。
E: I... I'm already dead.

C: 但如果只是赌着玩玩，那就照我们第一次见面时那样——就赌我的命，女士。
E: But if it's just a friendly bet, I'll put on the line what I did when we first met. I'll bet my life, ma'am.

C: 若无「秩序」，弱者何以为善？
E: Without Order, how can the weak be righteous?

C: 星核怎么样了？
E: What happened to the Stellaron?

C: 哦…明白了，我这就去传达。
E: Oh... got it. I'll do it right away.

C: 苜蓿草家系会见了公司？
E: The Alfalfa Family had a meeting with the IPC?

C: 稍等，我还想和大家聊聊。
E: Just a moment. I'd like to talk to everyone.

C: 但「同谐」的惩戒在所难免，等待他的将是一场审判，至于细节…家族不愿透露太多。
E: However, facing punishment from the Harmony is inevitable. He will face a trial. As for further details... The Family would rather not disclose them.

C: 「血肉孱弱，而我心坚如辉石。若非如此，则『存护』之道无以立足。」
E: "Mortal flesh is fragile, yet my heart is unyielding like the monolith. For without this resolve, the way of Preservation would fade into oblivion."

C: 我说的！
E: I did!

C: 我需要你帮忙找一枚炸弹。
E: I need your help finding a bomb.

C: 你要透过现象看本质，而我的本质就在桶里。
E: You have to look past the surface to see my true essence, and my essence is within this can.

C: 炸弹？天啊，我可不是炸弹。
E: Bomb? Gosh, I'm not a bomb.

C: 我们从中看到自我，然后…得以「存在」。
E: Within them, we glimpse our own essence, and thus... we truly "exist."

C: 没错，帕姆只是在生气…才不是因为米沙、铁尔南、拉扎莉娜他们——
E: That's right. Pom-Pom is just angry... It's not because of Misha, Tiernan, Razalina and the rest...

C: 蕉——蕉！
