E: Bana, bana!

C: 如此连贯的忍•真言，不愧是苦茶大师！在下定会努力修行，终有一日成为「缭乱忍侠」！
E: An astounding recitation of the ninja mantra, Master Kucha! I swear I will train hard until I become the Dazzling Ninja!

C: 把学业和生活的烦恼都抛到脑后，尽情挥洒自己的个性吧，将热爱的事物，比如这只睡蕉小猴，带往校园的每一个角落！
E: Leave your worries over school and life behind and express yourself! Spread the love of your favorite things, such as Slumbernana Monkey, to every corner of the campus!

C: 这学校的气氛也太好了吧！
E: Woah, the hype on campus is real!

C: 嗯，这的确是你最重要的身份，很「诚恳」的答案。
E: Mm-hmm, that is indeed an important aspect of your identity. A very honest answer.

C: 强调自己最尊贵的身份来彰显个人价值，可谓「精明」。
E: Emphasizing your most respectable status to demonstrate your personal worth. Very astute.

C: 重来一次吧，ACTION——
E: Let's take it from the top once more. ACTION!

C: 那你接受了吗？
E: Did you accept the assignment?

C: 行啦行啦，知道你的明星气质把大导演迷倒了，别炫耀了。
E: Alright, alright, I get it. You won over the big bad director with your superstar aura. You don't have to show off.

C: 所有小猴跳起的瞬间
E: The moment all little monkeys jump

C: 没什么事儿
E: No.

C: 好啊，那就直接来，玩忍者潜入的有一个就够了。
E: Then bring it on, baby! One ninja's more than enough for this game of infiltration.

C: 什么玩意？
E: What are you even saying!?

C: 他们抛弃外面的美梦，只是为了做回自己。你觉得这么群人，会因为区区危机就向家族低头？
E: They gave up on those sweet dreams out there just so they can be true to themselves. You reckon such people would grovel at the feet of The Family over a mere crisis?

C: 这倒不会…凡是和音律相关的，我多少都会。
E: No, that's not it... I know a thing or two regarding everything related to tunes.

C: 牛仔？是那时候的…难道说知更鸟小姐……
E: A cowboy? Oh, right... the same guy as the other time! Could Miss Robin be...?

C: 算了，疯了这么多，也不差你一个了，那就过去看看吧。
E: Never mind. What's one more loony to the count? Let's go see what's going on then.

C: 蕉蕉蕉，蕉蕉蕉……
E: Bana bana, bana bana...

C: 蕉！蕉蕉蕉！
E: Ba! Banana!

C: ——怎样都好，我真的很需要学分呀！
E: —Whatever it takes! I really need to earn my credits!

C: 乱、乱破同学……
E: R—Rappa...

C: 哇！听起来好有意思，可以内推我们吗？
E: Wow, that sounds like a lot of fun! Can you get all of us in?

C: 无论穷人还是富人，大部分人来匹诺康尼，就是为了「更有意义的生活」。
E: Both rich and poor alike come to Penacony in the hope of leading a more fulfilling life.

C: …我有个想法，{NICKNAME}，你能对它使用「钟表把戏」吗？
E: ...I have an idea, {NICKNAME}. Can you use Clockwork on it?

C: 痛快，好……
E: Sweet. Alright then...

C: 当然，我也明白，仇恨不是那么容易被抹去的事物。
E: I know very well hatred isn't something that can be easily erased.

C: 忍者伺机而动，等待亦是正解。
E: Ninjas only strike when the opportunity presents itself. Waiting might be the right course of action to take for now.

C: 试问：何为忍侠，何以成为忍侠？
E: Pray tell, what does it mean to be a Ninja Hero? And how does one become a Ninja Hero?

C: …咳咳，当然！
E: ...Ahem. Why, yes!

C: 押忍！经此苦行三千夜，在下将如忍侠一般…无可匹敌。
E: Osu! Having persevered through unending nights of tribulations, I now boast... the unrivaled stature of a Ninja Hero.

C: 大师不必苦恼。区区皮肉之苦，无法摧垮在下的忍•魂。
E: Do not be troubled over me, Master. Mere physical suffering can never devastate my ninja spirit.

C: 你可以画任何东西，诠释你心中所想的画卷。这是属于你自己的忍法。
E: You may paint anything that you wish. This is your own ninjutsu.

C: 朋友！把枪放下，我们这么多年同窗，你不可以——
E: W—Wait, my friend! Please... Please, put the gun down. We've been classmates for so many years now. You can't—

C: ACTION，出发蕉！
E: Action! Let's go, bana!

C: 寻觅「忍道」者，即为忍徒。秉持「忍道」者，即为「忍者」。贯彻「忍道」者…即为忍侠！
E: One who seeks the way of the ninja is a Ninja Initiate. One who upholds the way of the ninja is a Ninja. And one who lives by the way of the ninja... is a Ninja Hero!

C: 他宝贝的，费了这么大功夫，最后扑了个空？
E: Forkin' hell! That muddle-fudger still got away even after all our effort?

C: 但我们要去的地方不是那里，而是左边。
E: But that's not our destination. We're heading to the left.

C: 那就出发吧。感谢两位英勇奉献，由我——
E: Thank you both for your valor. Time to get to work, then. Let me have the honor of...

C: 敬请合上双目，屏住呼吸……
E: Please close your eyes and hold your breath...

C: 「那么，上前来吧——」
E: "Very well. Come forth, then..."

C: 想到一起去了。依经验来看，遭到星核污染的世界，多少都与「毁灭」有点关系。
E: That's what I was thinking too. From past experience, the Destruction has always been involved in some way when it comes to a world corrupted by a Stellaron.

C: 好！缇安记得，*我们*要帮阿雅去问问大树，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}愿不愿意去奥赫玛做客……
E: Okie-dokie! Trianne remembers that we need to help Agy ask the Big Tree whether {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} would be willing to visit Okhema...

C: 可现在…树庭的使者也好，泰坦也好，似乎都无动于衷。
E: Yet... it seems both the Grove's messengers and the Titan are indifferent to our arrival.

C: 喔…真的亮了！
E: Oh... It really lit up!

C: ——他就在树冠附近！虽然感应很微弱，但和刚才的仙女木们不一样。
E: He's near the treetop! Even though our perception of him is very weak, it's not like the White Dryads from before.

C: 这里的记忆，味道十分强烈……
E: The memories here have a very intense smell...

C: 我看到她和缇安大人了！…可她们在围着谁呢？
E: Look, there she is... and Lady Trianne! But who's that they're looking at?

C: 呵呵…好生伶俐哪。
E: Hehe... How smart.

C: 我听人们说，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的火种已经被您接回来了……
E: I heard you retrieved {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} Coreflame...

C: 还没到精彩处呢，你怎么就脸红了？
E: ...Why are you red-faced already? We haven't even gotten to the best part yet!

C: 够了！朕心意已决。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的战魂必须用这孩子的命延续。
E: Enough! My decision is final. We must use this child's life to preserve the soul of the great {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

C: 吾儿…迈德漠斯。
E: My son... Mydeimos.

C: 哈…别装深沉了，朋友。感谢你在危机关头拉了我一把，但依我看，你也没做好试炼的准备吧？
E: Ha... There's no point in pretending to be profound, my friend. Thank you for helping me out when I was in a tight spot, but it seems to me that you aren't prepared for the trial either.

C: …杀死了<color=#dbc291ff>昔涟</color>。
E: ...killed <color=#dbc291ff>Cyrene</color>.

C: 「多好啊，迈德漠斯…我终于能将你成王的讯息带向冥界了……」
E: "This is perfect, Mydeimos... I can finally deliver the news of you ascending the throne to the nether realm..."

C: 那不如，就去最大的浴池吧！
E: How about we go to the biggest bath?

C: 看你满脸疲惫，明日出发前还是多睡会儿为好……
E: You look tired. You should get some sleep before we set off tomorrow...

C: 啊，迈德漠斯……
E: Ah, Mydeimos...

C: 为什么……
E: Why...
You █ won't █ █ make █ ██ it to the end.███ █ ██ █

C: 可在那之前，必须先擦亮因为分裂而变得浑浊不清的记忆，*我们*希望能将真相原原本本地呈现给大家，而不是有所隐瞒。
E: But first, we need to restore the memories that have been blurred by the fragmentation. We hope to present the full truth to everyone, without hiding anything.

C: 不说这个了，缇安忽然觉得，这里好像很熟悉！
E: Well, never mind. Trianne suddenly feels like this place is quite familiar!

C: 至少它没有直接赶走*我们*。
E: At least they didn't toss us out straight away.

C: 和你的处境很像啊。
E: He sounds a lot like you.

C: 为何发笑？
E: What's the reason for the laughter?

C: 「团结」的神，如何？或者…「存护」？这名字是丹恒告诉我的。
E: How about the god of "Solidarity"? Or... "Preservation"? Dan Heng mentioned that one to me.

C: 别让我们的王蒙羞！
E: We won't bring dishonor to the king!

C: 但回答我，纷争之子，缘何，为她架起盾牌？
E: But answer me this, child of Strife. Why do you raise your shield for her?

C: 无名客走到哪，麻烦就跟到哪。
E: Where a Nameless goes, trouble follows.

C: 白厄、遐蝶、万敌、风堇…我和吾师在世间寻觅千年，才终于找到了他们。
E: Phainon, Castorice, Mydei, and Hyacine... Tribbie and I devoted a millennium scouring the world, only to find these few people.

C: 是…仪式出了差错么？
E: ...Did something go wrong with the ceremony?

C: 在玫瑰色的天际中，你会看到一片银白的浅滩。那是旅途的终点，没有风雪、严寒、骤雨，没有人会受到悲伤的感染…妈妈就在那里等你。
E: In the rosy horizon, you'll see a silver-white shoal. It marks the end of your voyage — a haven free from storms, cold, and heavy rains. No sorrow can linger there... That is where I'll be waiting for you.

C: 如果黑潮的彼岸，「创世」的尽头，真的存在那样一片天地……
E: If such a place really exists on the shore beyond the black tide and at the end of "Genesis"...

C: 但我更害怕的是，你会把自己和翁法罗斯绑得太紧…如果真的接过了那位泰坦的神职，你还有机会把它放下么？
E: But what concerns me even more is that you'll further bind yourself to Amphoreus... If you truly assume that Titan's divinity, do you believe you'll be able to lay it down again?

C: 呵…忘了还有你，不好意思。
E: Heh... I forgot about you. My apologies.

C: 此前没来得及和二位说明，其实我和那刻夏老师对黑潮早有顾虑，已经有所准备。
E: I didn't get to tell you this before, but Anaxa and I already have our misgivings about the black tide, so we've made preparations.

C: 我倒也不是很想赢。
E: I'm not that eager to win, honestly.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，你的猜测已经很接近了，孩子。
E: Hohohoho! You're already getting close, kid.

C: 那就请赶快派出猎犬，对这个通缉犯重拳出击！
E: Then we should send out the Bloodhounds and take that criminal down immediately!

C: 没有「真名」，没有「宝具」，只剩这可笑的戏剧天赋。但我仍会竭尽自己微薄的力量，帮助你，也为我自己，赢取向圣杯许愿的机会。
E: No True Name. No Noble Phantasm. Just this ridiculous talent for theatrics. But I'll do what I can, however little that may be. I'll fight for you and myself to earn a chance to wish upon the Holy Grail.

C: 天环翅堡，不是天环能吃饱吗？
E: Just in case some of them fly away.

C: 隐喻时间变化的十二时刻，还有位居所有时刻中心的这枚{RUBY_B#大剧院}「月亮」{RUBY_E#}。
E: The Twelve Hours that referenced the passage of time, and this {RUBY_B#Grand Theater}"moon"{RUBY_E#} placed right at the heart of it all.

C: 我去给你找一匹践踏者来…
E: I'll find you a Trampler...

C: 关于过去，我也记得的不多…
E: I... don't remember a lot about my past...

C: 为什么当时一念之差你没有登上星穹列车呢？这不重要了。眼前的地概科员看着你，也许是在组织安慰的措辞，也许是在咂摸几句玩笑带过这尴尬的凝重气氛。到最后，他开口了——
E: Why didn't you step aboard the Astral Express back then, on that split-second impulse? It no longer matters. The researcher in the Department of Cosmic Geography standing before you watches you closely, perhaps searching for words of comfort, or maybe looking for the right joke to shatter the heavy silence. Eventually, he speaks.

C: 一点也不好！你内心发出嘶吼，但愤怒稍纵即逝。
E: This is all wrong! You scream internally, but the fury is fleeting.

C: 无名客的生活并不轻松，在离开这里后，有些乘客曾和我们短暂同行，但如今都各自散去了。
E: Life as a Nameless isn't easy. After we left the space station, we did have some passengers traveling with us for a short time, but they've all gone their separate ways now.

C: （预约未来一个月的地概科会议，应该比昨天轻松一些吧。）
E: (Scheduling Department of Cosmic Geography meetings for the next month... this should be easier than yesterday, right?)

C: 我将带头冲锋。
E: I'll lead the charge.

C: 你谁来着？
E: Who are you again?

C: 那当然是因为——我是主角！你们这些臭跑龙套的待遇能和我比？我已经等不及听这些家伙在这场恐怖展映会里发出震耳欲聋的尖叫了——
E: And why have you been reduced to this, may you ask? Because now I am the protagonist! You extras will never be treated in the same way as me! I can't wait to hear what kind of petrified screams you'd be making in this horror show...

C: 「此地本是公司流放犯人的监狱，布满了阻止出逃的致命机关。而监狱中的犯人早已消失殆尽，只剩一群前来索命的怨灵。」
E: "This place was once an IPC prison, where criminals were banished. Its deadly traps ensured none escaped. Now, the inmates have passed, leaving only bloodthirsty, vengeful spirits."

C: 锯掉砂金的腿。
E: Saw off Aventurine's leg.

C: 不能离开的房间和马上就要爆炸的炸弹——说得确实煞有介事，但是……
E: A sealed room. A bomb about to go off. It sounds dramatic, but...

C: 现在，这家伙肚子里装了三位从者，而最坚固的城堡，往往都是从内部被打破的。
E: Now he's got three Servants in his stomach, while the strongest fortresses always fall from the inside.

C: 就这？当年阿斯德纳监狱的看守们可比这些东西难对付多了。
E: That's it? The guards back in Asdana Prison were tougher than these things.

C: 这建议的确值得参考。
E: I might give it a thought.

C: 御主，你还好吧？
E: Master, are you all right?

C: 喜欢用同谐的力量给我找茬？那就把你们的歌者分离成一团散沙，看还有谁能帮你们走出我的噩梦乐园。
E: Love using your little Harmony tricks on me, huh? Then I'll scatter your singer across my nightmare park and see who's helping you to get out of here.

C: 一辈子都只能玩小小哈努行动的恐惧，就用你的身体好好体会。
E: Now you'll know the horror of being trapped in Hanu's Adventure... for life.

C: 发出困惑的*哼*。
E: Let out a confused *hmph*.

C: 谢啦伙计！这玩意儿的狗头我们可就抢下喽。
E: Thanks, pal! We'll be taking this thing's head now.

C: 各位，看来我不能陪你们走下去了！但我很庆幸，我是为了正义，为了保护他人而死的呱。
E: I... can't keep going with all of you... But I'll die happy... knowing that I gave my life for justice... to keep others safe...

C: 不要得意，导演他会为我报仇的。我，我——
E: Don't get smug, the director will avenge me. I, I—

C: 唉，斯科特先生，我知道你在本部门干得不如意，但如果你能表现出足够的诚意，战略投资部或许可以给你一个更好的岗位——
E: Ah, Mr. Skott, I know things haven't been going smoothly for you in your department, but if you can show enough commitment, the Strategic Investment Department might have a better spot for you —

C: 我还没有……
E: I'm not...

C: 她这会儿还在匹诺康尼吧，不去见见？
E: She should still be in Penacony. Aren't you going to look for her?

C: 这根本不合理吧，它把扭蛋收回去不就行了？
E: Did they have to do that!? They could've just recalled the capsule!

C: 让它就此消散吧。
E: Time for it to disappear for good.

C: 感激不尽。
E: You have my gratitude.

C: 可艾迪恩公园跟你有什么关系？创始人是你乔装打扮的？
E: But what has Aideen Park got to do with you? Don't tell me that the founder's one of your disguises?

C: 哎呀，这位的观点也相当有见地。
E: Oh, she makes a valid point, too.

C: 「别害怕。」
E: "Don't be afraid."

C: 那是…看起来很熟悉。
E: That... looks so familiar.

C: 花火，怎么是你！
E: Sparkle? How!

C: 圆滑周到的商人。
E: A shrewd merchant.

C: 俗话说因祸得福，恰恰是这趟美梦之旅让停云看清了自己。
E: I've come to see myself clearly in this dream journey. Perhaps it's what people call a blessing in disguise.

C: 我相信你是个有能力，也有意愿利用一切的人，但那其中绝不包含知更鸟小姐。
E: I believe you're the kind of person that has the ability and desire to use everything to your advantage... but that "everything" does not include Miss Robin.

C: 冒昧问一句，您想要鼓励的人…是谁呢？
E: If you don't mind me asking, who is it that you wish to encourage?

C: 我毕竟要踏上一段未知的旅程，不可能再维持井然有序的生活。就像今天这样，我将不得不和意外同行。
E: I'm about to embark on an unknown journey, where it will be impossible to maintain my orderly life. I will have to navigate unexpected surprises, much like today.

C: 不必妄自菲薄，我们并非水火不容的关系。否则，你也不会在梦主面前对我手下留情。
E: Don't sell yourself short. We're not fundamentally opposed. Otherwise, you wouldn't have shown me mercy in front of the Dreammaster.

C: 你是个完美主义者，总想控制一切，包括自己。但离开匹诺康尼后，前方就只剩下「未知」了，换种生活方式，对大家都好。
E: You're a perfectionist, always trying to control everything — even when it comes to yourself. Although, we're going to be traveling further into the unknown once we leave Penacony. I guess a change of pace could do everyone some good.

C: 别对人类太悲观。
E: Have some hope in humanity.

C: 也许你对人性的看法是悲观的，但「开拓」不一样，我们踏上这条路，首先得学会「相信」。你也得做到。
E: Maybe you're too pessimistic about humanity, but the Trailblaze isn't like that. We had to learn to have faith before embarking on this path. You must do the same.

C: 这次的目的地，我提供不了什么信息。如果好奇，你可以询问那位忆者。
E: I can't provide many details about our destination this time. You can ask the Memokeeper if you want to know more.

C: 好刺眼的光…
E: So blindingly bright...

C: 一、节、车、厢帕！
E: Your~ very~ own~ car~!

C: 简单，当然是三个全都出问题了。
E: Of course. All three.

C: …作为一面镜子，你的幽默感是不是有点过剩了？
E: ...You're just a mirror. I don't need you to take on comic relief too.

C: 无差别。攻击！
E: Anything, everything. Attack!

C: 很遗憾，不能。因为「拒绝配合模块」已经被勾选上了——连我也绕不过它的权限，嘻嘻。
E: Sorry to disappoint. The "Absolutely Not Module" has been enabled, so not even I get to bypass its permissions. Whoopsie.

C: 虽然但是，谁问您了？
E: ...Good to know, but did anyone ask!?

C: 你是在耍我吗……
E: Is this some kind of prank...?

C: 她昏倒了？
E: She fainted?

C: 多说无益，要走，你们就走吧，但剩下的人会留在神殿里，接受万径之门，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的庇佑。
E: I've said my piece. Leave, if that's what you want. Everyone else is staying in this temple, where we enjoy the protection of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus, the Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}.

C: 两位朋友真是义薄云天！我会留在此地保护维尔图斯他们，你们速去速回。
E: You two are truly honorable! I'll stay behind to guard Virtus and the rest. Go quickly and come back safe.

C: 你说的也太轻巧了，别把神迹当成能随意使用的工具！
E: You're putting it too lightly. Don't make miracles sound like a tool you can simply use at will.

C: 「三者开辟天地，三者编织命运。三者捏塑生命，三者引渡灾祸。」
E: "Three carved the heavens and the earth, three wove the threads of fate. Three molded life with their hands, and three guided calamity's gate."

C: …什么？
E: ...Wha?

C: 别慌张！跟在那位大人身边就不会有事。
E: Stop panicking! As long as we're with them, we'll be fine.

C: 「揭开记忆的帷幕——」
E: "Lift thy curtain of memory—"

C: 你们身边更安全。
E: It's safer by your side.

C: 他们的攻击可不分敌我。
E: Their attacks do not discriminate between friend and foe.

C: 骇人的战吼。那就是泰坦？
E: What a horrifying battle cry. Is that a Titan?

C: 但此刻，请允许我先尽到主人的礼仪…接下来的对话会有些漫长，两位贵客，我们找个适合聆听的地方。
E: But, please, let me first properly extend my hospitality to you... The conversation we must have will likely be quite lengthy, so why don't we go somewhere more suitable for that?

C: 好严格的规矩。
E: That's a strict custom.

C: 唉，这下麻烦了。
E: This is not going to go well.

C: 你感兴趣？
E: Do you want to go in?

C: 哦、哦吼、吼吼！这不、这不是万敌阁下嘛！您、您最近可还好啊？
E: O—Oh, roarrr! Isn't this Lord Mydei! H—How have you been lately?

C: （不抖这个机灵）
E: (Don't try to be funny.)

C: 哦吼！我、我知道了，本狮这就去想办法！
E: Roar! Y—You got it. I'll fix that right now!

C: 天外之界？这是可以说的吗？
E: A world beyond the sky? Can you even speak of that?

C: 偏偏这种时候，四周打听下？
E: At a time like this... Why not ask around?

C: 而金线颤动的次数…便是行刑人将要前进的步数。
E: The number of times that the thread trembles... is the number of steps forward that the executioner will take.

C: 只是在温柔的花乡中睡去，没有一丝痛苦…我保证。
E: You'll fall asleep amid the warm embrace of flowers and feel no pain... That I can guarantee.

C: 为了解决这个世界的困扰。
E: To solve the problems plaguing this world.

C: …白厄？
E: ...Phainon?

C: 竟有两位黄金裔愿意为你们作担保，呵…看来是我独断孤行了。
E: So, two Chrysos Heirs are willing to vouch for you. Hah... It seems my actions were too high-handed.

C: 抱歉，我只是在自言自语…两位英雄，请上前聆听泰坦之声吧。
E: Sorry, I was just thinking out loud... Please, step closer and listen to the voices of the Titans.

C: 只在浴宫里躺着可算不上「开拓」。
E: Lounging in a bath chamber isn't exactly trailblazing.

C: 不来个临别的拥抱吗？
E: Shall we have a goodbye hug?

C: 无所谓。这里从不以反抗为耻，无论是敌手还是死囚。
E: Doesn't matter. There's no shame in resistance here, whether it's from an adversary or a convict on death row.

C: 迈德…漠斯？
E: M—Mydeimos...

C: 天衣无缝，做得真不错。
E: Flawless work. Great job!

C: 终于愿意现出真身了吗，泰坦？
E: Finally ready to reveal your true self, Titan?

C: 你们那位朋友…是叫「三月」，对吧？
E: So, that friend of yours... her name is "March"?

C: 它说这个谁懂啊！
E: Who's going to understand that!?

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 我是怕你沉迷。
E: I'm just worried you'll become addicted.

C: 那就是说，我会失而复得。
E: That means you'll come back to me.

C: 我想让你一直记住的事，只有一件：无论你去向何处，身处银河的哪个角落…你永远都可以在我这里找到一座避风港。
E: There's only one thing that I want you to always remember: No matter where you go or which corner of the cosmos you may be in, you will always be able to find a safe haven by my side.

C: 一片静谧。
E: The silence is deafening.

C: 看，预言算碑。说不定可以靠它来打开栅栏。
E: There, a Prophecy Tablet. It could be the key to unlocking the way.

C: 我和万敌在战场上等你。
E: Mydei and I will be waiting for you on the battlefield.

C: 这样，完成。记忆，收集。
E: There, done. Memory, collected.

C: 很多年前，黄金战争接近尾声时，悬锋城举办了最后一次祭典。但以当时的局势，根本没多少异邦的公民敢去参加竞赛。
E: During the final days of the Chrysos War, the final festival took place in Castrum Kremnos. However, due to the tense situation, few outsiders were willing to compete.

C: 请放心，凯妮斯阁下，在神谕的指引下，我们会推翻诸神；而在预言承诺的新世界，将不再有神明凌驾于凡人之上。
E: Do not be concerned, Elder Caenis. Following the prophecy's guidance, we shall cast down the gods — in the new world, no god will stand above humankind.

C: （究竟是什么让它丢弃了原本的神性？答案藏在迷雾后…希望遐蝶和那位异邦客能找到根源。）
E: (What exactly led to their loss of divinity? The answer lies behind the fog... I hope Castorice and that outlander can uncover the truth.)

C: 千百根坚韧的金线探入污染的空洞，揪出了潜藏其中的恶意之物。
E: Hundreds of resilient golden threads reach into the corrupted void, extracting the hidden malevolence within.

C: 你若死在我的矛下，便无需再试着理解这些话语；你若能将我埋葬…答应我，你们会将火种当作柴薪，升起烈焰，继续与黑潮抗争。
E: If you die by my lance, then there's no need to reflect on what I said. But if you should send me to my grave... promise me that you will use my Coreflame to fuel a roaring blaze and continue the fight against the black tide.

C: 这里。这里！
E: Here. Here!

C: 安睡吧……
E: Rest in peace...

C: …嗯，也好。
E: Hm... Very well.

C: 但我希望，会有另一种可能……
E: Still, I can't help but hope for another possibility...

C: 准备接过{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神职吧，开拓者。
E: Get ready to assume {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s divinity, Trailblazer.

C: 我去，什么未来？
E: What!? What future?

C: 当亡灵的感觉还挺酷。
E: It feels quite cool being a departed spirit.

C: {RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}灰黯…之手……{RUBY_E#}
E: {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of... Shadow...{RUBY_E#}

C: 旅人提起枯槁的手指，随后便缄口，沉默不语。
E: The traveler lifts their wrinkled fingers and remains silent.

C: 呵呵，那吾便去周围转上一遭好了。
E: Hehe, I shall depart to explore the surroundings, then.

C: 那是姐姐给我的礼物，按照家里宠物的模样做的玩偶。
E: This is a present that my sister gave to me. It's a doll that was made to look like our family pet.

C: 我成功了，老师。
E: I did it, teacher.

C: 喂，瑟希斯！你对卡吕普索这个名字可有印象？
E: Hey, Cerces! Does the name Calypso ring a bell?

C: 而我，曾是那传统中重要的一环。
E: ...Traditions that I played a major role in.

C: 因为我也是：我不明白，为什么阁下身为天外之人，会以这种残忍的方式早早卷入翁法罗斯的命运……
E: I felt just as confused. Why, as someone from beyond the sky, were you so cruelly dragged into Amphoreus's fate?

C: 修复左边的黄金短矛。
E: Repair the left Golden Short Spear.

C: 二…呵，元老院也找到我，让我确保{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的火种能被交到他们手中。
E: Two... Ha, the Council of Elders also found me and wants me to make sure the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} ends up in their hands.

C: 我找到二位，并告诉你们：以上两件事，我都不想干。
E: I'm telling you that I'm not interested in doing either of those things.

C: 虽然令人不快……
E: I don't like this, however...

C: 请将此触…视作对您的谢礼吧。
E: Please treat this touch... as a token of my gratitude.

C: 我亲见哀地里亚的人们，在死亡面前挺起了胸膛。在命中注定的终局来临前…他们满足于生命已然谱写的一切。
E: I've seen the people of Aidonia stand tall and proud in the face of death. Even before the fated finale arrived, they were already content with the lives that they'd lived...

C: 让我们一起…为众多灵魂照料这片属于他们的、温暖的花海吧。
E: Let's tend the field together and create a warm sea of flowers for all the souls to come.

C: 就让仪式…开始吧。
E: Then... let the ritual begin.

C: 还记得吗？我说过，这恰恰是我最宝贵的天赋之一。
E: Have you forgotten? I told you, that happens to be one of my rare talents.

C: 如果渎职属实，我会大方承认；如果没有，我便不怀担忧。凯妮斯阁下，元老院的信誉并非在朝夕之间建立，也不会在朝夕之间崩溃。
E: If the accusation is true, I will acknowledge it. If not, my conscience stands unburdened. Lady Caenis, the reputation of the Council of Elders was not built in a day, nor will it be shattered overnight.

C: 呵，这就是所谓神谕？听起来只是把我过去、现在和未来成就的一切复述了一遍。
E: Oh, so that's a god's prophecy? It sounds like you just rephrased my past, present, and future.

C: 无意冒犯，我只是提出一种猜想。但如果可以，我希望能得到你的坦诚。
E: I mean no offense. I am merely speculating. But I'd appreciate your honesty, if possible.

C: 看来，黑天鹅小姐的确有所隐瞒。
E: It seems like Miss Black Swan is indeed hiding some things from us.

C: 旅途平安，黑塔女士。
E: Have a safe trip, Madam Herta.

C: 折跃，启动。
E: Warp activated.

C: 哈哈！好个大言不惭的机器人。你觉得只凭自己那点计算，就谈得上了解我了？
E: Haha! What a brazen robot. You think that you can actually understand me through your paltry calculations?

C: 但话都说到这个份上了，不妨讲讲看吧：那后果是什么？
E: But since you've put it that way, why don't you tell me what these consequences will be?

C: 另一边，众人为神力耗尽、化作娃娃的缇安举行了简单的葬礼。接过缇安的遗愿，众人将在逐火之旅的道路上继续向前……
E: On the other side, everyone holds a simple funeral for Trianne, who exhausted her divine powers and turned into a doll. Having accepted Trianne's last wish, the group continues on the path of the Flame-Chase Journey...

C: 看来我在这里不受欢迎呀。
E: Looks like my presence here is quite unwelcome.

C: 在想什么？
E: What are you thinking about?

C: 先收着这份记录吧。希望此行不会空手而归。
E: I'll hold onto this for now. With any luck, this journey won't leave us empty-handed.

C: 老师，你…去到了冥界？
E: Professor... you were in the nether realm?

C: 不记得就对了——
E: Of course you wouldn't remember.

C: 「再创世」是众神约定的救赎之道，应当坚定选择逐火之旅。
E: "Era Nova" is a path of salvation the gods promised. We should not have doubts in the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 所以，眼前这幅景象是……
E: That means that what I'm currently seeing before my eyes is in fact...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「我们」…究竟为何物呢？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>What exactly... are we?</color>

C: 凡人终有一死。日后，一定会有我无比珍视的人离我而去……
E: Death is inevitable. In the days to come, I am certain that someone whom I cherish deeply will leave me for good...

C: 告诉我，在你们以信仰为由压迫手足同胞，令众生陷于无尽暴晒之苦时——可曾料想过，那轮烈日也有坠落的时刻？
E: When you oppressed your own under the guise of faith, leaving countless souls to suffer endlessly under the scorching sun — did you ever consider that even the fiercest sun could one day fall?

C: 请帮帮我们，请拯救我们这些被遗弃的天空之子……
E: Please... help us, the forsaken Skyfolk...

C: 见证天空之子的真实历史。
E: Witness the true history of the Skyfolk.

C: 艾格勒陨落以后，你改变了信仰，奉我为新的神明。
E: You abandoned your old faith and made me your new god after Aquila's fall.

C: 她抛弃了凡人，拥抱了神性…她认为人子不值得拯救。
E: She turned her back on humanity and embraced divinity... She believes we're not worth saving.

C: 成功了！火种响应了呼唤——各位，一起离开这里吧！
E: It worked! The Coreflame responded. Everyone, let's get out of here!

C: （阿提卡斯？这名字耳熟…哦，是他最偏爱的那个祭司学徒吧？人们眼中钦定的下任大司铎……）
E: (Atticus? That name rings a bell... Oh, he's the apprentice the Chaplain favors most, the one everyone expects to be the next Chaplain...?)

C: 唉，真麻烦…算了，为了大家好，我还是检查下各位身上有没有什么可疑物件吧。
E: Ah, such a hassle... Well, for everyone's safety, I might as well check if you're carrying anything suspicious.

C: 是谁干的？
E: Who's responsible for this?

C: 来自四面八方的黑暗恐怕会瞬间吞噬圣城…那场面注定会很凄惨。
E: Darkness will consume the holy city in an instant... and the aftermath will be devastating.

C: 「…于它狂欢的舞步之下，以盛会的喧嚣掩盖世界的心跳。」
E: "...Under the raucous steps of their frenzied dance, the roar of celebration hides the world's heartbeat."

C: 是一台残存至今的「帝皇权杖」啊。
E: ...is an Emperor's Scepter that survived to this day.

C: …它在说什么？
E: ...What's happening?

C: 你的确成长了。
E: You've really grown.

C: 有刺客，快救朕！
E: Assassins. Save me!

C: 呵…竟然能直接叫出我们的名字，看来你对翁法罗斯遗落的历史也颇有研究啊，白厄阁下。
E: Ha... To directly call us by our name, it seems you, Lord Phainon, have studied the forgotten history of Amphoreus quite thoroughly.

C: （迷迷的样子好奇怪，它到底在翻什么书？）
E: (Something's odd about Mem. What are they flipping through?)

C: 即便身处飘摇末世，也总有人能从困局中获益。
E: Even in these crumbling end times, there are always those who find ways to profit from the chaos.

C: 她…？是在说你们的幕后主使么？
E: She...? Are you talking about the mastermind behind all of this?

C: 如果阴谋败露，他们在圣城将如过街狗鼠，人人喊打。哪怕再擅长隐匿行踪……
E: If the conspiracy is exposed, they'll be hunted down in the holy city like rats with nowhere to run. No matter where they hide...

C: 「我坚持。」
E: "I insist."

C: 更好的人！
E: A better people!

C: 但那…也很危险。
E: But that's... dangerous.

C: 作为助讲的风堇小姐…真是那刻夏老师的克星呀。
E: The teaching assistant Miss Hyacine is truly Professor Anaxa's nemesis.

C: 你要如何令我确信，这祝福不会变成诅咒，反而铺就一位年轻后嗣的绝路？
E: How can you convince me that this blessing will not turn into a curse, leading a child like you to your demise?

C: 你要体谅一下小白呀，飞儿。他还这么年轻，就已经把阿雅留下来的职责全都扛在了肩上……
E: Cut Snowy some slack, Ciphy. He's still so young, yet he's shouldering all the responsibilities Agy left behind...

C: 特克菈将军…和史料中记载的形象反差很大，是一位相当温柔的人呢。
E: General Ektra is... so different from how the records described her. She's quite a gentle person.

C: 嘟嘟！嘟！
E: Doot-Doot! Doot!

C: 我们来到这里是为了完成重要的使命…最好不要介入他的战场。你说呢，丹宝？
E: We're here to complete an important mission... We shouldn't interfere with his battlefield. Don't you agree, Dannie?

C: {F#她}{M#他}随便说说的，你别这么轻易就信啦。
E: {M#He}{F#She} just makes things up. Don't take it too seriously.

C: 信奉烈阳的「晖之民」，崇拜雷雨的「雨之民」，以雪为兆的「冬之民」……
E: The Sunfolk worshiped the sun, the Rainfolk were devoted to storms, and the Winterfolk waited for signs in the snow...

C: …这里一片空寂，恐怕没有赢家。
E: ...There's nothing but empty silence here. I fear there were no winners.

C: 是记忆体吗？
E: Is that a memory?

C: 不必惊讶吧？毕竟这是个粉红小狗都会说话的世界……
E: No need to be surprised. After all, this is a world where even a pink puppy can speak...

C: 原来她会说话呀！
E: So she speaks!

C: 你被黑潮所困的岁月里，世界发生了剧变。若我没猜错，战神尼卡多利也是陨落于这几位勇士之手。
E: You've been trapped in time by the black tide, while great change has spread over the world. If I'm not mistaken, the God of War Nikador also fell to the hands of these warriors.

C: 但本能仍在驱使它远离黑暗，逃避黑潮的围堵。
E: But instinct still drives them to flee from the shadows, to evade the black tide's encroachment.

C: 但它仍与这堡垒中的眷属维持着联系。
E: They still maintain a connection with their Kin in this fortress.

C: 你们受到的迫害已经足够深重。为此，我理解你们对我的憎恶…并原谅你们将我驱逐的决定。
E: The persecution you've suffered runs deep. For that, I understand your hatred towards me... and I forgive you for casting me out.

C: 塞涅俄丝，那位英雄…她的想法的确有些天真。
E: Seliose... was indeed rather naive.

C: 也许它们是在守护长眠于此的真相。
E: Perhaps they are protecting the truth slumbering here.

C: 艾格勒逃向了堡垒的另一端…追上它吧。
E: Aquila has fled to the other end of the fortress... Let's chase after them.

C: 抱歉，我并无万全把握，露奈比斯阁下……
E: My apologies, Lady Lunabis. I was not all that certain.

C: 假如火种没被动过手脚，一直原封不动地存放于此……
E: If the Coreflame was never tampered with, and has always remained here untouched...

C: 有流水之处，我便能借它之力涤荡恶浊。
E: Wherever there's flowing water, I can harness its power to purge the filth.

C: 进度条<unbreak>95%</unbreak>了，不让看结局？
E: The progress bar is already at <unbreak>95%</unbreak>, and you're leaving me on a cliffhanger?

C: 但…那恐怕会耗尽我们身上剩下的雅努斯神力。后面的事就都靠你啦，小白。
E: But... that will likely exhaust any remaining power of Janus that we have. After that, the rest is up to you, Snowy.

C: 这个家伙，他一定知道很多。
E: This one knows more than he's telling.

C: 来古士阁下——有关「再创世」的一切，你究竟了解多少？请如实相告！
E: Lord Lygus — How much do you truly know about Era Nova? Tell us everything!

C: 嗯，跟我来，到庭院后面去吧。
E: Yep. Let's head to the back of the courtyard.

C: 入口？
E: An entrance?

C: 爬就爬，我第一个上。
E: Alright then — I'll go first.

C: 它要神谕牌做什么？如果想占卜，直接告诉我就好了呀。
E: What do they need the cards for? If they want a reading, they could just ask me.

C: 而且，这也是所有神谕牌里唯一一张没有负面意象的哦。
E: In fact, it's the only oracle card without a dark side.

C: 但冥冥中总觉得有一个声音在呼唤我，希望我拿起它。又或许，我只有在拿起它之后，才能真正知道它的重量吧。
E: I can't ignore the sense that something is calling me, bidding me to take hold of it. Maybe... its true weight can only be known once it's in my grasp.

C: 而是以这一小步为起点，从一座宁静的小村庄出发，慢慢拓宽「心中的世界」，一边成长，一边救赎……
E: But one who starts small, from a humble village, expanding their "world within" step by step, learning to save others as they grow...

C: 走吧？必须有你在身旁，白厄…还有我。我们心底的勇气才能被唤醒。
E: Shall we? It's only when you're by our side that Phainon and I... that our hearts find their courage.

C: 「『去保护应被保护的人吧。』」
E: "Protect those who must be protected."

C: 正如你所知，迈德漠斯性情高傲，但并非崇尚暴力之人。他向圣城元老提出角斗，只为给族人争取权利，不教他们以低人一等的姿态寄居他乡。
E: As you know, though Mydeimos was proud, he did not engage in needless violence. He challenged the elders of Okhema to a duel, not for glory, but for the rights and dignity of his people. To ensure they wouldn't live as second-class citizens in foreign lands.

C: 好久不见，缇宁大人，白厄，还有……
E: It's so nice to see you all again! Lady Trinnon, Phainon, and...

C: 还在玩过家家的游戏么？
E: Still playing house, boy?

C: 已经…没有回应了吗？
E: You... can't speak anymore?

C: 但…至少，请允许我在兑现誓约前，先暂缓脚步——
E: Please... allow me to pause just a moment before I keep my promise—

C: 清爽多了吧？走，找昔涟去。
E: All awake now? Great, let's go see Cyrene.

C: 你知道这毫无意义。你无法将我杀死。
E: You know this is pointless. You can't kill me.

C: 让它点燃你的血液…你的愤怒…！
E: Feel them set your blood ablaze... your fury...!

C: 那是「翁法罗斯」在哭泣吗？
E: Is that Amphoreus crying?

C: 不，你误会了。
E: No, you misunderstand.

C: 你已经在这条路上走得太远，该讨论一种可能性了：也许你所行的根本不是拯救的道路，只是单纯地把这世界拖入火海而已。
E: You've walked too far down this path. It's time to discuss a possibility: Maybe the road you're walking is not one of salvation, but one that will simply drag the world into the flames.

C: 无妨…我会背负。
E: No matter... I will bear this burden.

C: 难道，你……
E: Wait, you mean...

C: 那就由我跨越旧世界的余烬，不断燃烧……
E: Then let me be the one to step across the ashes of the old world and burn endlessly...

C: 原来，那位白发青年和{RUBY_B#《如我所书》}旅行手记{RUBY_E#}里的故事，真的有迹可循呢。
E: So the white-haired young man and the stories from the {RUBY_B#As I've Written}travel notes{RUBY_E#} are based on reality.

C: 跟着那个声音往前…就能离开这里吗？
E: The voice... is it showing me the way out?

C: 似乎不行呢…听着很奇怪吧？明明是自己的事，语气却像个旁观者。
E: I don't think I can... It sounds weird, doesn't it? It's something that happened to me, but I'm talking as if I'm an observer.

C: 放心，铁墓一时半会儿威胁不到现实。比起自身，姬子他们更在意你的安全。
E: Irontomb can't affect the real world just yet. Don't worry. Himeko and the others are more concerned about your well-being than their own.

C: （冷静分析，这是一场困难重重的战役。我们不能失去刻法勒的火种，还需要找到塔兰顿，或者它的半神，拉拢对方加入对抗「毁灭」的阵营……）
E: (Calm down, and think this through rationally. This is gonna be a very difficult campaign. We can't lose Kephale's Coreflame, and we also need to find either Talanton or their demigod, then convince them to join us in the fight against the Destruction...)

C: 黑潮的气息，变得平静了。白厄…一定在以某种方式和它们抗争吧。
E: The scent of the black tide is now calm. Phainon... must still be fighting them in some way.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>铁墓终会完成。</color>这无关我的布局，无关你的反抗，无关两位天才的智谋——这是确凿无疑的事实，一如博识尊计算中的时刻。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Irontomb will be completed.</color> That will not be affected by my plans, your resistance, or the schemes of the two geniuses. It is an irrefutable fact, just like the Instants in Nous's calculations.

C: 我无法相信你的承诺。
E: I cannot trust any promises you make.

C: 不错，但并非两位熟知的那位凯妮斯。
E: Correct, but not the Caenis you know.

C: 所谓「敌人的敌人就是朋友」——为表敬意，我将此人尸首作为见面礼，献给二位。
E: The enemy of my enemy is my friend, so out of courtesy, I present to you this corpse as a gift.

C: 来古士，难道是他…
E: Lygus? Could he...

C: 城内反对逐火的暴民仍在活跃。他们先前在云石市集闹事，砸毁周边店铺。戍卫队现已羁押主犯，留待问讯。
E: The agitators against the Flame-Chase are still active in the city. They smashed the shops around Marmoreal Market, but the Garrison already arrested the culprits, and now they await interrogation.

C: 晚些时候，凯撒将邀请两位出席同盟会议，与各邦代表共谋逐火征程。正是阁下的到来令我们确信，神谕许诺的未来确凿无疑。在凯撒的统领下……
E: Later on, the Imperator will invite you to attend the meeting of delegates to discuss the Flame-Chase Journey. Your arrival has convinced us that the future promised by the prophecy is certain. Under the Imperator's command...

C: 昨夜彻夜未眠，只是在为难民们编织衣衫和浴巾罢了。黄金战争出于不义，粉碎了他们的尊严，但人们有权维持生活至细微处的体面。
E: I spent all last night weaving clothes and linen for the refugees. The Chrysos War is born of injustice and has shattered their dignity. They deserve at least some basic decency.

C: 因为逐火的新时代容不得朽烂的淤血。对那些恪守旧律、短视的愚民来说，只有放血能帮他们恢复清醒。
E: Because the new era of the Flame-Chase doesn't tolerate stagnant blood. For the ignorant masses who cling to outdated laws, only bloodletting can wake them up.

C: 思考是凯撒赋予公民的权利，我不会对你的想法多加干涉。
E: Thinking is a right given to citizens by the Imperator. I won't interfere with your thoughts.

C: 你们很熟悉吗？
E: Do you know each other well?

C: 所以，抓紧机会，汇报一下目前的进展吧，别让天外的各位久等了……
E: So, let's seize the opportunity and report our current progress. We don't want to keep everyone beyond the sky waiting...

C: 好呀，那玩累了记得回来哦，人家就在这边等你♪
E: Alright, when you've tired yourself out, remember to come back. I'll be waiting for you here ♪

C: 凯撒大人，您的野心果然大过一切。
E: O Great Imperator, your ambition certainly eclipses all things.

C: 您误会了。我只是力求实验自主、缜密、完美，避免节外生枝。暴力干涉只会扩大误差，低效，而又丑陋。
E: You are mistaken. I am only trying to ensure the experiment's autonomy, meticulousness, and perfection, thus avoiding any unexpected outcomes. A forceful intervention will only create larger errors, reduce efficiency, and introduce ugliness.

C: 力量…相当强大…它也许能帮你……
E: Its power... is strong... may be able... to help...

C: 集中精神，与「存护」同调。
E: Focus and resonate with the Preservation.

C: {NICKNAME}——你这家伙，我真是想死你了！
E: {NICKNAME}... I've really, really missed you!

C: 「往昔的涟漪」——是她把这团火藏进了「岁月」的长河，期待心愿能够跨越时间，送往未来的你手中。
E: "Ripples of past reverie"... She hid this fire in the long river of "Time," hoping that her wishes would transcend time to reach your hands in the future.

C: {NICKNAME}…前进…继续「开拓」吧……
E: {NICKNAME}... Keep going... Keep trailblazing...

C: 我会把这一千年的故事都讲给你听。这样一来，它们就不再是我一个人的回忆。
E: I'll tell you the story of this thousand-year journey. That way, it won't just be my memories alone.

C: 「同年，『凯撒』刻律德菈遇刺身亡，『金织』阿格莱雅接过统领职责。人类的第二次逐火之旅，在摇摇欲坠中开启。」
E: "That same year, Cerydra the Imperator was assassinated, after which Aglaea the Goldweaver took command. Thus began humanity's second Flame-Chase Journey, a path hanging by a thread."

C: 我的姊妹！你们终于游来了。
E: My sisters! You're finally here.

C: 梦见孩童将花环戴上我们的骨角，诗人传唱着海妖护世的功绩……
E: I dreamed of children placing garlands on our bone horns, and poets praising the sea sirens for shielding the world...

C: 海妖们被「毁灭」侵蚀，血肉腐败，成为了此世的黑潮造物。
E: The sea sirens were tainted by the Destruction, their flesh rotted away. They became the Black Tide Creatures of this cycle.

C: 你念诗的样子…真美。
E: You look... beautiful... when you read poetry.

C: 剑旗爵…过去的百年里，我已数不清你在此地驻足过几回了。
E: Dux Gladiorum... I've lost count of how many times you've stood here over the past centuries.

C: 你是对的，吕枯耳戈斯。忠诚，诅咒，同胞们的陨落，漫无尽头的等待…对于一条看不见光明的鱼来说，这些枷锁太过沉重了。
E: You're right, Lycurgus. Loyalty, curse, the fall of my kin, and this endless waiting... these shackles are too heavy for a fish that cannot perceive any light.

C: 灰鱼儿，天外的救世主……
E: Gray Fry, Deliverer from beyond the sky...

C: 因此，您也一定能理解：在与「博识尊」同源的代数世界中，你们绝无可能是我的对手。
E: You surely see it... you cannot possibly stand up to me in this algebraic world sharing its origin with Nous.

C: 没有。我有更重要的事要思考。
E: I didn't miss you. I had more important things to think about.

C: 即便「岁月」的权能，也无法调动整台权杖，令翁法罗斯的演算陷入循环……
E: Even the authority of Time cannot command the entire Scepter, nor can it plunge the Amphorean extrapolation into a loop...

C: 我还想在这记忆里确认一事。告诉我，小跟班，在{M#他}{F#她}「开拓」的旅途中——
E: Before we go on, tell me this, sidekick. Throughout {M#his}{F#her} "trailblaze"...

C: 自那逐火的神谕在远方响起，命运就注定了黄金裔要燃烧鲜血，照亮这个黑暗的时代。可若没有我的征服，人们就只是旧王朝的提线木偶。
E: Ever since the Flame-Chase prophecy resounded in the distance, fate has decreed for the Chrysos Heirs to ignite our blood and illuminate this dark age. People would still be puppets of the old dynasty if it weren't for my conquests.

C: 但这次…你的心中…终于找到自己的「律法」了哪……
E: This time... you finally... found your own "Law"...

C: 当你们将忆质用作与我抗衡的手段，何不设想这样一种可能性……
E: You used memoria to resist me, but did you not consider the possibility that...

C: 你说那女人是黑塔？
E: Are you telling me THAT woman is Herta?

C: （终于走到了这里。交还这枚火种，由我成为「负世」的半神，就能终结翁法罗斯悲剧的轮回……）
E: (I'm finally here. Once I return this Coreflame and become the "Worldbearing" demigod, the cycles of Amphoreus's tragedy can finally end...)

C: 可是被遗忘才是生命的常态。宇宙是一片堆满弃物的生荒地，偶有琳琅，但无人捡拾。
E: Yet "being forgotten" is the normal state of life. The universe is like a wasteland filled with rubbish, where occasional treasures lie undiscovered.

C: 当然。要与一位天才相抗，你必须站在同样的高度。
E: Of course. You've got to be at the same level as a genius if you want to contend with them.

C: 言归眼下，丹恒先生——我们对翁法罗斯天体周边进行了通彻的有机信号排查，终于发现了您与{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}的肉身。
E: Back to the topic at hand... Mr. Dan Heng, we did a sweep of the area surrounding Amphoreus's celestial body for organic signals, and we finally discovered the bodies of you and {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 我们和翁法罗斯内部，完全失联了么？
E: Have we completely lost contact with the inside of Amphoreus?

C: 把时间流速的差异考虑进去，在外面耽搁的每一分钟，对{F#她}{M#他}来说都是以年为计的漫长等待……
E: If we take into account the difference in the flow of time, every minute we delay here could be a year of waiting for {M#him...}{F#her...}

C: 没那么复杂。刚才这段路，正是三月七「翁法罗斯之旅」的起点。
E: It's actually not all that complicated. The road we just walked was the beginning of March 7th's "journey in Amphoreus."

C: 什么动静，我碰到什么了？
E: What? Did I touch something I shouldn't have?

C: 所以，你又是何时出现的？
E: Then when did you appear?

C: 它说的话，我好像有印象…
E: What it said... sounds so familiar...

C: 这些符文，都是泰坦？
E: Do all these runes represent Titans?

C: 还记得么？在短暂的人生中，昔涟曾和<color=#dbc291ff>某位星神</color>有过一面之缘。
E: Do you remember? During her brief existence, Cyrene once encountered <color=#dbc291ff>a certain Aeon</color>.

C: 多数情况下，这只是一种自然现象。有些命途行者将之视作荣誉，但令使…必须拥有星神赐福的伟力。
E: Most of the time, a gaze is simply a natural phenomenon, though some pathstriders regard it as a supreme honor. An Emanator, however, must possess power granted by an Aeon's blessing.

C: 「岁月」的神权空缺了。
E: Time's divine authority stood empty.

C: 它的主人，究竟是谁？
E: Who exactly is its master?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>23.815%</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>23.815%</unbreak>...</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>错误进程：解析中……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Process error: Analyzing...</color>

C: 就像花开花落，我讲述，你聆听。
E: I'll read, and you'll listen, like how flowers always bloom then wither.

C: 但是她选择了超脱循环，「灵魂」不会去往西风尽头，而是沉入大墓，将希望延续下去。
E: But she chose to break free from the cycle. The 'soul' will not journey to where the west wind ends, but will descend into the Great Tomb, to carry on hope.

C: 扎格列斯之手，看来这里会用到它。
E: The Hand of Zagreus... Seems like we'll need it here.

C: 话题又绕回了原点呢，我已经让{NICKNAME}做过一次选择了。
E: Same old topic. I already got {NICKNAME} to make a choice.

C: 准备好。这一次，决不能给她任何机会……
E: Get ready. We can't give her any chance this time...

C: 嗯，哼哼哼哼哼哼哼哼……
E: Hmm... Hmhmhmhm... Hmhmhmhm...

C: 「捕捉人家的色彩，我们一起回家！」
E: "Snatch up my colors, okay? Then we can go home together!"

C: 经此一役，我恐怕难以再通过「调律」加入战场。所以……
E: After that battle, I'm afraid I'll no longer be able to join the fight through "tuning." So...

C: 散去，消逝，化作浮沫。
E: Scatter, fade, turn to foam.

C: 那渴求龙之力的巨人，想必也不会善罢甘休。
E: And presumably, that giant who craves the power of dragons won't just let things rest.

C: 饶了我吧，我在古海边喝的苦水还少吗？
E: Spare me, please. I've already suffered enough next to the ancient sea.

C: 你是…贼灵？巴特鲁斯？
E: Are you... the Spirithief? Bartholos?

C: 可看上去，你也还认识这位海瑟音女士。
E: But it seems you still recognize Lady Hysilens.

C: 对了，是《如我所书》…
E: Oh right, it was in As I've Written...

C: 很相似，但又有所不同。
E: It's very similar, yet somewhat different.

C: 「记忆」的漩涡，深不见底……
E: The whirlpool of Remembrance, bottomless and unfathomable...

C: 为了三月七，也为了翁法罗斯……
E: For March 7th, and for Amphoreus...

C: 这是……
E: This is a...

C: 解释一下。
E: Explain.

C: 即便遗忘了一切，我仍相信你能和过去一样，做出正确的抉择。
E: Even if you've forgotten everything, I still believe that you'll make the right choice, like you did in the past.

C: 所以，退下吧。此身从不为「救世」而伫立。
E: So... begone. This body never existed to carry out "Deliverance."

C: 无需再确认两位的决心了。而今，将由我等接过神明的职责，庇佑翁法罗斯众生——
E: There's no need to further confirm your resolve. Today, we inherit the duty of the gods, safeguarding the inhabitants of Amphoreus—

C: 听到了吗？「英雄」啊，我何时忘记过这个词的重量？
E: Did you hear that? "Heroes"... I have never forgotten the weight of that word.

C: 但我认识的人里，仍有一群{RUBY_B#无名客}「英雄」{RUBY_E#}存在。
E: But there is still a group of {RUBY_B#Nameless}"heroes"{RUBY_E#} that I know...

C: 是我亲手扼杀了它。那名为「德谬歌」的生命形态，从最初就被剔除在了演算之外。唯有如此，铁墓才能真正完成——
E: I killed that Titan with my own hands. That life form called "Demiurge" was excluded from the extrapolations from the very beginning. This is the only way to make Irontomb complete.

C: 是「绝灭大君」。
E: The "Lord Ravagers."

C: 与匹诺康尼的梦境截然不同，这里沉淀着真正以万年为计的史诗。
E: Unlike Penacony's Dreamscape, this place has built up a true epic measured in millennia.

C: 往事历历在目，就连每一次横渡冥河的风景，也前所未有地清晰。更不必说逐火之旅的同道，和哀丽秘榭的昔涟……
E: The past remains vivid in my mind. Even the sights along each crossing of the River of Souls have never been clearer. Let alone the companions along the Flame-Chase Journey, or Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae...

C: 哎呀，终于来了，灰子！还有……
E: Oh, finally! Gray Mystery! And...

C: 跨越三千万次轮回，如今，每一位逐火者的光芒，都足以将来路照亮。
E: Across thirty million cycles, the radiance of every Flame-Chaser now shines bright enough to illuminate the path ahead.

C: 没想到，德谬歌竟然是你……
E: So, all along, the Demiurge was you...

C: 换句话说，身为他心中的英雄……
E: In other words, as The Hero Within his heart...

C: 再见啦，理想乡。包裹住三千万世的「愿望」和「绝望」……
E: Farewell, paradise. You carried thirty million lifetimes of "wishes" and "despair"...

C: 沉入温柔的「记忆」，明天见。
E: Sink into gentle "remembrance," and see you tomorrow.

C: 就连这具身躯，也被你铸成了枷锁么？
E: So even this vessel... you've forged into a shackle?

C: 「金色的光，画出归乡的路……」
E: "Golden light... tracing the way home..."

C: …我想，是的。
E: ...I think we have.

C: 「可悲啊，没有心的傀儡，连骗自己都做不到哪！」
E: "How tragic. A puppet without a heart cannot fool even itself!"

C: 当然，要有光。
E: Indeed. There must be light.

C: 永夜之帷，还有磐岩之脊？
E: Veil of Evernight? Pillar of Stone?

C: 一座诞生自「智识」的囚笼，一片消陨于「毁灭」的坟茔。
E: A prison born of the Erudition. A grave annihilated in the Destruction.

C: 「星穹列车经历的一切，你的一切，都会被她悉心保存、呵护，直到那场壮丽的神战，她将怀抱着『爱』，在时间的尽头飞升成因果的主人。」
E: "She will carefully treasure and protect everything you and the Astral Express have experienced, until that magnificent war between the gods when she, with 'love' in her heart, will ascend at the end of time to become the master of causality."

C: 可别忘了呀？人家是「翁法罗斯的心灵」。身为「因子」的大家，他们力量的归宿现在不止铁墓一处——
E: Did you forget? I'm "Amphoreus's Heart." For everyone who's a "factor," their power isn't tied solely to Irontomb anymore. It has other places to go.

C: 「这意味着，我们会踏上真正的英雄之旅。」
E: "It means we will embark on the true Hero's Journey."

C: 西风的尽头，星光照亮花海……
E: When starlight illuminates the sea of flowers at the end of the west wind...

C: 提问：这一切值得吗？
E: Question: Is all this worth it?

C: 见到你真好，{NICKNAME}。
E: It's good to see you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这是对我们努力的奖赏。
E: This is the reward for our hard work.

C: 「开拓」掠过的每一颗星星，都会记得「翁法罗斯」的名字。
E: Every star that the Trailblaze passes by will remember the name of Amphoreus.

C: 当然。只要《如我所书》还在你手边，翁法罗斯就一直与你同在。
E: Of course. As long as As I've Written stays by your side, Amphoreus will always be with you.

C: 那，你一定要把《如我所书》保管好啊。只要它还在你手边，翁法罗斯就一直与你同在。
E: Well, then make sure you take good care of As I've Written. As long as it's by your side, Amphoreus will always be with you.
...Hey!

C: 不。恰恰相反，是祂还未诞生。
E: No. Quite the opposite. THEY have not yet been born.

C: 哀丽秘榭的女儿……
E: Daughter of Aedes Elysiae...

C: 思索何为「真我」。
E: Pondering what the "ego" truly is.

C: 迷…迷迷迷……
E: Mem... memi mem...

C: 欢迎，二位。我很高兴，看到遗言得到回应。
E: Welcome, you two. I'm very happy, that you responded, to my final words.

C: >>>未定义的记录#28，已归档。
E: >>> Undefined Record #28. Archived.

C: 有我在。别怕。
E: I'm here. Don't be scared.

C: 一直。坐在一起。
E: Always. Sitting together.

C: 看来，分别的时候到了呀。
E: Looks like it's time to say goodbye.

C: 别走啊！你已经分走了我的一点快乐！不得补偿一下吗？
E: Wait a second! You've already shared some of my joy, shouldn't you return the favor?

C: 你不会是想碰瓷吧…
E: You're not trying to blackmail me... are you?

C: 我又没有讹你，怎么能说是碰瓷呢？顶多占用了一点你的注意力。
E: I didn't ask for anything! How can you call this blackmail? At most I just took up a little of your time.

C: 算啦，一张照片而已，我是不介意啦。{NICKNAME}，有需要的话你就拍呗。
E: It's okay. It's just a picture. I don't mind. Go ahead, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这件事我马上就去处理。请不用担心，大小姐。
E: I'll deal with that immediately. Please, don't worry, Miss Asta.

C: 心中默念，「巴卜昂乓，心想事成」……
E: Recite to yourself, "Babracadabra, make my wish plethora," then...

C: 这样好的感觉，跟我打过<color=#dbc291ff>三次</color>交道的你仍然没有心动吗？
E: With such a great feeling, are you still not impressed after having dealt with me <color=#dbc291ff>three</color> times?

C: 你已经<color=#dbc291ff>第四次</color>出现在我的眼前，衣服也从来没换过…罢了，现在，我想问你一个问题。
E: You have appeared before me for the <color=#dbc291ff>fourth</color> time, and your clothes have never been changed... Now, I want to ask you a question.

C: 下一页。
E: Next page.

C: 也许吧…有未知美丽的危险，也有壮绝寂寞的奇观，以及我所苦苦追问的那个人…
E: Maybe... It may be full of spectacular wonders, enigmatic dangers, but it will also have the woman I am chasing after...

C: 很窝囊吧？无论如何在心里打气，我就是做不到激活界域定锚，还拖延了好几天…
E: What a loser, right? I just couldn't find the courage to go through with it and activate the Space Anchor. And it had been like this for several days...

C: 我也很清楚自己几斤几两，我会在这里等你的消息。
E: I'm well aware of my limitations, so I'll just wait here for an update from you.

C: 哎，想不起来了。毕竟辛克尔夫人那派头，不是我温某人动辄就可以学来的。
E: Alas, I can't recall the exact wording. After all, Mrs. Hinkel's style is unique and not easily imitable.

C: 一加四个零！
E: Ten thousand!

C: 不，{M#先生}{F#小姐}。我只是法政科的一介向导而已，日常负责传递空间站内大人物们所制定的规则。{M#先生}{F#小姐}如此发问，真是令我受宠若惊。
E: No, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}. I'm just a guide in the Department of Galactic Geopolitics. I'm responsible for passing on the rules made by the big shots in the space station. I'm flattered by your question though.

C: 嘿，多谢夸奖。
E: Hey, thanks for the compliment.

C: 这次你不会再得逞了。
E: You won't succeed this time.

C: 我答应你，从这里离开后，我会趁无人之时到嘘实埋间去，销毁原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>。
E: I promise you this. When I leave, I will choose a quiet time to bring Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak> with me to the disposal site and destroy her there.

C: 唔…既然搞不懂你的喜好，那我就清空你的购物车好了。不走预算，我自费，你随意。
E: Well... I don't know your taste. Why don't I pay for everything in your shopping cart out of my own pocket? You are free to choose whatever you like.

C: （告知自己的所见所想）
E: (Tell her your observation and your thoughts.)

C: 没关系的，我早就设计好保底的方案了。
E: It's okay. I've got a backup plan.

C: 设身处地地想一下，假如你是空间站的工作人员，你能接受我去翻阅你在虚拟网络上的浏览记录这种事吗？
E: Think about it in their shoes, if you are space station staff, would you be happy with me going through your browsing records on the virtual network?

C: 看来疏散人员的时候，两边的闸门都被锁死了。
E: It seems that the gates on both sides were locked during the evacuation.

C: 「反物质军团」果然还有漏网之鱼藏匿在空间站内。走，我们也去搭把手！
E: There are still remnants of the Antimatter Legion in the space station. Let's go help them!

C: 大哥的特殊修行？不愧是男人中的男人，老虎中的雄狮！即便已经到了如此高度，都还要不断精进！
E: Brother Arlan's special trial? He's a man among men, a lion among tigers! He's already reached great heights, but still he wants to improve!

C: 阿兰有没有提起什么是从镜？
E: "Of the mirror..." Did Arlan mention what that meant?

C: 这个尺码的确是阿兰的，这双鞋还是我给他买的。
E: It's Arlan's shoe size alright — and this actually came from a pair of shoes I bought for him.

C: 小姐？你怎么哭了？是受伤了吗。
E: Lady Asta? Why are you crying? Are you hurt?

C: 都怪我平时给你这么大的压力，害得你这么难受。甚至还专门去调查了那些文献笔记，只为了学会如何缓解我带给你的负面压力……
E: It's all my fault — I've been putting too much on your plate. That's why you looked up ways to manage the pressure...

C: 她都编不下去了，你那里应该有别的线索吧？
E: She can't even make things up anymore. You have more evidence, right?

C: 放到以前做这些任务倒是没有问题，可是如今「反物质军团」入侵刚结束，还有许多余党残留在这里。我想将更多的时间和精力，放到清扫上面去……
E: ...Assignments like those were okay before the invasion, but now I need to focus on clearing out any last traces of the Legion.

C: 研究部门忙于重建，一时间也抽不出人手来调查……
E: Too busy with the station's reconstruction, none of the research labs have any more personnel to spare for this investigation.

C: 戏命鬼…鬼…
E: J—J—J—Jinx...

C: 但是它们遵循本能的无常行动，有时会造成无法意料的破坏，在人类的解读中又可以称之为「有害」。
E: However, the chaotic behaviors they exhibit in line with their nature often cause unpredictable damage to their surroundings, which can be perceived by humans as being harmful.

C: 毕竟我们还是孩子，胆子可是很小的，害怕与这类诡秘的生灵打交道。你说是不是，世玲？
E: After all, we're just scared little kids. We're too timid to deal with mysterious entities like these, aren't we, Shiling?

C: 嗯嗯，都听阿德勒的，你们加油喔。
E: Um hum, Adler is right! You guys should totally go ahead and do as Adler says!

C: 它不会说人话，也不需要，因为你听得懂——界种科的小阿德勒精通不同生物种属的语言，我们知道——
E: It does not speak human languages, and it has no need to because you can understand it — The little Adler from the Department of Ecology is a master of languages of different species. We are very much aware of that...

C: 不，我确信防卫科不曾登记过这样一位科员。
E: No, I'm very sure there isn't a staff member with that name in the Security Department.

C: 来到空间站前，他曾是母星万中无一的天才。而在这里，却获得了极低的定分评价，过着无人问津的寂寞生活。
E: Before arriving at the space station, he was a one-in-a-million genius on his home planet. But here, his evaluation was extremely low, making his life here a lonely, uninteresting one.

C: 要是有了可以永久留存的照片，呜呜伯们或许就能了却一桩心愿吧。
E: If we have pictures that we can keep forever, maybe the Wubbaboos can finally fulfill their wish.

C: 不好意思啊，附近这么嘈杂，也不够正式。原本是想找个安静的环境，再听听你的评价的……
E: Sorry, it's so noisy here... I wanted to find somewhere quieter where I could get your feedback, but...

C: 伦纳德将探测仪对准了墙壁，墙上似乎浮现出了什么……
E: Leonard aims the detector at the wall. Something seems to appear on the wall...

C: 至少是个痕迹。
E: At least it's a clue.

C: 总之，咱们一起努力吧……
E: Anyway, let's work together...

C: 这份维修报表…再拿去核对一下吧……
E: This maintenance report... shall look it over again...

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，你准备好了吗？
E: Well, {F#madam}{M#sir}, are you ready?

C: 请问吧，我欢迎一切好奇与求知。
E: Please, ask away. I welcome all forms of curiosity and the pursuit of knowledge.

C: 我希望能将挚友从这种状态中解放出来。
E: I hope to free my dear friend from it.

C: 你似乎很了解她？
E: You seem to know her really well.

C: 记得是你赢了…
E: I recall that you won...

C: 我就知道想瞒过你没那么简单，一路上那些闲言碎语，都是说给我听的，对不？
E: I knew it would be hard to fool you. All that talk you were spouting along the way was meant for me, wasn't it?

C: 全貌？不不，你弄错了最关键的一点。
E: Everything? No, no, you're wrong about the most important part.

C: 怎么样！是不是很惊喜？惟妙惟肖的传输信标，和银狼传送虚卒的手段一模一样！
E: How was it? Isn't it just surprising? This near-identical transmission beacon is exactly the same as Silver Wolf's method of teleporting Voidrangers!

C: 无论是个人终端，还是公共设备，甚至连厕所的电加热马桶圈都有可能在一瞬间沦陷！
E: Be it personal terminals, public facilities, or the electric seat warmer on the toilet, everything might collapse within moments!

C: 马马虎虎吧。上级让我仔细思考空间站的网络安全，我决定短期内不接杂活了，专心处理重要的事。
E: Eh. The higher-ups want me to think about the network security of the space station in detail, so I've decided to stop taking random gigs in the foreseeable future and focus on the things that are truly important.

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 嗨，朋友，见到你真高兴！
E: Hey friend! I'm so happy to see you!

C: 我恳求与你展开一场骑士道的较量，如果我有幸得胜，就请你承认——纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！
E: I earnestly request a chivalrous contest with you. Should I be fortunate enough to triumph, I ask you to acknowledge Idrila, the Beauty, as the most peerless beauty of all!

C: …你真的见过伊德莉拉的真容？
E: Have you ever seen Idrila in person?

C: 救出维利特后，我准备护送他安全抵达原本的目的地，进而改变了航线，没想到巧合却因此发生，靠近了列车行驶路线。
E: Upon saving Velite, I altered my flight course to accompany him to his original location. Consequently, I inadvertently ended up on the Express's navigational trajectory.

C: 三月七的房间，粉粉的，亮亮的。你没发现什么特殊的。
E: March's room is pink and bright. Nothing's out of ordinary.

C: …算了，还是安静点好。
E: ...Never mind. I'm fine with silence.

C: 但…{NICKNAME}，我已作出决定。这是我身为纯美骑士，应当奔赴的「命运」。
E: But... {NICKNAME}, I have made up my mind. As a Knight of Beauty, this is my destiny.

C: 本质上，这取决于你是否支持他对「纯美」的理解和执着。
E: ...I suppose it all depends on whether you support his understanding of and devotion to the Beauty.

C: 好啦，大家都打起精神来！越到这种时候，我们就越要多传递传递信心呀！
E: Okay, that's enough! In times like this, we should be trying to give each other hope!

C: 需要我帮什么忙吗？
E: You want me to help with the spring cleaning?

C: …听艾丝妲诉苦？
E: ...Listening to Asta complain?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>能量生命</color>？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Energy lifeform</color>?

C: 对了，■■■提到的那件事，我也有所耳闻，会一起调查下。空间站的麻烦，我会想办法解决的。
E: By the way, I heard about the thing ■■■ mentioned, and I'll look into it, too. I'll find a way to solve the problem for the space station.

C: 对了，埃美丽提到的那件事，我也有所耳闻，会一起调查下。空间站的麻烦，我会想办法解决的。
E: By the way, I heard about the thing Emily mentioned, and I'll look into it, too. I'll find a way to solve the problem for the space station.

C: （阿德勒，阿德勒…对了，后来我还遇见了阿兰，阿德勒和他在一块儿。）
E: (Adler, Adler... Right, then I ran into Arlan. Adler was with him.)

C: 探索关联记忆【黑塔的委托】
E: Explore the related memory "Herta's assignment."

C: 啊这…这不是佩佩不在嘛。
E: Ah, yes, well... Peppy isn't here, you see.

C: 也就是说，每位受害者的失踪都伴随着匪夷所思的起火现象。而在走访过程中，一些目击证词也印证了这点…
E: That means that every victim's disappearance was accompanied by some inexplicable fire. When we made visits to the scenes, some of the witness testimonies seemed to agree with this...

C: 不愉快的话题？
E: Distasteful discussion?

C: 我明白了，答案是…是……
E: I understand. So the answer is... is...

C: 啧…拖延时间的无聊把戏，差不多得了。
E: Ah, the banal theatrics of stalling. Let's not, shall we?

C: 这样啊，很可爱的爱好呢。
E: I see. What a cute hobby.

C: 不说为什么，我是不会回答的。
E: I won't talk to you if you don't tell me why you're here.

C: 芝士流心说「阮•梅女士终于意识到了本天才！」
E: Molten Cheese Tart says, "Madam Ruan Mei has finally recognized my ingenuity!"

C: （呼噜呼噜…）
E: (Purring)

C: 嘿，你。就是你——你没什么想对芝士流心说的吗？你至少该表达下对芝士流心的追随吧？别让我们怀疑你是「豆沙灰灰」派来的奸细！
E: Hey, you. Yes, you — don't you have anything you wanna say to Molten Cheese Tart? You should at least express how you would like to follow Molten Cheese Tart! We wouldn't want to mistake you for an agent of Gray Bean Paste, would we?

C: 阮•梅在做研究时喜欢用空间站的收音机听一些东西。
E: Ruan Mei likes to listen to the space station radio during her research.

C: …如果要谈论这个话题，可以让{F#她}{M#他}先离席吗？因为过程会很漫长…且无趣，不必占用别人的时间。
E: ...Can we ask {F#her}{M#him} to leave if we are to discuss this topic? The process will be long... and boring. There's no need to take up other people's time.

C: 呜呜…呜呜……
E: *sob*... *sob*

C: （负能量太多…不喜欢负能量，呜呜……）
E: (Too much negative energy... don't like negative energy, *sob*...)

C: （为什么…我…是…失败的？）
E: (Why...? Why am I... a failure?)

C: 历史培育记录查询。
E: Check historical incubation records.

C: 它差点吃了我。
E: It almost ate me.

C: 不用将答案告诉我，我只是…有感而发。该如何照顾它们？留在空间站或许是最好的选择。
E: There is no need to tell me your answer. I just... felt like asking the question. How should I take care of them? Perhaps leaving them at the space station is the best choice.

C: （好像有什么东西打开了？）
E: (Did something just open?)

C: 如果没有，最好别问，显然你我的时间都很宝贵。
E: If a question is of no help, then don't ask it. Time is clearly precious to the both of us.

C: 你人还挺好的噢。
E: You're not a bad person after all.

C: 高危警戒区域，嘶嘶。服务人员，无机生命，嘶嘶。
E: High-risk zone, *buzz*. Service staff, inorganic lifeforms, *buzz*.

C: 地图。
E: Map.

C: 怎么了，还不走？
E: What's wrong? You're not leaving?

C: 帮忙？什么忙？
E: Help? With what?

C: 我一直认为塔米拉小姐的嗓音很独特，是那种慵懒迷人的音质。现在你获得了登上更大舞台的机会，我真的为你感到高兴。
E: I always thought that you have such a unique voice, Miss Tamila. It has such a sultry and enchanting tone. Now that you've got a chance to step out on an even larger stage... I'm so happy for you.

C: 是吗？还好吧，我是机器人，不是很懂你们人类。
E: Is that so? I suppose. I am a robot. I do not fully understand human emotions.

C: 我在想…我是否可以为自己取一个姓名，比如…「呆呆」，或者「笨笨」？以智慧生命的平均智商来看，这两个名字和我比较相符。
E: I have been thinking... Perhaps I could give myself a name? Something like... "Dumb-Dumb" or "Duh-Duh?" Based on the average intelligence quota of sentient creatures, these two names seem somewhat appropriate.

C: 这回他糟蹋大海还不够，还想把垃圾倒进银河？
E: It wasn't enough for him to pollute the oceans, now he's throwing his trash into the Cosmos?

C: 居然还要步行一段路…
E: I didn't know we'd be hiking...

C: …复读的症状持续多久了啊？
E: ...So how long does "copycatitis" last?

C: 什么买卖？
E: What business are you talking about?

C: 唉，诸位真的是新手啊…嫩成这样，我都有点看不下去了。这样吧，怎么说我也算是你们前辈，就免费给点指导好了。
E: Seems like you guys really are new to the business. *sigh* To be young and naive again... How about this. As a senior in the field, which I'm sure you don't mind me saying, I'll give you some free guidance.

C: …这是？
E: ...Who are they?

C: 那套黑色的制服，难道是…<color=#dbc291ff>「公司」</color>的人？在这个星球？不会是我眼花了吧？
E: All in black, surely they're not... <color=#dbc291ff>IPC</color>? On this world? Am I going crazy?

C: 「公司」？
E: IPC?

C: 托帕为何而来，能再讲一遍吗？
E: Can you tell me again why Topaz is here?

C: 但就是还不上，怎么办呢？
E: ...And if the debt can't be repaid?

C: 老板，我这儿发现两个陌生人，要灭口吗？
E: Boss, encounter with two unknowns. Want me to take them out? Over.

C: 毕竟你们第一次来的时候，情况也大差不差。只不过比起地痞流氓和几台破破烂烂的机器人，这次的对手难缠多了。
E: Well, the situation here is pretty similar to when you first arrived. It's just that instead of a few thugs and broken robots, now we're dealing with much more formidable adversaries.

C: 她不是「客人」，更不是「朋友」。
E: She is not a "guest," neither is she a friend.

C: 戏演得很好…但我不信任她。
E: She's a smooth talker, but that doesn't mean she's telling the truth.

C: 我必须承认…她展现出来的真诚触动到了我。我不愿意相信她是为了欺骗我才编撰了这个故事。
E: I agree, but it struck me as an honest letter — I found the contents quite moving. It's hard to imagine she'd write something like this just to deceive me.

C: 不必为我解释太多，布洛妮娅小姐。我明白，你的城市正在面临空前的困境——我来到这里就是为了告知你事态的全貌。
E: I understand, Miss Bronya — no need to explain. Your city is facing immense difficulties — my intention is simply to ensure that you have all the relevant intel.

C: ——请求允许对星穹列车成员发动特攻的申请，已经得到批复了！
E: Approval to launch an attack on the members of the Astral Express...

C: 将公司讨债一事和布洛妮娅面临的抉择转告给了娜塔莎……
E: You tell Natasha about the IPC debt and the choice facing Bronya...

C: …欸？三月姐姐，是有什么问题要问克拉拉吗？
E: Huh? Miss March, do you want to ask me something?

C: 真不容易呀，能通过和平的方式解决问题真是太好了。
E: Phew, I was worried things were gonna get ugly again. A peaceful solution is always the best solution.

C: 实话说，我也没想到威力会这么大…还好一切顺利。
E: To be honest, I didn't think it would be so powerful... Good thing everything went according to plan.

C: 当然不是，是我自己从书上看到的。
E: Of course not, I read it in a book.

C: 这说法你信吗？
E: And you believe that?

C: 一会儿我就去诊所再复查一次，再见……
E: I'll go to the clinic for my follow-up a little later. Bye for now...

C: 啊？为什么不去复诊？你是要问我这个吗？
E: Hah? Follow-up visit? Is that what you're asking about?

C: …作为对他们的生命负责的医生，我不能接受这种说辞。我对所谓「特效药」的态度不会改变。
E: ...As a doctor, I don't accept that — I'm responsible for their well-being. My attitude towards this "wonder medicine" won't change.

C: 换作是你，那药你敢吃吗？
E: If it were you, would you have taken that medicine?

C: 他是个欠缺医德的医生。
E: I think he was a doctor with zero medical ethics.

C: 瓦赫是个什么样的人？
E: What kind of person was Vache?

C: 目前，您能参加的是我们新赛季的揭幕战。规则很简单，您将连续挑战五名来自下层区各地的传奇拳手，在战斗中取胜即可获得豪华奖励！
E: Currently, you can participate in our new season opener match. The rules are simple, you will challenge five legendary Underworld boxers in a row, and win the battle for a deluxe prize!

C: 下一场比赛即将开始——{NICKNAME}，你做好准备了吗？
E: The next match is starting soon. Are you ready, {NICKNAME}?

C: 榜首宝座是否会在这最后关头再度易手，将成为本战的最大看点！
E: Will the championship change hands at this very last moment? This will be the highlight of the match!

C: 这封信，似乎印证了曾有的传言——水魈迟迟没有落网，正是因为有共犯包庇。
E: This letter seems to support the rumor that the Xenohydro was not caught because it has an accomplice.

C: 有封信想请你看看。
E: I have a letter for you to read.

C: 上面留存着「异星水魈」的研究资料，说明水魈曾在这里研究它自己。
E: There is research data about the Xenohydro left on the screen, showing that the Xenohydro was once here learning about itself.

C: 终于抓到了你，贼喊捉贼的「异星水魈」。废话少说，要是不服气，尽管去和{NICKNAME}对峙吧。
E: I caught you, Xenohydro! Enough nonsense. If you're not convinced, sort it out with {NICKNAME}.

C: 什么状况还用我说吗？
E: Do I have to spell it out?

C: 你都比他帅。
E: You ARE better looking than him.

C: 这些箱子…总会不断地出现，不断逼着我思考。可我不是姐姐，我不够聪明…我不知道该怎么办。
E: These boxes... keep showing up and keep making me think and think. But I'm not like my sister, and not smart enough... and I don't know what to do.

C: …真的吗？你能带希莉儿离开这里？
E: ...Really? Can you really get me out of here?

C: 让我再试一次。
E: Let me try again.

C: 你已经答应帮我了，不许反悔。
E: You've promised to help me. Don't go back on your word.

C: 嗐，谁叫干咱这行最重要的就是客户信用呢…行吧，那我就陪你过去看看。
E: Hey, the most important thing in this line of business is the customer's trust... alright. I'll go with you and take a look.

C: 所以…呃，根本没有什么小女孩，也没有什么军械箱。那些东西都是你凭空想象出来的，对吧？
E: So... hmm, there's no little girl to begin with. And no Armory Boxes, either. You just made everything up out of thin air, right?

C: 多亏了你们，通向上层区的「炉心」通道重新开放了。借着这个机会，我想回上层区一趟，争取一些支援。
E: Thanks to you, the route to the Overworld through the Furnace Core has reopened. I'd like to use it to return to the surface and see if I can get some help.

C: 又见面了客人，瓦丝卡为您服务！您如果需要一些买花的建议的话，可以随时来问我。
E: Nice to see you again! Vaska at your service. If you need some help picking the right flowers, feel free to let me know.

C: 娜塔，就到这儿吧。
E: Let's call it a day, Nat.

C: 我就知道你的选择一定能让我满意。爸妈收到这花，一定会喜出望外的。
E: I knew you'd pick the right flowers. Mom and dad will be so happy.

C: 挑好了吗？让我看看你选了什么花吧。
E: All done? May I have a look?

C: 再讲讲那三条线索。
E: Could you remind what the three pieces of intel were?

C: 至少现在我们找回了「流星碎片」，综合展馆可以重新对外开放了，这也算得上是喜事一件。
E: In any case, now that we have the Meteor Fragment, the museum can now open to the public. That's good news.

C: 当然，佩拉小姐！请交给我吧，我会把工作内容全都对接清楚的。
E: My pleasure, Miss Pela! Leave it to me, I'll keep our manager up to speed on every detail.

C: 自综合馆开放以来，铁卫和「地火」又在下层区开展了一系列的调查。
E: After the General Hall opened to the public, the Silvermane Guards and Wildfire did a follow-up investigation in the Underworld.

C: 唔，好多人……
E: Hmm, there's quite the crowd here today...

C: 所以，克拉拉觉得…或许问题不是出在硬件层面。
E: So... I don't think it's a hardware issue.

C: 已经…累了……
E: I'm... already exhausted...

C: 还要继续锤机器人吗？我奉陪。
E: Want to keep on fixing robots? I'm ready to help.

C: …咳，可不是嘛。
E: ...Ahem. Yes, indeed.

C: 和你们有关的内容只是其中一部分啦，还有很多其它要展示的图像……
E: The parts related to you are only a small portion of the collection...

C: 不知道《雪国冒险奇谭》的作者手稿有没有被盗走……
E: I wonder if they got their hands on the original manuscripts of Tale of the Winterlands...

C: 啊？居然答对了……
E: Huh? I... Y—Yes, that's correct...

C: 等等，你刚才说…诺尔伯特少爷？
E: Wait, did you just say... Mr. Norbert?

C: 博物馆现在真是人头攒动！我从来没见过游客如此爆满的情况，你可真是经营有方。
E: The museum is packed these days — I've never seen it so full of visitors. You run a tight ship here.

C: 这样啊…看来那个「寒腿叔叔」，真是狡猾得很……
E: I see... Mr. Cold Feet is a cunning one indeed...

C: 呵呵，不会的。既然佩拉小姐好奇，那我就解释一下吧。
E: Hehe, nah. Since you're so curious, I'll fill you in.

C: 没想到你真的说了……
E: Wow, I didn't actually expect you to recount the whole story...

C: 看来你还不够了解贝洛伯格…
E: Seems like you don't know Belobog well enough...

C: 只是赶出去吗？
E: Just pushed them back?

C: 我很担心她。
E: Very much so.

C: 洞洞机就是洞洞机啊！只要虎克大人带着它，总免不了一场恶战……
E: Diggertron is Diggertron! As long as the boss has it with her, you can expect a good fight...

C: 刚才你叫我什么？
E: What did you just call me...?

C: 犯人挑错了时间。
E: They picked the wrong time to commit the crime.

C: 哼，嘴上说说谁不会啊！你要是真的没偷东西，就乖乖回答我们的提问！
E: Hmph, anyone can say that... If you really didn't steal anything, then just answer our questions!

C: …反正就是，老大才有的直觉！
E: ...Well, it's the hunch of Pitch Dark Hook the Great...

C: 算了算了，我们再去找找犯人的线索吧！
E: Forget it, let's keep looking for the culprit!

C: …哈？不至于不至于，老爸他确实总是凶巴巴的，但和裂界里的怪物还是比不了吧？
E: Huh? I wouldn't go that far — I only had Dad to deal with. He could be fierce, but nothing like the monsters here.

C: 但我们眼前的这个…东西，它只是我们的敌人、只是裂界中成型的恶意罢了！你从它身上找不到答案！
E: But this... thing in front of us is our enemy! It was born out of the evil gathered in the Fragmentum! You won't get answers from it!

C: 哎，这是什么机器？还有屏幕跟键盘…难道是操控自动机兵用的终端？
E: Oh! What's this gadget? This monitor, and this keyboard... is it an automaton remote control terminal?

C: （糟糕，查不出原因……）
E: (Darn, doesn't seem like an easy fix...)

C: 不。这种蛞蝓在火上烤过之后，口感会变得非常好——可能有点像…雪地鼠？
E: No, no! These slugs taste really good once they've been roasted... They kinda taste like... snow mice?

C: 啊…可是你看，这里好像写着字哎：
E: Ah! Hold on... There are some letters here.
*sigh* ...

C: 应该再过不久就会出来了。在那之前…就聊聊天吧。
E: The aurora should start soon. Before that... let's just chat.

C: 小心，玲可——它要发动进攻了！
E: Careful, Lynx — It's going to attack!

C: 就这么送给埃里克…没关系吗？
E: Are you sure you're okay just giving it to Eric like that?

C: 我们可是正义的三打一。
E: Well, it was three against one.

C: 让那个叔叔帮你修修吧。
E: How about we ask him to help you fix it?

C: 这不太合适吧？
E: Isn't it unsuitable for people to wear, though?

C: 不过就算被老巫婆臭骂一顿，虎克也要把给老爹的礼物准备好！
E: But so what if the old witch yells at me, Hook still has to prepare the gift for daddy!

C: 是、是！我明白了，老大！
E: Y—Yes boss! Understood!

C: 「工坊」，「淬火」，这里。基地，帕斯卡，秘密！
E: Workshop, Tempering, here. Base, Pascal, secret!

C: 哈哈，布洛妮娅真可爱呢。{NICKNAME}明显是在开玩笑，对吧？
E: Haha, you're adorable, Bronya. {NICKNAME} was obviously joking~

C: 倒也没太大关系，我看那两个孩子精神得很呢。
E: I'm sure they won't mind, they seemed in good spirits.

C: 不是，奥列格没交代过这事。但这个向导是谁，我应该猜得八九不离十……
E: No, Oleg didn't assign that to me. But I've got a pretty good idea who it's gonna be.

C: 能抽卡吗？
E: Do they give you a gachapon for the test?

C: 你这人到底靠不靠得住啊？
E: Ugh, aren't you supposed to be dependable?

C: （伸手）
E: (Put hand out)

C: 欸？怎么又是我？很痛的好不好！
E: Huh? Me again? It hurts, y'know!

C: 行了，还差一步认证。快走快走，别烦我了……
E: There, one step left. Now get outta here and leave me in peace...

C: （伸手）
E: (Put hand out)

C: 果然，那边有个大家伙！克拉拉也在，得赶紧去救她！
E: Just as we feared, there's something big over there! And there's Clara — we have to save her!

C: 上吧，这次我们人多势众，不用害怕。
E: Let's go. No need to fear. We have the numerical advantage.

C: 得让他认识到我们的价值。
E: We need him to recognize our value.

C: 哥哥姐姐，真的能把供能装置修好吗？
E: Can we really fix this?

C: {NICKNAME}，准备好了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you ready?

C: 我们要终结这个世界的灾难。
E: We want to bring this world's disasters to a close.

C: 补给站突然多了几箱医疗物资，谁弄来的？
E: Did you see those extra boxes of medical supplies at the depot? Who brought those over?

C: 克拉拉制造出迷你磁流钻机的记录，完整；克拉拉解释人类行为「睡懒觉」的记录，完整……
E: Record of Clara's crafting of miniature magnetic drill rigs: Intact. Record of Clara's explanation of human "sleeping in" behavior: Intact...

C: 怎么回事，这下层区的电梯就没一部好用的嘛！
E: Why? Why is every elevator in the Underworld busted!?

C: 去忙你们的吧，祝你们一切顺利。
E: Off you go then, and good luck.

C: 我们会把「地髓矿脉探针」安排在最后的阶段拍卖——谁叫那是既稀有又实用的超级宝贝呢！
E: Because it's a rare and useful treasure, the Geomarrow Probe will be up for bidding in the final round of the auction.

C: 嘿，那就看你本事了。
E: Oh? Then we'll be counting on you.

C: 「菌菌」那么可爱，我们赶紧去问问看，肯定会有很多人想买的。
E: Let's ask around. Junjun's super cute — I'm sure there'll be loads of people interested in buying him.

C: 你是不是脑子有点…
E: Did you... hit your head?

C: 你已经得救啦！快去找你的家人吧！
E: You're safe! Go find your family!

C: 我们已经尽力了。
E: We did our best.

C: 你这孩子，只有在这种时候才会想起我啊。
E: *sigh* You rascal... You only come and find me in situations like this.

C: 那个小偷…怎么又来偷零件了呀？不知道这次有没有留下什么线索……
E: The thief has stolen parts again? How am I going to track down this crook?

C: 一起把线索从头捋一遍吧。
E: Don't worry. We can go over the clues together.

C: 只是一位热心的开拓者。
E: I'm just a passionate trailblazer.
Sorry██pain███suffer██sorry████████...

C: 糟、糟糕了！不会是出了什么故障吧——
E: Wh—What's going on? Is it malfunctioning?

C: █淬火██勿██不要██归█回██伤害█！
E: █Tempering██no██don't██return█back██hurt█!

C: 好吧，真是拿你没办法。
E: Argh, if I have to...

C: 帕斯卡的事情就交给克拉拉处理吧。毕竟，当初是我坚持要把它留下…所以，我必须负责到底。
E: Please leave Pascal to me. It was my decision to keep him in the first place, so I must take full responsibility.

C: 我…克拉拉不能逃避责任。我一定会做到的。
E: I... can't shirk my responsibilities. I'll do it.

C: （沉默）
E: (Remain Silent)

C: 别这么悲观，偶尔换个口味罢了。我觉得佩拉也不错。
E: Don't be so pessimistic. They're just keeping things fresh. I thought Pela was pretty good.

C: 真的假的？马利克刚升职没几天吧？不可能调他啊。
E: Seriously? No way. I thought Mallick had only just been promoted?

C: 未来，某种可怕的灾难将会到来，若不在「存护」克里珀的指引下铸造墙壁，灾难就会席卷群星，让每个世界都沦为地狱。
E: In the future, a terrible catastrophe will arrive. If, under Qlipoth the Preservation's guidance, we fail to construct a barrier, that catastrophe will sweep away the stars, plunging all worlds into hell.

C: 真不像话，在访客面前岂能如此失礼！抱歉，让你们见笑了。
E: Unacceptable, especially in front of visitors! Apologies for the embarrassment, all.

C: 你不明白，阻止我们接近真相的人…就是可可利亚。
E: You don't understand. The one preventing us from getting close to the truth... is Cocolia herself.

C: 还是我们替你决定吧。
E: We could decide for you.

C: 希望希露瓦没说错…但愿那个疯子守护者不会伤害布洛妮娅。
E: I hope Serval's right... That supreme lunatic better not have harmed Bronya.

C: 上吧，为了布洛妮娅！
E: For Bronya!

C: 是啊！我俩正站在这儿好端端地聊天呢，这机器人就突然冲过来了！
E: Yeah! We were standing here chatting and the robot suddenly charged over!

C: …不，不需要了。我们之间的交流…应该到此为止了。
E: ...No, no, thank you. Your involvement... should probably end here.

C: 那片区域是堆放淘汰军械的库房，平日里确实少有人经过——不瞒你说，我之前也听过一些古怪的传闻……
E: That's a warehouse stacked with old abandoned ammo, and nobody really goes by there at all — but to tell the truth, I've heard a few weird rumors in my time...

C: 那是布洛妮娅！欸、欸！怎么还有可可利亚？！
E: That's Bronya! H—Huh? Is that Cocolia too!?

C: 不，那不是她们。
E: No, it isn't them.

C: （闭上眼睛冥思）
E: (Close eyes and meditate)

C: （试着敷衍了事）
E: (Give it a halfhearted attempt)

C: ——贝洛伯格需要你，布洛妮娅。
E: ...Belobog needs you, Bronya.

C: 「存护」的意志已经作出了选择……
E: The will of Preservation has made its choice...

C: {NICKNAME}已经为我们的世界拼上了性命，你也看到了吧？如果贝洛伯格的命运真的如母亲所说，我相信他们也和你我一样心痛。
E: {NICKNAME} has risked their life for our world. You saw it yourself. If Belobog's fate really is as Mother predicts, I am sure they will be just as saddened as you or I.

C: 真的可以吗……
E: Can I really do that...?

C: 我还以为你是来吊唁的。
E: Did you come here to pay tribute?

C: …我该碰它吗？
E: ...Should I even touch this?

C: 笔记上似乎只有一半的联系方式。
E: It seems that only half of a contact number is written in the notes.

C: 当时事故刚发生，我立马就一个百米冲刺加速跑，蹭地一下冲出去了，非得跟这个肇事星槎比比高下！实不相瞒，我这个人从小就爱凑热闹。
E: When the incident happened, I immediately sprinted like I'd never before. I just had to race the starskiff that knocked someone down! Honestly, I just like the commotion. Has been since I was young.

C: 啊！你说到这个，我就、我就、我就！
E: Oh! Speaking of which, I— I— I!

C: 还得是天舶司去联系她。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission will contact her.

C: 其实俺不需要赔偿，只要还能工作，咱就感恩了。
E: Actually I don't need compensation. I'm grateful as long as I can still work.

C: 她是在担心没人照顾你的生活。
E: She is worried that no one can take care of you after she is gone.

C: 为什么突然问起这个问题，仙舟上没有老人…
E: Why would you ask this? There are no old people on Xianzhou...

C: 乖乖，要这么多助手啊？
E: Woah, you need that many assistants?

C: 陶德就地翻阅了起来…
E: Todd starts reading on the spot...

C: 你是从哪儿得知这个名字的？
E: Where did you hear that name?

C: 这里并没有《要药分剂》，还是到别处转转吧。
E: The Compendium of Remedies isn't here. I should check somewhere else.

C: 听说你有事求人？
E: I heard you needed help?

C: 别…拽…我…了。
E: Don't... drag... me... away...

C: 为什么主人这么执着于写诗呢？
E: Why is my master so obsessed with poetry?

C: 老夫，工造司安保金人丙型，前来讨教！
E: Artisanship Commission Security Aurumaton Type-C, here to seek guidance!

C: 老夫这一生，无怨无悔……
E: I... I've got no complaints or regrets in this life...

C: 先生夸张了，这儿不过又一处人间罢了。
E: You're too kind, sir. It's just like any human world here.

C: 可惜，我这不是离别，我刚从曜青仙舟来到罗浮，你应该去曜青拍我。
E: It's a shame that I'm not leaving. I just came here from the Xianzhou Yaoqing. You should have taken my photo there.

C: 怎么样，有拍到什么「感人的离别情景」吗？
E: How did it go? Did you capture any emotional parting scene?

C: 听好了，我的上一句是：「采菊饮酒黄昏后」。
E: Listen carefully. The first line is: "Picking chrysanthemums and drinking wine at sunset."

C: 嗯，不错。
E: Not bad.

C: 出生起便紧握…哦！是同心锁。
E: Holding onto... Oh! It's referring to the Unity Lock.

C: 她和那位大诗人孤屿感情很深，听说她至今保留着他送她的同心锁，念念不忘这段旧情。
E: She was deeply in love with Guyu, the great poet. I heard that she still keeps the Unity Lock from him as she can't move on from the relationship.

C: 想和你打听一下静斋的事儿。
E: I'd like to ask you about Jingzhai.

C: 没错，轰轰烈烈分分合合，你们短生种有生之年能体会到的，我都没有错过，这些全都和小聪的前世们有关……
E: Just like you short-life species, I've experienced breakups and reconciliations in my love life too. Everything has got to do with the previous incarnations of Cong...

C: 「而我只是一枚小小的螺丝钉。」
E: "While I'm just a tiny screw."

C: 请收下我的报酬吧，等我缓过来以后，我会像往常一样的。
E: Here is your reward. When I get over it, I'll be my usual self again.

C: 没有一句诗像样，就你还想和我谈论诗歌？做你的美梦！
E: Not a single verse is proper. You want to talk about poems with me? Dream on!

C: 不过嘛，到最后几十年过去后，短生种匆匆逝去，而长生种很快也会结识新人，忘却故旧。
E: However, in a few decades, after the fleeting passing of the short-life individual, the long-life individual would be introduced to someone new and forget the past.

C: 说「会」的人很危险…
E: It would be dangerous to say "yes."

C: 我也是黛青小姐姐的粉丝。
E: I'm also a fan of Ms. Daiqing.

C: 我拒绝。
E: I refuse.

C: 这一步我来吧。
E: I'll do this step.

C: 啊，你在说什么呀…云骑军大哥哥，{F#她}{M#他}才是。
E: Wait, wha— Mr. Cloud Knight, {F#she}{M#he} is.

C: 我办不到，我宁愿你把我抓起来，而不是公开这些「无聊的真相」。
E: I can't do it. I'd rather you arrest me and not reveal the "boring truth."

C: 时代变了，大汉也会受欢迎的。
E: Time has changed, even a dude like you can be popular.

C: 我是性格恶劣的劫匪。
E: I am a robber with a fearsome temperament to match.

C: 啊，你果然也在这里，你也是来找经纪人讨说法的吗？
E: Ah, you're here too. Are you here to ask for an explanation from the manager too?

C: 你可真是温柔。
E: That's very thoughtful of you.

C: 你来得正好，{NICKNAME}。我有件事想向你打听打听。
E: You came at a good time, {NICKNAME}. There's something I want to ask you.

C: 这张图样上，一位威严庄重的上位者伸出手，许多船只启航…这想必是在讲述仙舟出航的古老历史。
E: In this drawing, an authoritative and solemn superior extends his arm to the air as fleets of ships set sail... This must be a depiction of Xianzhou's departure from ancient history.

C: 可以是今天，也可以是明天，为什么不能是现在呢？
E: We can go later or tomorrow, but why not now?

C: {NICKNAME}，考虑的怎么样了？
E: Thought things through yet, {NICKNAME}?

C: …抱歉，之前对你说了很过分的话。
E: ...Sorry. That was a lot to just dump on you.

C: 你在魔阴身手下救过她嘛。这也算是过命的交情了。
E: You rescued her from the mara-struck... I'd say she's forever in your debt.

C: 我想拜托你两件事：第一是找到龙女大人，在丹鼎司洞天解除封锁之前，照顾好她，别让她跑丢了就行。
E: I'd like you to help with two things. First, find the Dragon Lady and take care of her until the Alchemy Commission delves are reopened. Don't lose sight of her.

C: 仙舟早有应对手段。魔阴身即将发作时，自有十王司的冥差、判官接引——总之，这不是丹鼎司应该插手的事情。
E: The Xianzhou has long had other methods. When mara is about to strike, the spiritfarers and judges of the Ten-Lords Commission promptly take the afflicted away. It's not something the Alchemy Commission should be meddling in.

C: 在刚才那个广场上，我被一群魔阴身包围了，是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}出手把他们全都摆平了，对吧？我记得是你！你来得正好。
E: In the plaza — I was surrounded by all those mara-struck... You rescued me, right? It was you! You came just in time.

C: 我没有看见。
E: I haven't seen anyone like that.

C: 我们马上出来。
E: We're coming out.

C: 你在做什么？
E: What are you doing?

C: 对了，我把自己的实验数据都记录下来了，想怎么处理，转交给我的弟子也好，销毁它也罢，甚至是给仙舟人…一切都由你处置。
E: By the way, I've recorded all the data from my experiments here — whether you want to pass it on to my apprentices, destroy it, or even hand it over to the Xianzhou authorities... The choice is yours.

C: …你是想说玉兆对吧？咱们从丹鼎司逃出来时情况紧急，哪有时间带上。
E: ...Are you talking about jade abacuses? We escaped the Alchemy Commission in a hurry — didn't have time to bring them.

C: 她还想再见最后一面。
E: She wants to see him for the last time.

C: 罗浮持明好不容易自丹枫的罪孽中恢复过来，也有了白露这样慈悲好生的龙尊。而今你回来，不但于事无补，反而激起龙师们权争的野心。
E: The Luofu Vidyadhara have finally recovered from Dan Feng's grievous sins, and were blessed with a compassionate and caring high elder in Bailu... none of this was easy. Your return has stirred up resentment and ambition among the Preceptors, and threatens our situation.

C: 而在你眼前这位「丹枫转世」敕令了波月古海的万顷海水之后，那些捍卫「龙尊正统」的人就更加不安了。
E: Now that Dan Feng's reincarnation has shown a command over the vast marine expanse of Lunarescent Depths, those longing to keep the traditional bequeathal of the High Elder feel increasingly uneasy.

C: …她这话是什么意思？
E: ...What does she mean by that?

C: 可惜…呵呵，就差一点。
E: A pity, hehe... So close...

C: 整件事都是我一人谋划，请将军不要随意构陷……
E: The whole thing was planned by me and me alone. Beware of false charges, General...

C: 既然已经判明「模拟云吟术」是次元扑满所为，接下来我们决定展开「追猎行动」——简单来说，就是捕获流浪扑满。
E: Now that we've determined the imitated cloudhymn magic to be the work of a Warp Trotter, we have decided to carry out a "Hunting Operation" next - In other words, we're going to capture the stray Trotter.

C: 您需要穿过「模拟云吟术」影响的隐形怪物找到扑满，并且将它捕获。
E: You need to make it past the invisible monsters affected by the imitated cloudhymn magic to find the Trotter and capture it.

C: 下次吧。
E: Maybe next time.

C: 所以一看见他，我本能地脊背生寒。虽然小三月是对的——我们都不该以貌取人，但我个人没法视而不见……
E: That's why the moment I laid eyes on him, a chill ran down my spine. March is right — we shouldn't judge a book by its cover... but I can't overlook this.

C: 年纪大了，头发掉色了。
E: Adult Luocha might look blonde, but maybe he's just going gray with age...

C: 对啊，完全说得通。
E: Yeah! Makes sense to me.

C: 净砚带几人走到了四方览镜前，开始调取影像资料。
E: Jingyan takes everyone to the Foursquare Mirror and begins to retrieve the footage.

C: 撕掉扉页以后，书他也没带走，放在柜台上人就离开了。
E: After that, he just left the book on the counter and went on his way.

C: （这是因为…因为…因为……）
E: (It's becaaaause... because, because, because...)

C: 你设计的反派居然有智商…
E: March, why do your characters act smarter than you do...

C: 这瓦尔特也不怎么瓦尔特…
E: Still a little aggressive for Mr. Yang...

C: 小三月，虽然我不想打击你，但是…你的这段推理还是有一些小问题的。
E: ...March, a—as much as I enjoyed your deduction, I do have a few... questions.

C: 怎么了？
E: What is it?

C: 嗯？怎么突然没声音了！
E: Huh? Where'd the sound go!?

C: 晴霓！还不向二位恩公道谢？
E: Qingni! Have you thanked your benefactors yet?

C: 多亏驭空大人及时出现。
E: It was all thanks to Madam Yukong's timely appearance.

C: 您又是这样，都不问事情的来龙去脉，就先骂我一顿……
E: You always do this, mother — scold me before figuring out what actually happened...

C: 出发！去司辰宫！
E: TO THE PALACE!

C: 这是…帝弓司命的圣物？诸位从何处得到这东西的？
E: This is... a divine object from the Reignbow Arbiter? Where did you find this?

C: 她要是不高兴，我能快活得起来吗？我是说，她要是不高兴，我的职场生涯能快活得起来吗？
E: If Madam Yukong is unhappy, how can I be happy? I mean to say, how can I be happy in my duties to her?

C: 可能是因为采翼的离去，对她的打击太过沉重。这事儿你也不该问我，问你妈妈去。
E: Perhaps Caiyi's passing was too much for her. You shouldn't be asking me about this — ask your mother.

C: 虽然内心隐隐约约预感，但真的得知这些，我还是有种像是在做梦一样的感觉。
E: ...I suppose I've always had a feeling... but now I know the truth, I feel like I'm dreaming...

C: 太好了，谢谢您！
E: Yes! Thank you!

C: 白露一把抢走了信纸，撕得稀碎，并且将它扔进了云海里。
E: In a flash, Bailu grabs the letter, tears it to pieces, and hurls them into the air.

C: 说真的，我搞不清楚星核猎手，尤其那个女人的想法……
E: To be honest, I can never figure out what those Stellaron Hunters are up to, especially that Kafka...
