C: 如果你想着「卡芙卡还会说什么」而选择：别这么做。每个选择都有后果，我们不得不为每个后果负责。
E: If you're only concerned with my next answer, quit while you're ahead. Every choice has consequences, and every consequence carries responsibility.

C: （「刃」的事情）
E: (Ask about Blade)

C: 十王司要处死他的时候，他逃出了幽囚狱，但受了重伤，很多事情都忘记了。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission planned to execute him, but he managed to escape from The Shackling Prison. He was severely injured — he forgot nearly everything.

C: 你以前是什么人？
E: Who are you?

C: 未来是注定的吗？
E: Is the future predetermined?

C: 我和萨姆按照艾利欧的指示找到了他，把他带回去。按艾利欧的说法，他的剑术和不死身有重要的用途，我知道的就这么多了。
E: Elio ordered Sam and me to find Bladie and return with him. According to Elio, Bladie's swordplay and immortality have important uses. That's all I know.

C: 怪了，在列车上没看到仙舟附近有这么大的行星啊。
E: Strange. I don't remember seeing a big planet near the Xianzhou when we were on the Express.

C: 怎么可能？我的舰船最后入港，玉界门随后关闭，天舶司已将星槎海彻底封锁——
E: How can that be? My ship was the last one into port before the Jade Gate was shut. The Sky-Faring Commission has already locked down Starskiff Haven entirely...

C: 喂，那个…「闷葫芦」？你叫什么名字？我要登记的，总不能给你填空吧？
E: Hey, you're pretty quiet. What's your name? I've got forms to fill out — can't put your name down as blank.

C: 你是仙舟天舶司的人，应该知道「星核」的威胁。
E: You work for the Sky-Faring Commission, so I assume you're aware of its destructive power.

C: 恩公不必担忧。身为接渡使，星槎操舵可是咱们这行的必备技能。
E: Don't fret. All Amicassadors know their way around a starskiff.

C: 哦…你想听听后来发生的事情？
E: Oh... are you interested in what happened?

C: 我算是明白你的手为什么这么冷了。
E: So this is why your hands are so cold.

C: 列车也不可能永载你走下去的，你的朋友们各怀心事，就像曾经的我们一样。
E: The Express won't be able to carry you forever. Your friends all have burdens of their own, just as we did back then.

C: 偷听别人说话可不好唷。何况，我几时说过他已不在人世了？
E: Eavesdropping is a bad habit. Besides, when did I ever say that he was no longer in this world?

C: …而罪人镜流，身犯魔阴，弑杀同袍，背弃盟谊。
E: As for Jingliu, the sinner... She succumbed to mara, slaughtered her people, and abandoned her oath.

C: 对，所以不去云骑驻地，而是直接送你去幽囚狱，包吃包住，还有重兵护卫着，绝对安全。
E: Correct, so we're not going there. I'm taking you to The Shackling Prison. Safe, well-guarded, plenty of food, and a place to sleep.

C: 呜汪！
E: Woof!

C: 别想用言语乱我心境。
E: Keep quiet — I don't want your words distracting me.

C: 咱们药王秘传的用人原则是，疑人不用、用人不疑。所以……
E: The Disciples' initiation is governed by the following principle — never accept who you suspect, and never suspect who you accept. So...

C: 辛苦了。可惜，那个叛徒已经被保护起来了…看起来即使截获密信，这些相关消息也是瞒不住的。
E: Good work. Unfortunately, the traitor has already found refuge under their wing... It appears that even our interception couldn't prevent the intel on our mission from slipping through the cracks.

C: 那么，像你这样的强者，为什么想成为药王秘传呢？
E: You seem like you've got it all figured out... What brings you to the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

C: 不过，具体的药理还是要等在下验证一下…这可能需要点时间。
E: The specifics, however, will require further investigation. This will take some time...

C: 人人各有职责，走吧。
E: Everyone has their duties. Let's go.

C: 她说「云骑军在丹鼎司」，我打算找一艘船，这就归队。你们怎么说？
E: She mentioned the Cloud Knights were at the Alchemy Commission — I should find a ship and regroup with my unit. What about you?

C: 是这样的，我瞧太卜用穷观阵推算卡芙卡的过去，我嘛，也有类似的需求……
E: Y'know... I see you've been using the Matrix of Prescience to divine into Kafka's past. Well, I have a similar request...

C: 那又是谁？三月，你今天怎么一直在说些奇怪的话…跟上我的脚步。
E: Who? March, you're being really weird today... Follow me.

C: 你们小心一点，不要弄伤她……
E: Be careful not to harm her...

C: 你找错人了，去和另一位聊聊。
E: Wrong Fu Xuan! Talk to the other one.

C: 我不会要挨个和他们打一架吧…太卜大人倒是还好，景元将军我大概真的打不过……
E: I don't have to fight all of them... right? The Master Diviner was easy-peasy, but I don't think I could take General Jing Yuan...

C: 咱们两个印象中的{NICKNAME}倒是差不多。
E: We have similar recollections of {NICKNAME}.

C: 仙舟的贸易航路上有许多类似的星球…可惜，反物质军团出现后，它们都失去了联系。
E: There are many similar star systems on the Xianzhou trade routes... Unfortunately, all of them lost contact after the appearance of the Antimatter Legion.

C: 啊？什么……
E: Huh? What do you mean...

C: （清除「失真」）
E: (Clear distortion)

C: 我甚至还没搞清楚发生了什么，就被弹出来了……
E: I don't know. Before I could figure out what was going on, it spat me out...

C: 云璃自信地看向了你。
E: Yunli looks at you confidently.

C: 我对这柄剑没兴趣。
E: I'm not interested in the sword, to be honest.

C: 哎哟哟，要掉小珍珠了吗？
E: Poor thing, are you crying?

C: 等等，你怎么还给她指路了，万一她是来打劫的呢？
E: Wait, why did you give her directions? What if she's planning to steal something?

C: 记得向怀炎将军道歉。
E: Don't forget to apologize to General Huaiyan.

C: 简单来说，见过宝剑的人并非都去过工造司，想要宝剑的人并非都见过宝剑…这么排除下来，就只剩下云璃小姐一位嫌疑人了。
E: To put it simply, not everyone who's seen the sword has been to the Artisanship Commission, and not everyone who might want the sword has seen it... So, the only remaining suspect is Miss Yunli.

C: 云璃说自己没有偷剑，我愿意信她。
E: Yunli says she didn't steal the sword, and I am willing to believe her.

C: {NICKNAME}，你昨日与云璃在一起，应该最有机会证明她的清白。你有什么想问我的吗？
E: You were with Yunli yesterday, {NICKNAME}, so you have the best chance to prove her innocence. Is there anything you need to ask me?

C: 藏于匣中的锁扣机关完好无损，并无被外力撬动、破坏的痕迹。
E: The locking mechanism nestled within the case remains intact, bearing no marks of external force or tampering.

C: 要怎么才能让他清醒过来。
E: How can we snap him out of it?

C: 真是怪人一个。
E: You're a real weirdo.

C: 如果熬不下去的话，可以把一切都交给我。你不必思考那些过于沉重的东西……
E: When things get too rough for you to handle, just leave everything to me. No need to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders...

C: 我品尝到了他们临死前的绝望。他们看不见这个日子到来了。你也一样。
E: I tasted their despair before death. They didn't see it coming, and neither will you.

C: 听这话，你是已经有头绪了？快说来听听。
E: If you put it like that, then do you already have someone in mind? Tell me, c'mon.

C: …哦，原来是这样。警长阁下，凶手是佐罗，证据是领带，对吗？
E: ...Ah, I see. Sheriff, the murderer is Lefton. The evidence is the tie, right?

C: 那…压根就没有凶手？证据就是那个戒指…算了，这我随便乱说的……
E: Then... right from the start, there was no murderer? The evidence is the ring... Whatever, I'm just spitballing here...

C: 如此一来，凶手似乎没有制造密室的理由。也有理由推测，如果现场真的是密室——那制造出密室的人，未必是凶手。
E: That being so, the murderer seems to have no reason for creating a locked-room. There is also reason to speculate that if the crime scene was a locked-room — then its creator might not necessarily be the murderer.

C: 因此当他得知这一信息时，就意识到是一息尚存的死者自己制造了密室。
E: And so when he learned this piece of information, he realized that the victim had created their own locked-room mystery.

C: 当然，这只是一个简单的思维游戏。谜底是什么并不重要，花火小姐只是为了暗示我一件事——凶手是「侦探助手」……
E: Of course, this is just a simple mind game. The answer to the puzzle isn't important. Miss Sparkle just wanted to pass on one hint to me: That the murderer is the assistant detective...

C: 真相不会说谎，「记忆」也不会。
E: The truth does not lie. Neither do memories.

C: 众所周知，可怕的假面愚者花火可以变化为其他人的样貌。而在这出剧目中，大反派花火已将自己伪装成了另一名角色。
E: Everyone knows that the mighty Masked Fool Sparkle can change her appearance to look like others. And in this drama, the villain, Sparkle, has disguised herself as another character.

C: 呃…是这样吗，感觉证据有点对不上号啊？要不，再想想？
E: Er... is that so? I feel like the evidence doesn't really match? How about you think it over again?

C: …没错，正是如此！
E: ...That's right. That's the one!

C: 真是一场惨剧啊，若不是有你这样明察秋毫的神探，凶手一定会逍遥法外！
E: What a tragedy. If it weren't for your incisive detective work, the murderer would still be at large!

C: 你瞧，援手到了。
E: Look, help has just arrived.

C: 何况自打星核邪祟入侵太卜司开始，它所造成的干扰已经大大降低了卜算的准确度——或然误差有千分之二那么多！我不能容许测算结果有此舛错。
E: Furthermore, interference caused by the Stellaron spirits that infiltrated the Commission has greatly reduced the accuracy of our divination. The margin of error could be as high as <unbreak>0.2%</unbreak>! I cannot tolerate such inaccuracies in our interpretations.

C: 符卿带来的消息，让这块拼图合上了——哈哈，星核猎手果然有趣，绕这么大个弯子，目的竟是为了令仙舟与列车牵上线，谁又能想到呢？
E: Nevertheless, Lady Fu, your intel means the puzzle is more complete than it was before, haha. These Stellaron Hunters are a captivating group — such lengths to get the Xianzhou and the Express onto the same track. Who would've believed it?

C: …咳咳，这个批次，还没上色完毕，怎能让它们出阵？
E: I... Ahem! We haven't quite finished the paintwork on this batch. How can we deploy them if they're not looking their best?

C: 混账！你提这个干什么！…不过你说得也有道理，咱们还是别跟这个短生种一般见识了。
E: Hey! Why'd you bring that up... Hmph, you're right, we shouldn't stoop to this short-lifer's level.

C: 就是就是！
E: Yeah!

C: 一口吞下
E: Swallow it down.

C: {NICKNAME}，在下恳求你离开罗浮…离开这场争端，事情并不是你看到的那样。
E: {NICKNAME}, please, I urge you to leave the Luofu... Abandon this struggle, the truth isn't what it appears to be.

C: 这样吧，咱们就从这三人的放生对象中寻找共性？这世上肯定有生命，可以同时符合他们所有人的需求……
E: Let's find out the similarities among the creatures they like to release. There must be a kind of being in this world that can meet the needs of all of them...

C: 将贝洛伯格的机器当作濒危生命，「放生」到遥远的世界里，积累所谓的「功德」…？
E: Treat the machines in Belobog as endangered creatures and release them to a faraway world in order to "accumulate merits"?

C: 记得准时到哟~
E: Remember to be there on time.

C: 我还以为你找到了什么合适的放生对象哩！
E: This isn't what I expected from you!

C: 你的朋友有没有替你分担？
E: Did your friends help you?

C: 知道危险你还去？
E: You're going despite the risk?

C: 好了，该嘱咐的都嘱咐完了，咱接着走，当心脚下。
E: Anyway, that's the background. Let's keep moving, and watch your step...

C: 唔，好奇心得到满足了，虽然产生了更多的问题，但既然答应了判官们要走，咱就不能食言了。
E: *sigh* I've got loads more questions, but my curiosity is satisfied for now. We better leave before the judges decide to arrest us.

C: 哦呼，你人真好。
E: Wow! That's a yes, right...?

C: 呃…棘手的是她身上依附的那个东西，那家伙，我不想和它打照面。
E: But... that thing attached to her is the tricky part. That's something I don't wish to face.

C: 藿藿，汝在镜中？可算定位到了！
E: Huohuo, are you in the mirror? I finally found you!

C: 判官大人真是打的一手好算盘，既然气氛都烘托到这了，我愿贡献一计。咱们先去个开阔的地方吧…比如那边的燕乐亭。
E: You have a sound plan, Your Honor... and since the stage is set, allow me to offer my assistance. Let's find somewhere more open first... like Swallowsong Pavilion, over there.

C: 去调查其他铜镜。
E: Investigate other mirrors.

C: 那座浮空岛上好像有面镜子…就是有点远……
E: I think there's a mirror on that floating island... but it's a bit far away...

C: 好的，我可以先为您大体介绍一下。
E: Of course, allow me to give you a general introduction first.

C: 我会帮你拿回来的。
E: I'll help you get it back.

C: 还有你的音色——如丝缎般柔和，从低音到高音都一直保持着相当程度的音色统一，真是罕见的天赋……
E: And your timbre — It is smooth as satin, and from low to high pitches, you've managed to keep your timbres steady to a considerable degree. You have a rare and precious gift...

C: 非常感谢您的教导，老师！我从来都没想过，从我的嗓子里能冒出那么美妙的歌声……
E: I truly appreciate your guidance, sir! I've never dreamed that such beautiful songs could be produced from my voice...

C: 你啊你…和你爸一模一样，只会惹我生气！我不知道为这个家操了多少心……
E: You... you're just like your father, always making me mad! You have no idea how much I've worried for this family...

C: 别人说什么你就信什么？你都多大了，别整天像个小孩子那么天真……
E: And you believe what anyone tells you? You're not young anymore. Stop acting like a naive child...

C: 那只外表精美雅致的礼盒，封装着我已经朽烂的未来。
E: That beautiful and intricate gift box holds my already-rotten future.

C: 你想取代我…但你并不是我。
E: You wish to replace me... But you're not me.

C: 杀死了我之后…你能得到什么？你还能给自己留下些什么？
E: After you kill me... what will you have gained? What else can you leave for yourself?

C: 你赢了…柯柯娜……
E: You won... Cocona...

C: 嗯，交给我保管吧。
E: You can count on me to keep them safe.

C: 啊…很高兴认识您。我是庞德的朋友，是来替他传话的。
E: Ah... A pleasure. I'm Pound's friend. I'm here to deliver a message in his stead.

C: 不管我再怎么尝试，结果都不会变。<color=#dbc291ff>我赢不了，{F#女士}{M#先生}…我赢不了。</color>
E: No matter how hard I try, the outcome stays the same. <color=#dbc291ff>I can't win... I just can't.</color>

C: 您好，欢迎光临，有什么需要的吗？
E: Hello, welcome. What do you need?

C: 我愿意为他放弃一切。
E: I would give up everything for him!

C: 这是不好的征兆。
E: This is a bad sign.

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 心灵空间中的莱斯利突然向后倒去…他打了个趔趄，踉跄着后退了两步，勉强再次站稳。
E: Inside the spiritual space, Lesley suddenly falls backward... He staggers and stumbles a couple of steps before forcing himself back to his feet.

C: 就选你了。
E: I'll pick you then.

C: 那<color=#dbc291ff>空艇就可以命名为：「塔塔洛夫号」</color>——传说中伟大的垃圾之王，它将指引我们走向征服和伟业！用涂装来彰显您的硬实力和威慑力。
E: Then <color=#dbc291ff>the airship's new name shall henceforth be the Tatalov</color> — the grand Garbage King of legend. It will guide us toward conquest and majestic grandeur! Give it a coat of paint to demonstrate your show of force and intimidation.

C: 我已用梦泡将您内心的提案记录起来——也包含备选方案，以便未来更换涂装之需。
E: I've used a dream bubble to record your preferred proposal — it also includes different options to prepare for the possibility of future repaints.

C: 太感谢了！
E: Thank you so much!

C: …垃圾桶。
E: ...Trashcan.

C: 在你面前的是一台白日梦酒店标配的自动化服务终端。
E: Standing before you is a Reverie Hotel's standard-issue automated service terminal.

C: 我专治怪事，说来听听。
E: Weird things are right in my wheelhouse. I'm all ears.

C: 当然！麻烦您查一下，我的名字是罗伊罗伊•布奇布嘎•巴登豪威尔。
E: Course I do! Please could you look up for me: Royroy Bougiebooga Baden-Powell.

C: 去找你的朋友吧！
E: Go find your friend!

C: （原来匹诺康尼也会有这种客人…本来以为能来得起这里的人都是非富即贵呢。）
E: (So Penacony has guests of that caliber, too... I thought everyone who could afford to come here was either filthy rich or an aristocrat.)

C: 这世道，狗仔队的话术都这么蹩脚了吗？我再说一次，退后！
E: Do the paparazzi nowadays all resort to such lame excuses? Let me say it again — back off!

C: 您、您听到我说的话了！不想受伤的话，就请在这里止步！
E: Y—You heard me! Stop here if you don't want to get hurt!

C: 小心，挚友！请站在我和波提欧兄弟的身后。
E: Be careful, my friend! Please stand behind Boothill and me.

C: …请保护好我的膝盖！
E: ...Please protect my knees!

C: 那就让前台一直空着吧。
E: Sure, let's just leave the reception desk unattended.

C: 但你一刻都没有为他感到悲伤，接下来开启的就是紧张刺激的帝垣琼玉牌局……
E: But you don't feel sorry for him even for a second because, in the next moment, you're fully immersed in the intense and thrilling game of Celestial Jade...

C: 为、为了您的安全着想，请您放弃闯入的想法！
E: F—For the sake of your safety, please drop the idea of breaking in!

C: 你进去找吧，我帮你看着入口。
E: You go in and find the manuscript. I'll keep watch at the door.

C: 因为他们很快就会意识到，自己的热情和天赋在长生种上百年的经验面前，显得单薄贫瘠。这是时间的鸿沟，很少有短生种能跨越过去，大多数人只能发出一声叹息。
E: Because they soon realize that their enthusiasm and talent pale in comparison to what long-life species have seen. This is a gulf of time that very few short-life species can bridge. Most people can only sigh at this barrier.

C: 短生种的匠人想在工造司里坚持下去，也是需要伙伴和朋友的。你这个修学星槎制造的徒弟，想必能理解他的梦想吧……
E: Short-life craftsmen need partners and friends if they're to survive in the Artisanship Commission. As an apprentice of starskiff manufacturing, you must be able to understand his dream...

C: 星槎制造有很多环节，每一环都至关重要。
E: There are many steps in the starskiff manufacturing process, and each one is important.

C: 即便工匠们对自己的设计十分自信，但是总有一些设计失败的时候。
E: Despite the confidence in their own designs, even our craftsmen have their failures.

C: 看来就快要培养完成了！
E: It looks like it's almost done incubating!

C: 从这个角度看，很多细节都看不到，我们换个地方再拍一个其他角度的吧。
E: Many details aren't visible from this angle. Let's move to shoot from a different angle.

C: 啊…{NICKNAME}，是你啊。那就麻烦你开始，给我来点刺激，好好教训我一下，让我振作起来！
E: Oh... {NICKNAME}, it's you. I'd appreciate it if you could talk some sense into me and help me pull myself together!

C: 眼前的业成阵，「识业因之序」，这是专用梳理「因果」联系的阵基。
E: This Karma Terminal that recognizes the order of karma is a base terminal designed to sort out causal relationships.

C: 我们从飞行士聊到职业牌手，还谈到了厨师和编剧，铖杰师傅说自己都没有什么自信。
E: We touched on occupations like the pilot, professional celestial jade player, chef, and even scriptwriter. Yet, Chengjie was not sure if any of those is suitable for him.

C: 好吧，我听从你们的建议，就从我感兴趣的「绘画」开始。
E: Well, I'll heed your advice and start exploring my passion — painting.

C: 我这也太亏了吧。
E: This is a bad bargain for me.

C: 迴星港内罪囚流窜，将彼等活着带回来，再来谈谈还阳之事。
E: You can find many of them roaming around at Stargazer Navalia. Bring them back alive, then we'll talk about your master.

C: 哈哈哈，说的也是！你不想去凑热闹我也能理解，毕竟场面每次也都大差不差。
E: Hahaha, you're right about that! I get it if you don't wanna join in the fun. It's all the same after a while.

C: 哈…谢谢你们，我感觉好多了。真不好意思，娜塔…浪费你的精力了。
E: Ha... thank you all. I feel much better now. Sorry, Nat... I must have wasted your time.

C: 那太好了。不管发生了什么，我都希望你们能好好相处，不要被一些琐事影响了彼此间的关系。回见，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thank you. Regardless of what's really going on, I hope none of you let small things get in the way of your friendship. See you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我那两部失窃的机器里有一台无人机，我给它起名叫「小飞」。我给「小飞」装了报警器，没权限的人只要一靠近它就会嗡嗡叫个没完——那音量，保证整个聚落的人都能听见。
E: One of the machines they stole was a drone — I call it Little Fay. Little Fay has an alarm that buzzes non-stop as soon as any unauthorized people get close. It's guaranteed to wake up the entire settlement.

C: …我刚想问，刚才那算怎么回事？
E: Yeah, I was gonna ask... what was all that supposed to be?

C: …神清气爽！帮上别人忙的感觉总是特别充实，你们觉得呢？
E: ...That felt great! It's such a wholesome feeling to help other people, don't you think?

C: …哈？！等会儿，你这就答应他了？
E: ...Huh!? Hold on — you agree?

C: …第一回合，开始！
E: Alright... fight!

C: 就差…一点……
E: Just a bit... more...

C: 他刚才…好像放下了什么东西？
E: Did he... put something down?

C: 也可以理解。如果有人问我：「匹诺康尼都有什么值得去的景点呢？」我恐怕也会一时语塞。
E: Can't blame them. If someone asked me, "What's there to see on Penacony?" I'd probably struggle to answer too.

C: 不过咱现在只能等到几周后演武仪典开幕，才有机会登舰了。在此之前，我们俩也不能耽误工作——所以才问你们，有什么比较值得一去的景点？
E: But for now, all we can do is wait until the Wardance starts in a few weeks before we can board it. We've still got work to do, so we can't just sit around waiting for it to start, that's why we're asking you about some must-see attractions.

C: 哈哈…你真有意思。还是给我们提供些更靠谱的建议吧。
E: Haha... you're just joking, right? How about giving us some more practical suggestions?

C: 真的吗？将军一直还担心我个子长不高呢。我一直劝他安心。
E: Really? The General is always worried I won't grow much taller, but I keep telling him not to worry about it.

C: 你说什么？
E: What did you just say?

C: 姑娘，难道没人教过你「不告而取是为贼」吗？如果非要用剑说话…可以，就咱们俩，现在一对一……
E: Hasn't anyone told you that taking without asking is stealing? If you want to settle this with swords... Fine, let's have a one-on-one duel right now...

C: 三月小姐说的没错，彦卿本事低微，眼下还不能为将军分忧。
E: Miss March is right. I don't have the skills to share the general's burdens at the moment.

C: 不愧是长生种，说起话来夹枪带棒的。你们可以不在乎时间观念，但每一分钟延误所造成的损失，我都要天舶司加倍赔偿！
E: Typical of a long-life species, your words are dripping with sarcasm. While you may not care about time, I do! I'll be demanding double compensation from the Sky-Faring Commission for every minute wasted!

C: 可爱。
E: Cute.

C: 你知道我排了多少年的队，才得到请衔药龙女为我看诊的机会吗？到底是什么人插我的队？这合理吗？
E: Do you have any idea how many years I've waited just to see the Healer Lady? And now someone cuts in line? How is that fair?

C: 丹恒，你觉得这两位到底谁更厉害一点？别怪我，我是真心好奇。
E: Between these two, who do you think is tougher, Dan Heng? Don't get me wrong, I'm just curious.

C: 那么，这次受联盟派遣前来探问建木灾异始末的，只有曜青的飞霄将军了？
E: So, General Feixiao of the Yaoqing is the only one investigating the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis on behalf of the Alliance?

C: 唔，虽然咱也算得上聪明伶俐，但学剑，听起来辛苦的很。
E: Yeah, while I'm smart, learning swordplay sounds like a whole lot of work.

C: 我明白了。
E: I understand.

C: 哪有这样的道理？
E: How does that make sense?

C: 罗浮上呈联盟的报告中既然出现了列车的行动记录，他一定想眼见为实，看看我们是否真有报告提及的那般能耐，而不是虚应故事找来的借口。
E: Since the Crew's actions were mentioned in the Luofu's operations log that was given to the Alliance, he probably wants to see firsthand if we're as capable as the report claims, or if we're just some made-up excuse to save face.

C: 说的不错。所以这次我前来，还有另一个目的：探视「呼雷」。
E: That's true. And that's why I'm also here for another purpose — to visit Hoolay.

C: 「船」最重要。
E: The ship is paramount.

C: 哪有师父上门接徒弟的？
E: What kind of master waits on their apprentice's doorstep?

C: 既然三月小姐来学剑，那总要有柄趁手的兵刃才行，就连夜置办了一套对剑。
E: Since you want to learn swordplay, Miss March, you'll need suitable weapons. So, I went out of my way to prepare a pair of swords overnight.

C: 我还要再准备一下…
E: Not really...

C: 都给我说饿了。
E: I'm getting hungry.

C: （稍后再去）
E: (Go later)

C: 有挥剑的理由，总强过茫然不知所措。我这一生救治过不少云骑，其中也不乏似二位这样出类拔萃的战士……
E: Well, it's better to have a reason for wielding a sword than to be lost and confused. I've saved countless Cloud Knights in my life, and there are plenty of exceptional warriors just like the two... of you...

C: 你自愿披上了贱畜的皮，加入这次行动，为光荣的大业献身。现在你告诉我，你搞不定？你知道我们需要多少条船吗？
E: You willingly donned the skin of a lowly beast to join this mission, dedicating yourself to our glorious cause. And now you're telling me you can't handle it? Do you realize how many ships we need?

C: 请再等等。
E: Just one moment, please.

C: 奉十王敕，凡有脱狱、劫狱者，不禁杀伤！
E: By decree of the Ten Lords, all prison breakers and intruders shall be apprehended, dead or alive.

C: 男人仿佛是从监狱的幽暗角落里突然出现，又仿佛下一刻会随时消失。
E: The man seems to materialize from the shadowy corners of the prison, as if he could vanish into thin air at any moment.

C: 这是事实，再说一遍又如何？罗浮的监狱管理，真是堪忧……
E: So what if I repeat it? It's the truth after all. The prison management on the Luofu is truly concerning...

C: 三月说的不错。爷爷，听说那个从幽囚狱里逃走的罪犯不是一般的可怕。万一有什么闪失……
E: March is right, Grandpa. I heard the escaped prisoner from The Shackling Prison is beyond formidable. In case anything goes wrong...

C: 是啊，我也听到了。不过，要让他们失望了。我已经禀报了将军，放弃了守擂剑士的身份。
E: Yeah, I heard them, too, but I'm afraid I'll have to disappoint them. I've already reported to General Jing Yuan that I'll give up my role as the ringmaster.

C: 虽然身高高不过折凳，但罗浮的小娃娃也有不输曜青战士的志气啊。
E: You may be tiny in stature, but your ambition matches that of the Yaoqing's warriors.

C: 恕妾身冒昧一问，这个步离人真有如此凶悍？
E: If I may be so bold to ask, is this borisin truly that formidable?

C: 既然如此，为何在降服这头恶兽后没将他处以极刑，反而只是关押起来？
E: If that's the case, why wasn't the beast executed instead of being imprisoned?

C: 如此说来，妾身要感谢将军以一纸流放令保护了老师。
E: If that's the case, I should thank you for protecting my mentor by exiling her, General.

C: 椒丘，既然你说「云骑会封锁港口」，我会让你亲自去港口瞧瞧，究竟云骑是否如你所想。<color=#dbc291ff>把你所看到的答案告诉我</color>。
E: Since you are so confident that the Cloud Knights will close the ports, Jiaoqiu, I'm now giving you a chance to go and see it for yourself. Go to the ports, come back, and <color=#dbc291ff>tell me what you saw</color>.

C: （虽然呼雷一行眼下能够藏身于闹市之中，但被发现也只是时间问题。他敢放我离开，到底有什么打算？）
E: (Although Hoolay and his followers can currently hide in the city, it won't be long before they're found. What was he planning when he let me go?)

C: …椒丘。
E: ...Jiaoqiu.

C: 我让你猜对手的战术风格，谁让你评价我的「老铁」了。
E: I asked you to make predictions about your opponent's combat style. No one asked you to criticize my dear Old Mettle!

C: 只是个练剑不久的小丫头…为何她也会被选上？
E: She's just a little girl that has only just started training... Why was she chosen as a contestant?

C: 没有。
E: No.

C: 难道说，我也是精锐？
E: Could I be an elite as well?

C: 别问我，我也不认识啊！
E: Don't ask me. I don't know either!

C: 来啊，曜青人，亮出你的爪牙！我和你，不死不休！
E: Come, Yaoqing man. Show me your fangs! We will fight to the death!

C: 擂台下面的大厅…我记得是在这边。
E: The hall below the ring... I remember it being this way...

C: 呼雷这家伙，豁出命来也要把将军拖下水！
E: Hoolay just wanted to take down the general, even at the cost of his own life!

C: 别再顽抗了！
E: Stop trying to resist me!

C: 猎物，匍匐待死！
E: Prey, kneel and accept your fate!

C: 呼雷，从你踏进我心中那一刻开始，你就已经输了。
E: Hoolay, from the very moment you stepped into my mind, you had already lost.

C: 若不如此，便不能听到长老的高论。
E: Otherwise, I wouldn't be able to hear your lofty opinions.

C: 啊？狗？哦哦哦，「傻狗」只是个形容词。那家伙是个人。
E: Eh? Dog? Oh oh, "idiot pooch" is just a nickname. It's a person.

C: 被愚弄了吗？
E: Is she being deceived?

C: 这是个…零件？
E: This is a... part?

C: 公主殿下莅临小店，小店真是蓬荜生辉啊！
E: For Your Highness to visit our humble shop, we are splendiferously honored to host you!

C: 这纺锤花，小店有不少存货，您要多少，小人就拿得出多少。
E: We have plenty of spindleblooms in storage. I'll fetch as many as you wish.

C: 你慢慢准备。我们俩也没什么急事。
E: Take your time. We aren't in a hurry anyway.

C: 琳儿玛，辛苦你了。
E: Lenamar, you've done well.

C: 如果朕和你们回去，你们会怎么样对待朕？
E: If I return with you, what will you do with me?

C: （默默赞叹老人的智慧。）
E: (Admire the elderly man's wisdom silently.)

C: 我看到了…某样东西，某种…<color=#dbc291ff>武器，伴随着无休止的杀戮和死亡</color>。它似乎和我有关。
E: I saw something... It looked like... <color=#dbc291ff>a type of weapon which brought about endless slaughter and death</color>. I seem to be related to it.

C: （听她的，先去黑塔办公室了解下情况吧。）
E: (I'd better listen to Herta and visit her office first.)

C: 说了你也不明白——不，别说是你了，就算换成其他「天才俱乐部」的成员，能理解这个课题的恐怕也寥寥无几。
E: You wouldn't understand even if I explained it to you, but it isn't your fault. Not even many Genius Society members can comprehend this matter.

C: 不，那位猎犬并没有说谎。秘密就在我们眼前。
E: No, that Bloodhound didn't lie. The secret is right in front of us.

C: 现在，我的胸腔里像是装着整个宇宙。我能看到它的每次闪烁，感受到它的每次跃动——但实际上，我对它一无所知。
E: Now, my chest feels like it holds the entire universe in it. I can see it flicker and feel its pulse, but I know nothing about it.

C: 哈，可惜你不是生物学家。先把这里清理干净吧，要不然可没法开工。
E: It's a pity you aren't a biologist. Let's clear this place up, or we can't start working.

C: 不按起爆按钮。
E: Do not press the button.

C: 自动巡航AI已开启。锁定目标中…<unbreak>30%</unbreak>…<unbreak>70%</unbreak>…完成。
E: Automatic cruise AI activated. Locking target... <unbreak>30%</unbreak>... <unbreak>70%</unbreak>... Complete.

C: 他们会永世诅咒我的名字，他们会…你又付出了什么代价，杜德利？
E: My name will forever be cursed. They'll... What's the price you have to pay, Dudley?

C: 那就好…那就再好不过了。
E: That's great... It couldn't be better.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我加入这项实验不是为了任何理念，只是为了我自己。我想让自己的才能和领域被世界看见，仅此而已。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I joined the experiment not for a good cause, but for myself. I wanted my talents and expertise to be seen by the whole world, and that's it.</color>

C: 我并未就此收集过多数人的意见。不过，有一位女士的评价，我想我可以代为转述。
E: I have not gathered too many opinions on this matter. However, there is one lady's assessment that I believe I can convey on her behalf.

C: 那只蓝色羽毛的孩子，它还没学会找到回家的路，就在捉迷藏时走丢了……
E: That blue-feathered child... it already got lost playing hide-and-seek before it learned how to find the way back home...

C: 你不只是个动画角色。
E: You're not just an animated character.

C: …我不记得了。
E: ...I don't remember.

C: 终于找到你了。
E: I've finally found you.

C: （坏了，那个人有危险……）
E: (Oh no, that person is in danger...)

C: 需要帮忙吗？
E: Do you need help?

C: 谢谢你，以及——再见了，不知名的好心人。
E: Thank you, and — goodbye, nameless well-wisher.

C: 去吧，一直向前走——你要找的人在那边等着你呢。
E: Go, keep forging ahead — the one you wish to find is waiting for you there.

C: 各位公民，你们也都看到了，就是这个外邦人！
E: Citizens, we have seen it too, it was this outlander!

C: 听到了吗？按照律法，现在你只有两个选择。要么赔钱私了，要么咱们公民法庭上见。
E: Hear that? According to our laws, you now have two choices: Resolve this with compensation, or I'll see you in civilian court.

C: 这位小友，请不要急着离开。我还有些话要说。
E: Don't be in such a hurry to leave, young friend. I still have something to say.

C: 救人一命，少吃几个我也愿意。
E: I'd be willing to forgo any number of apples to save a life.

C: 我同意你的观点。
E: I agree with your perspective.

C: 类似的悲剧在这片土地上发生过太多次，难道每个可怜人都是咎由自取吗？我看未必。
E: Similar tragedies have happened too many times in this land. Did all of them deserve their fates? I think not.

C: 你扛着货箱，一路回到了重渊。
E: You lug the crate back to the abyss.

C: 哎别，何必呢？我就是想说这些食物很珍贵而已，只要你躺在椅子上，按照步骤用餐就好……
E: Oh come on, there's no need for that. I just wanted to put emphasis on how priceless these foods are. Just make sure you lie back in your chair and savor them in order...

C: 送给一伙快饿死的外邦人。
E: To feed a group of dying outlanders.

C: 给出苹果。
E: Give him the apple.

C: 这么看，我一直以来的观点还是挺明显的……
E: From what I did, I think my standpoint is pretty obvious...

C: 黄金裔搜集夺火种，既是为了将泰坦解放，也是为了帮众人博得一线生机。这叫名正言顺。
E: The Chrysos Heirs gathered Coreflame to liberate the Titans and pave a possible path for survival for all mortals. It is perfectly justified.

C: 观众们陷入了议论——其中不乏其他泰坦的信徒。而伊特罗听到这个话题则是有些尴尬，不知该如何开口。
E: The audience is engrossed in discussion — scattered among them are many disciples of other Titans. And Etro, somewhat embarrassed by this subject, struggles to find his voice.

C: 听到可能被外人占便宜，在场的公民激动了起来。他们高呼着对拉莱德表示支持，全然没意识到他本人或许才是那个摘桃子的家伙。
E: Upon hearing that they might be taken advantage of by outsiders, the present crowd gets riled up. They hoot and holler in support of Liluder, oblivious to the fact that they might just be the ones reaping said blessings.

C: 广场上的公民越来越少，人们回味着刚刚发生的一切。这座城市究竟该去往何方？还没有人能给出答案。
E: The citizens at the plaza start to scatter, with people digesting what just happened. In what direction should this city head towards? No one seems to have the answer.

C: 重渊的外邦人怎么样了？
E: What happened to the outlanders at the Abyss?

C: 那个…我在外行商时听流民们说过，泰坦眷属都聚集在黑潮下的<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋城</color>，只有你们这些英雄知道它在哪。
E: So... While I was traveling and selling my wares, I heard word from the refugees that the Titankin were gathering in <color=#dbc291ff>Castrum Kremnos</color> under the black tide. Only a hero such as yourself knows where they are.

C: 你认识帕里斯吗？
E: Do you know Paris?

C: 你不懂，无法使用。
E: Understand, you do not. Use it, you can not.

C: 我玩得转。
E: I can make it spin.

C: 既然你懂算碑，那这次也要拜托你帮忙了——别担心，我帕里斯绝不会让你白忙这么多次，事后定有重谢！
E: As you understand this thing, I must ask you for help once more... Fear not, Paris will not let your efforts be in vain again, and they will be greatly appreciated!

C: 你未来会有我需要的东西。
E: You will have something I need one day.

C: 感觉要开始胃疼了…
E: Am I sensing a love triangle...?

C: 真是个草包。
E: You are truly useless.

C: 我怎么觉得气氛不太对…
E: Why did that seem a little off to me...?

C: 这里的店主每天都会遇到各种各样的客人，也算是见多识广，就问问他们吧。
E: The store owners here meet all kinds of people every day. They'll be the most knowledgeable about the area. We should ask some of them.

C: 这里就是雕像小姐记忆中的过去了，但她在哪里呢？
E: This is the past in the statue lady's memory... But where is she?

C: 就在这之外，厄运的影子也试图把我们拖向灭亡！
E: Even right here, the shadow of misfortune attempts to drag us towards annihilation!

C: 瞧瞧是谁来了？尊贵的圣女大人。
E: Who do we have here? Our esteemed Holy Maiden.

C: 这方案能谈下来，多亏了雅利洛-Ⅵ的经验。比起短期利益，树立一个「存护」的典范更有助于长线发展。
E: Thanks to our experience in Jarilo-VI, we were able to close this deal. Rather than focusing on short-term gains, establishing a model of "Preservation" will be more beneficial for long-term development.

C: 什么事这么神秘？
E: What's so secretive?

C: （叹息）。
E: (sigh)

C: （沉默）。
E: (keep silent)

C: 而且，最后一次演算的记录——你担任「负世」泰坦那次——至关重要。「开拓」会取代「毁灭」，净化这个世界。
E: Besides, the last extrapolation record, the one when you acted as the Worldbearing Titan, is crucial. The Trailblaze will replace the Destruction and purify this world.

C: 听说以前有六个…
E: Heard there used to be six...

C: 干得好呀{F#丫头}{M#小子}！
E: Well done, {F#lass}{M#boy}!

C: 正在研究学习计划……
E: Reviewing curriculum...

C: （为她搜寻考卷，督促她学习）
E: (Find exam papers for her and urge her to study.)

C: 正常人可不会像你这样…
E: Normal people won't feel that way...

C: 但是我…一时半会儿也改不过来。书里面又都只会写一些大道理，实际上一点用都没有！
E: But I... I can't change that quickly, and books only ever write about theory. In practice, it's all useless!

C: 这也太卑微了吧？聊个天而已，又不是求人办事。
E: Isn't that a bit too humble? It's just a chat. We're not asking for any favors here.

C: 八成是他自己太困，产生了什么幻觉。
E: He was probably too sleepy and hallucinated.

C: 这家伙生物钟出了点问题，最近精神状态非常差，所以我认为这事压根就是他的幻觉！
E: That fellow's body clock hasn't been working well lately and his mental state is pretty bad. I think it's all a figment of his imagination!

C: 真的吗？不过，我听呜呜伯们说，你好像很喜欢到处捡东西……
E: Really? But I heard from the Wubbaboos that you like to pick stuff up from everywhere...

C: 最近很多人来问我「幸运签」的事，他们总以为，捡起来两团纸就能从此一飞冲天。
E: A lot people have been asking me about the fortune leaf recently. They all think that just picking up a piece of paper would take their career to places.

C: 感谢你的帮助，年轻人。这是你的报酬——下次我再需要帮忙的时候，希望你还在。
E: Thank you for your help. This is the payment I promised. I hope you can still help me the next time I need your help.

C: 将和费尔多的谈话内容转述给了华劳斯……
E: You convey what Furdo said to Wallace...

C: 原来如此…那位叫费尔多的法官很有职业素养，他拒绝的理由我完全理解。可惜了，我一直希望能和一身正气的人做朋友。
E: I see... Judge Furdo is very professional, and I completely understand why he refused to be friends with me. Too bad, I always wanted to be friends with righteous people.

C: 这种天上掉下来的好机会，我怎么可能错过？
E: How could I miss such a good opportunity?

C: 干巴巴的讨论永远比不上实际行动。走吧，我已经物色好了今天的拍照地点。
E: Meaningless discussion can never be compared to real action. Come on, I've found a photo spot for today.

C: 实不相瞒，我想让你们到恶魔之胃里搜集一些古代遗物。
E: To tell you the truth, I want you to go to the Devil's Stomach and collect some ancient relics.

C: 我们是来送货的！{NICKNAME}，把菲多拉姐姐的物资拿给她吧。
E: We are here to deliver these goods! {NICKNAME}, give Fidora her supplies.

C: 收件人是…伊妮丝？
E: The recipient is... Eunice?

C: 莉拉读完了吉尔伯特的信……
E: Lila finished the letter from Gilbert...

C: 如果你有这个意向，我随时可以给你安排学校。我还是很欣赏你的。
E: I can arrange some lessons for you any time, should you have the inclination. I quite admire you.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈，原来如此。
E: Hahaha, I see.

C: 杰帕德
E: Gepard.

C: 话说回来，我还是有点好奇——那个波瓦大臣出了什么题刁难你？快，给我讲讲……
E: Having said that, I'm still curious — what was the question that Bova stumped you with? Come on, and tell me...

C: …收下这些吧！这是你帮我跑腿应得的。
E: ...Please, take this! You deserve it, for helping me with everything.

C: 必然是我！
E: Must be me!

C: 七彩虹…有意思~像塔米拉小姐这样闪耀的人，所钟情的花竟然是…「平凡的美好」。
E: Rainbows... interesting~ For someone as glorious as Tamila, her floral preference is so... "ordinarily beautiful."

C: 说说看吧。
E: Go on.

C: 确认过后，还得麻烦你回来向我说明一下情况…剩下的由我来接手即可。
E: Please come back to let me know of the situation once you're done, and I'll handle the rest.

C: 咦？你有认识的医生吗？还是在下层区？！
E: Huh? You know a doctor? In the Underworld!?

C: 也正因此，有位编辑正在追着我讨债…她最近似乎发现了我的住所，便连日登门拜访。可我哪里有稿子能拿得出手？
E: That's why an editor is hot on my trail... She recently found out where I live and keeps visiting me, but I don't have any manuscripts to show her!

C: 没关系。你是来替他求情的，对吧？
E: It's okay. You're here to ask me to leave him alone, right?

C: 你让他放心吧，我最近找他的原因根本就不是催稿。其实是我们出版社主编看中了他的才能，想要聘请他当《水晶日报》的专栏作者呢。
E: Tell him not to worry. I'm not looking for him because of the manuscript. It's because my chief editor likes his work and wants to hire him as a column writer for the Crystal Daily.

C: 噢哟，不小心扯远了。总之，谢谢你帮忙！这是我的一点心意……
E: Anyways, that went off on a tangent. Thank you! These are your rewards...

C: 拉雯妮开始讲述自己的故事……
E: Lavonne starts to talk about herself...

C: 多谢，年轻人。希望不会占用你太多时间。
E: Thank you, kid. I hope this won't take a lot of your time.

C: 你…知道寒潮吧？她害了寒病，没能挺过去。
E: You know about the Eternal Freeze, right? She got sick from the cold and didn't make it through.

C: 他没想过回来与您生活吗？
E: Has he ever considered moving back here to live with you?

C: 但如果你执意拒捕…那就别怪我不客气了！
E: But if you insist on resisting arrest... then I may have to go tough on you!

C: 嚯嚯嚯…真神奇！想不到我这把老骨头还有看到它亮起来的一天啊。
E: Ohoho... Amazing! I didn't think I'd live to see this light up again...

C: 哦！原来如此。
E: Oh! I get it.

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，虽然人来人往的程度不及灾前，但这里多少也算是鱼龙混杂。
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve was reopened, it has become less busy than before the disaster, but it is still a mixed bag.

C: 这会不会是放生帮干的呢？
E: Do you think this could be the work of The Unshackled?

C: 不管它，直接扔回海里。
E: Forget it, just throw it back.

C: 你有没有认识的人落难了？
E: Is there anyone you know that has gone missing?

C: 我不知道，我没想带走你的枪。
E: I didn't know. I didn't intend to take your gun.

C: （接下来的故事，不应该是帮助落难船长，制伏叛乱水手，重新回到文明世界吗？别擅自在荒岛上留下来了啊！）
E: (Their story from here should be about rescuing a castaway captain or subduing rebel sailors and returning to the civilized world, surely? You can't just selfishly hole up on a deserted island!)

C: 喝就完事了！
E: Bottoms up!

C: 请不要再试图向内窥探了——毕竟你的定位并不是那种会闯进NPC家中肆意搜刮的屠龙勇者，对吧？
E: Do not attempt to peer inside anymore — You're not some dragonslaying hero who barges into NPC homes and ransacks their belongings, are you?

C: 旁听
E: Listen

C: 如果自己去拨动一下琴弦，能发出不同的声音吗？说干就干。
E: If you twang the strings yourself, will they make different sounds? Let's try it.

C: 低温浴池的寒气砭人肌骨，据说常常泡在低温浴池中，有助于维持年轻的身体状态。真是很棒的…呃…保鲜意识。
E: The cold bath chills you to the bone. It's said that taking regular cold baths helps with maintaining youthful vigor. This is really good for... err... refreshing awareness.

C: 餐点种类繁多，随时可以自行取用。并且，无论哪一样看上去都极为新鲜，想必更换得很勤快。
E: Plenty of dishes arranged on it for self-service, and, everything looks refreshingly... fresh. They're probably quick to switch out dishes.

C: 雕塑框架扭曲变形，像是一只闭上的机械眼睛。你想起艾格勒曾有百双眼睛注视大地，如今却只剩下这些人造的微光。
E: The sculpture's frame is twisted, like a closed mechanical eye. You remember Aquila once had a hundred pairs of eyes observing the world — yet now, only these artificial glimmers remain.

C: 你不愿见到地面散落的碎石瓦砾，但就算修好了灯柱，它究竟又能在这坚守多久呢？
E: You hate seeing the ground cluttered with rubble, but even with the lamppost repaired, how long can it hold up?

C: 天才俱乐部#83黑塔女士拒绝引渡这名窃忆者，但异问魔究竟向寂静领主提出了什么问题，黑塔女士表示密切关注。
E: Genius Society #83, Madam Herta, refused to extradite the Memosnatcher, but she showed considerable interest in the questions posed to the Lord of Silence by the Inquisition Spirit.

C: 失却故乡的羁旅者和穷途末路的亡命徒。
E: The lost wanderer, and the desperate outlaw.

C: 月光移转，空影徘徊。
E: As moonlight shifts and shadows linger.

C: 没什么，怕你仗着不死之躯不做「入浴」的准备。来了就好。
E: Nothing in particular. I feared you wouldn't be preparing to "bathe" with that immortal body of yours. You're here, and that's all that matters.

C: 肉食…它们重返尘世，只为了再一次死去？
E: A source of meat... They are returning to the world just to die once more?

C: 荣幸之至。克拉特鲁斯必不惜此身，如铸铁羽翼卫于王侧，坚守悬锋荣耀。
E: It would be my greatest honor. I, Krateros, would give my life and defend your side, like iron wings that hold tight the honor of Kremnos.

C: 想必她会提出挑战王权的动议，以她最擅长的方式——角斗——保护她的孩子。
E: I am certain that she will challenge me for the throne and try to protect her child using what she is best at... gladiatorial combat.

C: 那便是歌耳戈王后亲允的王师之名。
E: That is the title of King's mentor, granted to me by Queen Gorgo.

C: 为了保护迈德漠斯，歌耳戈王后向王欧利庞发起了角斗，不幸落败，被一剑割开了咽喉。
E: Queen Gorgo challenged King Eurypon to gladiator combat to protect Mydeimos. Unfortunately, she was defeated and had her throat slit by his blade.

C: 此乃进步之阶梯、思想漫游之庭园；求道者应于此敬拜，忆其亲族之爱，则求索真理之路畅行无碍。
E: This is the stairway of progress, the garden for intellectual wanderers. Seekers of truth should worship here, reflecting on the love for kin, for only through this remembrance may the path to wisdom remain unobstructed.

C: 或许在那段晦暗的童年中，缇宝将大部分时光都花费在了这些石板上。
E: Perhaps Tribbie spent most of her time during those grim childhood years with these stone slates.

C: …没了么？
E: ...Is that all?

C: 将一个高于二次幂的数分成两个同次幂的数之和是可能的吗？
E: Is it possible to break a number greater than the square of two into the sum of two like powers?

C: 在这黑漆漆的迷雾中，你隐约看见几位身着白袍的祭司正面向圣烛静默祈祷。他们的脚下铺陈着新摘的松枝、月桂与鲜花，你似乎闻到了某种阳光晒在干爽衣物上的味道。
E: In the pitch-black mist, you vaguely see several white-robed priests silently praying before the holy candle. Freshly picked pine branches, laurels, and flowers are laid beneath their feet, and you catch a faint scent reminiscent of sun-dried clothes.

C: 这台衣匠发出的声音空灵而卡顿，显然阿格莱雅并不在另一边。
E: The Garmentmaker speaks in a hollow, stuttering sound, indicating that Aglaea is not on the other end.

C: 没有…无法…协助。
E: Without... Unable... to assist.

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 看看这些「浪漫」的蝴蝶，如此可爱，又如此脆弱…要是让我选的话，我会更愿意变成一只甲虫。
E: Look at these "romantic" butterflies — so charming yet so fragile... If I could choose, I'd rather be a beetle.

C: o((◉ω◉ ! )っ「这、这怎么行！哪儿不舒服？豹豹会尽力为你治疗的！」)∋
E: o((◉ω◉ ! )っ "Th—That won't do! Where does it hurt? I'll do everything in my power to help!" )∋

C: 浓雾吞去星光，你感到一阵晕眩。
E: The dense mist swallows the starlight, and dizziness overtakes you.

C: 塞涅俄丝大人最后告诉我，天空的权柄已经与艾格勒的神躯融合，一同被熔铸进了天象画壁之中。
E: Lady Seliose told me at the end that the authority of Sky had fused with Aquila's divine body, and both were molten into the celestial mural.

C: 怎会如此…大祭司大人呢？你可知她现在身在何处？
E: How could this be... Where is the High Priest now?

C: 诚然，身为命运泰坦的祭司，至少我们自身，不该阻碍向往命运之人的热忱。
E: Indeed, as the priest of the Fate Titans, we must not stand in the way of those who long for their destiny.

C: 嘶，好疼…果然还是不能得意忘形啊…我的血也是红色的，看来英雄的结局并不适合我。
E: Hiss... That hurts... I really let my guard down, didn't I? And my blood is red... so I suppose a hero's end isn't meant to be mine after all.

C: 通往建筑内部的木门，似乎上了锁。你试着推了一下，只能听见合页发出吱嘎的抗议声。
E: The wooden door leading inside the building seems locked. You give it a push, and all you get is a cranky squeak from the hinges.

C: 「诡计之半神」赛法利娅，生于光历<unbreak>3942</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年。
E: Cifera, the Demigod of Trickery. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3942</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>.

C: 我看你要走上白日梦的命途了。
E: I see you're taking the Path of Delusion.

C: …「遇事不决，量子力学」？
E: ...when in doubt, a quantum scientist did it?

C: 母亲…？
E: Mother...?

C: 鱼儿游啊游…鱼儿游啊游……
E: The fish swims and swims... and swims and swims...

C: 不客气。
E: You're welcome.

C: 曾经有学者说，所谓「星空」并非是高天之上的灯火——而是一片片遥远的「大地」。
E: A scholar once said that the starry sky isn't just a collection of lights up above, but rather, endless distant stretches of "earth."

C: 你是谁啊——
E: Who are you...

C: 唷，血气方刚！有我年轻时的派头，哈哈哈！
E: Wow, I admire your fighting spirit! You remind me of myself when I was young, hahaha!

C: 那是当然，这怎么可能让你白出力呢？于情于理都说不过去啊。
E: Of course, you will. How can we make you work for nothing?

C: 之后再说。
E: Maybe later.

C: （看来还有其他人被困在这里，我们要不要过去看看？）
E: (Looks like there's someone else stuck here. Should we go take a look?)

C: 喊我来干嘛？
E: Why'd you yell for me?

C: （前面危险，千万要躲开，别被它们发现了！）
E: (Danger up ahead. Avoid at all costs. Don't get spotted by them!)

C: （{NICKNAME}，佩佩知道你最厉害了，能不能陪我去……）
E: ({NICKNAME}, Peppy knows you're the strongest. Can you come with me...)

C: 哼，我们手里可是有证据的，你看看这个！
E: Hmph, we have the evidence. Look at this!

C: 我感觉你也没多独特…还不如佩佩呢。
E: You're not that special... You can't even compare to Peppy.

C: （你要是不开门，我就让{NICKNAME}{F#大姐头}{M#大哥}破门而出，然后一球棒击穿你的外壳，打爆你的芯片，让火花在你的线路里乱窜！）
E: (If you don't open the door, I will get {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME} to break down this door, shatter your shell with a bat and smash your chip. That will send sparks down your wiring!)

C: （我先问问小姐的意思吧，得回去跟她说一声。）
E: (Let me ask Miss Asta about her opinion. I have to go back and inform her.)

C: 纸片？哪有，这不还是毛茸茸的嘛！你摸摸看？
E: Paper? No way, I'm as fluffy as ever! Come on, give me a feel!

C: 那我们一起来胡思乱想吧！放空、放空…让思绪飘向远方……
E: Let's get lost in thought together! Let's clear our minds and let our thoughts wander far and wide...

C: 它们是谁画的？
E: Who drew them?

C: 呀，明明更应该惊讶，但总觉得{NICKNAME}一定会这么说呢。
E: Ah, I should be more surprised, but somehow I knew {NICKNAME} would say that.

C: 对不起，我记不得了。
E: Sorry, I can't remember.

C: 今天还有武器测试吗？
E: Are there weapon tests today?

C: 有什么事吗？
E: What's up?

C: 而「无罪大乐透」则是同一个星系的监狱里举办的盛事。他们会抽选一个犯人暂获一日自由，其他的犯人得在那一天替他把苦役干了。
E: Well, there's also an Innocence Lottery over in the same star system — in their prisons. The prize draw offers one prisoner one day of freedom, and all the other prisoners have to pick up their hard labor for the day.

C: 他们付上这笔钱，是为了知道究竟谁会被放出监狱，好早做准备……
E: They paid up so they could learn who's going to be released from prison on a given day — so they can get ready for that...

C: 哎，我该不该将占算结果告诉老板呢……
E: *sigh* Should I tell the boss the results of this divination or not...

C: 下次可就没有这么简单了。
E: It will not be so easy next time.

C: 等一下。
E: Wait a moment.

C: 我和宝箱在这等您。
E: I'll be waiting for you here with the chest.

C: 我的话是不是有些太多了，要不我们直接开始下棋吧。
E: Ah, but I digress. Shall we start the game?

C: 当然缺点也是显而易见的——我快要自闭了。
E: Of course, the downside is evident — I'm on the verge of becoming socially withdrawn.

C: 真的有很多玩家感兴趣吗？
E: Are there really that many gamers interested in it?

C: 哦哦哦哦！新的谜题你都完成了，我这里暂时没有什么新的谜题了。
E: Ohhhh! You've completed all the new puzzles! I don't have any more new puzzles at the moment.

C: 不错，很酷的操作。
E: Not bad, very cool moves.

C: 现在想来，我只需要有人能给出答案，不论是哪种观点，我都能用以坚定自己的路！
E: Now that I think of it, I just need someone to give an answer — no matter the perspective, I can use it to ascertain my own path!

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to my duties.

C: 在业已破碎的当下，若虫们拥有的赐福相当珍贵。倘若将它积沙成塔，将会是一股可观的力量，定能解开最牢固的封印。
E: As karma has been severed in the current era, the benediction bestowed upon the nymph becomes incredibly precious. If gathered to form a mountain, these benedictions would hold enough power to break even the most unyielding seal.

C: 衣匠一把抓住记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

C: 嗯…有位织者自诩博古通今。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的休息室内</color>锐评一位学者的演讲，你可以去指教一二。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who prides itself on being knowledgeable and insightful. The golden thread brings tidings: They now offer critiques on a scholar's speech <color=#dbc291ff>in the lounge of Marmoreal Palace</color>. Perhaps you could pick up a few pointers there.

C: 衣匠一把抓住记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

C: 哈哈，很豪华吧？
E: Haha, isn't it luxurious?

C: 我是、银河球棒侠！
E: I am, the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 桀桀——既没挑拨指针拉扯咱的后背，也没有揪着咱的尾巴不放，第一次这么平淡地打招呼，竟然还有些不适应。
E: Crrrk... For us to be calmly greeting each other for the first time without poking at our backs with a compass, nor pulling at each other's tails, I'm suddenly not used to this.

C: 关于你的事迹…
E: Tell me your story...

C: 别自恋了。
E: Don't flatter yourself.

C: 那是那是，我巴特鲁斯还是很幽默的。
E: Exactly. I, Bartholos, have quite the sense of humor.

C: 这么直接就承认失败？
E: Admitting defeat so easily?

C: 不对不对，我巴特鲁斯才不会这么说话。所以一定是扎格列斯老祖说的！
E: No... I, Bartholos, would never speak like that. It must have been what Zagreus said!

C: 我也最喜欢被你揍——才怪！
E: And I just love getting pummeled — YEAH RIGHT!

C: 啊，慢着慢着…看你的眼神，仿佛就是在说——「我还真是活见鬼了？」
E: Whoa there, judging by that look, you're probably thinking, "Am I seriously seeing a ghost right now?"

C: 一枚掉在路边的银币，平平无奇。但就在你将它拾起的一刹那，奇怪的手感告诉你，这枚银币其实从未真正落在地面上，而是紧贴地面、保持着一种类似磁悬浮的状态。
E: An utterly unremarkable silver coin lies on the roadside. But the moment you pick it up, its strange texture tells you that it never truly touched the ground. Instead, it hovers just above the surface like magnetic levitation.

C: 哎哟——投降，投降！再扯下去，我这兄弟俩就要骨肉分离了。呕…这种天旋地转的感觉…太糟糕了！
E: Ahh — I surrender, I surrender! If you keep pulling like that, we'll be split apart! Bleh... I feel like the ground is spinning... I feel so sick!

C: 哎呀哎呀，舒服，畅快！你这家伙，按摩的水平很不错嘛！
E: Oh dear. Yeah, right there! You've got talent for massaging!

C: 唉，遥想当年，巴特鲁斯可是远近闻名的江洋大盗，哪怕是刻法勒或者塞纳托斯，见了咱那也要礼让三分。可现在呢？也许是咱隐身术太好，在这里站个半天，竟然只被你注意到了。
E: Back in the day, I was a legendary master thief. Even Kephale and Thanatos would have to show me some respect. But now? Maybe I'm just too good at going invisible. I stood around half the day, and only you noticed me.

C: 光明正大的偷袭，桀桀桀桀！
E: A perfectly honest ambush! Hehehehe!

C: 唉呀，瞧您这误会的，这哪能啊…巴特鲁斯对朋友从来都真心相待，遇事更是甘愿为朋友两肋插刀！等等…我好像没有肋条？
E: Oh dear, you misunderstood me, big time! How could I ever... Bartholos has always been genuine with friends, ready to take a knife to the ribs for them without hesitation. Wait... do I even have ribs?

C: 锵锵，是紫色的小猪，有毒的小猪！
E: Ta-da! Meet the purple pig, the poisonous little piggy!

C: 你好啊，帅气的银河飞行员！您的老朋友巴特鲁斯也在参与飞行员培训课程——
E: Well, hello there, dashing cosmic pilot! Your old friend Bartholos here is also taking the pilot training course...

C: 桀桀桀，亲爱的伙计，看在{RUBY_B#列位星神}天外诸神{RUBY_E#}的份儿上，巴特鲁斯向您致以崇高的问候！
E: Hehehe, my dear friend, by the {RUBY_B#Aeons}gods beyond the sky{RUBY_E#}, I, Bartholos, send you my most noble greetings!

C: 短矛我会还你，不过…你瞧，月色如此美丽，老巴特鲁斯也忍不住想与老朋友在月下攀谈——
E: You'll get your spear, but first... just look at that beautiful moon. It makes me want to have a nice chat with an old friend.

C: 否
E: No.

C: 那么，这些是我代表元老院向您支付的展品租借费用，请收好。
E: Here's the payment I'm making on behalf of Council of Elders for borrowing the exhibits. Please accept it.

C: 发生什么了？
E: What happened?

C: 好的，我收到了。按来古士爷爷之前的规矩，七个凑一组才好轮展。这次还没凑够，我就先不帮你挂上去了哦？
E: Alright, got it. But according to Mr. Lygus's rules, trophies should be grouped in sets of seven for proper rotation. Since you don't have enough yet, I won't hang this one up for now.

C: 对吧？只可惜我们没有任何证据。
E: Right? Too bad we don't have any evidence.

C: …唉，就像之前我告诫恩维尔的那样，光靠猜测还是解决不了问题啊。
E: *sigh* Just like I reminded Avilius earlier, speculation alone won't solve anything.

C: 迷津隆隆作响……
E: The Maze groans deeply...

C: 呵，会把推演当做游乐的，寻遍这雅努萨波利斯，也就辅祭你一人了。好在欧洛尼斯也身在三相殿中，借助它的权能，溯回记忆中的迷津不成问题，只是——
E: Ha, treating divination as amusement — among all of Janusopolis, you're the only acolyte who would do so. Fortunately, Oronyx resides within the Temple of the Three Fates, and with their authority, retracing the labyrinth of memories should be no issue. However —

C: 哗啦…也许你只是亡魂？大铁球从你身上穿过去了。原来如此，我逐渐理解了一切。
E: *whoosh* Or maybe you're just a ghost? The iron ball passed right through you. I see, it's all starting to make sense now.

C: 哗啦啦…不不不，别听他的，我还没玩够呢。
E: *whoosh* No, no, no, don't listen to him! I'm not done playing yet.

C: 先去做其他该做的事吧。说不定过一阵子，它就会自己长腿跑掉了…
E: Let's focus on other tasks for now. Who knows, it might magically grow legs and move itself later...

C: 您是…{NICKNAME}阁下，那位继承了欧洛尼斯火种的黄金裔？真是天父显灵了，我刚唤取出这个「火种匣」，拜托您打开它吧！
E: You're... {NICKNAME}? The Chrysos Heir who inherited Oronyx's Coreflame? By the sky father's grace, I just retrieved this Coreflame Casket — please, open it!

C: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
E: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

C: 时间不多了——{NICKNAME}阁下，拜托您打开下一个火种匣吧！
E: There's no time — {NICKNAME}, please, open the next Coreflame Casket!

C: 一生着实过于仓促…{NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你，帮助我做了一件能让自己感到佩服的事情。
E: Life is far too short... {NICKNAME}, thank you for helping me do something I can be proud of.

C: 没有时间了…
E: There's no time...

C: 事不宜迟，{NICKNAME}阁下，请您打开这个火种匣试试吧。
E: No time to waste! {NICKNAME}, please, try opening this Casket!

C: 语毕，身影在刹那间消散，仿佛从未存在过一般。而你的手中，却在不知不觉间握住了一串吊坠。
E: With those words, the figure vanishes in an instant, as if it never existed. But in your hand, you find a pendant you didn't even notice you were holding.

C: 反正给代码造成了一点小小的创伤，无伤大雅的事！但…这些代码漏洞正在宇宙里疯狂膨胀，让其中的东西都变成了<color=#dbc291ff>「无尽」</color>！
E: We just damaged the code a little. Just a little! But... these bugs in the code are expanding like mad in the universe, and everything in it became <color=#dbc291ff>"Endless"</color>!

C: 你自己进去吧，看看就知道了。
E: Just go in there yourself. You'll know what I mean.

C: 记忆的碎片在你眼前闪烁，最后快到来不及辨认。这时你才恍然醒悟：那些并不是你的记忆，而是属于这片宇宙的，从亘古延绵至今的时间切片。「…是你是你吗奋勇者破碎者背叛者…」星神「记忆」向你发出探询：「…我记得你噢列车划过白巨星的轨道噢那道光在银河的星彩终结…」从祂口中说出每个字都连接着彼此，仿佛呢喃。接着，不等你回答，祂消失了。
E: Fragments of memories flash before you until they get too fast to be recognizable. That's when you suddenly realize those are not your memories, but frozen moments of this universe since time immemorial. "...is you is that you the brave one the broken one the traitorous one..." The Aeon of Remembrance asks of you. "...i remember you oh the express glide past the white giant orbit oh that beam of light end in cosmos color..." Every syllable THEY utter is connected to the next. Then suddenly, without waiting for your answer, THEY disappear.

C: 我该做什么？
E: What should I do?

C: 「『巡猎』的岚…」黑塔低声说，「别发呆了，祂在你前头，快喊住祂。」
E: "Lan, The Hunt..." Herta whispered. "Don't be in a daze. THEY are ahead of you, hurry up and call THEM."

C: 「真势利…」你听见黑塔仿佛咬牙切齿地嘟囔，「玩游戏不就是把看到的一切都打烂吗……」
E: "What a snob..." You can hear Herta muttering angrily with gritted teeth. "Isn't playing games all about smashing up everything you can see...?"

C: 唔，他是我们的第四个合伙人，#84「怪人」斯蒂芬•劳艾德。作为一个天才，这家伙对发挥才能毫无兴趣，每天2/3的时间花在他养父的水果店里。
E: Oh, he's our fourth partner, member #84, Stephen "Weirdo" Lloyd. That guy's a genius with no interest in using his abilities, and spends two-thirds of his time in his adoptive father's fruit shop.

C: 你们真的想研究星神吗？
E: Are you folks really here to research Aeons?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「是呀。当你想面面俱到的时候，事情就会越变越复杂。做减法是一门艺术，目前我们还不打算搞艺术。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Yup, things get more complicated when you try to cover all your bases. Minimalism is a real art form, and we're not doing enough of it right now."</color>

C: 「目瞪口呆…你把这份活干得超出预期了…」黑塔按耐不住震惊，却又不敢大声说话，只轻悄悄地，「我们现在只能加载出这一时刻琥珀王的身影！…无所谓，我会记录下这些！」
E: "Amazing... Your performance exceeds my expectations..." Herta can barely contain her surprise, but she dares not speak too loud. So, she whispers, "Now, we can only load the image of Amber Lord at this moment! It doesn't matter. I'll record everything."

C: 以经验为尘料，对其揉合再造、创造的另一重境界谓之想象；而尘料本身的渐次消退却成为记忆。你的记忆时常存在疑点：回头望去，数百个琥珀纪前发生的事——你正在遍历。
E: The realm created by blending and recreating dust formed by your experience is called the imagination. When the dust fades, it becomes your memory, which often is unreliable. Looking back, you are going through events that took place hundreds of Amber Eras ago.

C: 「回答正确！我想用球把塔伊兹育罗斯砸晕！」
E: "That's correct! I want to knock Tayzzyronth out with a ball!"

C: 而这位领袖——那位女性正坐在你的面前，在一把椅子上，背着光。你看见金色卷发与双刃双枪。「在盛大宴会开始前，欲念的控制需更加专注，避免任何人出纰漏」，她的微笑曼妙无比，她向你伸出邀请的手。
E: The leader, a gorgeous woman, is sitting before you in a chair with her back to the light, her blonde curls and armaments visible. "One must control their desires and eliminate any loose ends before the grand feast." With an enchanting smile, she extends an inviting hand to you.

C: 「沙王」及其后代猛烈孳生，繁殖不休，净空行经之路上的一切星球。大地、海洋、生灵…「沙王」净空行经之路上席卷了寰宇三分之二的有生区域，令「赏金猎人」这一名词险些成为历史。
E: The Sand King and its offspring breed at an alarming rate, hollowing all planets in their path and inflicting suffering upon land, sea, and life itself.... Two-thirds of known existence in the Sand King's wake have fallen prey to its insatiable hunger, pushing the title of "bounty hunter" to the brink of extinction.

C: 「嘟…嘟……味有所属！新鲜活力！由#？赏金猎人的单钳手搅拌的美味汁！」
E: "Beep... Beep... Fresh and breezy! From bounty hunter #?, a tasty juice mix made with their single-claw hand!"

C: 蠹星多样性的虫类生态曾吸引近万光年内的星系赏金猎人前来猎捕，一时间宇宙中游行的猎人来往络绎不绝——他们正在为接下来的「工作」做准备。他们的领袖具有独特的个人魅力，她安抚人心，向大家说出危险又饶有趣味的言论：这不过是在编纂虫类图谱。
E: The diverse ecology of Lepismat has attracted numerous bounty hunters from star systems spanning up to <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> light-years away. For a time, the steady stream of hunters coming and going creates a bustling atmosphere as they prepare for their next "job." Their leader, with her unique charisma, quiets the crowd and states that this is all for the compilation of insect charts.

C: 一群人类曾行于「贪饕」的命途之上，他们通过观察被猎食者的痕迹来推敲「贪饕」巨物的所在，并对它们进行反向追猎。你在一尊石碑上看见他们篆刻下的图腾，像是一场晚宴前应尽的礼节——
E: A squad of human beings once traveled the Path of Voracity, observing the traces along the way and trying to locate their prey. You notice a totem they carved on a stone tablet, like a solemn ritual before a grand feast...

C: …你挣扎了一会，终于…忍不住…舔了一下它！忆泡是冰凉的、胶质的，没有味道。你的舌头在上面留了一个浅浅的压印，很快它又恢复原本的型状。…你的好奇心得到了满足。
E: ...You struggle with your thoughts for a bit, and finally... you can't help yourself... and you give it a lick! The Memory Bubble is cool, rubbery, but otherwise tasteless. Your tongue leaves a faint depression on the surface, which quickly fades back into its original state. Your curiosity is sated.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 谁给你们设计的电子形象？
E: Who designed your avatar?

C: 看来一次测试只能容纳这么多数据了。想再继续，就得先把之前的储存清空。
E: Looks like this is the limit for data capacity in one test. We'll have to clear the previous data if we want to continue.

C: 『装卸部』柯拉帕乌。
E: Korapao from the Cargo Division.

C: 她杀掉了你。
E: She killed you.

C: 「我要杀掉这些悲哀的有机生命。」他悲伤地说。
E: "I must kill all these pathetic organic lives," he declares morosely.

C: 边星贸易战争打响后，博识学会始终在追溯其起源：直到战争进入末期，在<color=#dbc291ff>路易斯•弗莱明</color>的退幕演说上，他们才有所收获。
E: Following the outbreak of the Borderstar Trade War, the Intelligentsia Guild made a relentless effort to find its cause. It wasn't until <color=#dbc291ff>Louis Fleming</color>'s retirement speech and at the final stage of the war that they finally found some answers.

C: 这发明不挺好吗？
E: What a great invention, right?

C: 你第一次真实地感受到「度日如年」的焦躁，战斗没日没夜地在斑斓星的高墙上进行。一批筑城者们冲上去，待到高墙崩塌，更多的人又填补上去，成为墙基的一部分。
E: For the first time ever, you've truly experienced the anxiety of slowing right down to "bullet time" as the battle rages day and night atop the vaulting walls of Resplendence. A group of Architects rushes up and, when the wall collapses, even more people flood the gap to become a part of the wall's foundation.

C: 你稍微降低了放射的强度，但灼烧的火焰仍在地面不断地升起。滚烫的大雨落到地面，又在接触到高温固体的同时蒸发，在生物圈内循环往复。
E: You reduce the intensity of the radiation slightly, but the scorching flames still keep rising up from the ground. The boiling rain falls to the ground, evaporating as it hits high-temperature solids, and circulating through the biosphere.

C: 你很快从海里探出头来，映照进瞳孔的，是葡萄色的液金长河，它环绕在一颗红巨星的边缘，如同仙子肩上的绸缎。
E: You quickly poke your head out of the ocean, and reflected in your pupils is a grape-colored stream of liquid gold surrounding an edge of a red giant star, like a bolt of silk on a fairy's shoulders.

C: 再想想，朋友，有待被写进公式的东西，就像是骨牌的第一张，一旦推动，便不可抑制。
E: Think again, my friend. That which waits to be written into the Formula is like the first tile in a game of dominoes. Once it has been put into motion, it cannot then be stopped.

C: 「何人？何时？何处？」你一一报上。老人闭上眼睛。你听得他的呼吸声，带着一种韵律，一张一翕一收一放，如同振翅又如织机。半晌，老人睁开眼。
E: "Who? When? Where?" You report each one-by-one. The old man closes his eyes. You can hear the rhythm of his breath: Expanding and contracting, taking in and releasing, like the wings of a butterfly or the spinning of a loom. After some time, the old man opens his eyes.

C: 她走向校准仪的操作面板，结束进程。不出意料的结果，可视化误差拟合成一组稳定的信号。
E: She walks towards the calibrator's control panel and ends the program. As expected, the visualized erroneous value is simulated and combined into a group of stable signals.

C: 「帕提维娅博士，没想到…她会成为『不可知域』的起点。」
E: "Doctor Patavia, who knew... that she will become the origin of the Unknowable Domain."

C: 「算有些渊源吧，在非线性物理上的研究成果……」
E: "We have share some connections over the results of nonlinear physics research..."

C: 没错！把无用的愚人都踩在脚底！
E: That's right! Crush all the useless fools underfoot!

C: 一台「权杖」万分之一的算力使用权，和她那神秘信号相同的价值。可行性，应用性，经济前景，以及黑箱拼凑的标准答案。
E: Authorized usage of one ten-thousandth computational power of a Scepter, a value similar to that mysterious signal of hers. A standard response from a combination of feasibility, applicability, financial prospects, and the black box.

C: 同僚们愤慨地呐喊，冲向对方的实验场，想要阻止这场强制迁移。
E: Your compatriots bellow in fury, rushing towards the invader's lab site in an attempt to stop this hostile takeover.

C: 成为刺杀暴君的英雄？
E: To be lauded a hero who slayed a tyrant?

C: 她感染了反无机方程？
E: She was infected by the Anti-Inorganic Equation?

C: 短暂地闭上眼睛。
E: Close your eyes briefly.

C: 一听就是有故事的人。
E: Someone who clearly has stories to tell.

C: 对有些人来说是主观臆断，对天才则是灵光一现。我有种直觉，我们在模拟宇宙遇见的这片瓶颈，它在阻止我们获取某些知识，挖掘某段历史……
E: To some, it may be subjective conjecture. To a genius, it is a flash of inspiration. My intuition is telling me that this bottleneck of knowledge that we encounter in the Simulated Universe is stopping us from gaining certain knowledge and unearthing a certain period of history...

C: 我们击败了波尔卡？
E: We've defeated Polka?

C: 「你不知道你错过了什么。」疤眼夫人说。「每一个工人，都会激动地把握住这个机会。这是一个*投机主义*的时代。」
E: "You have no idea what you have missed out on," Madam Scarred Eye remarks. "Every worker would be thrilled to be given such an opportunity. After all, this is an 'era of opportunism'."

C: 现在…到了你表现自我的时刻。
E: Now... it's time for you to showcase your talent.

C: 是的…这不是你意料之中的结局，究竟哪一步走错了？你开始渴望人生可以重头再来，也许那时你会选择不一样的…道路？
E: Indeed... this is not the outcome you have expected. What did you do to make things so wrong? You wish you could start everything over. Perhaps, you would have chosen a different path in the beginning.

C: 一盏烛火被点亮，司美之神隐约阔绰的面容在碎片中摇曳…你看得更清晰了，但此时，一位揽镜人的面容却突然从巨大碎片中出现！
E: As one of the candles is lit, a vague image of the God of Beauty's broad face flickered within the fragment... Just as the image gets clearer, the face of a Mirror Holder suddenly appears within the massive fragment!

C: 你悄悄离开了…你希望身上没有沾上「鏖兜虫」的味道。
E: You walk away quietly, hoping you remain untainted by the scent of the Combatobugs.

C: 「哦，看看你身边那位机械女士。它可以教你提升自己的『魅力』，或是『智力』。一切看你的选择。」
E: "Oh, look at that mechanical lady next to you. They can teach you how to improve up your charisma or intelligence. It's all up to your choices."

C: 瞧瞧它稚嫩的口器，从诞生的那天开始就没进食过一点东西。这么天真可爱的小家伙，谁能忍心看它活活地受冻挨饿？
E: You look at its tender mouthparts. It has never had anything to eat since the day it was born. Who could bear to see such a cute and innocent little guy suffer from the cold and hunger?

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 你奄奄一息地走进阿莉达星的宾馆，不知道为什么，这里的居民在做事时，个个都显得慢条斯理又心不在焉。
E: You enter a hotel on the Alda Star System on the brink of death. You have no idea why, but it seems that all of the residents here seem extremely slow and absent-minded with everything they do.

C: 「留它一口气！这个我还用得着！」学士下意识吼道。
E: The scholar instinctively shouts out: "Don't kill it! I can still use that for my research!"

C: 「故事，请为我讲述一个故事，真假皆可。」诗人说，「然后，我带走你的诗句，你拿走我的歌声。」
E: "A story. Please tell me a story. Fact or fiction is fine." Says the poet. "Then, I shall take your verses, and you shall receive my song."

C: 「真是个不好笑的笑话。」愚者笑道。
E: "What an unfunny joke," the Fool laughs.

C: 在现场维持秩序的狛犬警官，紧张地大口吃起了狗粮。被它拷住的暴走族少年，也不禁为比赛捏了一把汗。
E: The lion-dog officer assigned to maintain order on the scene is nervously chowing down on dog food. Even the biker gang youth they cuffed under arrest is sweating over the contest.

C: 作为塔利亚地区唯一的销售员，它以全年负销量的业绩高居销售部榜底。原因无他，这里客户在购物时，从来都不会付钱。
E: As the only salesperson in the Talia region, it ranks at the very bottom of the sales department's charts because of its negative sales volume all year. There is only one reason for this: The customers here never pay when they buy anything.

C: 不知走了多久，坚实的触感终于抵达你的脚尖。劫后余生，你长吁一口气，瘫倒在地上。
E: You can't tell how long you've walked, but a sturdy sensation finally meets your toes. Having survived the calamity, you let out a long sigh of relief and collapse to the ground.

C: 你试图打造曼妙的歌声，但蹩脚的唱腔却连鱼群都尝试逃离。愤怒的眷属们向你一拥而上，打算终结这撕心裂肺的曲调。
E: You attempt to craft a graceful melody, but your clumsy singing drives even the fish away. The enraged Titankins surge towards you, intent on silencing this heart-wrenching tune.

C: 你在棋盘上飞快地跳跃，从飞雪连天的北域到黄金战争的中心。你开始猜想，自己究竟扮演的什么角色？与此同时，另一颗棋子却和你同时站到了战场的两端。哦，你们现在是两座城邦的将军，必须马上进入一场紧张刺激的对局！
E: You leap quickly across the chessboard, from the snow-laden northern domain to the center of the Chrysos War. You begin to question the role you are playing. Meanwhile, another chesspiece stands at the other end of the battlefield. Oh, you're both now generals of two opposing city-states, about to engage in an intense battle!

C: 打开方程商店。
E: Open the Equation Store.

C: 打开祝福商店。
E: Open the Blessing Store.

C: 「难得你这么积极，正好来验证下新程序的稳定性。」黑塔信手创造出一团奇异的数据体，「来吧，通过之后，我会给你奖励的。」
E: "It's rare to see you so eager. This is a perfect opportunity to test the stability of the new program." Herta casually created a strange data entity. "Come. Once you pass, I'll reward you."

C: 还有坐拥整座矿脉的哈厄耳，它祝福那里的小孩都有一双好运的贼手。于是祭司教唆女儿摸钱包，国王指导儿子学偷盗。
E: In Haerel's mines, they gifted the children there with unnaturally lucky hands for stealing, inspiring priests to teach their daughters pickpocketing and kings to train their sons in the craft of thievery.

C: 酒杯摔落，王妃也一命呜呼。这告诫世人，勿要谋害他人，也勿要被妒忌蒙蔽眼睛。
E: The wine glass shattered, and so did the queen's life. It serves as a warning to all: Do not scheme against others, nor let jealousy cloud your vision.

C: 「若是城邦倾毁，此后的岁月里，又要如何制出此等佳酿？」
E: "If the city were to fall, how could such finest brew be produced in the years to come?"

C: 在人子们的足迹布满翁法罗斯前，已有那伟大的神明开辟前路，因它曾到来，所以我们才能触及。
E: Before the footprints of humanity marked Amphoreus, this great deity had already paved the way. Their prior arrival enables us now to reach them.

C: 山谷和河流尽收眼底，耳边吹拂的是高空独有的凉爽微风，但被艾格勒注视的风险也在上升，你需要做出抉择。
E: From up here, valleys and rivers unfold beneath you, a breathtaking panorama. You feel the refreshing chill of a breeze unique to high altitudes. But with every inch you climb, so does the risk of catching Aquila's attention. A choice must be made.

C: 果不其然，你连落选的通知都没收到，看来面试官甚至都忘记有你这样一名面试者存在。
E: As expected, you don't even receive a rejection letter. It's as if the reviewer even forgot that you never existed.

C: 你握紧门把手，卯足了劲推开门，这门的重量却如羽毛一样轻，你摔了进去。
E: You grip the handle tightly, plant your feet, and shove with all your strength. But the moment the door moves, it swings open effortlessly, sending you tumbling inside.

C: 在那个时代，人类唯一需要依赖欧洛尼斯的，或许就是在黑夜下欣赏繁星。而欧洛尼斯对此并不生气，依旧孤独地预言着。
E: In that era, the only thing humanity needed from Oronyx might have been to gaze at the stars under the night sky. And Oronyx was not angry about this, still lonely, continuing to prophesize.

C: 当最后一位和欧洛尼斯直接沟通过的老祭祀去世，那些伟大的预言变成了遥远的传说，在一代代翁法罗斯人中口口相传。
E: When the last priest who communicated directly with Oronyx passed away, those great prophecies became distant legends, passed down from generation to generation in Amphoreus.

C: 创世的工作远远没有结束，塔兰顿一刻不停地开始制定新的法律。
E: The work of world-forging was far from complete, and Talanton works endlessly to formulate new laws.

C: 自黄金世结束后，众多城邦陷入黑暗，人们再也享受不到无穷无尽的食物，只能倒退回渔猎生活。
E: After the Era Chrysea ended, many city-states fell into darkness. People could no longer enjoy endless supplies of food and were forced to revert to a hunter-gatherer lifestyle.

C: 吉奥里亚找来自己的眷属，一只鼹鼠，它从众人口袋里偷走最后的一颗苹果，饥饿的人们追逐这只鼹鼠，一直到一片谷地。
E: So Georios sought their own Kin, a mole. It stole the last apple from the people's sack, and the hungry masses chased this mole to a valley.

C: 未曾忍饥之人，无权指责。
E: Those who have never known hunger have no right to blame.

C: 泥浆落到海中，化为游鱼；溅到地上，变成走兽；甩到空中，被阳光晒干，就变成了飞鸟。
E: Mud that splashed into the sea became swimming fish. Mud that struck the land turned into roaming beasts. Mud flung into the sky, dried by the sun, transformed into soaring birds.

C: 诸神的造物令巨人分外欣喜，世界也因此充满生气。但它仍旧不曾满意——
E: The creations of the gods filled Kephale with joy, and the world thrived with newfound vitality. Yet, despite this, the giant remained unsatisfied —

C: 「这些造物终究不具备我等的智慧，时间终将让他们化为砂砾。」
E: "These beings, for all their beauty, still lack our wisdom. In time, they will crumble into dust."

C: 会议室的人们正吵个不停，你甚至听不清每个人到底在说什么。
E: The people in the conference room are so noisy that you can't even hear what anyone's saying.

C: 这首歌才代表了真正的音乐艺术，可是它竟然排在最后，你怎能接受这位富有才华的选手就这样被埋没！
E: This performance represents the true art of music, and yet it was at the bottom of the list. How can you accept that such a talented contestant was just buried away?

C: 浇浇我呗，浇浇我呗！
E: Water me~ Water me!

C: 书籍被包上了空间站标识的封皮，内里却都是货真价实的文献巨作。你翻阅书籍时，一张纸条从书页间掉了出来。
E: The book is bound with covers containing the logo of the space station, but the contents are all authentic masterpieces. As you flip through the pages, a piece of paper falls out.

C: 果香味逐渐扩散，你好似置身于山谷与鸟鸣之间，而这股涓涓涧溪就是抚慰苦难心灵的最好良药。
E: The fruity scent gradually spreads. You seem to be among birdsong in a valley, and the trickling stream before you is the best balm to soothe your suffering soul.

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 还是赶紧按下冲水键离开这里吧。
E: Just flush it and get outta here.

C: 「不断有人冒出来」？
E: "Popping out of nowhere"?

C: 怎么说呢，这个地方本来是我的「专属休息区」，有时候实验数据不理想，我就过来休息一下。
E: How to put it... This place was once my own private rest area. Whenever experiments wouldn't go my way, I'd come here for a little break.

C: 幸会，我是{NICKNAME}。
E: What an honor to meet ya, I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 「不不不，」你连忙摆手，「我只是…有些好奇。」雷诺阿先生不发一语地注视着你，仿佛在示意你继续——他最好是，你想——不然这趟可白来了……
E: "Not at all." You quickly wave your hand dismissively. "I'm just... curious." Mr. Renoir watches you silently, as if asking you to continue — well, he better be — otherwise you would've wasted your time...

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 在其身后的则是从不愿以真面目示人的克洛妲尼娅。她是王国中最灵敏的头脑，自幕帘的阴影中谨慎地驾驭着王国治下的一切星球。她是你最得力的顾问。
E: The one next to Hildebenia is Chlodania, who never reveals her face in public. With the brightest mind in the kingdom, she carefully manages from the shadows all the planets under the kingdom's rule. She is your most competent adviser.

C: 还好，附近只是门可罗雀的老商业街，你没有砸到任何人。谈笑风生的老爷夫人们先是吓了一跳，发现你不过是坨湿答答的黏液后，复又畅快地碰起杯来。
E: To your relief, there is only an old shopping street with few pedestrians nearby, and your landing has hurt no one. Elderly couples who were happily chatting suffer a fright, but as soon as they realize you are nothing but a puddle of slime, they immediately clink their glasses in happiness again.

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: (;ﾟдﾟ)
E: (;ﾟдﾟ)

C: 可惜，如果你们也是若虫的话，我们就能在一起愉快玩耍了嗡。
E: What a shame! If you were also nymphs, we could have had a lot of fun together.

C: 总感觉缺了什么线索...难道和那些创生若虫有关?
E: Feels like we're missing some clues... Could have it something to do with those Creation Nymphs?

C: 当然，这声音也有可能来自门后的那位惴惴不安的先生——你倒是不妨问问他：他到底为什么要特地在这里为一道冰冷的栅栏门配音。
E: Then again, the voice could have come from the nervous man behind the gate. You approach him to ask why on earth he is playing ventriloquist for the gate.

C: 嗯…不会错的，绝对是「冷面小青龙」本人的肖像。而且图像相当清晰，看来是出自专业人士之手……
E: Uh-huh... No doubt about it. This is definitely a portrait of Cold Dragon Young. The image is pretty clear, too. It looks like it's done by a professional...

C: 唷，客人，欢迎光临！想来点什么？
E: Well, hello! Welcome! What would you like to order?

C: 您准备好了就到摊车前面来吧，挑战随时开始！
E: Come to the front of the stall when you are ready. The challenge will start whenever you want!

C: {NICKNAME}。
E: {NICKNAME}.

C: 一般
E: Neutral

C: 哎哟，真要命！我、我给还不行嘛！
E: Ack. You're killing me here! I—I gave you credits. Is that not enough!?

C: 但无论是与不是，你都获得了一笔意外之财——你就当是替铁卫收了罚款吧。
E: Right or wrong, you did receive some unexpected cash. Let's just say you've accepted the fine on behalf of the guards.

C: （我的天啊…刚才那是个梦吗？）
E: (Oh god... Was that just a dream?)

C: 我姑且问问啊，你有兴趣加入我们「机械热潮」乐队吗？
E: Let me ask you a question. Are you interested in becoming a member of Mechanical Fever?

C: …尤其是像我一样喜欢扒在机械屋窗户上近距离无死角全天候一睹希露瓦大人芳容的同好！
E: ...especially someone like me who enjoys climbing onto the workshop window to see Lady Serval's beautiful face up close all day long without any obstructions!

C: 我的希露瓦大人…！
E: My Lady Serval...!

C: 其他虫都不和我玩…
E: The other nymphs don't want to play with me...

C: 舒服…
E: Comfy...

C: 荣誉队员，如果你不会玩捉迷藏，可以向我请教！虎克是不会嫌弃你笨的！
E: Honorary member, if you don't know how to play hide-and-seek, just ask me! I won't laugh at you for it.

C: 啾！被你发现了~
E: Tweet! You found me~

C: 嗯嗯？什么叫「新的纷争半神回到了他忠实的悬锋城」「树庭贤人在公民大会激昂陈词」「黄金裔即将揭开再创世的新篇」？！
E: Wait, what? The new demigod of Strife has returned to his loyal Castrum Kremnos!? The Sage of the Grove delivered a rousing speech at the citizens' assembly!? Chrysos Heirs are about to unveil the next chapter of Era Nova!?

C: 物流机巧鸟还会说话？
E: Courier cycranes can talk?

C: 我只记得…突然我就能说会道了，我也不是很清楚。
E: All I remember is... suddenly I'm able to speak. I can't recall any specifics.

C: 我可不是什么老板，非要说的话，我和这些物流机巧鸟应该是同事关系。
E: I'm not some boss. If I have to say it, these courier cycranes and I are more like coworkers.

C: 哎呦呦呦，你这有机生物怎么这么呆板？我这能是不怀好意？我这明明满含爱意。
E: Ah, come on. How can an organic like you could be so dense? How could I be giving you a nasty look? I'm nothing but love over here.

C: 梓桥让我找你回去。
E: Ziqiao sent me to get you back.

C: 其实你回不回去，我无所谓。
E: I don't really care if you go back or not.

C: 不是。
E: No.

C: 再问一次，我是男的还是女的？
E: Once more: Am I a boy or a girl?

C: 除非，你相信自己是一个破局之人……
E: Unless, you believe you're different...

C: 你们的大哥怎么是只机巧鸟？
E: Your boss is a cycrane?

C: 就别怪我们大发慈悲地刁难你了。
E: Don't blame us for picking on you.

C: 是哦！在这儿待得太久，都有点代入了喀。
E: Oh, right! I've been here so long that I started to immerse myself too much.

C: 你就不觉得这个角色扮演的玩法很羞耻吗？
E: Aren't you embarrassed to have to role-play like this?

C: 很显然，你那容量有限的胃脏尚无法应付如此局面。老实说，这时候投降对你的身体好处更大一些。
E: The limits of your stomach obviously cannot handle this kind of situation. Honestly, at this point surrendering would be more beneficial to your health.

C: 我们其实尝试联系了几次，对方根本不愿意回应。
E: We tried getting in touch many times, but it wasn't willing to respond at all.

C: 我也很好奇！
E: I'm curious, too!

C: 「为了捣乱」也行…我只是想要一个确切的答案。
E: "Just wanted to troll us," sure — I would be okay with that. I just want a definite answer here.

C: 喀喀喀…我就是寄宿在神机体内的魂灵，是谁胆敢亵渎晨昏之眼的圣物？
E: Crrkrrk... I am the spirit dwelling in the divine machine. Who dares to defile the divine object of Eye of Twilight?

C: 去网上发个帖怎么样？
E: What about making a post on the web?

C: （一定很麻烦，悄悄离开这里）
E: (This spells trouble. Better sneak out.)

C: 前几天我打开玉兆随便看看，发现有个刚成年的小老弟在问是报考太卜司好，还是去工造司好。
E: A few days ago, I was browsing randomly on my jade abacus, and there was a young man who just turned adult. He was asking if he should apply for the Divination Commission or the Artisanship Commission.

C: 小小年纪，何出此言？
E: You're so young. How can you be so sure?

C: 什么叫小小年纪，我只是看起来小，你看不起谁呢！
E: Who are you calling tender!? I only look like a child. Are you patronizing me!?

C: 略显冷清的店铺，货架上还摆着微笑的钟表小子小人。
E: Smiling Clockies lines the shelves of a slightly cold and sterile store.

C: 见识一下吧，哈努兄弟无敌的——哈努哈努回旋加速喷气式哈努哈努炮！
E: Come witness the invincible Brother Hanu and his Hanu-Hanu Tornado Speed Jet Hanu-Hanu Cannon!

C: 你问井盖的加护有什么用？这你就问到点上来了。
E: You want to know what the blessings of the manhole covers do? You're hitting the nail on the head.

C: 哪怕是后来叱咤风云的「钟表匠」，也对这里的风景赞不绝口。
E: Even the soon-to-be all-powerful Watchmaker could not praise the scenery here enough.

C: 换作平时，以你的个头一定挤不进来…好吧，凡事也没那么绝对，你身手灵活，应该是得挤得进来的。
E: Any other time, given your size, you'd never be able to squeeze in here... But never say never. You're nimble, so it might very well be possible, after all.

C: 人就刷地不见了…
E: Their entire person just disappears into thin air...

C: 伟大的光明之神，创造了昼夜！
E: The mighty God of Light created day and night!

C: 这故事听着有点耳熟。
E: This story sounds a little familiar.

C: 待会儿继续泡澡。
E: I'll keep soaking.

C: 浴巾…这个吗？
E: Bath towel... This one?

C: 历法是一种形而上学…
E: Calendars are a kind of metaphysical concept...

C: 听说过戏剧节吗？
E: Have you heard of the Theater Festival?

C: 您的书上怎么没写啊！
E: Why isn't this covered in your book!

C: 你面前是一艘公共客运星槎。人们搭乘这种星槎，可以用相当便宜的价格在不同洞天之间航行。
E: Before you is a public transport starskiff. People catch this kind of transport to sail between different delves for a relatively low price.

C: （不围观了。）
E: (Stop watching.)

C: 你懂个…不行，我要与人为善、我要与人为善…你要明白，星槎能顺利飞行，都是靠神明的庇佑，不好好做这些敬礼神明的仪式，是很容易出事故的！
E: What do you kn— No! Thou shalt be kind, thou shalt be kind... You must understand that Starskiffs rely on the blessing of the gods to sail smoothly. It's way too easy for accidents to happen — unless I pay proper homage to the gods through ritual!

C: 请列车长明示！
E: Please elaborate!

C: …应物科？好像听过。等等，刚刚说的是应物科还是天才俱乐部来着？
E: ...The Department of Implement Arts? Pom-Pom's heard of it. Hang on, did you just say the Department of Implement Arts or the Genius Society?

C: 啊！！！！{NICKNAME}乘客，你突然出现，吓了帕姆一大跳！
E: Argh!! {NICKNAME}, where'd you come from? You freaked Pom-Pom out!

C: 平淡的意义
E: Plain meaning

C: 这事急不来，还是再想想呗。
E: Don't rush things, Pom-Pom. Let's think it over again.

C: 干嘛？威胁我？
E: What are you doing? Is that a threat?

C: 话虽如此，帕姆还是有点不放心大家。
E: That may be the case, but Pom-Pom is a little bit worried about everyone else.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你…你不要过来啊！
E: {NICKNAME}, d—don't come near me!

C: 那你再扫一遍？
E: Can you clean it again?

C: 找到了，请在这里签一下字。因为是代理领取资源补给，需要把你和委托人的名字都写上。
E: Found it. Please sign here. Since you are taking the resource supplies for someone else, you need to write down both your name and your client's name.

C: 禁止乘客躺在沙发上吃东西…禁止乘客在帕姆刚拖干净的地板上踩出脚印…禁止……
E: No eating on the couch... No footprints on Pom-Pom's freshly mopped floor... No...

C: 身为星穹列车的列车长，为每位乘客提供一流的服务自然是我的职责。
E: As the conductor of the Express, it is naturally my duty to provide first-class service to every passenger.

C: 物流机巧鸟功能检测…全功能已恢复<unbreak>76.9%</unbreak>，正在前往目标地点。
E: Testing functions of the express cycrane... <unbreak>76.9%</unbreak> of full function restored. Heading to the target location.

C: 那之后我又氪了不少。
E: After that, I gacha'ed loads more.

C: （这玩意……）
E: (This whatchamacallit...)

C: 期待你的表现，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: I look forward to your performance, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: 你需要在禁区内<color=#dbc291ff>战胜四十名银鬃铁卫</color>！没错，只有击败数达到这个数字，挑战才算成功！
E: You'll have to <color=#dbc291ff>defeat forty Silvermane Guards</color> in the restricted zone! That's right. You can only pass this challenge once you've hit that number!

C: 记住，你要击败四十名铁卫才算通过演练！
E: Remember, you have to defeat forty Silvermane Guards to pass this drill!

C: （确实有进食的痕迹，并且像是四足生物，还需要一些线索。）
E: (There are indeed signs of feeding here, and it looks like it's from a four-legged creature. I need more clues.)

C: 总之，关于异象的调查，我们又进了一步，接下来地衡司会以「次元扑满」为方向继续展开调查，这一切都要归功于您。
E: Anyway, we've made progress in the investigation. Thanks to your discoveries, the Realm-Keeping Commission will be looking into those Warp Trotters next.

C: （集装箱里好像有什么声音…不出意料的话，应该是次元扑满的声音……）
E: (I hear some noise coming from the container... There could be a Warp Trotter in there...)

C: 这也太没有意思了！
E: This was not fun at all!

C: 不过，我现在还没有搞清楚次元扑满是如何模拟出云吟术的…说不定，这是博识学会里的课题，我也是一头雾水。
E: Still, I haven't figured out why those Warp Trotters were able to imitate cloudhymn magic... Maybe the scholars in the Intelligentsia Guild can look into this.

C: 哈努兄弟用智慧击败了石头老板的爪牙，这真的太酷了。
E: Hanu has overcome Boss Stone's minions with his wits. Impressive!

C: （看来，这搏击俱乐部里有个所谓的邀请函……）
E: (I guess you need an invitation from the Fight Club...)

C: …没想到你竟然收到了我们的邀请函。
E: ...I didn't expect you to get an invitation.

C: 我对格斗不感兴趣…
E: I'm not interested in brawling...

C: 我们这是正规比赛！
E: We run officially sanctioned matches!

C: 出石头！
E: Rock!

C: 啊…有人在那里吗？在窗户外面……
E: Ah... is someone there? Outside the window...

C: 啊…我明白了。谢谢您，好心的陌生人……
E: Ah... I understand. Thank you, kind stranger...

C: 我就知道，你的歉意都是装出来的！
E: I knew all that apologizing was an act!

C: 啊！啊啊啊！！有鬼，有鬼啊！！
E: Ah! Ahhhh! What the heck!

C: 你决定将它从墙上揭下。为了贝洛伯格，也为了你的同伴。
E: You decide to peel it off the wall. For the sake of Belobog — and for the sake of your companion.

C: 很好，现在你找到一个靠谱的基准点了。下一步该怎么做？集中思维，控制视线；拨开迷雾，探寻知识。
E: Now that you finally have a starting point, what should be your next move? Concentrate your thoughts, fine-tune your vision, evict all distractions, and seek truth with your own eyes.

C: 菲多拉既想买下来，又想省钱。纠结之际，她希望我能出出主意。
E: Fidora wants to buy things, but also wants to save money. At this frustrating juncture, she hopes you can come up with an idea.

C: 「高见如下，请你洗耳恭听。你应当……」
E: "...my esteemed opinion for you to carefully obey. You should..."

C: 嗯！失踪货物已经标记好了，感谢您的协助！回收货物就交给我们来进行吧。
E: Yes! The missing items have been marked. Thanks for your help! We'll take care of the retrieval.

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 我们好像又收到了一些<color=#dbc291ff>奇怪的讯号</color>…应该跟咱们要找的遗失物没什么关系，不过有时间的话还是去看一眼吧。
E: We seem to have received some <color=#dbc291ff>strange signals</color> again... I suppose they aren't related to the items we are looking for, but you may search for them when you have the time.

C: 怎么样，我说的没错吧，这枚小零件比你想象得更有价值，还帮你换到了一个铁盒。
E: How about it, I was right, wasn't I? This small component was more valuable than you could've possibly imagined — it even managed to get you this iron box.

C: 市场上的「鲛人泪」我见过太多了，希望你能给我看点儿不一样的。
