E: I've seen too many Draconic Tears on the markets, so I hope you can show me something a little different.

C: 你打开邮包，看到里面静静地躺着一张星际和平公司的储值卡，面值<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点。
E: You open up the parcel and see a stored-value card from the IPC just lying there, with a face value of <unbreak>1000</unbreak> credits.

C: （前一艘货运星槎还没离港…大概因为「那位老师」还被困在里面。去找予衿帮他要件衣服吧。）
E: (The last freight starskiff hasn't left the port yet... Probably because "that teacher" is still stuck inside. Go find Yujin and help get his clothes.)

C: 你总算正常一些了。
E: You're finally starting to sound normal.

C: 躺平多好啊。
E: Sounds better to just quit.

C: 在如此悲惨的宇宙中，谁也不能摆脱失去快乐的必然结局，因为谁都会有无可奈何的时候！财富和假期总是不够多，麻烦和账单总是不够少。
E: In a universe as tragic as this, nobody gets to escape the inevitable conclusion of happiness lost — because everyone has always felt that helpless feeling before! There's never too much when it comes to riches and vacation, and never too few when it comes to troubles and bills.

C: 哪种事？
E: What kind of thing?

C: 我没找到她。
E: I couldn't find her.

C: 我们致力于「倾听」和「疏导」，帮助宾客们排除有可能危害到「美梦」稳定性的负面情绪。
E: We are committed to "listening" and "guiding" guests to help them expunge any negative emotions that might endanger the stability of their sweet dreams.

C: 杂志每期都会评论匹诺康尼的当红电影，用语犀利、视角独特，从不向主流市场献媚。
E: Every issue has a review of the latest popular movies in Penacony, with sharp critiques and insightful perspectives that never pander to a mainstream audience.

C: 俗不可耐！艺术的事，能用销量这种东西来衡量吗？！
E: How vulgar! Art cannot be measured by something as trivial as sales!

C: …我透不过气来…全都是惨叫…太吵了！
E: ...I can't breathe... everything's screaming... it's too loud!

C: 至于那些我曾因自己的激情与梦想所取得的「荣耀」…那令我不得不远走他乡、隐姓埋名的「荣耀」…曾有太多人为它奉献、为它牺牲——
E: And as for the "glory" that I've achieved with all my passion and dreams... That same "glory" forced me to travel far away, keeping anonymous the whole time... too many people have devoted themselves for that — sacrificed themselves for that...

C: 嘿…你知道吗，那家伙其实做梦都想在梦境酒店工作。不过——可惜啊，她连梦都做不了。
E: Ha... Do you know what? She actually dreams of working at the hotel in the dreamscape. But how pathetic — she can't even dream properly.

C: 真不容易，难得有那么一刻，我觉得自己的内心没有那么沉重了。
E: It's not easy to meet a moment like this where my heart doesn't feel as though it's so heavy.

C: 等会儿，你是…星穹列车的成员？它现在情况如何了？
E: Hang on, are you... a member of the Astral Express? How are things there right now?

C: 我的飞船在围攻中被华丽地炸成了碎片，我本人则借着爆风登上了泯灭帮的战舰。
E: My ship was blown into magnificent smithereens during the assault, and I used the force of the explosion to board the Annihilation Gang's battleship.

C: 曾经忠诚的部下要么离开了他，要么被他残忍地折磨。就在海盗团即将分崩离析时，一位戴面具的访客找上韦兰，说虚空鲸的大脑提取液可以缓解这种不良反应。

C: 果然没有看错你！
E: I knew I was right about you!

C: 不过，进入安检机器后你需要扮演好*一件行李*，你明白吗？一件*真正的行李*。行李是不会说话，也不会乱动的，只有经历考验的行李才能通过传送带，能做到吗？
E: You must play the part of luggage once you're inside the security scanner. A real piece of luggage. Remember, luggage does not speak or move, and only luggage that pass muster can make it across the conveyor belt. Can you do it?

C: 在你眼前的毫无疑问是一个「空箱子」，它是如此空空如也，刚好能放下一人。
E: There's no doubt that the object before you is an empty box. It even has just enough space to fit a person.

C: 请你出去！
E: Please leave the area at once!

C: 你能看见我的星核吗？
E: Can you see my Stellaron?

C: 至此，我们俩竞锋舰老东西终于是满足愿望了。
E: Just like that, we two old Skysplitter veterans have fulfilled our long-held dreams.

C: 没错。
E: Exactly.

C: 别喊这些没有用的了，要喊招式！
E: Stop yelling nonsense and call out an attack!

C: 俗话说得好，万事开头难。在经历过上一堂课的洗礼之后，你对接下来的课程充满信心。
E: As the saying goes, "the first step is always the most difficult." After enduring the previous lesson's trial by fire, you head into the next lesson with brimming confidence.

C: 扮演成折纸小鸟。
E: Roleplay as an Origami Bird.

C: 就这样，在一派和乐融融的气氛中，你的课堂体验圆满落幕——
E: Just like that, amidst a united, harmonious atmosphere, your classroom experience comes to a satisfactory close...

C: 呜呜，刻法勒的祝福不见了…这根本是扎格列斯的诅咒吧？
E: *sob* Kephale's blessing is gone... Be this Zagreus' curse instead?

C: 那么，你打算睡多久？
E: So, how long are you going to sleep?

C: 完
E: The End

C: 还不是睡觉的时候！
E: It's not time to sleep now!

C: 可以不回答吗？
E: Can I refuse to answer?

C: 让我来告诉你！
E: I'll tell you!

C: 有车头和车尾，走到哪里都受欢迎，更何况，梦境里的经历已经证明了，列车从空中撞下来也是不俗的战力。
E: Got a carriage head and a tail, warmly welcomed wherever it goes. And your dreamscape experiences have proven that the Express packs a mammoth punch when it hurtles down from the sky.

C: 吼吼吼，真浪漫呐！假如本狮的脖子不是石头做的，也想抬起头来仰望星空了。可惜可惜，这不是正确答案。
E: Ho-ho-ho, how romantic! If my neck weren't made of stone, I would have raised my head to gaze at the stars. Alas, that is a wrong answer.

C: 可以不回答吗？
E: Can I refuse to answer?

C: 问对人了！幽默感…你从不缺少这个东西。无论是把在场听众都整沉默的冷笑话，还是各种谐音梗，你全都信手拈来。
E: That's totally you! A sense of humor... You've never lacked in this department. Be it the dad jokes that silence the audience, or all sorts of puns, you know 'em all like the back of your hand.

C: 你确信奥赫玛的朋友们当中有比你更懂幽默的人，邀请谁来回答这个问题好呢？
E: Are you sure that you have friends in Okhema who have a better sense of humor than you? Who will you invite to answer this riddle?

C: 那个…请把手拿出去吧，我听过你的故事，狮狮还不想死。
E: Then... please take your hand out. I've heard about you, and I don't want to die yet.

C: 本狮和城中的其他同类不同，无论是什么答案，只要能让本狮发笑，都是正确答案。要想抓住本狮的笑点，不妨再试一次。
E: I am different from my brethren in the city. No matter what the answer is, as long as you make me laugh, they are all correct answers. You can make a few more attempts to see what tickles my fancy.

C: 试着自己想想。
E: Try thinking about it yourself.

C: 呵呵，放心吧，他也不是你想象的那种人。
E: Heh heh, don't worry. He's not that kind of person at all.

C: 吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
E: Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!

C: 可是吼，此事疑点甚多，经过塔兰顿信徒的调查，发现城主最后接触过的只有几个人，他们各自的证言如下：
E: But some things didn't quite add up in this accident. According to investigations by Talanton's disciples, they found that there were only a few people the lord last interacted with. These were their testimonies:

C: 你试着尽量精简地把情况用讯息发给了阿格莱雅，不到片刻就有了回复。
E: You try your best to summarize the question in a message to Aglaea, and receive a reply soon after.

C: 不要，不要。这个会让小火苗做噩梦，想要，更加柔软的东西。
E: No, no. This gives the dim flame nightmares. Something softer, please.

C: 爱。
E: Love.

C: 会讨厌钱的人，我平生从未见过——正确答案是垃圾！
E: Well, I've never encountered anyone who loathes money. The correct answer is: Trash!

C: 什么价值也没有…
E: I'm totally worthless...

C: 看起来真是高大又威猛。
E: You look majestic and formidable.

C: 等待天上掉馅饼。
E: Wait for a windfall.

C: 别怕，弟弟，就让{M#他}{F#她}见识下我们热血沸腾的组合技！
E: Fear not. Let {M#him}{F#her} witness the intensity of our combined skill!

C: 你成功直面了我，闯入者。或许现在我该称你一声「勇敢的人」。
E: You've managed to face me, intruder. Perhaps I should call you a "brave one."

C: 没有混乱的宇宙。
E: A universe without strife.

C: 形态只是联觉信标体系之外的一种通用表达，你看我不像人，我还觉得你不像人呢！
E: Form is but a kind of communication beyond the Synesthesia Beacon system. You think I don't look like a human? Well, I think you are the one who doesn't look human!

C: 接受制裁吧。
E: Get ready for your punishment.

C: 但没关系，修修总会好的！
E: But do not worry, it can be fixed!

C: 想一个合理的理由。
E: Think of a plausible reason...

C: 是个好愿望，但看上去它甚至不愿统治哀丽秘榭。
E: That's a good wish, but this little guy doesn't even seem interested in ruling Aedes Elysiae.

C: 深不可测的神秘人。
E: Mysterious and unreadable.

C: 那，不妨来预演一下吧？假如有一天，{NICKNAME}身边的人突然消失了……
E: Then how about a little warm-up? Imagine someone close to {NICKNAME} suddenly disappears...

C: {NICKNAME}，思绪飘去哪儿了呀？
E: {NICKNAME}, why are you in a daze?

C: 哦，你喜欢这里的风景呀？让我也好好看看，记下你喜欢的地方~
E: Oh, you like the view here? Then let me get a good look too, so I can remember the places you like~

C: 真有意思呢，你这么一说，人家都想去实地看看啦。只是，要你来当向导！
E: That's so fascinating! When you talk about it like that, I wanna go see it for myself! Hehe, but I'll want you to be the guide!

C: …感觉是不能细想的事情呢。
E: ...Doesn't sound like something I should get into.

C: …胜利纪念碑都建好了吗？还有这些，异邦人留下来的战利品，现在是我们的了！
E: ...Has construction on the victory monuments been finished? All of this loot that the travelers left behind is all ours now!

C: （冲出去）
E: (Charge out)

C: 等等，我是奥赫玛的人！
E: Wait! I am from Okhema!

C: 拿走供品。
E: Take the offerings.

C: 埃普斯实在太过遥远，开「门」的消耗巨大。愿雅努斯为它指引前路。
E: Epos lies too far beyond our reach. Opening the "Passage" there demanded too great a toll. May Janus light that foal's way.

C: 怀疑与虚无感充斥着我的内心，而在这里，瑟希斯以至高的理性给了我答案——
E: Uncertainty and void consumed me until I reached here, where Cerces offered clarity through the highest reason —

C: 来吧。智慧的门扉已为你打开——
E: Come. The doors of wisdom now open for you—

C: 第一问：选择你认为最适合的词，用来形容「大地兽、秘酿，和数学的集合」。
E: Question One: Select the most fitting term to describe the set of "dromas, ambrosia, and mathematics."

C: 而声带振动产生的声波并不足以点燃柴火，这是宇宙中常见的一个物理学知识。
E: And the sound waves produced by vocal cord vibrations are not enough to ignite firewood, this is a common physics fact across the universe.

C: 再创世…树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，他口中的真相还真让人放不下心啊。泰坦是旧日的黄金裔，我在书库工作大半辈子，也从未听闻这种论断。
E: Era Nova... Anaxagoras of the Grove, the truth he speaks of is truly unsettling. The Titans were Chrysos Heirs of the past? I've worked in the library for most of my life, yet I've never encountered such a claim.

C: 看来它并不愿意在公众场合露出肚皮，想不到还是一条有偶像包袱的小狗。
E: It seems like it doesn't want to expose its belly in public. Never thought I'd find a dog that puts up a facade.

C: 你在说什么呢？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 星神密卷是什么？
E: What is the Mystic Scroll of Aeons?

C: 最好是第一时间，只与我一个人联系！
E: Preferably right away, and only me!

C: 你在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 守护大家的心灵，坚守最后的港湾。这，就是我卡波特的职责。
E: Safeguard everyone's heart and defend our harbor. This is my job, Capote's job.

C: 我没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 没有什么问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 为什么要喝这么多咖啡？
E: Why are you drinking so much coffee?

C: 不过，不过应物科工作繁忙，你就算不相信，也别去打听了。省得给我们添麻烦。
E: Anyway, the Department of Implement Arts is very busy. Don't ask around even if you don't believe me. Save us some troubles.

C: 有没有什么陈年旧梦的八卦？
E: Is there any old gossip?

C: 还在人家莱斯莉离开空间站之后，搞了一堆稀奇古怪的小石头，在上面雕刻花纹，说是要做一个莱斯莉出来。真的疯了！
E: He made a bunch of weird little rocks while Lesley is away. He carved the rocks, saying that's Lesley's face. He's really out of his mind!

C: 这东西是限量发售的，我一直没抢到…我已经挂高价去收购了，但是一直到现在也没人愿意转手。
E: They only made limited copies of it, you see... and I haven't been able to get my hands on them. I've sent out the word that I'm willing to buy them even at a high price, but so far I haven't heard back from anybody.

C: 好厉害！不过…你讲的很多东西我都有点听不懂。哎，要是萍萍姐来听，她肯定听得懂，我要是能和她一样聪明就好了。
E: That's awesome! But... I'm having trouble following many of the things you said. Alas, if Wenfry were here, I'm sure she could get it. I wish I were as smart as her.

C: 方才跟你聊了几句，鄙人发觉你讲话还蛮有气势的。这里的造物天天只会恭维我，我和它们聊起来倒是话不投机。
E: I find the way you speak quite assertive from our conversation earlier. The creations here always flatter me, and I'm not on the same wavelength as them.

C: 你真的和怪物战斗过吗？
E: Have you really fought against monsters?

C: 嚯嚯，以前就有过这种事，那——么——大的怪物，看起来多厉害，结果还不是见到我就跑！
E: This isn't the first time something like this has happened. Back then, there was a monster THIS huge! It seemed intimidating, but it scuttled off the moment it saw me!

C: 大家一定要重视，要警惕，千万要小心那些「豆沙灰灰」手下的坏东西！
E: Guys, please be very, very careful of those thugs under Gray Bean Paste. We need to take them seriously.

C: 我知道怎么去其他舱段，是通过那个叫「电梯」的东西，还是那个「接驳车」来着？
E: I know how to go. I have to take something called an "elevator" or "shuttle," right?

C: 喂！没想到又见到你了……
E: Hello! I didn't expect to see you again...

C: 冰冷的电子音提醒你：「您所呼叫的用户不在服务区。」
E: A cold electronic voice notifies you, "The user you are calling is out of the service zone."

C: 放出来了？
E: You've been released?

C: 试试就试试！
E: Couldn't hurt, I guess!

C: 当然，任何探索都伴随着危险，尤其是与泰坦神明直接相关的时候。你的谨慎没有问题，还是把这个卷轴放在原地，迅速离开吧。
E: Of course, any exploration comes with risk, especially when it is directly linked to Titans and gods. Your caution is understandable. Maybe it's best to leave the scroll where you found it and make a quick exit.

C: 要不你们先做个自我介绍？
E: How about you introduce yourselves first?

C: （质疑：前提有误。）
E: (Question: Your premise is flawed.)

C: 我自会有判断。
E: I'll make that call.

C: …我们确实找到一些线索。
E: ...Actually, we did find a few clues out there.

C: 让我想想…前几天，宁芙家的后厨来我这儿订了大量食材，其中有不少名贵的珍品。
E: Let me see... Several days back, the kitchen staff for Nympha's family placed a massive food order with me, including several expensive delicacies.

C: 厄琉斯，是你在外面吗？
E: Aelius, is that you outside?

C: 你将自己刚才目睹的记忆场景转述给了珀里法斯。
E: You relayed the scenes from your memories to Periphas.

C: 说出来你可能不信…在我刚入职的时候，我特地来这里跟它合了个影。
E: You may not believe me, but... when I first started working here, I came here specifically to take a photo with it.

C: …有废话才奇怪吧。
E: ... Having nonsense would be the weird part.

C: 「你有感觉到震动吗？每次见到你，我的心脏都会疯狂地急速跳动。」这句难道不浪漫吗？不感动吗？
E: "Can you feel that vibration? Every time I see you, my heart starts pounding like crazy." Isn't that totally romantic? Aren't you impressed?

C: 因为我每次听到闹铃，都感觉自己会在一瞬间内头脑清醒，这意味着她就是我的灵感女神。
E: Because every time I hear my alarm, my head feels super-clear for a second — which means that she's my muse.

C: 最近如何？
E: How's it going?

C: 别急，拍两下就好了。
E: Relax. Just give it two slaps and it'll be fine.

C: …我刚刚好像听到我的肚子在咕咕叫？
E: ...I think I just heard my tummy rumbling.

C: 哥们，这事靠谱吗？
E: Dude, is that reliable?

C: 你是…？
E: And you are...?

C: 但我偏不管！
E: But I refuse to deal with this!

C: 呵，而我们…这些被留下来的悬锋人，也何尝不是如此呢？
E: Heh. And we, the Kremnoans left behind — aren't we the same?

C: 神明为什么要创造这样无情的世界，我恨创造出这样世界的神明……
E: Why did they create such a merciless world? I hate those who made this world...

C: 救命啊——！
E: H—Help...!

C: 不行，我不能就这样结束…也不能让你这山之民大个子来主持公道。
E: No, I can't just let this end... nor will I let you, a towering Mountain Dweller, act as the arbiter of justice.

C: 真的吗？谢谢你！
E: Really? Thank you!

C: 感觉艾格勒的光特别亮、特别烫，人们都很害怕的样子……
E: Aquila's light feels so dazzling and scorching, it looks like everyone's really afraid...

C: 也许这暗示了两任烈阳之间的差别——艾格勒的光照曾经耀眼无情，而如今刻法勒的黎明却更加温暖柔和……
E: Maybe it's hinting at the difference between the two suns — Aquila's light was once harsh and merciless, while Kephale's dawn seems warmer and gentler...

C: 哈哈哈！居然有人问我刻法勒和我们是什么关系？
E: Hahaha! Someone's actually asking me what Kephale has to do with us?

C: 我不明白全知的父意味着什么…但是，它也像所有真正的爸爸一样，不会向自己的孩子索要东西。
E: I don't quite know what "all-knowing father" means... but like every real dad, they wouldn't demand anything from their children.

C: 抓紧时间，沿路带她多走走吧。
E: Hurry up, and take her for a walk along the way.

C: 别怕，我来了！
E: Have no fear, for I am here!

C: 呵呵，你们不必再要强了，真正的强者已经到场。我们会像捏住铁饼一样把怪物捏个稀碎，对不对，{NICKNAME}？
E: Hehe, you don't have to keep pretending to be strong. The real champion is here. We'll crush the monsters like we're holding a discus, right, {NICKNAME}?

C: 放心，你很难死的。
E: Relax, you're pretty tough.

C: 给我签一个名吧？
E: Could I get your autograph?

C: 这位{F#女士}{M#先生}，你来得刚好，听说你是黄金裔大人们的贵客，请你告诉他们两个——
E: {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, you got here at the perfect time. I've heard that you're the distinguished guest of the Chrysos Heirs! Tell these two:

C: 我只知道，我已经下定了决心，要为你再念那首情诗百次千次，吐露那段应得回响的浪漫……
E: All I know is that I've made up my mind to recite that love poem for you a hundred times, a thousand times, to express that romance that deserves its response...

C: 委托名「珍藏的蜜酿去哪了」，推演结果是「在委托人肚子里」。
E: Request: "Where did the treasured Honey brew go?" - Extrapolation Result: "In the client's stomach."

C: 怎么办呢？又不能给人强灌下去——也许能？啊，啊，有了，有了。
E: What should I do? Can't exactly force them to drink it— Or can I? No, wait, I've got a better idea!

C: 翁法罗斯唯一的一樽，源自「海洋」的纯酿，樽铭为「把欢宴带去明天」。无他，无价。
E: The last bottle in all of Amphoreus, a pure brew of the "Ocean," bearing the inscription "Take the Feast to Tomorrow." It is, quite simply, priceless.

C: 之前你在空间站的时候，帮了大家不少忙。多亏了你，我的工作也轻松了不少。
E: You were a great help to folks on the space station — my job was so much easier with you around.

C: 帕姆会和列车一起冒险。
E: Even from the Express, Pom-Pom's still part of the adventure.

C: 列车里玩这个不好吧…
E: We probably shouldn't run around on the Express...

C: 总之你就收下吧，别和我客气啦！
E: Anyway, just take it! Enjoy your gift!

C: 列车，真的在天上飞呢…下次克拉拉一定要说服史瓦罗先生一起来。
E: The Express really does fly up in the sky... Next time, I'll have to convince Mr. Svarog to come along.

C: 唔，要是跟着你们就能见到这么多新奇玩意…那我要不还是一起走算了？
E: If I'd known there were so many high-tech wonders on the Express, I probably would've insisted on going with you guys.

C: 之前和列车长简单聊了几句之后，对于佩佩每日饮食的配方有了一些改进的想法。应该谈不上好吃，但一定会更有营养的。
E: Yeah, the conductor gave me some ideas on how to improve it. It'll probably taste worse, but it'll be more nutritious.

C: 哈哈，可不行啊。行商的星际飞船更注重载重、安保、消毒等等事宜……
E: Hah, now that would be something... but on a merchant ship, load, security, and sterilization take precedence over creature comforts...

C: 黑塔女士最近很有名呢，公司的节目和广播里轰炸般地反复提及她的名字。
E: Madam Herta's reputation precedes her of late — her name is constantly mentioned in the company's broadcasts and programs.

C: 我刚才似乎看到了一群虚空鲸从窗外飞过。
E: I think I just saw a group of void song whales fly past the window.

C: 一旦到了我这个年纪，就不怎么会结交新朋友了…
E: Once you reach my age, it becomes difficult to make new friends...

C: 算了算了，有别的也行，这里有黄石乳酪洋芋条吗？
E: Never mind, I'm sure there'll be other things I like. Do you have Yellow Boulder Cheese Fries here?

C: …不长了？
E: ...A—Are you sure?

C: 没有。我梦见自己飞得很高很高，哪还看得见你。
E: Nope. I was super high up — how could I see you from up there?

C: 这件事虽然是我的私事，但{NICKNAME}你也不是外人，我还是偷偷告诉你吧。
E: It's my personal business, but since you are hardly a stranger, I'll tell you something in secret.

C: 喜欢啊。以前偶尔会在生活中遇到不顺利之事，如今只要望向宇宙，就会意识到这些烦心事有多渺小……
E: Yeah! All the challenges of everyday life seem to disappear when you gaze out into the universe.

C: 研究课题进度如何？
E: How's your research?

C: 在仙舟联盟的民间故事中，有很多和游云天君有关的传说。游云天君造虹车、开星轨，遍行天宇、链接瀛寰。
E: There are many legends about the Cloudstrider in the Xianzhou Alliance's folktales. The Cloudstrider made a chromatic echelon, created the star rail, and traveled across the universe — connecting many worlds.

C: 说起来，无名客也是个劳神焦思、宵旰忧劳的营生啊…不如来试试本座平常喝的药茶吧？
E: Hmm, it would seem that being a Nameless is also a tiresome and difficult pursuit... Oh! You should try the herbal tea I like to drink.

C: 那也太多了！
E: That's way too much sugar!

C: 你这不是挺自在的嘛？
E: You seem quite at home already.

C: 真的有人会在车厢里种「镰叶紫菀草」吗？胆子可真大啊~
E: Is someone really growing Asters on the Express? That's quite a bold thing to do!

C: {NICKNAME}，刚才三月带我去她的房间逛了逛。
E: {NICKNAME}, March just showed me her room.

C: 你记得吗？我第一次见到你的那天就特别倒霉，绥园闹鬼，尾巴也不见了……
E: On the first day we met, I was really unlucky. Fyxestroll Garden was haunted, Tail disappeared... Do you remember?

C: 但事实上，我们远没有你们那样熟络…唔，看来这种联想有些无端了。
E: Still, in reality, we're nowhere near as close as you... Hmm, perhaps I'm drawing connections where there aren't any.

C: 好细致的记录！看了一天智库，我差点忘了时间。
E: The level of detail in these records is amazing! Oops... have I really been looking at the data bank all day?

C: 真的吗？可以吗？
E: Really? Can I?

C: 更不用说，能从大家那里听到银河各地的故事和见闻……
E: And of course, the chance to listen to everyone's stories and adventures from different parts of the Cosmos is just amazing.

C: 如果能和大家一起去往那些世界，亲眼看到音乐中描绘的景象，那就更好了……
E: If only I could journey to those worlds with everyone and see them for real...

C: 这样啊…我这就托管家帮忙，买一些最新最智能的清洁用具和厨具。
E: I see... I'll ask the butler to help buy some of the newest and smartest appliances and utensils.

C: 那不如，面具就索性不用设计了，没有五官的面具，没有性格的性格……
E: How about forgoing the mask design then? A mask with no facial features, a personality with no personality...

C: 你来了，{NICKNAME}。
E: You're here, {NICKNAME}.

C: 嗯…忆者们也该思考一下有没有更好的现身方式了。
E: Hmm... Memokeepers should probably think of a better way to show up.

C: 当然。忆者的占卜方式，可不只有记忆一种哦~
E: Of course not. The Memokeepers' divination techniques don't all involve memories.

C: 手心中残留的一丝毛绒，我打算将它保存起来，作为它在这美丽宇宙存在过的证明。
E: I intend to save this remaining bit of fluff in my hand — proof that it once existed in this beautiful universe.

C: 记得刚和「老铁」见面时，我们都不太服气对方…它说我脾气差，我嫌它长得丑。
E: I remember when Old Mettle and I first met, we weren't very accepting of each other... He said I had a bad temper, and I thought he was ugly.

C: 真、真的吗！这么大一份，都给我了？！那我就…不客气了！
E: R—Really? All this, for me!? Then... I'll take it!

C: 所以，我要给三月和你制定一份修炼计划表！
E: So I want to draw up a training schedule for you and March!

C: 这么大的蛋糕够吃吗……
E: Is a cake of this size big enough...?

C: 休眠舱里空空荡荡，你猜测在此休眠的科员或许已经得到了妥善安置。
E: Seeing the empty cryosleep pod, you suppose the researcher once inside has been properly accommodated.

C: 你将脸贴在冰冷的表面向内窥探，却只能看见灯光下倒映出你的脸。你与空空如也的实验舱面面相觑。
E: You press your cheeks against its icy surface and peek inside, only to see your own reflection under the lights. You and the empty experimental pod gaze at each other.

C: 培养舱中的植物形态让你感到似曾相识，它与星际和平公司某款食品的广告图片完全吻合，界种科捞外快的能力令你咋舌。
E: The plants in the incubator look familiar, as they closely resemble an advertising image of a food product from the IPC. You are amazed by the Department of Ecology's ability to rake in extra income.

C: 很高兴认识你！
E: Glad to meet you!

C: 你认出了广告画面上的界种科标识，你有些好奇——不知回到主控舱段后，能不能问界种科的科员要几盒来尝尝……
E: Noticing the Department of Ecology logo on the advertisement, you wonder whether you can get some samples of the product from their researchers when you return to the master control zone...

C: 嗯？有什么值得一瞧的东西吗？
E: Hm? Are you trying to have a staring contest or something?

C: 随着时间推移，鲑鱼的醇味被稀释，夕红果的肉脯会被入侵，当夕红鱼的食材和调味已经难分彼此，以食材命名的区分方式将失去意义…
E: Over time, the rich flavor of Salmon dilutes, as it makes its way into Redsunset's flesh. When you can no longer tell Redsunset Salmon's main ingredient from its seasoning, the dish's name doesn't make much sense...

C: 这家伙还挺固执的哈？我看出来了，哈，他也不傻，想和我套近乎……
E: This guy sure is persistent. I see... he's not stupid. He's just trying to curry favor with me...

C: 请不要干扰列车长的日常工作！
E: Quit being a nuisance! Pom-Pom is working!

C: 你知道吗？贝洛伯格的人种至少有三个不同的起源。但你似乎并不属于其中任何一种，这也是我当时那么吃惊的原因。
E: Did you know that humans in Belobog have at least three different origins? But you don't seem to belong to any one of them. That's why I was so surprised back then.

C: 不过，我相信还有其它物种设法在寒潮中幸存了下来，只是没法证实而已。现在嘛，也只能研究研究各种各样的人类——
E: But I believe there are other animals out there that survived the Eternal Freeze. I just have no way to prove it. Now, I have no choice but to study humans...

C: …让你失望了，我还是政务部官员，依旧负责处理行政区的民生事务。
E: ...Sorry to disappoint you. I am still an Administrative Official responsible for handling matters related to civil affairs in the Administrative District.

C: 绝对没戏。
E: Not a chance.

C: 唉，也不能怪你，是我的描述还不够吸引人。
E: Well, I can't blame you — it's my own problem. My writing is not good enough.

C: 我明白了。
E: I've got it.

C: 忘了自我介绍，鄙人亚诺，是一位写手。抱歉挡住你的去路了…嗯？怎么，找我还有什么事吗？
E: I forgot to introduce myself. My name is Amo. I write things for a living. Sorry for blocking your way... Hm? Can I help you with anything?

C: 怎么可能不在意啊，我不喜欢在练歌的时候被人盯着。
E: Don't mind you how? I don't like being stared at when rehearsing.

C: 那你以后该怎么登台啊？
E: How do you perform in front of your audience then?

C: 我只是说法夸张了一些。
E: I exaggerated a bit.

C: 你说《雪国冒险奇谭》？我也不确定啦，只是我们书迷的圈子里最近在流传这个消息，也不知道是真是假。
E: You mean the Tale of the Winterlands? I'm not sure. But that's the rumor that has been circulating among us book fans. I don't know if it's true or not.

C: 还想问问剧院里的事…
E: I'd like to know more about Tamila...

C: 只是我现在暂时没想好该怎么报答你…这样吧，你要是有什么东西要修就来找我，我免费给你修！
E: I just haven't been able to figure out how to repay you... How about this. If you have anything you want repaired, come and find me. I'll do it for free!

C: 瞧你这话说的，我也有自己的痛苦好吧？
E: Hey, I have my own problems, too. Okay?

C: 这是衡量过成本后得出的结果。
E: I'm sure they reached this conclusion after weighing all the costs.

C: 听我一句劝，那个蓝毛是个诈骗惯犯，不管他说什么都别信！
E: Take my advice, that guy is a serial scammer. Don't believe anything he says!

C: 最近啊，我正以互助会的名义准备诉愿信，打算找布洛妮娅大人一趟。
E: Recently... I'm preparing an appeal on behalf of the Association. I plan on meeting with Lady Bronya.

C: 我先看会书，你选好了就告诉我吧。
E: I'll be here reading. Let me know when you've made your selections.

C: 好呀。说吧，你想聊什么？
E: Alright. Let's hear it. What do you want to chat about?

C: 有打听到什么其他消息吗？
E: Have you heard any other news?

C: 你先忙吧。
E: I'll leave you to your work.

C: 不过…又得自己买菜自己煮…哎，真怀念能以前在上面的餐厅约会的日子…也不知道那个铁卫大哥现在过得怎么样……
E: But... I'll have to buy everything and cook it myself... Ack, I really miss those days when we could date up there... I wonder what that man from the Guards is up to these days...

C: 唉，怎么说呢…大家都不容易，要是这磐岩镇也被裂界侵蚀了，我们也得像他们一样另寻生计，谁又不希望这时有人能帮一把呢？
E: Well, how should I put it...? Life isn't easy. If Boulder Town also gets eroded by the Fragmentum, we will have to find another livelihood. Who wouldn't want some help at a time like that?

C: 哦，对了，我还联系上了一个叫拉雯妮的房地产中介，她手里的项目看着很有前途…但前提是她所说属实。
E: Oh yeah, that's right — I also got in touch with a real estate agent called Lavonne. Her project looks promising... if what she's saying is actually true.

C: 哼，不知好歹的外来人。
E: Hmph, ignorant outsiders.

C: 在这地底要想发财，谁不知道得跟我史考特混。
E: Everyone knows, they have to follow Scott if they want to make a life for themselves Underground.

C: 听爸爸妈妈说，他们以前就住在上层区，直到家里「破产」了以后才搬到了下层区。如果有机会的话，阿丽娜真想回到上层生活呢。
E: My parents told me that they used to live up there until they were "bankrupted" and we had to move down here. If I get the chance, I'm definitely gonna try and go back up there to the Overworld.

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 你在修炼魔法？
E: Are you practicing magic?

C: 哼，别想用这种借口来套我的话！虎克老大想知道的话，她早就当面来问我了！
E: Hmph, I won't be fooled by that excuse! If Boss Hook wanted to know anything from me, she would ask me herself!

C: 啊，我在找一位大姐姐，她是一位…那个…银鬃铁卫。您见过这样的人吗？
E: Ah, I'm looking for a lady. She is a... Silvermane Guard... Have you seen someone like that?

C: 你看起来很警惕。
E: You look like you have your guard up.

C: 噢，你对这个感兴趣？歌德是我的姓氏，宾馆是我家的产业，说起来都是些陈芝麻烂谷子的老事了。
E: Oh, that's what you're interested in? Goethe is my family name and Goethe Hotel is my family business. Well, it all began a long, long time ago.

C: 谢谢，还是让我自己转转吧。
E: Thank you. I'll walk around by myself.

C: 你们外来者见多识广，要是饭菜上有什么喜好，可以多跟我讲讲。我也能趁机跟你们多学两手！
E: You outsiders are certainly very well-traveled. Let me know if you have any preferences for food, maybe I can also learn something from you!

C: …你们真是打外边来的？真没骗我？
E: ...Are you really from the Outside? You are not lying?

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 讲讲歌德大饭店吧。
E: Tell me about the Goethe Grand Hotel.

C: 贝洛伯格——下层区是我的家，我唯一熟悉的地方。有机会的话，我也想去见识见识外面的广阔世界…但绝对不是现在。
E: Belobog... the Underworld's my home, the only place I've ever known. If I get the chance, I'd love to see the world out there... But definitely not right now.

C: 就先聊到这儿吧。
E: Nice chat.

C: 意思你也是天才？
E: Are you saying that you're a genius, too?

C: 我妻子的厨艺…算不上多好。但这么长时间过去了，我对那味道有点古怪的家常菜反倒有些期待……
E: My wife's cooking skills... aren't great. But after all this time, I've come to really love and look forward to that weird-smelling home-cooked aroma...

C: 哈哈，借你吉言！等我回了家，可得抓紧时间好好陪陪家人……
E: Haha, here's hoping! Once I get home, I'll have to catch up on spending time with the family...

C: 正确答案就是佩拉。想不到吧？这么个一丝不苟的情报官小姑娘，私下里竟然是个爆裂的摇滚鼓手…大概是工作压力太大了吧？
E: The correct answer is Pela. Hard to believe, right? The petite, meticulous intelligence officer is actually a drummer in a rock band... I guess there's too much pressure on the job?

C: 虽然铁卫内部还是不太信任那些黑衣人，不过我认为，现在我们走在正确的道路上。
E: Although the Silvermane Guards still do not fully trust those people dressed in black, I believe that we are now on the correct path.

C: 之前你态度挺激烈的。
E: You were quite worked up about it before.

C: 总之…我们已经把该办的都办了，之后就没必要多操心啦。
E: Anyway... we've done everything we need to do. There's no need to worry about what happens next.

C: 欢迎来到机械聚落，{NICKNAME}。
E: Welcome to the Robot Settlement, {NICKNAME}.

C: 啊，还有一些人虽然没有加入鼹鼠党，但是我们的荣誉队员！比如伊莎贝拉姐姐、阿丽娜、克拉拉……
E: Ah, there are some who didn't join, but are honorary members! Like Isabella, Alina, Clara...

C: 你没受他欺负吧？
E: You haven't been bullied by him, have you?

C: （沉默…）
E: (Silence...)

C: 保重身体。
E: Take care.

C: 有很多星球欠公司债吗？
E: Are there many planets indebted to IPC?

C: 的确，就连我一开始也没想到你真的能赢...也许这就是无名客的过人之处吧。
E: To be honest, I didn't think you would actually win... I guess that's what makes the Nameless so amazing.

C: 虽然只是一簇数据，但次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神确实对你表现出了热情，也许它还会梦见电子羊呢。
E: Although it's just a bunch of data, Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord really does seem fond of you. Perhaps it even dreams of electric sheep.

C: …雪球！
E: ...A snowball!

C: 野餐？去哪儿野餐？
E: Picnic? Where can you do that?

C: 女士，我们最近不开门……
E: Madam, we've been closed lately...

C: 这还不简单，我教你自制酸奶油！
E: That's no good. I'll teach you how to make homemade sour cream!

C: 我太理解您了，可您就要眼睁睁地让自己孩子输在起跑线上吗？
E: I completely understand you. But are going to just stand there wide-eyed and watch your kid fail at the starting line?

C: 放心吧，我们肯定帮你打好掩护。
E: Don't worry. We'll come up with a flawless cover story.

C: 这新品也没那么好吃啊……
E: This new one isn't very yum...
Mm? *sigh*

C: 那都是谣言……
E: That's all just a rumor...

C: 放工了…咱要不上哪儿逛逛？
E: Work time's over... Let's hang out. What do you say?

C: 回收旧铁锹、坏打桩机！
E: Recycle old shovels and broken piledrivers!

C: 上层精选，「哞哞」牛奶！
E: The Overworld first choice: Moo-Moo Milk!

C: 再讲一个，再讲一个！
E: Another, another!

C: 五十。
E: Fifty.

C: 哎，这老头…哪有像你这么砍价的！
E: Gah, this old geezer... Who would haggle like you!

C: 直拳！摆拳！再来一个……
E: Jab! Haymaker! And one more...

C: 怎么办呢……
E: What should I do...

C: 这是博物馆的藏品，不能买。
E: This is not for sale, it's a museum exhibit.

C: 封锁前我就在这个矿场工作…
E: Before the blockade, I was working in this mine...

C: 曾有个身犯多起谋杀案的化外民被押送了进来，根据档案记录，他被称为「勺子」，曾用一柄铁勺子持之以恒地对受害人施害。
E: There was an outworlder who got sent in for committing multiple murders. According to the records, he was known as "The Spoon" because he once used an iron spoon to persistently cause harm to the victim.

C: 这个过程持续了数十年，我低估了这样若有若无的声音对一个人的影响。从此以后，我也算是积累了一些经验……
E: The tapping lasted for decades. I shouldn't have underestimated the damage such faintly perceptible noises could do to a person's psyche. I suppose you can say that I gained some experience after that...

C: 嗐！这就是您不懂了啊！别看咱细胳膊细腿儿，咱可是「云曳旗旌流星拳」的首席大弟子。咱这路拳法可堪称仙舟外家拳之王！
E: C'mon, that's where you're ignorant! I may look like a pushover, but I am the Cloudbanner Meteor Fist's chief disciple. My fists are unrivaled among the auxiliary martial art schools in Xianzhou!

C: 其实你写得很有风格！
E: I actually think you write with your own style!

C: 比如这句：「棍上金工鸿利摇，白纸飞段救鹅毛」…就是我用机器随机组合中最像人话的一句诗，虽然我也没看懂，但不妨碍我能品出其中的技术优雅感？
E: For example: "On the staff the goldsmith waves large profit obese, white paper flies stages to rescue the goose"... This is the most humanistic verse I've strung together out of the automated word-combination logarithms. I don't understand what it's trying to say, but can't you sense the elegance of technology here?

C: 所以你失败了。
E: And so you failed.

C: 不如随便买点什么吧！无论作为旅行纪念品，还是带回家作为伴手礼，都绝对倍儿有面子！
E: Why not buy something as a souvenir for yourself or a family member? I guarantee it'll be something that raises your prestige back home!

C: 你的货都是从哪来的？
E: Where do you get your goods?

C: 嗐，反正你就是一帮我挣工时的，无所谓了。
E: Eh, you're just helping me clock some hours for my job, never mind then.

C: 我在家想要什么就能有什么，怎么到了地衡司就得听你们的？不就是不符合要求吗，凭什么不让我成年？谁给你们这么大权力的啊？
E: I can have and do anything I want at home, so why should it be any different when I'm at the Realm-Keeping Commission? Why can't I be an adult without passing the requirements? Who gave you the rights?

C: 嘿，瞧你问的这问题！我爹娘都替我办了，我还操心它干什么？
E: Ha, what kind of question is this? My parents have already taken care of it, so why should I have to be concerned about it?

C: 现在我说「建木又长回去了，我也能长回去」，他们立刻哑口无言。总算不用再听他们唠叨了，这下清净了。
E: Now, I never fail to shut them up every time I say "I can revert just like the Ambrosial Arbor." They finally stopped nagging.

C: 请不要这样，我们从不搞虚假宣传。我们在正式上市之前是有严格的产品测试的，我们找来了一些「体验官」试用。
E: Please don't say that. We never engage in sham advertising. We hired Testing Officers to conduct rigorous product testing before we launch anything.

C: 持明族不都是尖耳吗？
E: Don't all Vidyadhara have pointy ears?

C: …只要你别说出去。
E: ...I'd be fine as long as you don't tell anyone else.

C: 没、没有！只是有些困倦，不曾想竟还胡言乱语起来了，望将军莫见怪……
E: N—No, I'm not! I was feeling a little tired, and was just muttering to myself. Please don't penalize me, General...

C: 说是「客观因素」，其实归根结底就是…百万书吏衣食所系。嘿嘿，您懂的。
E: Well, we say "objective factors," but the ultimate factor is.... well, these countless files also feed lots of hungry mouths, if you know what I mean, hehe.

C: 嗯，您请讲，我会尽力回答。
E: Mmm, go ahead. I'll do my best to answer.

C: 反正不管我处理或不处理，就结果而言还是差不多的，不如去掉这些中间环节……
E: Anyway, it doesn't matter what I do or not do, the results are always gonna be the same. Why not cut out this middle part...

C: 你去告诉她也没有用，那个人就是天生操劳命，她从来不放心我完成的事儿，每次都要亲自上手帮我解决「待处理的麻烦」。
E: Doesn't matter, mate. A person like her is born to work hard, and she never trusts what I do. Also, every time when there are "outstanding troubles" to deal with, she'll just complete it for me, personally.

C: 你是谁啊？
E: Who are you?

C: 真是个敏锐的小家伙…不过还是让我从头说起吧。
E: You really are a quick one, aren't you... But please, let me start at the beginning...

C: 我该走了…
E: I should go...

C: 行啊，在外面做生意，咱们还得多聊。
E: Cool. Outworld traders like us need to stick together.

C: 不是域外行商，那没有关系，我还担心这里又来一位卖赛伯邑超导合金的主。
E: Doesn't matter whether you're an Outworld traveling merchant or not. I'm more concerned about another vendor trying to sell Cybercity superconducting alloys out here.

C: 仙舟上说「同行是冤家」，又一说「冤家路窄」，这就说明「同行路走窄了」。咱俩不是同行，这路肯定是越走越宽阔。
E: On the Xianzhou, there's a saying: "Your peers are your rivals" — and another one: "Rivals will always run into each other," meaning rivals tread a narrow path alongside each other. We are no rivals, so the road we take should surely widen out.

C: 那位辛克莱老爷总觉得我要害他，我是怀着恶意来抢他的生意的。我提供一个报价，他就把价格压低，我再提一个，他再压低……
E: Master Sinclair always thinks I'm out to get him, and that I'm this evil mastermind stealing his business. When I offer a price, he lowers it, and so I put out another price. And he lowers it again...

C: 慢走啊。
E: Off you go. Take care.

C: 另外还有些散碎的工作，比如判决文书、官方通告、内宣材料…反正在这幽囚狱里，只要是需要「写作」的地方，就是我的职责范围。
E: Additionally, there are miscellaneous tasks like issue verdicts, official announcements, internal marketing... So long as it has to do with "writing" in the Shackling Prison, it falls under my jurisdiction of work.

C: 一转眼，能容下我的地方，也就只剩下十王司了——他们就喜欢和社会脱钩的人…不好意思，我好像聊跑题了，哈哈。
E: In a blink, the only place that would take me was the Ten-Lords Commission. They love people disconnected from society... Sorry, I seem to have gone off-topic, haha.

C: 抱歉，我只是路过的。
E: Sorry. I'm just passing through.

C: 再说了，自动机巧它也不会给地衡司纳税啊。
E: Or to put it another way, how much tax would an automatic ingenium pay to the Realm-Keeping Commission? Nothing.

C: 你说话可太冲了，我没惹你吧。
E: That's a little too harsh. Did I say something wrong?

C: 「讨厌」？真不至于，我只是不习惯这里的工作氛围而已。就好比你们化外民来到仙舟，总有人说自己「水土不服」，换个环境多少有点不适应。
E: "Hate"? That's a strong word. I'm just unaccustomed to the work culture here. Just like when you Outworlders come aboard the Xianzhou and people say you "don't get the culture." If you take anyone out of their natural environment, they'd be uncomfortable to a certain degree.

C: 蛰伏许久，为祸如此剧烈…当然棘手！
E: They lay dormant for so long, only to inflict such vicious damage... Of course they're problematic!

C: 能聊聊天吗？
E: Can we chat for a bit?

C: 你在这里主理什么公务？
E: What official matters are you handling here?

C: 客官，话不可以这样说呀。别人不要了，我这里才会收下嘛。
E: Please don't say that, my dear customer. I only accept things that people don't want.

C: 哎，是你啊！怎么样，丹鼎司里有什么新消息吗？
E: Ah, it's you again. Anything new with the Alchemy Commission?

C: 卜者应该相信客观事实，过于情绪化只会影响占算结果…您倘若不能理解，我问您一个问题您便清楚了，人为什么想要占卜第二次呢？
E: Diviners should believe in objective facts, so being too emotional will affect the result. Let me ask you a question, and you'll be able to understand it. Why would people want to do divination for the second time?

C: 但可笑的是，她却因为准确的卜算离开了太卜司，实在是令人唏嘘。
E: Ironically, she left the Divination Commission because of her accurate divination. This is really saddening.

C: 嘁，我不知道这些破店有什么好，都是些不值钱的破烂嘛…噢，我可不是在说您。
E: Tsk, I just don't get what's so great about these shabby stores. Worn-out trash for low-end customers... Oh, I'm not talking about you.

C: 放生日记本，实际上就是将我们的一切烦恼与负面情绪写在日记上，借由纸页将这些情感放生出去，以此达成一种内心的圆满与平静。
E: By releasing it, we free ourselves from the anxiety and worries we placed onto those pages, thus achieving a sense of calmness and inner peace.

C: 咦，又是你，你是有什么事吗？
E: Oh, it's you again. What's up?

C: 游客也分很多种，我算是经验丰富的，还写过不少攻略和点评，几年下来，在网上已经是「荣誉会员」了。这可是花钱都买不来的，懂吗？
E: There are all sorts of tourists, and I think of myself as a seasoned one. I've written many guides and reviews over the years, and I even got recognized as an honorary member online. You can't even buy that kind of recognition with money, you know?

C: 尤其推荐这「红油乱斩牛杂」，将牛杂作为主料，进行卤制，而后切片。用辣椒油、花椒面等辅料制成红油浇在上面，可以说是质嫩味鲜、麻辣浓香！
E: Personally, I highly recommend this Chili Oil Beef Offal Stew. This dish is made by marinating the beef offal, slicing it, and then pouring chili oil and ground pepper over it. Its spicy and beefy aroma is simply irresistible!

C: 从此之后，咱就立志要开一家与他们背道而驰的饭馆：量大管饱、物美价廉！咱们这家尚滋味，就是这个梦想的结晶啦！
E: That's when I determined to run a restaurant that would go completely opposite to everything they stood for. I want big portions, quality food, and low prices! I'm telling ya, Spices Supreme is that dream coming true!

C: 来来来，这边请——我这里兜售各色奇珍异宝，老板您要不要来瞧瞧？
E: Come in, come in! I have all sorts of wondrous treasures here! May I interest you with something?

C: 我是不是什么问题都可以问你？
E: Am I allowed to ask you any questions?

C: 我现在没什么想买的。
E: I don't have an appetite now.

C: 你甚至都没有看我一眼。
E: You didn't even look at me.

C: 你这文玩一定很贵吧！
E: These fandangles must be incredibly expensive, I guess?

C: 好，要是有喜欢的可以跟我交流交流，这年头，同好难求啊。
E: Sure, feel free to come to me if anything catches your eye. It's not often to meet another curio lover these days.

C: 钻火圈、拿大顶，徒手油锅捞铁饼。舞毒蛇、耍老鹰，能言走兽当笑星。总而言之一句话——只有看官不敢看的，没有我们不敢演的。
E: Fire hoops and handstands you may already know, but we have so many other stunts untold. Snake dance and eagle show, and even the fiercest beasts will dance to our tempo. In short, we provide any performances, as long as you have the guts to enjoy them.

C: 你看见的是仙舟「虚陵」，其他仙舟于此渡航流转，除此以外再不见人烟，仅有金人星罗密布。
E: You are seeing the Xianzhou Xuling, a mobile dock that provides supplies and maintenance services for other Xianzhou ships for supply and maintenance. This ship is filled with aurumatons, but not living beings.

C: 话又说回来，找本姑娘是有什么事吗？
E: By the way, how can I help you?

C: 回答的很好。绝不争功，就算太卜大人派了工作，你也能拉上别人合作垫背，一同辛苦，这才是「快乐工作」的做法。
E: Excellent! Never hog the credit, so that you can pull others down even if the master diviner assigns extra jobs to you. Sharing the woes is the key to happiness at work.

C: 很快，「我们」两方都达成了自己的使命。在四个琥珀纪虚无的徘徊后，全部十万七千三百三十六个信息体逐渐合众为一，成为「我们」。
E: It didn't take long before both civilizations fulfilled their missions. After wandering in the void for four Amber Eras, all <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> data entities eventually merged as one, forming "us."

C: 骗小孩儿呢！这么个东西沉沉地坠在尾巴上，连睡觉时也不能取下来，有这样的饰品吗？
E: They are treating me like a three-year-old! This heavy thing drags my tail down, and I can't even take it off when sleeping. You think jewelry is supposed to be like that?

C: 不要纠结龙尊了，你把我当成「医士」吧，至少看病的本事是毋庸置疑的嘛。
E: Don't think too much about my role among the Vidyadhara. Just think of me as a healer. At the very least, my ability to treat illnesses is beyond doubt.

C: 这烟熏牛肉堡的药理，你听我跟你慢慢讲来——
E: Let me tell you the pharmacology behind the medicinal efficiency of smoked beef burgers...

C: 谷饲牛肉，木德育之；铁板烹饪，金德佐之；烟熏火燎，火德资之；鲜美多汁，水德蕴之；至于土德…算了，本小姐也编不出来了。
E: The grass-fed beef represents the wood element, the iron plate used to cook the beef represents the metal element, the flame that grills the beef represents the fire element, and the juice of the meat represents the water element. As for the earth element... Forget it. I can't make up this stuff anymore.

C: 汝笑了。真好。
E: You laughed! I'm glad.

C: 好用到我想成为岁阳训练大师。
E: It makes me want to become a heliobus trainer!

C: 这个时候你就不要担心我的手了，我会放在桌子上。
E: Don't worry about me carrying you, I'll place the gourd on the table.

C: 我听说如果人被吸进了藏月瓠中，贴上十王司特质符箓，一时三刻就化为脓水了。怎么样，我刚好随身带着藏月瓠，{NICKNAME}大人要试试吗？
E: I hear that if a person is absorbed into the Lunaumbra Gourd, then affixed with a Ten-Lords Commission special talisman, they will be reduced to pus within an hour. I happen to have a Lunaumbra Gourd on me. Would you like to try, {NICKNAME}?

C: 反正基于这个理由，十王司的成员也都是些和社会完全脱钩的家伙。孤儿、怪人、贼配军——基本上都是这种人。
E: Anyway, because of this, the members of the Ten-Lords Commission are made up of people who live in seclusion — orphans, weirdos, prisoners, just to name a few.

C: 对于你们店，我有些好奇…
E: About your shop, I am somewhat curious...

C: 小女子不擅陷阵厮杀，所以被分去「问」字部，在十王督导下推演业判宝箓，收集情报，为平息下一场灾祸早做准备，可说是判官中最无用的刀笔吏了。
E: Since I'm not good at combat, I am assigned to the Interrogation Division and tasked to deduce and interpret the Karmic Tome under the Ten Lords' supervision. My job is to gather intelligence in preparation for the next disaster. As a non-combat Judge of the pen, my job is considered the most useless among Judges.

C: 亲亲，这可不嫌贵呀。玉兆这玩意儿「买新不买旧」，产品更新换代太快了。
E: Babe, you need to be willing to invest in this. You know what they say, "Never buy an old jade abacus" — they put out new models all the time.

C: 刚才那位客人，上来就问我「最贵的宝贝是什么」，我心中暗叫不好，暂时缓住了他，等到您朝这边走来，他便扭头走开了。
E: That customer just now opened with "what is the most expensive item you have here." It did not sit well with me, after which I delayed him. When you came over, he turned and went away.

C: 客人打算典当还是闲聊，小店也随时为您服务。
E: Whether you have something to pawn or just wish to chat, I am always at your service.

C: 骗人的吧？
E: That's a lie, surely?

C: 我明白这话外之意，无非就是在说「仙舟上娱乐方式那么多，怎么还在搞这老一套的东西？」，甚至还有人觉得我特别俗气，不应该出现在星槎海这里。
E: I know what the question's really asking though. They want to say "there's so much to do on Xianzhou, yet there's something as old-fashioned as this?" Some even consider my presence tacky, that I'm out of place on Starskiff Haven.

C: 随后这杯茶水再次汇集，再次化作一团小小的水球。铁皮囚犯大惊失色，心说不好，下意识里想要择路而逃。此时这团茶水再次动作，封住了囚犯口鼻。
E: Then the tea gathered and formed into a watery orb once more. The prisoner, taken aback, thought to cut his losses and retreat. But the tea made its move again, sealing the prisoner's nostrils and mouth shut.

C: 那我推荐您试试「仙舟红茶」，虽说茶水浓淡与个人口味和感受有关，但要是浓苦的茶，咱们店也是端不出来的。
E: Ah, then may I suggest the Xianzhou Black Tea? The strength of the tea depends on personal tastes and sensations, but we refuse to serve tea that's too strong and bitter.

C: 这位朋友，你那个星舰长得挺别致啊。怎么样？需要新船员吗？
E: My friend, that starship you've got there, it's gorgeous. How about it? Fancy a new crew member?

C: 对食物要求严格，就是在对「人之所以为人」严格。
E: To be strict with what you eat is to be strict with the "reason why we are people."

C: 你为什么要逃出仙舟？
E: Why did you flee Xianzhou?

C: 你听说过「步离人」吗？那是丰饶民中最强悍善战的一支，生有发达的犬齿和利爪，据说与狐人系出同源。仙舟在古代和步离人打过好几场战役呢。
E: You've heard of the borisin? They are the most battle-savvy among the Denizens of Abundance, born with full sets of fangs and talons. It's said they share an origin with foxians. Xianzhou and the borisin waged a few wars against each other in ancient times.

C: 哎哟，咱们的观众老爷来了。是找我俩有事，还是要咱再给您说一段？
E: Ah, here comes our esteemed audience! Are you looking for something from us, or do you want us to do another skit for you?

C: 来吧，让我们一起，筋肉的明天在向我们招手！
E: So, join me! A future where muscles shall shine beckons!

C: 跟我聊聊神仙姐姐吧。
E: Tell me about this celestial lady.

C: 简而言之，博识学会是与星际和平公司共生的学术组织。倡导的理念是：「一切知识必须如货币般流通」。
E: Put simply, the Intelligentsia Guild is an academic organization in symbiosis with the Interastral Peace Corporation. Our motto is "All knowledge must be circulated as freely as currency."

C: 我想和你打听一下，有什么化外民可以挣钱生活的门路吗？或者说，你平时靠什么养活自己？
E: I wanna ask if there is a way for Outworlders to make a living here? Rather, how do you usually earn money?

C: 好，那你路上小心。之后要是遇到什么适合我的工作，可以介绍给我。要是听到什么长生之秘…你懂的，别独占秘密呀。
E: All right, be careful on your travels. If you find any work I can do, please let me know. If you hear anything about the secret to immortality... you know, don't hog it all.

C: 停云小妮子所在的「鸣火」商会先后连接起了十六个世界的贸易使团，还把海市办成了星海盛典。
E: The Whistling Flames guild that Tingyun works for got in bed with the trade delegations from sixteen worlds and turned the Grand Fair into an intergalactic festival.

C: 哎…这世间尽是些，让人笑不出来的玩笑。
E: *sigh* ...The world is full of jokes I can't bring myself to laugh at.

C: 那他们最好是「强者」。
E: They'd better be as "formidable" as you say.

C: 你知道吗，我虽然帮科员同事们做过无数次恋爱咨询，但是我其实没有谈过一次恋爱，再加上我这个人比较羞涩……
E: You know, despite giving courtship advice to countless colleagues of mine at the space station, I've never been in a relationship before. Plus, I'm rather shy...

C: 其实吧，我也看出来了，你对看比赛没兴趣是不是？赚钱你总有兴趣吧。
E: Actually, I can also tell that you're not interested in the competition. What about making money? I'm sure you're interested in that.

C: 我见你这人面善值得信任，换了别人我可是只字不提。这段时间地衡司查得严，你也别走漏了风声，等过了这段风头，咱俩一起赚大钱。
E: It's only because you seem like a kind and trustworthy person that I'm telling you this. If it were anyone else, I would have kept my mouth shut. Also, as the Realm-Keeping Commission has been quite strict about things as of late, remember to keep everything on the down-low. Once their investigation dies down, it'll be our time to shine.

C: （不解地摇头）
E: (Shake head in confusion.)

C: 我的问题问完了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 想喝苏乐达的话，可以来这里找我。
E: Well, if you ever feel like a bottle of SoulGlad, you know where to find me.

C: 将军舰桥上一声吼～
E: From inside the pilothouse came the General's battle cry~

C: 不管，我要开大星槎！
E: I don't care. I wanna pilot a mega one!

C: 驭空大人好温柔…
E: Madam Yukong is so gentle...

C: 你写的虚假报道没问题吗？
E: Is the misleading article gonna land you in trouble?

C: 我不管！我就要开大星槎！
E: I don't care. I wanna pilot a mega one!

C: 出交通事故了吗？哎，真是世事难料啊。
E: Could he have gotten into an accident? *sigh* That's how unpredictable life is.

C: 别嫌了，一般仙舟人哪儿能像你这样跑东跑西，好羡慕啊。
E: Don't worry about it. Nobody on Xianzhou gets to travel all over the place like you do. I'm jealous.

C: 好厉害啊，卷起来了
E: Simply amazing, it's rolled up.

C: 我与我娘亲逃外星～
E: My mom and I escaped to an off-world system~

C: 你没事吧？
E: Are you okay?

C: 你都做了什么呀！
E: What did you do!

C: 嘿嘿。
E: Heehee.

C: 可惜我无尽的残生只能如此做结了。
E: It's a pity that the rest of my endless life is going to be spent like this.

C: 不过，我也不在乎！我是一个特立独行的岁阳，大家都说待在魔阴身里难受，我偏要待在魔阴身那里！在魔阴身的意识中越痛苦，我就会越强大。
E: But then again, I don't care! I'm a heliobus who marches at my own beat. Everyone says staying inside a mara-struck body feels horrible, but I want to do exactly that! The more painful I am in the mara-struck's conscious, the more powerful I'll become.

C: 看在你先前打的那么用力的份上，让人家想想…
E: Mm, you certainly pummeled me hard enough before, so let me think...

C: 嗯？是新面孔，又是哪里来的新人选手么？有什么不懂的多问问我这位老前辈啊。我会让你知难而退…啊，不对，我会让你明白竞锋舰上的赛程有多艰辛的。
E: Hmm? A new face, another new participant from somewhere? You can count on this old veteran if you have any questions. I'll have you running off in no time... Ah, that's not right — I'll make you understand the ardor of the Skysplitter's tournament.

C: 那就好，那就好。
E: That's good, very good.

C: 难道这也在计算之中吗？
E: Is all this within your prophecy, too?

C: 这怎么可能啊！
E: How can this be!

C: 归根到底活着为了什么?
E: What exactly is the purpose of life?

C: 这货箱是我的！我的！
E: This crate is mine! Mine!

C: 我现在一闭上眼就能看到他……
E: I can see him every time I close my eyes...

C: 历史的走向，或许只在人的一念之差。
E: The course of history can change in the blink of an eye.

C: 咦？！奶奶你——
E: Huh!? Grandma, you—

C: 对了，还得去探望迷路迷境的妖精们…许久不见，它们恐怕又稀里糊涂地把日子过得一团糟了吧？
E: Oh right, I should also visit the fairies in the Membrance Maze... It's been a while. I bet they've made a complete mess of things again in their usual scatterbrained way?

C: 胡说…我…还没有输…我还能再战……
E: Nonsense... I'm... not done yet... I can still drink on...

C: 我一直在追求的，不就是这样一处归宿吗？可当我真正游入港湾之后，心里剩下的，只有平静。
E: Isn't this the kind of home I've been hoping for all along? Yet now that I've finally arrived at this harbor, all I feel is peace.

C: 呵呵…这里没有清洗者窥探，更没有黑潮造物侵扰，本该是没有病痛的温柔之乡。
E: Heh... This should be a peaceful haven, free of illness, with no Cleaners prying and no Black Tide Creatures lurking.

C: 那倒不是，它栽进了一帮元老里边。他们正在叽叽喳喳嚼舌根，这下炸了锅，追着我跑出半条街，害得我不小心踩着尾巴了。
E: Not exactly, it landed right in the middle of a group of elders. They were gossiping away when it happened, and it caused an uproar! They chased me halfway down the street, and I ended up stepping on my tail in the chaos.

C: 灰子，扎格列斯之手迭代后应该换个更酷的名字。不如…就叫赛法利娅之手吧！
E: Gray Mystery, once the Hand of Zagreus gets its upgrade, it needs a cooler name. How does the Hand of Cifera sound?

C: 希望它能让你铭记这一点。
E: I hope this will help you remember that.

C: 还以为和大地兽的互动教学课，会更循序渐进一点，没想到一来就是最重量级的嘉宾呀！
E: I thought the dromas interaction lesson would be more gradual, but wow, we're starting off with the heavyweight guest right away!

C: 大地兽也很喜欢你呢。
E: The dromas seems quite fond of you, too.

C: 巴特鲁斯阁下，您引冥河淹没黑潮造物的设想也未能实践…待到我能够掌控冥河时才发现，黑潮本是生死论外之物。
E: Lord Bartholos, your plan to submerge the Black Tide Creatures in the River of Souls couldn't be realized either... When I took command of the river, I learned the black tide exists beyond life and death itself.

C: 我这是占全了啊……
E: But it seems like I've hit the jackpot...

C: 外面的冥差！帮我个忙…
E: Spiritfarer! Can you help me?

C: 你要想啊，难的案子功劳才大嘛。难度越大，报酬越贵。
E: Just think about it. It's the hard cases where they give the most credit. The higher the difficulty, the better the reward.
Shh!

C: 你说智械能修炼所谓的内功吗？
E: Do you think Intellitron can also practice that so-called inner cultivation?

C: 那下届演武仪典什么时候啊。
E: Then when is the next Wardance?

C: 那不就是暖炉么？
E: Isn't that just a heater?

C: 这算联盟最寡淡的菜系。
E: They have the blandest dishes in the Alliance.

C: 在星星的最高处，猿猴偷走了它深爱的公主，但它无处可逃，只能被现实锁住。
E: At the very highest point of the starry sky, the great ape thief kidnapped his beloved princess. However, with nowhere to run, he was sealed in place by reality.

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 你好，我不叫二营长。另外，你的超弦轨道炮，已经拿来了。
E: Firstly, I'm not a Sergeant. Secondly, I've already brought your orbital cannon.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 无所谓，反正是打公司。
E: Doesn't matter, they are going up against the IPC.

C: 我还以为他撑不了几个回合。
E: I thought he wouldn't last more than a few rounds.

C: 以上知识点每年都会在廻星港工人年度考核试题中出现，请你务必记准记牢。虽然你在通常情况下不需要参与考核，但万一呢？
E: Please pay attention to the fact above, as it is often included in the annual examination of the Stargazer Navalia workers. Under normal circumstances, you are not required to take part in the exam, but it is better to prepare for the unexpected.

C: 案牍库上的铭牌显示：「大敌名录」。
E: The plate on the file repository reads, "List of Archenemies."

C: 这是一只崭新的快递箱，表面没有任何纸质或数字单据能够表明它的身份。
E: This is an all-new courier package, with no stickers or other labels attached that could indicate its identity.

C: 残破的快递箱被随意丢弃在地上，单据上猩红色的「退件」电子戳昭示着的命运。货品名称一栏写着「九百九十九朵朱明紫月季」。
E: A tattered courier package is left abandoned on the ground. The bright-red stamp of "RETURNED" on the bill signifies its fate. "<unbreak>999</unbreak> Zhuming Mauve Roses" is written in the "Goods" column.

C: 你拆开了这个可悲的包裹。见一封书信飘摇着落到了你的指间，信纸上散发出清朗的香气。你不由得读了起来。
E: You open the pitiful package, and a letter falls out and slips in between your fingers. A refreshing and pleasant scent wafts from the paper. You can't help reading it.

C: 翻开书，你见这页的内容似乎是序言。
E: Opening the book, you see what appears to be the preface.

C: 这页的内容与狐人大鼓有关。
E: The contents of this page are related to Foxian Drum Chant.

C: 这是蜕生前的旧梦，还是未出世的宏愿？你不清楚。也许很快，这个梦将随逝水流去。
E: Is this an old dream from before its rebirth, or an as-yet unfulfilled aspiration? You are unsure. Perhaps soon, this dream will fade away with the flowing water.

C: 你抚摸持明卵，聆听它微不可查的细语。它借你之口低声轻叹，故土不在此处，故土不在此处…你生于遥距罗浮千万光年外的方壶仙舟。
E: You softly touch the Vidyadhara egg, listening to its barely audible whisper. Borrowing your voice, it laments about being away from its homeland. This is not home. This is not home... It was born on the Xianzhou Fanghu, ten million light-years away from the Luofu.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 这根本就称不上是两难选择——正常人不会吃腐败的食物。你的理智占了上风，只希望有人能够及时清理掉它。
E: This is an easy choice to make. Anyone sane would stay away rotten food. Your sanity prevails, and you just hope that someone will clean it up quickly.

C: 这似乎是一封来自名为「枘凿六合」秘密结社的调查问卷——这年头怎么还有自称「秘密结社」的组织？
E: This seems to be a survey from a secret society called Hexanexus. You can't believe it still calls itself a "secret society" in this day and age.

C: 对仙舟人来说，回收损坏器物，将它们修好往往得不偿失。但偏偏有人热爱生残补缺，在这个一切快速生成快速消费快速遗弃的年代里，这些人坚持不受迷惑。
E: The people of Xianzhou see collecting and repairing broken things as a waste of time, but there are those that find joy in replacing what has been lost. These people refuse to be led astray by this generation of rapid consumption.

C: 形虎拳馆的套餐中存在「师徒一对一」的教学方式。师傅会为学徒管理食物摄入、以及个性化拳法课程，还附带声援鼓励——这肯定不便宜。
E: There is a teaching method in the Tiger Boxing Gym's training package known as "1-on-1 mentorship." A mentor will manage their student's food intake, create a personalized martial arts curriculum, and even cheer them on. This cannot be cheap.

C: 你重新封上了快递箱。幸亏你拆箱时动作比较温柔，没有损毁花朵和信件，不然…还真是有一点小尴尬。
E: You re-seal the package. Fortunately, you were gentle when you tore it open and did not damage the flowers or the letter. Otherwise... this could have been really awkward.

C: 演不了就换人！
E: Change the performers if they can't put up a show!

C: 里外不是一个口味。
E: But tasted so gamey.

C: 灯笼静静漂浮在夜色中，周身散发着温暖的光芒，平等地为所有人照亮回家的路——尽管并非所有人都有家可归。
E: The lanterns silently float in the night sky, each emitting a warm and uniform glow that lights the way home for all, even though not everyone has a home to return to.

C: 你听到门后传来一阵悠扬的提琴声，那动人曲调中似乎饱含思念之情；
E: You hear the mellifluous music of violin strings behind the door. This moving song seems to carry a sense of longing;

C: 左转：艾迪恩公园；后退：钟表小子广场。
E: Turn left: Aideen Park; Go back: Clockie Plaza.

C: 「人靠衣装车靠胎。」只要走进这家店，丑小鸭也能变成黑天鹅。
E: "Clothes make the man and tires make the car." If you walk into this store, even an ugly duckling can also transform into a swan.

C: 装饰在柜子上的猫头鹰们盯着你，窃窃私语。
E: The owls set in the drawer stare at you, whispering among themselves.

C: 这些柜子的密码锁看上去就像猫头鹰的眼睛。你试着拨动码盘，却没有半点反应。
E: The combination locks on these drawers look just like the eyes of the owls. You try turning the numbered dials, but receive no response.

C: 富有艺术气息的长桌。从这屋子的布置和藏书来看，主人的品味还算不错。
E: A long table brimming with artistic flair. From the looks of this house's layout and library, its master had great taste.

C: 积木们零散地堆放着，再无孩子的手将它们拿起。
E: The blocks are scattered all over, never again picked up by a child's hand.

C: 据说在梦境酒店还正常时，这个房间压根无需侍者、食物自己就能端上顾客的桌。
E: It's said that when the Hotel in the dreamscape was running, this room had no need for attendants — food would serve themselves on guests' tables.

C: 从这里远眺匹诺康尼大剧院姑且算是个不错的消遣。如果你也想借景消愁，我倒是不介意为你留个位置。
E: Taking in the view of the Penacony Grand Theater from here barely counts as a decent way to spend my free time. If you want to join, I don't mind saving you a spot.

C: 匹诺康尼不是梦想之城吗…我、我也有自己的梦想啊！
E: Isn't Penacony supposed to be the city of dreams...? I, I also have my own dreams!

C: 你不慌不忙地从口袋里掏出了梦境护照，颇为自豪地翻开展示。望着上面密密麻麻的贴纸，笨罐先生露出了羡慕的神情。
E: You steadily fish out a Dreamscape Pass from your pocket, showing it off like a prized possession. Scrutinizing the cluster of stickers on it, an envious expression plasters Mr. Piggy Bank's face.

C: 你呢？我的心灵之友。你和我聊天，该不会也是……
E: What about you? My kindred friend. You chatting with me, are you also...

C: 没什么想了解的。
E: There's nothing else I'd like to ask about.

C: 你目瞪口呆地看辛格勒从包里扯出一张报纸，纸面宽大得足以遮住她的半个身子。好吧，看来身材不那么高大确有好处。
E: Dumbfounded, you see Singler whip out a newspaper from her bag. It is wide enough to cover half her body. Sometimes being vertically challenged has its advantages.

C: 您看，星际之间人们南来北往，明明各自迥然不同，却时常因某些共性短暂地聚集在一起，期间又要在这并不牢靠的共性之中谋求更多共性以实现自己的目的……
E: You see, people of the stars hustle and bustle about, their journeys and destinations obviously vastly different. Yet, thanks to some inexplicable universality, they are usually brought together briefly. During which, they seek further resonance in this unreliable universality to realize their own goals...

C: 你说起冰雪中的贝洛伯格、不见天日的下城区，说起被星核迷惑的大守护者。
E: You talk about the snow-laden Belobog, the Underworld that never sees daylight, and the Supreme Guardian led astray by the Stellaron.

C: 犹豫就会败北！
E: You snooze you lose!

C: 在你校准对方情绪的一瞬间，一只谛听突然出现在了眼前。
E: The moment you calibrate the target's mood, a Diting pops out of nowhere.

C: 现实中的坏消息已经够多了，犯不着在梦境里再去强调它们，是吧？
E: There's already enough bad news out there in the real world, so why go and underscore it in the dreamscape?

C: 据说某皮皮西被摸球之后，连整个人的性别都变了——真是太可怕啦！
E: I heard that one Pepeshi ended up changing gender entirely after having their fluff ball stroked — that's scary!

C: 咳、咳咳…咳！
E: Cough, cough... cough!

C: 但我画不出来——我能绘制出远比一座城市更为抽象的事物，但只有这个题材，我无论如何都无法下笔。
E: But I can't — I've no issue painting something far more abstract than a city, but this is the only thing where I cannot put my ideas into action.

C: 周围的孩子还在哭着闹着遍地打滚的时候，我就已经习惯了用绘画表达自己的内心世界。凡是能用画笔创作出来的，我都不想浪费言语去表达。
E: While other kids were wailing and rolling on the floor, I had already learned how to express my feelings through paintings. And if my artwork couldn't convey them, I didn't bother to say them either.

C: 我的爱人，她是匹诺康尼的珍宝，人群中最耀眼的启明星，所有人都会被她吸去目光——没错，即使是广告牌也不例外！
E: My love, she is the treasure of Penacony, the brightest star in the crowd, catching everyone's attention — That's right, not even a billboard is exempt!

C: 同时，这也是项极其理性的工作——一切需要万分小心。上一任哈利伯顿，也就是我的师父，就被毁于将星核嵌入表身时产生的爆炸波中。
E: At the same time, it is a job that requires a great amount of rationalism... Everything must be done with great caution. The previous Haliburton before me, my tutor, was destroyed in an explosion when he embedded a Stellaron into a watch face.

C: 「嘭！！！」有什么东西从卡死的组件间弹出来，落在你手中。
E: *Boom!!* Something flies out from between the jammed parts and lands in your hands.

C: 不仅如此！一想到我是家族的一份子，我的自豪感就源源不断地向外喷涌，如同这城里随处可见的喷钞机！
E: Not just that! Just the thought of me being one of The Family makes my heart burst with overflowing pride, like one of those money guns that are everywhere in the city!

C: 您好啊，这么巧在此处遇见，要不要一起看会儿风景聊聊天？
E: Hello, what a coincidence to see you here. How about a chat while we take in the sight?

C: 虽然不过是噩梦一场，但从梦里惊醒的那种感觉可真是不好受哇…希望别再来一次了，我这把年纪可经不起这吓……
E: It may have been just a nightmare, but to be shocked awake from my dream didn't feel good at all... I hope it doesn't happen again, I don't think I can take much more at this age...

C: 万分抱歉为您带来了不便的体验。我们会进一步优化工作流程，提升服务质量，以保证您能够充分享受美梦之旅。
E: We apologize for any inconvenience you may have experienced. We will refine our workflow and enhance our service quality to ensure that you can fully enjoy your trip.

C: 太普通了吧？
E: Isn't it too ordinary?

C: 愿您在匹诺康尼度过一段愉快的时光。
E: I hope that you have a pleasant time in Penacony.

C: 唔，这是什么？好微妙的感觉……
E: Hmm... what is this? It feels so unusual...

C: 此时此刻，您想体验一个什么滋味的梦境？
E: What kind of a dream would you like to experience now?

C: 好吧，期待您的下次光顾！记住，爱德华医生比您更了解您内心的喜好！
E: Well, I'll look forward to your next visit! Remember, Dr. Edward knows more about your preferences than you do!

C: 柯柯娜的眼神变得灵动了起来，然后哼起了那首由她自己创作的歌……
E: Cocona's eyes come alive. Then, she starts humming the song she has written herself...

C: 「请闭上眼睛，再往前看」
E: "Close your eyes and look ahead."

C: 「车靠贴膜人靠装，厄皮洛斯购物爽。」
E: "Clothes make the man. Shop till you drop at the Epirus Apparel Fashion Show."

C: 怕什么？反正载具系统还没开放。
E: What's there to be afraid of? The vehicle system is not available yet anyway.

C: 除内置电源外，本型号独轮飞车还配备有脚动驾驶系统。
E: In addition to the built-in batteries, this vehicle is also equipped with a foot-operated driving system.

C: 不过嘛，看在你这么有礼貌的份上…算了吧！这就给你打开车灯。
E: However, since you were so polite... Fine! I'll switch them on for you.

C: 我就是「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」的主人！
E: I own The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand!

C: 容器的使命是存储，但这台机器选择将财富分享给世界——这或许也是「同谐」的一种表现？
E: The purpose of a container is storage, but this machine chooses to share its wealth with the world. Could it be an act of Harmony?

C: 在遇到你之后，我终于搞懂了：珍惜自己身边的好朋友，这才是我最应该追求的事情！
E: After meeting you, I finally realized that cherishing my friends is the most important thing to do!

C: …这当然就要靠您自己去发现了，朋友！这么安排是为了让您在获奖的兴奋之余，还能充分享受探索带来的满足感！没错，设计如此！
E: ...You'll have to figure it out yourself, my friend! It's arranged that way so that you can feel the excitement of winning a prize as well as enjoy the process of discovering the uses of the card! Yes, that's the concept!

C: 据说那里关押的都是最最可怕的犯人……
E: I hear that all of the most terrifying convicts are held there...

C: 你知道吗？第一次见面的时候，我们明明相约共进晚餐，却未曾想一直聊到了第二天的早饭。
E: Did you know that, the first time we met, our dinner lasted all through the night till breakfast the following day? We had so much to talk about.

C: 麦考先生对公馆的安保要求十分严格，而我负责将他的命令传达给猎犬家系的小伙子们。
E: Mr. McCoy is stringent about the security of Dewlight Pavilion. My job is to convey Mr. McCoy's instructions to the Bloodhound guys.

C: 不过，这正是美梦安宁的象征，不是吗？
E: Still, it means things are peaceful in the Dreamscape, isn't it?

C: 虽然不知道那是谁，不过我猜她一定也是个爱宠人士，哈哈。
E: I have no idea who that is, but I bet she must be a pet lover too, haha.

C: 等等…这不对劲！按理来说，应该只有{RUBY_B#「家族」成员}「家人」{RUBY_E#}才能目视它的光辉才对——你明明什么都看不到，干嘛装出一幅很兴奋的样子！
E: Wait, this isn't right! Normally, only {RUBY_B#members of The Family}"kinsmen"{RUBY_E#} can see its glow. Why did you fake your excitement when you couldn't see anything?

C: 那是一个平静的午后。妈妈在厨房做饭，我在沙发上玩着模型小人。安逸与香味一同在空气中弥散。
E: It was a peaceful afternoon. Mom was cooking in the kitchen, while I was playing with some figurines on the couch. Tranquility was in the air along with the mouthwatering aroma of food.

C: 先聊到这吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat for now.

C: 呃…这、多谢你的好意，但现在不行，我不能随随便便答应你。
E: Uhh... Umm, thank you for the kind offer, but I cannot right now. I cannot just casually agree to something like that...

C: 当你尝试用些固定的形容去描述它的时候，你就开始在失去它了。
E: It's precisely when you try to use a fixed definition to describe a home that you begin to lose it.

C: 你是匹诺康尼本地人么？
E: Are you a local Penaconian?

C: 钟表披萨蛋糕卷，百层圣代柠檬挞；\n切片蛋糕飞碟堡，苜蓿色拉苏乐达？
E: We have Clockie Pizza, Cake Rolls, Hundred-Layered Sundaes, and Lemon Tarts\nSliced Cakes, Floatdisc Burgers, Alfalfa Salad, or SoulGlad?

C: 我们也都同时失去了什么——哈哈哈，这种句子常挂在嘴边可没什么意思。
E: Then we are all losing something else at the same time. Hahaha, these quips are no fun to be constantly mentioning.

C: 这尊雕像象征着一位神秘人物——潜伏于五大家系背后的影子家系家主——卡拉赫爵士。他是一位「神秘」的命途行者，暗中控制着五大家系和匹诺康尼大小事务。
E: This statue symbolizes a mysterious figure - Head of the Shadow Family that lurks behind the Five Lineages - Sir Callagh. He is a Pathstrider of Enigmata, controlling the Five Lineages from the shadows, along with all political affairs of Penacony.

C: 想听听你对我的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about me.

C: 是吧。这家酒吧暂时保住了，我们的生活不会被打扰。这就是值得高兴的事。
E: Yeah, indeed. This lounge is safe for now, and our lives won't be disrupted. That's something to be happy about.

C: 哎呦，客人，我哪敢对您有看法啊。您能喜欢道具表演就是我的荣幸了。
E: Oh, dear guest! How dare I have complaints about you? I'm honored that you're interested in my item show.

C: …现在要看吗？这里的环境悠闲又清净，正适合看点好玩的节目来打发时间！
E: ...So, would you like to enjoy the show now? A little entertainment in this quiet joint would be the perfect way to kill some time!

C: 它跳下了椅子，似乎不想再聊了。
E: It jumps off the chair and doesn't seem interested in talking anymore.

C: 然后，再把卖掉的钱拿走九分，将吃剩的残渣施舍给我，美其名曰赏赐——这就是匹诺康尼所谓的美梦！
E: And then, they'll run off with most of the money and give me the scraps that remain as a "reward." That's the Penaconian Dream!

C: 平心而论，以我的现状，想要成为那种能够自由进出大剧院的宾客，多半不现实。可整个匹诺康尼又有多少人是这样的宾客呢？
E: To be fair, becoming the kind of person who can freely enter the Grand Theater as a guest is pretty unfeasible based on my current circumstances. I wonder how many people in Penacony are able to walk right into this theater?

C: 天助我也，天助我也！都说星穹列车热心肠，这回总算是让我见识到了！
E: The Great One blesses me! Everyone knows how kind-hearted the crew is, and now I get to witness it myself.

C: 唉，我也想像站在聚光灯下，接受观众们的欢呼。但…那终究不是属于我的生活。
E: *sigh* I want to be just like those contestants and stand out in the spotlight as I'm cheered on by the audience. But... that's not the life that's been chosen for me.

C: 开拍开拍！谁再耽误了拍摄时间，小心我当场炒他鱿鱼！
E: ACTION! If anyone else gets in the way of this shoot, you'll be fired on the spot!

C: 祝你在这里过得愉快。
E: I wish you a happy journey.

C: <size=28>再来抓我一次吧，甜蜜的「死亡」！</size>
E: <size=28>Come and seize me once more, sweet "Death"!</size>

C: 而且说实话，那家餐厅的食物虽然卖相谈不上好，但味道还不错。流梦礁的生活条件虽然不怎么样，氛围可真是非常宜居了。
E: And if I'm honest, the food in the restaurant didn't look great, but it didn't taste bad at all. Though the living conditions in the Dreamflux Reef may be nothing to write home about, the atmosphere is actually very comfortable.

C: 怎么突然抱怨起来了？
E: Why are you complaining all of a sudden?

C: 每次看到他们互相配合，快乐地沉浸在音乐之中，不断向着更好的自己前进的时候，我就像目睹奇迹一般幸福……
E: Every time I see them working together, happily immersed in the music and constantly moving towards a better version of themselves... The joy I feel is like I'm watching a miracle unfold before me.

C: 曾有这样一位女性，是她首创了对于忆质运动的科学研究。
E: There was a woman who pioneered the scientific study of memoria movements.

C: 因为受够了那些所谓权威的恶劣行径，我来到流梦礁探寻她的足迹……
E: Because I had enough of the bad behavior of those so-called authorities, I came to the Dreamflux Reef in search of her footsteps...

C: 拉扎莉娜女士，我会继承你的遗愿走下去的……
E: Madam Razalina, I'll carry on where you left off...

C: 感激不尽！钟表小子博物馆建成的那天，您的名字一定会出现在感谢名单上。
E: Thank you so much! The day Clockie Museum is up, your name will certainly be on the gratitude list.

C: 可我去美梦做什么呢？我的心已经老了，再弹不出热情欢快的曲子啦。所以我问他：「难道是想让我回到博物馆的橱窗里吗？」
E: But what am I going to do there? My heart's already too old to play those cheery songs once more. So I asked him: "Don't tell me you're trying to take me back to that display cabinet in the museum?"

C: 本店的面包以及其他的所有食物，所用的原料都来自纯净有机的忆域农田。
E: All bread and other foodstuffs in our store use pure organic ingredients sourced from the Memory Zone's farms.

C: 到现在，磨粉、揉面、发酵、烘烤…这样的工序我已经重复了不知道多少遍，但每次闻到烘烤带来的热腾腾、暖洋洋的香味时，我就会感到由衷的幸福。
E: All the grinding, kneading, fermenting, and baking... I've repeated this process countless times, but every time I smell that steamy warm scent of something baking, I'll get this feeling of sincere happiness.

C: 嗯？看来你已经找到一半小鸟了。
E: Hmm? Looks like you've already found half the birds.

C: 啾！真是群好高骛远的家伙，翅膀还没硬，就想着怎么飞行了啾。
E: Tweet! What a bunch of arrogant fellas, already thinking about flying before their wings have even fully grown.

C: 操练什么？
E: Training on what?

C: 呜呜，原来客官不是为了人家来的，不过人家真的很需要您的帮助啾。
E: Boohoo, so you didn't come here for me. I really do need your help, though, tweet.

C: 给我讲讲折纸小鸟的故事…
E: Tell me the story of the origami birds...

C: 小鸟们都很调皮，稍微不注意就会跑去其他地方…还是麻烦客官先把那孩子带回来吧！啾啾！
E: The birds are very mischievous, they'll run off to other places if you don't watch them for even the slightest second... Please bring the children back safely! Tweet tweet!

C: 来，这是人家特地为您准备的礼物，请务必要收下啾。
E: Here, this is a present I've specially prepared for you, you must take it, tweet.

C: 不可见的宿星引我来此，褪去锁枷拘囚\n被唤醒的热忱疾声高呼，方知渴念已久
E: An unseen star guided me here, breaking the fetters that shackled me.\nA roused fervor cries out, a realization of a long-muted desire.

C: 哦，我的博识尊，你残酷的语言让我的心脏回路发生了一次小短路！
E: Oh, my Learned Nous, your cruel words have caused a short circuit in my heart circuit!

C: 看这魔方大师设计的七色六面魔方，如同宇宙本身一样玄妙莫测；看这用情绪碎片铸造的奇妙积木，能诱发你内心深处最真实的情感……
E: This colorful magic cube was designed by the cubemaster, as unfathomable as the universe itself. Just look at this wondrous building block that was crafted from emotion fragments — it will reveal the truest emotions in the deepest crevices of your heart...

C: 但说真的，我理解不了他们寻求快乐的方式，作为玩具，我一点也不快乐！于是我逃出了那里，乘着一位喜欢我的顾客的船来到了匹诺康尼。
E: But to be honest, I could never understand the method in which they sought joy. As a toy, I was not happy at all! That's why I escaped, boarded a ship of a customer who favored me, and made my way to Penacony.

C: 他们不痛苦吧。
E: I'm sure they aren't suffering.

C: 那就来聊点让我感觉平静的话题吧——关于我的身世。
E: Let's talk about topics that calm me then — like where I come from.

C: 古怪的智械并未回应你的道别，仅以目光送别你远去的背影。
E: The strange Intellitron does not respond to your farewell, and merely gazes at you as you walk away.

C: 这位客人，请留步——要来一份下午茶吗？
E: Dear guest, please wait... Care for some afternoon tea?

C: 至少现在你明白之前的伏笔感从何而来了。
E: At least you now know where the sense of foreshadowing that you felt before came from.

C: 虽说隔行如隔山，但既然我的烹饪也算是一种艺术创想……倒是也可以通用。
E: Our professions may be worlds apart, but my cooking also counts as a form of artistic expression, so I think it still fits.

C: 想要让它不那么脆弱，非得采取些手段才行。
E: We have to take action to protect them from their fragility.

C: 至于刚才那些话…哈哈，您看上去气度不凡，恐怕不适合这么开门见山。
E: As for what I just said... Haha, there's something unique about you, so it didn't feel right getting straight to the point.

C: 实在是…不知所谓！
E: Ridiculous!

C: 所以我才说嘛，根本没什么不一样的……
E: So, in my opinion, we're not all that different from paramecium.

C: 其实我不是侍应生。
E: Actually, I'm not the waiter.

C: 哈，我真是越活越有出息了！
E: Ha, my life's on the upswing with each passing day!

C: 嗯，正好让我静一静。
E: Perfect. I get some time to myself then.

C: 哈哈，我从来不认为自己是个英雄，也不是什么恶棍。我只是一个律师，一个擅长收集一切有利信息的律师——未雨绸缪是我的职责。
E: Haha, I've never thought of myself as a hero, nor a villain. I'm just a lawyer, one who's honed a craft in gathering useful information. After all, it is my duty to be ahead of the game.

C: 察觉到你的目光一直停留在它身上，它看了看你，视线在扫过你的五官时因为过于激动，竟差点宕机。
E: Noticing that your gaze has been fixed on it, it looks at you and scans your face before nearly crashing in excitement.

C: 具体我也不清楚，但很多人会被我吸引过来，我听船员们说，好像预售行情还是挺火爆的。
E: I don't know the detailed statistics, but I seem to be attracting many people. I heard from the crew that the pre-sale seems to be very popular.

C: 因为…以前我总喜欢当着客人的面喝苏乐达，久而久之就给大家造成了「原来狗狗也可以喝苏乐达」这样的错误印象，汪。
E: That's because I was always drinking SoulGlad in front of our guests. Over time, people formed the misconception that "dogs can drink SoulGlad as well," woof.

C: 小问题，不至于开除…
E: It's only a small issue. You won't be fired.

C: 但是我们乐队的吉他手说：「你摇冰块的声音比你的琴音响得多。」哎，差点把我气到昏迷。可现在我想通了，成年人为了谋生拉下脸很正常，这些闲言碎语算什么。
E: But when our guitarist said my cocktail shakers resound a lot better than my bass... Boy, I almost went into a stroke. *sigh* I've thought it through now. Pride doesn't pay the bills, so what's a little mindless when I'm earning my keep.

C: 你这用人唯亲不太好吧？
E: Should you really be keeping it all in the family?

C: 不过会让我变成这样的过去，想来不是什么好事。逻辑：不记得才更好。
E: However, a past that rendered me to my current state is probably not worth remembering. Logic: Not remembering my past is probably better for me.

C: 啊？我有段时间没去那边，难道学校把那些签名都给擦掉了？算了，随他们吧。
E: Ah? I haven't been there in a while. Maybe the school has gotten rid of the signatures? Well, that's up to them.

C: 前阵子，我去问派对组委会拒绝我的理由，他们说什么今年的预热派对只邀请有「梦想」的学生。言下之意，成为派对之王不算「梦想」咯？这是瞧不起我。
E: A few days ago, I asked the party committee why I wasn't invited. They told me this year's kick-off party is only for students with "dreams." So apparently, being the Party King isn't considered a dream? How dare they!

C: 那也不能随便改别人的记忆。
E: That's no reason to tinker with her memory.

C: 如果感兴趣的话，下次去我的派对吧！我欢迎任何人，即便一分钟前我才认识你。
E: Come to my next party if you're interested! Anyone's a guest, including those I just met.

C: 行，如果你想到了好点子，记得来找我。
E: Alright. Come look for me when you get a good business idea.

C: 其实我的球笼只是最普通的型号喔，与学校的练习用车别无二致，只是舱内被改装得更适合我的个头，外表用了荧光粉的涂装，仅此而已。
E: Actually, my Spheroid is a completely normal model. It's exactly the same as the campus training model. The interior is just adjusted to suit my size better and the exterior has been painted fluorescent. That's all.

C: 刚开始，一切都很美妙。他们带我去梦境里最好的餐厅，递上完美的商业计划，然后不断地向我灌输梦想：我会是第一个皮皮西冠军，成为所有皮皮西人的榜样……
E: At the beginning, it was all wonderful. They took me to the finest restaurants in the Dreamscape, laid out perfect business plans, and kept filling my head with dreams: I would be the first Pepeshi champion, an idol for all Pepeshi...

C: 你已经做的很好了。
E: You have done extremely well.

C: 那当然！咱可是正规社团，学院里登记在案的，你就放一百个心吧！
E: Of course! We're a proper, registered club. Don't you worry about that at all!

C: 绝对不可能是什么排演事故…我敢用这学期的绩点发誓。
E: There is no way that this was just a simple rehearsal accident... I'd bet my semester's grades on it!

C: 说来惭愧，其实我加入社团之后也写过什么像样的段子，没办法，学业压力大，我只能抽空来参加社团活动。
E: I'm ashamed to say it, but I haven't really written anything decent since joining the club. With all the pressure from my studies, I can only make time to attend club events when I can.

C: 那你还问我？
E: Then why did you even ask me?

C: 看来先前的演出经历在乐队成员心中留下了极为深刻的印象，以至于任何情绪都无法动摇这份热情。这就是音乐的力量吧。
E: Looks like the performances left an indelible, lasting impression in the band's hearts — no amount of emotion can cause this passion to waver. This is the power of music.

C: 那是自然。作为学院代表，我也很高兴看到学员能变得更加优秀，找到自己想走的道路。再次向你和那位乐队核心表示感谢。
E: Naturally. As an academy representative, I am also happy to see a student growing with excellence and figuring out their own path. I have you and your band's lead to thank.

C: 学生们原本便对这位代表颇有微词，校方也曾收到过相关投诉，只是碍于苜蓿草家系的情面，才始终没有处理。
E: There have been students who have been critical of this representative, and the school has also received related complaints. It was due to the considerations of the Alfalfa Family that this problem was never resolved.

C: 老师，时代变了。
E: Teacher, times have changed.

C: 哎，水平太高，名声太大，能力太强…想要退隐都很难啊！
E: *sigh* Too skilled, too famous, too capable... Retreating into obscurity would be impossible!

C: 这样吧，以后你过来买东西我给你打折！
E: How about this, next time you buy something from me, I'll give you a discount!

C: 老爹他挺好的…就是…那个…他知道我退学警告书的事了。但我跟他承诺了，今后绝对不会让他失望的。
E: My old man is doing okay... It's just that... He knows about my academic warning letter. But I promised him I won't disappoint him again in the future.

C: 唉，又被同学投诉了，这群天天玩奢侈品的公子哥，商品稍微有点瑕疵就要举报我违规经营！
E: *sigh* Classmates are complaining about me again. These rich folks play with luxury items every day, and report me for violating regulations just because there are slight flaws in the products!

C: （写下幽默的寄语）
E: (Write a witty message)

C: 亲爱的无名客！欢迎来到「派对车厢」，调饮机器人「闭嘴」为您效劳！要不要吃点东西、喝点饮料，再跟我聊聊旅途中发生的趣事？
E: Dear Nameless! Welcome to the Party Car, drinksmith robot Shush at your service! Would you like something to eat or drink before chatting with me about the interesting things that happened during the trip?

C: 提问：波提欧先生最害怕哪艘仙舟？答案：「方壶」。因为那里有「伏波将军」。
E: Why is Boothill always so confident? Because it's not his first rodeo.

C: 不过我并未从她身上探知到能被称为威胁的事物，这点可以放心。
E: Just so you know, I haven't sensed anything that comes off as a threat in her. No need to be concerned about that.

C: 先聊到这里吧。
E: That's all I wanted to talk about.

C: 「看到这些书了吗？随便翻开它们，里面一页纸的内容，也远比这些钱要珍贵。」
E: "Did you see these books? If you flip through them, you'll find that a single page of one of these books is way more valuable than the money."

C: 精心准备的礼物摆放于此，它们所传递的情感价值远比礼物本身更加宝贵。
E: Carefully prepared presents sit here, with the value of the emotions they deliver being much dearer than the objects themselves.

C: 是你在喊我吗？那个…你认识我？
E: Are you calling for me? Umm... Do you know me?

C: 在你眼前展现出来得是无边的天空，巨大的浮空艇悬于云层之上，下面的云团如潮水般涌动。
E: The boundless sky appears before your eyes, the massive airship hovering above the clouds. Looking below, you see the clouds surging like tidal waves.

C: 居然是活的船长！快快快，帮我跟{F#她}{M#他}拍个合照。船长，我可以跟你握个手吗？
E: It's the captain! Quick, quick, help me to take a photo with {F#her}{M#him}. Captain, can I shake your hand?

C: 「可以合照吗？」你听见有人发出这种请求，刚刚应下，又有人掏出纸笔找你签名，耳畔还有和你握手的请求在不断重复。
E: "Can I take a photo with you?" You hear someone request. As you agree, another person takes out a pen and paper to ask for your autograph. There's also a constant barrage of requests from people to shake your hands.

C: 一道金光烧毁了泰坦悬置于此的心脏，眼前的一幕，正是遗留下来的「犯罪」现场。
E: A flash of golden light incinerated the heart that the Titan had left here. What lay before me was the scene of this "crime."

C: 你也会和过往结识的所有同伴一起，拥抱一个新的明天。这次，用上比以往更多的温柔、坚决和勇气吧！
E: Together with all your companions from the past, you'll embrace a new tomorrow. This time, with more tenderness, determination, and courage than ever before!

C: 严禁携带燃油类物品。
E: Petroleum-based items are strictly prohibited.

C: …你又不是小孩子了
E: ...Remember that you're no longer a child.

C: 我们要投诉你！
E: We'll complain about you!

C: 老奥帝？他昨天就来了。
E: Old Oti? He already arrived yesterday.

C: 克劳迪娅小姐！
E: Miss Claudia!

C: 应该是这样玩的…
E: This is the way...

C: 总感觉姿势不太对…
E: Doesn't feel right...

C: 螺丝星人从不吹牛…
E: People from Planet Screwllum never boast...

C: 要入梦就开心点吧。
E: Just be happy if you want to enter the dream.

C: 葛瑞迪影业上新片了…
E: Grady Films has released a new movie...

C: 都别来打扰我。
E: Don't bother me right now.

C: 宝箱？我看宝箱怪还差不多……
E: Treasure chests? Just don't get killed by chest mimics...

C: 又是「再来一瓶」…这次活动的中奖率也太高了吧？
E: "One More Bottle"? Again?... The odds of winning are way too high.

C: 不不不，我觉得你已经充分掌握了这门艺术精髓，可以去实践一下了。
E: No, not at all. Actually, I think you've grasped the essence of this art well enough to practice it.

C: 通缉令上吧。
E: I think I've seen your face on a wanted poster.

C: 很好，来个炫酷的姿势…
E: Nice, now do a cool pose...

C: 想都别想！
E: Don't even think about it!

C: 嘘，小声点，万一被人听见，传到主办方那里，咱们就惨了。
E: Shh, keep your voice down! Walls have ears, if this gets back to the organizers, we'd be screwed!

C: 期待了这么久的演出，说取消就取消了。
E: Such a long-anticipated performance, canceled just like that.

C: 念错词了，是苏乐达！
E: Ah. Sorry. Mispronounced that one. SoulGlad!

C: 我手头也没余粮了…
E: I don't have extra on me...

C: 很抱歉……
E: Really sorry...

C: 费用有点贵啊…
E: The fee's pretty steep...

C: 我们又在一起听歌了…
E: We're listening to songs again together...

C: 这个…我回去准备一下。
E: I... I'll return to prepare.

C: 啊？你的查重率是多少？我也借鉴了别人的论文，不会被发现吧？
E: Ah? What was your plagiarism rate? I also referenced other papers. Do you think I'll be exposed?

C: 《钟表小子》系列动画的经典海报——「滴答！我们的好朋友，愿你能永远笑得开怀！」
E: A classic poster from the Clockie cartoon series — "Tick-tock! My good friend, may you always be filled with laughter!"

C: 总之要听话！
E: In any case, it has to obey!

C: 哈哈，看来是我误会您的来意了。只怪近期光顾小店的顾客十有八九都是冲着这个系列来的。
E: Haha, it looks like I misread your interest. Lately, it seems like everyone who stops by is on the hunt for that specific line of products.

C: 上次说到你们信仰瑟希斯……
E: You mentioned your faith in Cerces...

C: 即使我已长大成人，他也习惯把我视作自己的责任……只是责任与过度保护的界线不太清晰就是啦嘿嘿。
E: Even though I'm an adult now, he still feels responsible for me... It's just that the line between care and overprotection is a bit blurry, hehe.

C: 需要找什么再和我说，有些东西我不摆出来卖……
E: Let me know what you're looking for. There are books I don't put up for sale...

C: 本店的宗旨就是用最简单的食材与手法，复刻出历史上那些美味佳肴。在此为您推荐本店的招牌菜——「古典拼盘」。
E: I'm trying to bring back those lavish historical dishes using the simplest ingredients and techniques. So, I highly recommend our signature dish, the "Classical Platter."

C: …抱歉，看来你认识我呢，说起来，灰宝去哪里了？
E: ...Sorry, looks like you recognize me. Speaking of which, where did Grayie go?

C: 这周内必然会一笔小财进账。
E: This week will bring a small windfall.

C: 很正常，人的体质不同。而你曾经就在极度混乱的情况下，在面对全副武装的奥赫玛士兵围剿时全部闪避，趁他们反应过来之前，你就来到这里了。
E: It's normal. People's constitutions are different. Even though you were extremely confused, you managed to perfectly evade every attack from a group of fully-armed Okheman soldiers, and before they could react, you ended up here.

C: 眼前一黑。
E: Everything goes black.

C: 我的抽卡运气能不能再好些？
E: Can I get some better luck in the pulls?

C: 喝了「法吉娜盲盒」的人就是这副德行，大家都习惯了，别在意。
E: People who drink the "Phagousa Blind Box" usually end up like this. Everyone's used to it. Don't mind it.

C: 真正的问题难道不是，这几个选项也不一定是*我*想问的？
E: Isn't the real question that — these options aren't necessarily what I wanted to ask anyway?

C: 结束后，他立刻就被叫走了，过了好久才垂头丧气地回来。
E: Once the turmoil settles, he is immediately summoned elsewhere and only comes back after a while, looking downcast.

C: 移民官说：「吉奥里亚给了你强健的体魄，你却只拿它来做饭？」
E: Then he scolded me, "Georios blessed you with a strong physique, but all you do is whip up meals?"

C: 嗐，没有那么复杂！{RUBY_B#神明}泰坦{RUBY_E#}不过是自然现象当中的一类，塞纳托斯唯一的好处，就是它自动排斥一切繁文缛节。你若是去坟地里办一场演唱会，于{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}而言，也一样无伤大雅。
