E: Hah, it's not that complicated. The {RUBY_B#gods}Titans{RUBY_E#} are just a type of natural phenomena. One good thing about Thanatos is that they automatically repel all mortal cultural codes. Even if you decide to throw a party in the graveyard, it wouldn't bother {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} one bit.

C: 没关系，利波就在这，随时等候着您的到来~
E: No worries. Lipos is here, patiently awaiting your return.

C: 就这样。
E: Yes.

C: 没别的了。
E: That's it.

C: 想请你帮我翻译一块石板。
E: I need your help to translate a slate.

C: 请别嘲笑我，传说是跨越万千岁月而诞生的珍贵结晶。比如最广为人知的翁法罗斯泰坦神话，如果你有机会了解，一定会被它的恢弘与精妙所震撼的。
E: Please do not laugh at me. A legend is a precious crystal that is born over the course of millennia. Take the famous Titan mythology of Amphoreus. If you have time to learn about it, you will be shocked by its vastness and exquisite detail.

C: 又比如，法吉娜与吉奥里亚两尊泰坦相看两厌，翁法罗斯的下雨天其实是法吉娜在灌醉艾格勒后对吉奥里亚发出的挑衅。
E: Another story that I have heard is that the Titans Phagousa and Georios cannot stand each other. Legend states that when it rains in Amphoreus, this is actually Phagousa taunting Georios after having gotten Aquila drunk.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 我相信你，你们很勇敢。
E: I believe you. You were extremely courageous.

C: 谢谢你。在这个地方，能有人愿意倾听已经是莫大的安慰了。
E: Thank you. Knowing that there is someone here who is willing to listen to me is already a great comfort.

C: 要我说那些外邦人就是不地道，闲得没事非要搞什么「分期付款」！从预售到定金截止三个月，等个尾款小半年，就算结了尾款想收到货还得再两个月！
E: If you ask me, these outlanders just don't know how Okhema works! They sit around doing nothing and demand "payment in installments"! They give you three months after the presale to pay the deposit and by the time you make the final payment, six months have slipped by. Even then, it'll still be two months before you even get what you asked for!

C: 嘿嘿，我不仅买到了，还买了三套！你懂得——一套用来收藏、一套日常把玩、还有一套向人展示……
E: Hehe. I didn't just buy one, I bought three set! You know what it's like — one set for the collection, one for daily use, and one to show off...

C: 那你不妨讲讲。
E: Then why don't you tell me a little.

C: 要是退而求其次，草木灰不是必须，烧碱也能完全胜任；但不用橄榄油肯定不行。动物的油脂腥气太重，其他植物油又不像橄榄油那样可以做出拉丝的效果……
E: If you have to make do with second best, you can use caustic soda instead of wood ash — though the olive oil is absolutely necessary. Animal fats stink, and other vegetable oils can't yield the same silky finish...

C: 只可惜信仰就像一种拼图——一旦被搅乱、打碎，人们就很难原模原样地再把它拼装回去。
E: It's just a shame that faith is like a jigsaw puzzle — once it's disturbed or smashed, it's very difficult for people to piece it all back together.

C: 好呀，我可以摸摸它们吗？
E: Okay. Can I pet them?

C: 抱歉…最近恐怕不行，小家伙们最近表现有些异常，我怕出什么岔子。
E: I'm sorry... Not right now. The little fellas have been acting out a little recently, and I'm afraid it could cause trouble.

C: 瑟希斯在上，看在研究的份上，就请让我进去吧……
E: For the love of Cerces... For the sake of my research, please let me in...

C: 如果在追逐纷争的路上有什么疑虑，可以来找我，我会帮你斩断它们。
E: Should doubt arise on your path to pursuing strife, you may seek me out, and I will help you sever it.

C: 尼卡多利的祭司是什么样？
E: What is a priest of Nikador like?

C: 聊天…不喝点儿…没法聊……
E: Chat... I can't... without something to drink...

C: 什么免责协议？
E: What liability waiver?

C: 呵…看来在欧洛尼斯的夜帷已经盖住{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}与我的回忆了。
E: Heh... It seems Oronyx's veil of night had already covered the memories between {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME} and I.

C: 太有帮助了！
E: Immensely helpful!

C: 好吧，其实是因为我曾在阿格莱雅大人的面前立过誓约，不再去尝试探索「天外之界」，至少这段时间里得装装样子。
E: Well, actually, I had sworn in front of Lady Aglaea not to try to explore the world beyond the sky. I need to keep up appearances, at least for the time being.

C: 那么，若不是我们已经有了关于「阿卡索斯」的知识，怎么能判断出他们的观点不够全面？若是「阿卡索斯」不存在，我们能从何处得到的关于它的知识？
E: So, if we did not already have knowledge of "Icatus," how could we realize that their views are not comprehensive enough? If "Icatus" does not exist, from where did we gain our knowledge of it?

C: 哈！智者的驳论真是毫不留情面。帕门弥德，现在你可得好好想想咯。
E: Hah! What a merciless rebuttal, wise one! You will have to think about this carefully, Parmenides.

C: 哈，哲学辩论的结果，岂是由人证的多少来决定的？若真是如此，公民大会就将是这世上最富有智慧的机构——他们永远都是对的。
E: Hah. So a philosophical conclusion is proven simply by the number of people that believe it? If that were the case, then the citizens' assembly would be the most intelligent organization on earth... They would always be correct.

C: 这些认识经过讲述与传承，便成为了关于「阿卡索斯」的知识。
E: This cognition is described to and inherited by others to become knowledge of "Icatus."

C: 不过我看辩论场上的回复里，没人说碰见过类似的事情——这个段子是纯粹编出来的可能性估计很高。
E: No one else has reported anything like this from what I've seen in the forum replies. It's probably just made up.

C: 慌乱的神色、结巴的话语、拙劣的借口，出卖了他的心虚。为了翁法罗斯民众的安危，正义的球棒侠决定问个水落石出。
E: The panicked expression, stammering words, and clumsy excuses betray his guilt. For the safety of the people of Amphoreus, the Galactic Baseballer of justice decides to get to the bottom of it.

C: 而我，无论如何努力抡动手上的重物，收获的却是贫瘠的肌肉与嗤嗤的笑声。
E: But no matter how hard I swing those heavy weights, all I gain are scrawny muscles and mocking laughter.

C: 好哇…能跟你这样有活力的年轻人多打打交道，可是大叔我的荣幸。
E: Of course... Being able to talk with an energetic youngster like yourself is a true honor for an old man like myself.

C: 聊聊你的「家乡」。
E: Talk about your "home."

C: 你应该听说过，奇美拉并非原本就生活在翁法罗斯的生物，而是花园的学者，使用「生命树种」培育出来的。
E: You must've heard before that the chimeras aren't actually native to Amphoreus. Rather, they were grown using the Seed of Life by the Garden's scholars.

C: …唉。在这样的环境下，个人的喜好又能改变什么呢？
E: ...*sigh* In such an environment, what's the use of personal taste?

C: 当然，就算恰好并未携带石板也不用担心，我们的课程还包括「即兴武器近战」与「徒手格斗」，以便学生们能在各种情况下随机应变。
E: Of course, it's okay even if you're not carrying a slate at that time. Our lessons also include improvised close quarters combat with weapons and hand-to-hand fighting. Our students are well-equipped for any situations thrown their way.

C: 还有「赤陶学派」那帮人，总嚷嚷什么「灵魂外无实体」、「存在即被感知」。有事没事就喜欢来个「信仰之跃」，不知摔残了多少学者。
E: And those Erythrokeramists going on about stuff like "there's no physical shell beyond the soul," "existence is to be perceived." And performing all those "leaps of faith" like they've got nothing better to do. Too many scholars have cracked their bones because of that.

C: 那你就走吧，找不到钥匙的人，不得入此门！
E: Then you should leave. If you can't find the key, you're not allowed inside!

C: 「我觉得问题出在奖项上，所以我打算自己搞个什么物理学奖，就用我的名字冠名，重振贝洛伯格科学界的荣光。等搞好了我喊你，说不定能参加个颁奖礼什么的。」
E: "I think the real problem is the awards themselves, so I'm planning to start my own Physics Science Award, named after me, to restore the glory of Belobogian science. Once I get it all set up, I'll invite you, maybe you can come to the award ceremony."

C: 没错！这正是我把期刊命名为《民间科学》的原因。长期以来，科学的解释权都被那些尸位素餐的官方学者牢牢掌握，导致贝洛伯格的科学水平严重落后。
E: That's precisely why I named it Citizen Science. For too long, the power to define science has been monopolized by complacent academics, holding back Belobog's scientific advancement.

C: 我非常理解你的看法，因为你是个普通人，缺乏对先进理论的洞察。
E: I understand where you're coming from because you're a normal person without insight into advanced theories.

C: 唉…是啊，假期过得好快，感觉还没和老爸相处多久呢。
E: Ah... yes, the holiday went by too quickly. I feel like I barely spent any time with him.

C: 好吧，既然你都这么说了，那我还是老老实实等老爸下次休假吧。
E: Well, since you put it that way, I guess I'll just wait patiently for his next break.

C: 小女子早就觉得，黄金歌剧院配不上塔米拉小姐，她值得有更广阔更璀璨的未来。
E: I've long believed that the Golden Theater isn't worthy of Miss Tamila. She's meant for a future that's far more expansive and dazzling.

C: 听听雅努斯之城的意义。
E: Tell me about the significance of the City of Janus.

C: 庆幸并无人听到你那愚蠢之词吧…若是卫队当真被唤来，此刻你恐怕已经因「诽谤圣女」的罪名被驱逐出雅努萨波利斯了！
E: Fortunately no one heard your foolish outburst... If the guards had actually been summoned, I fear you'd have already been cast out of Janusopolis for "defaming the Holy Maiden!"

C: 神谕将如何指引我的故乡？
E: How will the prophecy guide my homeland?

C: 我想找你聊聊…
E: I was hoping we could talk...

C: …无缺的英雄。时至今日，我仍会如此评价白厄。作为最完美的黄金裔，他注定在逐火之旅中背负沉重的救世使命。
E: ...The perfect hero. To this day, that is still the opinion I have of Phainon. As the most perfect Chrysos Heir, he is fated to bear the heavy fate of saving the world in the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 关于缇里西庇俄丝……
E: About Tribios...

C: …遐蝶，找到了她在漫长岁月里踽踽独行、一直追寻的答案。
E: ...Castorice finally found the answer she's been searching for all these years, walking alone in the long journey.

C: …这就是天空后裔和昏光庭院的由来啦！
E: ...And that's how the descendants of the sky and the Twilight Courtyard came to be!

C: 葫芦…是那种腰细肚鼓的中空果实吗？莲食学派的植物著论里好像有提到，不过在现在的翁法罗斯已经很少见了。
E: Gourds... You mean those hollow fruits with slim waists and rounded bellies? I think they're mentioned in the botanical treatises by the Lotophagists, though they're quite rare in the Amphoreus of today.

C: 错的，请叫我银河球棒侠。
E: Wrong. Call me the Galactic Baseballer.

C: 你看错了，我不认识黄金裔。
E: You've got the wrong person. I don't know any Chrysos Heirs.

C: 元老院的前辈们说「我们站在光历的转折点上」，或许真的如此。再见，希望我们都能顺利越过转折点。
E: The senior senators love saying, "We stand at the turning point of the Light Calendar." Maybe they're right. Goodbye. Hope we both make it through this turning point.

C: 换句话说，我将对你的帮助视为一种投资，我相信我的眼光。哈哈，这样吧，先给你一些「小心意」就当是交个朋友了。
E: Think of my help as an investment — I trust my instincts. Haha, here, consider this little gesture a token of friendship.

C: 来，仔细看、往这看！瞧瞧这身材，再瞧瞧这肌肉！怎么样，喜不喜欢、羡不羡慕？
E: Come and look closely! Right here! Behold, this body, and these muscles! Do you like them? Do you admire them?

C: 感谢你，就聊到这里吧。
E: Thank you. That's all for now.

C: 怎么了，又是你？来寻求泰坦的指引吗？
E: You again? What is it? Have you come to seek the Titan's guidance?

C: 一尊衣匠突兀地站在这里，透露出一丝茫然。
E: A garmentmaker stands here abruptly, exuding a sense of confusion.

C: 我想起来了…有位织者一只想要去往彼岸。它正藏在<color=#dbc291ff>双月高塔上</color>，试着用自己的方式抵达冥界。
E: I remember now... A weaver has always wanted to reach the other side. It is hiding on the <color=#dbc291ff>Twin Moon Spire</color>, trying to reach the nether realm in its own way.

C: 你能让这些若虫停止闪烁吗？
E: Can you make these nymphs stop flickering?

C: …那具尸体，但愿不会是他，塞纳托斯在上，求求你放过这个可怜的魂灵吧。
E: ...That body, I hope it's not him. By Thanatos, spare this poor soul.

C: 我先走了，再见。
E: I'll take my leave now.

C: 加油，小机灵鬼。
E: Keep it up, smart one.

C: 热爱智慧的听众啊，你又为什么不跑呢？
E: Oh, wise listener – why don't you flee?

C: 噢？怎么，你曾听过我的布道？那你一定知道我过去强调过多少次要「恪守祭仪」了。
E: Oh? You've heard my preaching? Then you must remember how often I stressed the importance of "observing the rituals."

C: 我只是路过，不打扰你了。
E: I'm just passing by. I'll leave you now.

C: 他们想继续祈祷，那我就带头做点祭仪，至于回应…哼！这些信众也需要我来安抚，眼下，也只能这样了。
E: If they wish to continue their prayers, I'll perform the rituals. As for responses... bah! These followers need my comfort as well. For now, this is our only course.

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 这边这边，你看！水面上的倒影，是不是特别可爱？
E: Over here, over here, look! The reflection on the water is super cute, isn't it?

C: 哦，你喜欢这里的风景呀？让我也好好看看，记下你喜欢的地方~
E: Oh, you like the view here? Then let me get a good look too, so I can remember the places you like~

C: 排练不能被发现迷！
E: Keep rehearsals secret, memi!

C: 唉，小姑娘总是那么客气，不就是顺手的差事，还特意烤了面包送来当谢礼。
E: She's always so polite. It's just a small favor, but she even baked me bread to say thanks.

C: 听起来很轻松对吧？都是些基础课程，毕竟，孩子们再长大点就得去帮父母务农了，用不上那些复杂的知识。
E: Sounds pretty relaxed, doesn't it? Just the basics. After all, once they grow a little older, they'll be helping their parents in the fields. So, no need for complicated knowledge.

C: 虽然暂时只有我们俩，但是这样一来，你也不用担心被抢走舞伴了迷！
E: Well, it's just the two of us for now. But hey, look at the bright side — no competition for dance partners, mem!

C: 明明走两步就能见面，大家为什么还要写信呢？真想不通迷……
E: But really — why write letters when you could just walk over and talk in person? Doesn't make sense, mem...

C: 去找寻妖精竖琴的地址吧，在迷路迷境深处应该会有发现。
E: Go search for the fairy harp. You should find something in the depths of the Membrance Maze.

C: 想四处看看，多了解这里。
E: We could hang around here and get to know this place better.

C: 暂时不想做什么……
E: I don't feel like doing anything right now...

C: 我的过去？哈哈，想不到除了维吉妮娅之外，还有第二个人对那些历史感兴趣啊！
E: My past? Haha, I never thought someone other than Verginia would be interested in those histories of yore!

C: 干杯！你这人真爽直，我喜欢。等玩完一遭，记得再来找我碰杯！
E: Cheers! I like your candor. Remember to drink with me again once you're done!

C: 等我完成《落木逐火英雄纪》，就能报、报答凯撒大人收留的恩情了吧。
E: Once I finish Heroic Saga of Flame-Chase, I'll be able to repay the Great Imperator's kindness in taking me in.

C: 但人…人有偏好啊！这帮坏东西…喝到不喜欢的，就全灌…灌到本狮嘴里！
E: B—But humans have preferences! That nasty bunch forced the ones they didn't like into my mouth!

C: 终于不用做数学了！
E: No more math! I'm free!

C: 带孙子可比带儿子费事儿多喽……
E: Taking care of grandkids is way harder than just taking care of your own kids...

C: 亲爱的，正好我有点口渴。不知道求神谕的队还要排多久，就买几个吧？
E: Dear, I'm a bit thirsty. I don't know how long the queue for the prophecy will take, so let's buy a few, okay?

C: 这才多少啊。
E: It wasn't even that much.

C: 如果我有翅膀的话——
E: If I had wings...

C: 小鸟望向猫头鹰老师——天真的孩子眨着一双双圆溜溜的大眼睛，期盼着最信赖的老师许诺中那无所不能的未来。
E: The bird looks in Professor Owl's direction. The innocent child blinks with its round, limpid eyes, eagerly anticipating the almighty future that the most trusted teacher promised.

C: 我只是法政科的一位向导而已，具体的方针策略，还得等创始人古恩老师决定。
E: I'm just a guide. Specific policies and strategies will be decided by the founder, Mr. Gunn.

C: 古恩老师是法政科的创始人，他富有智慧与哲思。
E: Mr. Gunn is the founder of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics. He is very wise and philosophical.

C: 如…如果还能被星神大人所注视的话……嘿嘿……
E: If... If I am really being watched by the great Aeons... Heheh...

C: 奇物再收容小队？
E: Curio Collection Squad?

C: 我还有一些事情想要问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 你那个角度能看到脸吗？
E: Can you see their face from that angle?

C: 这到底是数字还是…
E: Is this a number, or...?

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 旧日仙女木的影子，依照莲食学派的说法，它们只分得了瑟希斯的零星智慧，心智混沌。
E: According to the Lotophagist school of thought, the shadows of ancient White Dryads only received fragments of Cerces's wisdom, leaving their minds in chaos.

C: 你想起了扶起巨树的丹恒，和他对荒笛许下的承诺。那么，仙女木的未来也靠他了。
E: You recall Dan Heng propping up the giant tree, and his promise to Terravox. Now, the White Dryads' future rests in his hands, too.

C: 到我出手的时候了！这儿没有战役要奔赴，没有荣耀需要捍卫，从小磨砺的技艺无处施展，我都有些无聊了。
E: Time for me to step up! There's no battle to rush to, no glory to defend, and nowhere to show off the skills I've honed since childhood. I'm getting pretty bored here.

C: …我们原本至死都未有机会向对方表露真心，谢谢您。
E: ...We might never have had the chance to confess our feelings if not for you. Thank you.

C: 不必，二位拿好！记得多来看看大地兽们！
E: No need! Here, take it! Just remember to visit the dromases more often!

C: 你们浴场怎么打烊了？
E: Why are your baths closed?

C: 就这？没有礼物吗？
E: That's it? No gift?

C: 我已经听说了，在天外的「圣杯战争」中，有人的夙愿是回到过去的哀丽秘榭。
E: I've heard that in the "Holy Grail War" beyond the sky, someone's deepest wish was to return to the past Aedes Elysiae.

C: 凯撒大人？怎么不是菈宝？
E: Great Imperator? Why not something cute, like "Cera"?

C: 正好，你瞧，这是昏光庭院的新产品——小伊卡限量周边！本来已经被人抢完了，幸亏我自己还留着一个，灰宝就把它捎回家吧！
E: Perfect timing! Look, this is Twilight Courtyard's new product, Limited Edition Little Ica merch! They were all sold out, but luckily I kept one for myself. Here, Grayie, take it home with you!

C: 你说，会不会有人在这里敲击风铃，举办一场小小的音乐会呢？
E: Say, do you think someone might ring these wind chimes and put on a little concert here?

C: 何况，悬锋人的字典里可没有无聊。做好一顿饭，与夺下战功同样光荣。
E: Besides, there is no word for "boring" in the Kremnoan language. Preparing a good meal is just as glorious as winning battles.

C: 如你所愿，史诗的道标已然显现。
E: As you wished, the saga's benchmark has revealed itself.

C: 就是嘛，咱也陪了你们一路，结果一大堆照片里，却没几张能照到咱。明明还换了新造型，好可惜啊——
E: Right? I've been with you guys this whole time, but in all those photos, there's barely any of me in them. And I even got a new look. Such a waste!

C: 瓦尔特来自一个我没听说过的星球，他现在还在寻找回去的办法。不过，我总觉得他对冒险更有兴趣，现在他已经不怎么提回家的话题了。
E: Welt is still trying to find a way back home to a planet that I've never heard of. However, it seems he's more interested in going on adventures. It's been a while since I've heard him mention going home.

C: 阿基维利…
E: About Akivili...

C: 在我的故乡，我在一家动画工作室担任原画设计师。
E: Back home, I worked as a concept artist at an animation studio.

C: 哔嘟…多看「家用寻物仪安全使用指南」，每次都有新发现。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Keep reading the Home-Use Object Finder Safety Manual. You'll learn something new every time.

C: 我给你推荐个好人选，他叫桑博…
E: I know just the man for this job. His name is Sampo...

C: 这是一辆快要报废的矿车。出于安全考虑，它现在只能作为教具在矿场里继续发光发热了。
E: This is a mining cart that's about to be scrapped. For safety reasons, it can only continue to serve its purpose in the mines as a teaching prop.

C: 全部准备好了，再来找我吧。
E: Come find me when everything is ready.

C: 少废话，安东尼娜叫你来，不就是为了这个？
E: Enough nonsense. Isn't this why Antonia sent you here in the first place?

C: 你看到矿区中央那片大矿脉没？壮观吧！之前做勘测的蠢货怎么就没早点发现，没想到最值钱的玩意居然灯下黑啊……
E: Do you see that big vein in the middle of the mine? Absolutely stunning! Why didn't those useless surveyors find it earlier! To think that the most valuable prize was hiding in plain sight...

C: 也许这份工作对矿区来说真的很重要，但是…唉，可我不想一辈子被圈在这矿区里啊。
E: This job may be essential to the mines... but... *sigh*, I don't want to be stuck in these mines for the rest of my life.

C: 滴答，有新的货要送？可惜你来得不巧。
E: Tick-tock, got new goods to deliver? Pity you came at a bad time.

C: 滴答，或许一个人也不错，能有更多的时间来转动思考的齿轮……
E: Tick-tock, maybe being alone isn't so bad after all. You get more time to turn the gears of thought...

C: （按下重启键。）
E: (Press Reset.)

C: 不，没什么。
E: Nothing.

C: 为什么会加入星核猎手？
E: Why did you join the Stellaron Hunters?

C: …算了，那不重要！鄙人名叫雷比尼，现在正为贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆贡献展品锐意写生中！
E: ...Ah, forget it. That's not important! My name's Rebini, and I'm currently absorbed in creating an exhibit for the Belobog History and Culture Museum!

C: 啊…这味道……
E: Ahhh... That smell...

C: 其实我就是于尔丹派来的…
E: To be honest... Uldan sent me.

C: 哈哈，谢谢你！我会好好观摩的！
E: Haha, thank you! Allow me to observe!

C: 「大守护者可可利亚早在求学时便展现出惊人的学识与能力——贝洛伯格坚信：如此聪慧的大脑定将拾起文明最后的薪柴，引领众人穿越晦暗无际的雪幕。」
E: "Supreme Guardian Cocolia showed remarkable knowledge and ability during her studies. Belobog firmly believed that such an intelligent mind would pick up the last torch of civilization and lead people through the dark and boundless snow curtain."

C: 忽然之间，她就像是需要我来哄睡的孩子，我也不知道怎么办，只能静静地搂着她。
E: It's like she suddenly turned into a child who needs me to put her to sleep. I don't know what to do either, so I can only embrace her silently in my arms.

C: 去哪？打谁？
E: Where do you want me to go? Who do I beat up?

C: 给钱都不拍。
E: Not even if you paid me.

C: …真好看，本姑娘果然是天生丽质！
E: ...That looks great! I truly am a natural beauty!

C: 看来像你这样刚刚抵达仙舟的旅客一定需要一个导游！
E: Looks like you're in need of a professional tour guide!

C: 看来不带上你是不行了…
E: Sounds like an offer I can't refuse...

C: 那你就信我的，就点「琼实鸟串」或者「鸣藕糕」，绝对不会出错。
E: Ah, with my discriminating taste as your guide, you'll never go wrong. Give the berrypheasant skewers or songlotus cake a try.

C: 探店不是自己花钱吗……
E: Don't taste testers pay for their own food?

C: 怎么办啊？
E: Psst, what should she do?

C: 你们之前都没有想到吗？
E: So, you've never thought of this before? *shaking my head*

C: 素裳和工人将斯科特的快递摆在码头的空地上。
E: Sushang and workers place Skott's package on the floor.

C: 等等，你的经验告诉你，它既然出现在这里，少不了会引来一场恶斗。不出意外，眼前这只「浓云金蟾」适时醒了过来。
E: Wait, you sense a malicious intent brewing in the air. A fight is imminent. As expected, the toad springs to life.

C: 哈——？我没听错吧。
E: Ha...? Did I hear that right?

C: 码头工人就必须和星际和平公司对立吗？
E: Does being a dock worker mean that person can't conspire with the IPC?

C: 你看看这个。
E: Take a look at this.

C: 没错，背地里做小动作可不行。
E: That's right! You shouldn't be betraying your fellow workers for a quick profit.

C: 我筹备着将<color=#dbc291ff>「码放货物」和「物流规划」进行升级</color>，之前闲置的码头，现在也准备开放使用了，你要是有空就来找我确认吧。
E: I'm preparing to <color=#dbc291ff>upgrade inventory and logistics planning</color>. The previously-idle dock is now ready for use, so come see me when you have time.

C: 会长知道码头升级有多重要吧？
E: Does he know how important it is to upgrade the dock?

C: 我听说银河中不少地区接受了公司的商业合作，并一举成为了星际贸易热门地区。
E: I've heard that many places in the galaxy that partnered with the IPC have become popular areas for interstellar trade.

C: 我们先离开这里吧。
E: Let's leave for now.

C: 我可不是自称啊，离开仙舟有好些年了，回到这里后儿时伙伴还叫我「小少爷」。
E: Oh, hehe, I didn't give myself that name — it's what my friends have always called me. I only recently returned to the Xianzhou after many years away, but it seems like the name stuck!

C: 所以我这不是替你找来了吗？
E: I can cover their salaries! Come on, it'd be rude to turn them away.

C: 一旦物流主导金人巷，同功坊这样的商铺很快会消亡，甚至不需要公司出手。
E: Once the Alley is turned into a logistics hub, shops like Artistry Hardware won't be able to sustain themselves, regardless of what the IPC does.

C: （这句话好像不太对劲……）
E: (I sense a hole in his logic...)

C: 我和燕翠师傅谈好了，活动期间，你可以在尚滋味白吃白喝。
E: Yancui has agreed to offer you free meals throughout the crossover.

C: 嗯…让小秘书再想想口号吧！我们去拍下一组。
E: Hmm, let's leave the slogan to Mingxi. We should head to the next location.

C: 感觉这句话可以一直用下去。
E: Very original.

C: 我还有别的事儿。
E: I have something else to do first.

C: 公司愿意更进一步，充分开发码头的物流效应。将金人巷打造成银河闻名的商业港口。
E: The IPC seeks to unleash the full potential of the dock, taking full advantage of its role as a logistics center — thus transforming Aurum Alley into one of the most advanced commercial ports in the galaxy.

C: （我们可以用什么证明？）
E: (Do we have any proof?)

C: 斯科特对你的出现视而不见，当然，你也可以对他不屑。
E: Skott chooses to ignore your presence, and in return, you can choose to disdain him.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 燕翠师傅都能处理，你也能！
E: Master Yancui can handle it. So can you!

C: 客人们马上就要到了，店里就拜托你了。
E: The diners will be here soon, so I'll leave the store with you.

C: …怎么可能，这是请假专用语。
E: ...What, no! This is how I talk when I want to request sick leave.

C: 好啊好啊，牌桌上见。
E: Cool cool, I'll see you at the games table.

C: 以后会多起来的。
E: There will be a lot more later.

C: 但是你想要的繁荣，与我们想要的不同？
E: Since we share the same passion, where is it that we disagree?

C: 就算有很多金人巷商户们期望如此，但这并不代表他们有远见卓识。
E: In agreeing with your approach, those shops may risk missing the bigger picture... and opportunities for future growth.

C: …看着这身衣服还不明白吗？
E: ...Can't you tell just from this set of armor?

C: 我们还有更加紧要的事情，需要优先处理。
E: There are more urgent issues that need to be taken care of first.

C: 「斗技」是个贝洛伯格古武术的术语。是一种不依靠蛮力，注重技巧的综合格斗技术。
E: "Martialism" is a term from classical Belobogian martial arts. It's a mixed martial arts form that focuses on technical skill rather than brute force.

C: 真是太精彩了！让我们把欢呼声献给，将贝洛伯格古代「斗技」融会贯通的综合格斗大师——
E: That's amazing! Lay-dees and gentlemen, let's give it up for the master of mixed martial arts, the champion of ancient Belobogian martialism —

C: 恭喜您，{NICKNAME}！您是本届「斗技表演赛」当之无愧的冠军！请收下这份丰厚的奖励，以及——史考特商业联盟提供的神秘奖品！
E: Congratulations, {NICKNAME}! You are the undisputed champion of the inaugural Martial Exhibition! Please accept your bounteous reward, and also — here's a secret prize for you from the Scott Business Alliance!

C: 至少数量上是很严谨的。
E: It's pretty rigorous indeed, at least by the numbers.

C: （接下来，只需要前往雷金标记的坐标附近探索异常情况就好了……）
E: (Now, just need to go to the location Regin marked and look out for anomalies...)

C: （猛踹雪堆）
E: (Kick the Snow Drift)

C: （这次还挺会隐藏的，只不过它肯定没想到变成广告画有可能被撕下来……）
E: (It's pretty stealthy, but it probably didn't think it would be torn off as an advertisement poster...)

C: 烧了也能取暖。
E: We can burn it for warmth.

C: 依我看，就听这位{F#女士}{M#先生}的！恶作剧这种不正之风，决不能在贝洛伯格盛行！
E: I think we should listen to this {F#lady}{M#man}! We cannot tolerate pranks like this in Belobog!

C: 没听过——哈欠！
E: I've never heard of it... *yawn*

C: 他叫什么名字？
E: What's his name?

C: 真后悔，要是你头一回给我手稿残页的时候，我就提高警惕该多好！
E: I wish I took more steps to protect myself back when you first gave me the note pieces!

C: …下次一定。
E: ...I'll make sure to be.

C: 哈哈哈，您真幽默。放心，我会把您的需求反馈给制作组的！
E: Hahaha, that's funny. Don't worry. I'll pass on your feedback to the developers!

C: 滴答！宾客！宾客你好，我是钟表小子，欢迎来到美梦小镇！
E: Tick-tock! Guest! Hello! I am Clockie! Welcome to Dreamville!

C: 直觉并不总是能带我找到真相。但如果没有了它，那我怕是连调查的第一步都迈不出去。
E: I can't always count on hunches to help me find the truth. But if there wasn't one, I wouldn't even dare embark on the first step of this investigation.

C: 什么情况？
E: What's the issue?

C: 会唱歌有什么用，你都没有嚎啕大哭，也没有讲述你的悲惨身世。没有节目效果我怎么让你过？
E: It's not enough to just sing well. Without tearing up or narrating the story of your miserable life, you add nothing to the show. How can I let you through?

C: 我不在的时候，这些怪物就要拜托你了。
E: Please take care of the monsters when I'm not around.

C: 比如说，我现在想喝<color=#dbc291ff>大杯特别甜</color>，能够让人回忆起过往幸福时光的饮料——
E: For instance, I want a <color=#dbc291ff>large, extra sweet</color> drink that brings back happy memories of my past...

C: …怎么回事？
E: ...What happened?

C: 我…我……
我故意惹人生气，也是想引起注意。不然…都没有人关注我……
E: I made him angry on purpose because I wanted him to notice me. If I didn't do that... no one would pay attention to me...

C: （有点不放心，还是跟出去看看吧。）
E: (Something's not right. I should follow him outside and check things out.)

C: 呀！人家的真心…被您给找到了呢。
E: Awww! You've found... my true heart.

C: <size=36>吼——！！！</size>
E: <size=36>Roarrr!!!</size>

C: 要是舒翁这么厉害，最近又常常不在，会不会…她不想要我们了哇？
E: Since she's been away a lot lately, could it be that... she doesn't want us anymore?

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: （不知道小星星恢复得怎么样，它今天还会来酒吧吗？）
E: (I wonder how Starlet is doing. Will he show up today?)

C: 什么情况，这鬼地方怎么有人？
E: What the heck? Why is there a human in this hellhole?

C: 怎么办？该怎么办？呜呜呜，好可怕，又要被关起来，用鞭子狠狠地抽！
E: What should we do? Boohoo... It's so scary... They'll lock us in and lash us like hell!

C: 在此，请让我问一句，它…还算好玩吧？
E: Let me ask you a question... Are you having fun?

C: 你与银河中无数无名客分享的开拓经历，都将成为未来无名客启程时的祝福。
E: The trailblazing experiences that you and Nameless across the stars share will become a blessing for future Nameless as they start their journeys.

C: （刚才上了那么多情绪、那么多价值，最后却没有寄出去？）
E: (After I poured so much emotion and value into it, the package still didn't end up getting sent out?)

C: 他可能也有苦衷。
E: Maybe he had his reasons.

C: 多刺激啊，就好这口儿。
E: How thrilling, just the way I like it.

C: 我当时喝得醉醺醺的，被人拽到了深处的客房，在那里看到一个头戴礼帽、身着华服的绅士坐在窗边，遥望绚烂的梦泡之海。
E: I already had a little too much to drink when I was dragged to a guest room deep in the corridor, inside of which was an immaculately dressed gentleman wearing a hat. He sat next to a window, staring into the distance at the colorful ocean of dream bubbles.

C: 你还好吧？
E: Are you alright?

C: 「你一定还在生我的气吧，气我为什么要画那些不知所云的故事，气我为什么不让你自由地创作，气我为什么从来不解释这样做的理由……」
E: "I bet you're still mad at me for painting those ridiculous stories, restricting your freedom to create, and yet I never explain my reasons for doing so..."

C: 是啊，「钟表匠」是匹诺康尼最好的动画师…永远都是。
E: Yes, the Watchmaker is Penacony's best animation artist... and will always be.

C: 真是一位了不起的开拓者。
E: What an amazing trailblazer.

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 贵客，感谢你让这些故事重见天日。
E: Thank you for letting these stories hit the screen, distinguished guest.

C: 在匹诺康尼，制作动画的方式非常简单——除了智能绘制、思维显像、算法生成这种常见方法，梦中还有擅长绘画的美梦剧团，可以还原古老的手绘动画质感……
E: Producing animations in Penacony is pretty simple. Apart from the common techniques like smart illustration, mental projection, and algorithmic generation, there's also the Sweet Dreams Troupe which is skilled in drawing and capable of recreating the vintage hand-drawn graphic style...

C: 「再让我说明一下目标——<color=#dbc291ff>找到所有被石头老板压榨的广告牌员工，带他们闯过敌人的阻拦，逃出工厂</color>！」
E: "Allow me to reveal the next objective: <color=#dbc291ff>Find all the Billboard workers that have been abused by Boss Stone, lead them in a charge through the enemy blockade, and escape the factory</color>!"

C: 能够漫步的苏乐达地板还没有全部消除…要直接打开宝箱吗？
E: The moving SoulGlad floor hasn't been completely removed... Do you want to open the chest?

C: 原来您就是《美梦往事》的导演！
E: So you're the director of Dreamjoy Memoir!

C: 可恶的石头老板，为了夺取小镇，居然想出这么卑劣的手段…
E: Darn that Boss Stone. He came up with such a heinous move just to take over the town...

C: 许多观众对《美梦往事》翘首以盼，让我们继续剪辑的工作吧！
E: Many fans look forward to Dreamjoy Memoir. Let's keep up the editing!

C: 稍等，我休息一会。
E: Hold on, let me take a break.

C: 嗯？似乎没听说过这种说法…但感觉还挺酷的，年轻人肯定喜欢！
E: Hmm? Never heard of that before... but it sounds pretty cool. The kids are gonna love it!

C: 这是个人物设定的小技巧，只要有个性的口癖，观众就会对他有更深的印象，甚至成为一种文化符号！
E: It's a small trick when designing a character to drop a catchphrase in there. The audience gets a deeper impression of them and it sometimes even can leave a cultural legacy!

C: 关于折纸小鸟。
E: About the Origami Birds.

C: 呵呵，我说的太多了。总而言之，我会按您的猜想去创作这份外传，请稍等……
E: Ha, I've said too much. In any case, I'll write this extra story based on your suppositions. Hold on a second...

C: 啊！怎么这么快！比仓鼠球骑士的「音速坚果」还快！
E: Ah, that was fast! Faster than the Hamster Ball Knight's Velocinut!

C: 没错！
E: That's right!

C: 目前首次测试正在开放中。怎么样，要来体验一下吗？
E: The open beta is out now. How about it, wanna try out the experience?

C: 参与测试有报酬吗？
E: Is there any remuneration for helping out with testing?

C: 「你看着眼前的三只球棒，一个念头闪电般刺入你的脑海：『当球棒侠救不了所有人！ 』为了拯救宇宙的蒙昧无知，你决定扔掉武器，奔赴新的战场——成为银河笔杆子侠！」
E: "As you gaze at the three bats in front of you, a thought flashes into your skull like lightning: The Galactic Baseballer cannot save everyone! To save the universe from its own ignorance, you decide to throw down your weapon and set foot on a new battlefield: That of the cosmos's literary hero!"

C: 噢，多么令人温暖的结局啊！
E: Oh, such a warm and fuzzy ending!

C: 二位选手，现在由我来为您介绍这一关的规则。
E: Competitors, allow me to introduce the rules of this challenge to you.

C: 龙啊，请将我的敌人都吞噬吧，嘎呜——！
E: O dinosaur, devour my enemies, grawwrr!

C: 但是，你知道吗？你必须得玩一把紧张刺激的「筑梦拼图」，否则就不能通过这里…呵呵。
E: But, you know what? You'll have to play an exhilarating round of Dream Jigsaw first. No jigsaw, no moving forward.

C: 储藏室…就在置物架后边吧？
E: The storage room... It's behind the shelves, right?

C: 难道…我只是个废案吗？
E: Am I... just a failed experiment?

C: 滴答！是不是有什么人在求救？
E: Tick-tock! Do I hear someone calling out for help?

C: 有人吗啾？我要坚持不住了啾！
E: Is anyone there, tweet? I can't take it anymore, tweet!

C: 即便如此，你们依然能感受到被监禁于其中的生命散发出的愤怒、无奈、沮丧……
E: Even so, you can feel the rage, frustration, and despair emanating from the imprisoned lifeform...

C: 以模拟宇宙的底层逻辑为基础，螺丝星的技术为载体，我编写了「差分宇宙」，作为分支项目为模拟宇宙承担一些独立的研究。
E: Utilizing the Simulated Universe's underlying logic and the Planet Screwllum technology, I have created the Divergent Universe as a branch project for independent research regarding the Simulated Universe.

C: 嘿嘿嘿，别紧张嘛，我是懂规矩的。这几位都是我的下属，他们因为运输船的事被迫滞留仙舟，多少有些压不住火气了…说到底，这都要怪你们仙舟呀。
E: Hey, hey, relax. I know the rules. These are my subordinates. They got stuck here because of the transport ship incident, and they need to vent their frustration... In the end, it's all the Xianzhou's fault.

C: 三月好棒！通过了基本功考试！
E: You're amazing, March! You've mastered the basics!

C: 三月七，这次的对手与公司机甲相近，你取出双剑，好好应战吧！
E: Your opponent this time is similar to the IPC mechs. Unsheathe your swords and give it everything you've got!

C: 本以为三月小姐在云璃的鼓动下四处游玩是浪费时间，看来也不全是浪费。
E: So, I thought you were just wasting your time traveling around with Yunli's encouragement, but it seems like it's paid off.

C: 这合适吗？
E: Do you think that's appropriate?

C: 那你们喝完了吗？
E: So, did you guys take it all?

C: 动手吧，毕竟，我已经没有还手之力了。
E: Go for it. I don't have the strength to fight back anyway.

C: 行啊，你被强化了，上吧。
E: Alright, you've been enhanced. Go for it.

C: 你这人年纪不小，但是<color=#dbc291ff>精神状态还是刚走进职场的小白一样</color>——将几乎全部的时间用在了工作之上，美其名曰「热爱工作」。
E: You may not be young, but <color=#dbc291ff>your mindset is still that of a fresh-faced newbie</color> who spends all their time on work, while proudly proclaiming to "love their job."

C: 你试着想想你上班之外的生活，是不是脑海里只能浮现两个字？
E: When you actually think about your life outside of work, only one word pops into your head, doesn't it?

C: 你默契地看向了煽风点火的最佳辅助——三月七，她立刻明白了你的意思。
E: You cast a knowing glance at March 7th, the main instigator in this war of words, who immediately caught your drift.

C: 莫非是三千年一开花，吃了能让人头发由白转黑，返老还童的雪莲？
E: Could it be the snow lotus that blooms once every three thousand years? The snow lotus that can turn one's hair from white to black and restore one's youth?

C: 没人活着。主舰就像是游戏作弊一样，它自己接管了载具、控制武器开火以及驾驶——甚至最后逃离了交战区，将学派成员遗体带回了母星。
E: No one survived. It was as if the mothership had a cheat code. It took over the vehicle, fired the weapons, and piloted on its own — it even escaped the engagement zone and brought the bodies of the scholars back to the home planet.

C: …大人还真是不容易呢。
E: ...Adulting is hard.

C: 老夫有几百岁了，当我完成它的一瞬间，我感觉自己只是个年纪大一点的孩子。大人与小孩，似乎不存在真正的分界线。
E: Despite my centuries of existence, upon finishing the toy, I found myself feeling akin to a teenager. It appears the boundary between adulthood and childhood is blurred, if not nonexistent.

C: 太卜大人前往玉阙仙舟面见爻光将军。但是她老人家「算无遗策」，已经帮我们把每日工作排到下个月了。
E: The Master Diviner has gone to the Yuque Xianzhou to meet with General Yao Guang face-to-face. However, she has already pre-planned our daily workload for the entire next month thanks to her "planning for every scenario."

C: 哼，一开始就别写，净卖关子！
E: Hmph. Then why write it in the first place? What a con!

C: 不现实吗？
E: Is that not realistic?
Okay...

C: 不必怀疑，这正是咱们俩最爱的形象。
E: There is no need for doubt. It is precisely the thing we love the most!

C: 这合法吗？
E: Is this legal?

C: 我会感应城中「友谊魔法」最强的地方，派我的分身前往那里。
E: I shall react to the place with the strongest Magic of Friendship in the city, and send my avatar to that location.

C: 「友谊魔法」不会说谎，我们果然是最好的朋友。
E: The Magic of Friendship never lies. I knew we are best friends.

C: 接下来，你打算怎么办？
E: What do you plan to do from here?

C: 我为什么会来参加演武仪典呢？这件事说来话长……
E: Why did I choose to participate in the Wardance? It's a long story...

C: 这不是…异邦友人需要些帮助吗。咱们云骑军平日里巡逻看到异邦朋友，不也得认真给人帮扶指路来着？
E: It's just... our friend from afar requires some assistance, that's all. Don't we Cloud Knights also earnestly help out and provide direction to the travelers we encounter on our daily patrols?

C: {NICKNAME}，我觉得我的症状不该拖下去了。可是，在仙舟该怎么去看病呢？
E: {NICKNAME}, I think I need to get my symptoms looked at. But, where can I see a doctor on the Xianzhou?

C: 这太卜司真的好壮观啊…怎么天上还飘着那么大的机器？不会掉下来吗？
E: This Divination Commission is so majestic... Why is that device floating in midair? Won't it fall?

C: 她应该就在那边，和其他几个卜者在玩什么「游戏」。
E: She should be just over there, playing some game with other diviners.

C: 我会尽可能修复玉兆里的信息，不过需要一点时间。
E: I'll try my best to restore the data in the jade abacus, but it'll take some time.

C: 哎！那不是素裳小姐吗？她怎么也在？
E: Oh! Isn't that Miss Sushang? What's she doing here?

C: 卢卡先生，你大胆告诉我，{NICKNAME}是不是在虐待你？我会给你做主的！
E: Mr. Luka, don't be afraid to tell me: Is {NICKNAME} mistreating you!? I will make sure you get justice!

C: 那种饮料里添加了不少忆质，原本是用于活跃睡梦，让人好梦连连。但不知为什么，却导致了你的不安感放大了，最终引发了严重的幻觉。
E: That drink has a fair amount of memoria in it, intended to make dreams more vivid and pleasant, but instead it caused your anxiety to be amplified, eventually triggering serious hallucinations.

C: 我陪你逛逛吧。
E: I'll accompany you.

C: 那不是我们现在要关心的问题吧！
E: I don't think that's what we should be worrying about right now!

C: 唉，你存着这个心思啊？！不行，不行不行不行！
E: Ah—!? That's what you were thinking about? No, no no no no!

C: 怎么哪都有你，你跟踪我？
E: Wherever I go, I see you. Are you stalking me?

C: 不，我只是基于仙舟人授予我的权力，允许你重返擂台罢了。你根本不需要我的「认可」——你不需要任何人的「认可」。
E: Actually, I'm simply using the authority granted by the Xianzhou people to let you return to the tournament. You don't need my recognition at all, or anyone else's.

C: （我竟然才想明白…杰帕德先生、银枝先生、波提欧大佬、史瓦罗大佬、当然还有尾巴大爷，他们试图告诉我的，其实是同一件事。）
E: (I can't believe it took me so long to realize that Gepard, Argenti, Boothill, Svarog, and Mr. Tail were all trying to tell me the same thing.)

C: …我早该料到的，一个能孕育出你的文明，是不会被轻易摧毁的。
E: ...I should have realized sooner — a civilization that can give rise to someone like you wouldn't be easily wiped out.

C: 你好啊，狐狸小姐。你就是我这场比赛的对手吗？我叫卢卡。
E: Hello, Miss Foxy. Are you my opponent for this match? My name is Luka.

C: 她说…消灭步离人？话太多了，后面没听清啊。
E: She said... destroy the borisin? She said too many words. I didn't catch the bit at the end.

C: ……根据天舶司的记录，这艘飞船原本隶属于博识学会。
E: ...According to records from the Sky-Faring Commission, this spaceship was originally registered under the Intelligentsia Guild.

C: 她真的是步离人吗？
E: Is she really a borisin?

C: 切记，破戒一事，虽不会毁灭己身，但会让你在对抗血火轮回的道路上一路溃败。我们所求的不是肉身的胜利，而是灵魂的不败。
E: Remember, breaking of the commandments will not destroy yourself, but it will pave the path of defeat when confronting the cycle of war and bloodshed. We seek not the victory of the flesh, but the invincibility of the soul.

C: 抱歉，你的问题，我无法回答。
E: I apologize. I am unable to give an answer to your question.

C: 哈哈哈，你学得还挺像。
E: Hahaha, you sure learn quick.

C: 建议还是别做媒体了…
E: I'd suggest you all quit the media industry...

C: 那是亲友团啊！
E: She's just here to support him!

C: 请这位记者朋友提问。
E: Please ask your questions.

C: 开始比赛。
E: Begin competition.

C: 银河这么广阔，大概叫什么怪名字的都有。
E: The cosmos is so vast that it probably has all sorts of strange names.

C: 真是精彩的演说！我宣布，本场比赛的胜利者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: What an exciting speech! I declare the winner of this match to be Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 你是在质疑我的专业能力吗？
E: Are you doubting my professionalism?

C: 其实我的第一个问题是关于「弃赛风波」的。外界传闻，卢卡选手输给波提欧之后，意志消沉，原本打算放弃参加复活赛的，幸好后来完成了比赛。
E: My first question is about the rumored match forfeiture. There's been a lot of buzz that Contestant Luka sank into a depressive state after losing to Boothill, and that he was prepared to forfeit the repechage, but fortunately still completed in the end.

C: 确实有这回事…
E: That was indeed the case...

C: 关于这点，{NICKNAME}教练如何解释？
E: How will you explain this, Coach {NICKNAME}?

C: 公司走狗
E: IPC dog.

C: 但我还是不知道庙会要干啥。
E: But I don't know what the temple fair is about.

C: 因为我终于发现了——废话越少，好评率越高。
E: Because I've finally realized — the fewer words spoken, the higher my positive reviews.

C: 赞美大衍万象！
E: Praise Mutare Magnus!

C: 这把游戏我优势很大。
E: I have a huge advantage in this round.

C: 请注意：这里是校园，培育精英的场所理应由最杰出的头脑领导。
E: Please be reminded: This is an academy. A venue that nurtures the elite should undoubtedly be led by the brightest minds.

C: 但请你牢记我的名字~契波•欧拉欧•拉欧~财富学院最优秀的「键盘手」~
E: But please remember my name, Czipo Lionel Lero! Fortune Academy's most outstanding keyboardist...

C: 我…我是筑梦学院的学生，负责弹贝斯…名字叫做…达凡绮。
E: I... I'm a Dreamweaver Academy student who plays the bass... My name is... Dafanchy.

C: 那么，这就是我等流派的大名了吗？
E: Then, this will be our school's official name?

C: 那么，这就是我等流派的大名了吗？
E: Then, this will be our school's official name?

C: 那要不还是取消吧。
E: How about we cancel the show then?

C: 「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的诸位，请随在下赶赴音律•猎场——
E: Everyone in Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party, please follow me to the Sound Hunting Ground...

C: 哟！「音律•主公」！
E: Yo! Sound Master!

C: 听闻这位外校人士在表演方面颇有造诣，如此不失为种好的解题思路。
E: I hear that this outsider has considerable performing talent, and it may yet be a good approach to solving the problem.

C: 最后那场闭幕演出，绝对是我见过的最精彩的舞台表演——没有之一！
E: That closing show at the end was deffo the most exciting performance I've ever witnessed, bar none!

C: 虽说音乐派对是由学生组织的活动，但还是会受到各个学院的影响。
E: Although the music party is a student initiative, it's still influenced by the various schools.

C: 没什么事情了。
E: That's all.

C: 就是…你好，请问你会演奏音乐吗？
E: Err... Hello, do you know how to play music?

C: 垃圾桶组合，好酷！
E: A trashcan group, cool!

C: 全免费无内购的新作。
E: This new release is totally free with no sneaky in-app purchases.

C: 不过…乱破小姐，我也有件事想要商量——
E: Although... Miss Rappa, I have something I need to talk to you about, too...

C: 对不起！我一直都在骗你们。我根本不是筑梦学院选出来的乐队成员，而是在冒充顶替！
E: I'm sorry! I was lying to you this whole time. I am not a band member selected by Dreamweaver Academy. I was impersonating them this whole time!

C: 在下明白了，但仍有一事相求。若阁下对音律•忍道抱有疑问，不妨继续随我等活动。
E: I understand, but I have one thing to ask of you. If you have any questions about the ninja way of sound, you might as well continue to work with us.

C: ——键盘•忍徒！
E: ...Ninja Initiate Keyboard!

C: 不愿意，那台机甲我开不了。
E: No. I can't drive that mech.

C: （既然临危受命，那就只能瞎编了！）
E: (I've been put on the spot. Guess I'll have to improvise!)

C: 说的好狠。
E: That's harsh.

C: 事到如今也只能相信了吧。
E: We have no choice but to believe at this point.

C: ——开始！
E: ...Begin!

C: 话说…我和乱破小姐创办的忍者团体，该叫什么名字？要不就叫「乱波」吧！
E: Now that you say it... What should we call this ninja band that we're forming? What about "Wave of Chaos"?

C: 不、不懂你在说什么。我们几个学院代表也不是来听你胡言乱语的！
E: I—I have no idea what you mean. We representatives of the academy aren't here to listen to your drivel!

C: 这枚忆泡记录了打开入口的方法——但这个梦境的具体构造未知，来源不明，搞不好是原始博士的人留下的东西。
E: The method to unlock the entrance is recorded in this memory bubble. However, the exact structure of this dreamscape is unknown, as is its origin. It could even have been left behind by one of Dr. Primitive's people.

C: 他的态度很强硬，还用学分来威胁我，所以就…答应了。
E: He was really insistent, and even used my credit hours to threaten me. So I had no choice but to... agree.

C: 嗨！我们来看你的乐队演出了！听知更鸟小姐说，你现在是乐队经理？怎么样，组乐队是不是很好玩？
E: Yo-ho! We're here to watch your band perform! Miss Robin said you're a band manager now? How about it? Is it any fun forming a band?

C: 诸位都找到了各自的忍道，便无需在下继续代为统率了。
E: Everyone has found their way of the ninja. There is no more need for me to continue leading it.

C: （吹嘘自己的社交能力）
E: (Brag about your socializing skills)

C: 演员
E: Cast

C: 你将那位智械商人的事告诉了他，还不忘极力夸赞对方的游戏究竟有多好玩。
E: You tell him about that Intellitron merchant and emphasize how fun the other's game was.

C: 没办法，玩乐队很辛苦的，要创作，要排练，还要到处找表演的机会，也赚不到钱…嗨，别看演出时候光鲜，平时连发胶都要省着用。
E: I had no choice. Being in a band was hard — You need to stay creative, and spend time practising, and network and find a chance to perform, and you still earned no money at the end of the day... *sigh* Don't be misled by the glamor of the stage. We even had to scrimp on hair gel.

C: 实不相瞒，这东西的灵感来自一种玩具小鸟。长了张惊恐的脸，捏一下就会发出刺耳的叫声，我特别喜欢。
E: Truth be told, the inspiration for this came from a toy bird. With its expression stuck in horror, emitting a shrill screech whenever you squeeze on it... I really loved it.

C: 「慰劳」也太见外了吧？
E: You don't think a token of "appreciation" is too formal?

C: 我要…找杨叔！
E: I want... to look for Mr. Yang!

C: 即使如此，也应该冷静。把道理讲清楚就够了。若他还是胡搅蛮缠，也不必再理睬了。
E: Even if that's the case, you should still remain calm. It's sufficient to just use reason. If he's still spouting rubbish, we can just ignore him.

C: 实在抱歉，其实我这几天在偷偷研究创意菜。有些成品实在太过失败，又怕被大家发现，就倒进了绿植里……
E: I'm really sorry, but I've been secretly inventing new dishes recently. Some of them were total failures, and I was afraid they'd be discovered, so I tossed them in the plants...

C: 来吧，我已经做好心理准备了！
E: Bring it! My mind and body are ready!

C: 喔！你真是个天才！我们快过去吧～
E: Ooh! You're an actual genius! Let's get to it!

C: 容我问一句…这到底是怎么遗失到那里去的？
E: Might I ask... How did it even end up there?

C: 真是失算帕，当时就该听你的，不要贪小便宜……
E: A huge miscalculation. If only I hadn't skimped on quality and listened to you back then...

C: 唉，还是先处理眼前的问题吧…这些蛞蝓会吃绿植的根茎，黏液还有腐蚀性，最重要的是…它们的样子…又黏又滑、嘴里还有一圈尖牙，实在有点恐怖帕！
E: *sigh* Let's just get back to the problem at hand... These slugs will eat the plants' roots, and their secretions are corrosive. Most importantly... they look... slimy and sticky, and they've got a rim of sharp fangs! Eww!

C: 不知道呢。不过他们俩挺开心的，就随他们去吧。
E: I have no idea. But they both look like they're having fun, so let them be.

C: 有了。就是这个。
E: Got it. It's this one.

C: 但那可是会无限生长，甚至能在短时间内成长到比列车还大的可怕生物……
E: But those are monstrous creatures that can indeterminately grow, and even grow bigger than the Express in a short period of time...

C: 优先去护送「丹轮寺」救下的孩子们吧。毕竟都是些孩子，是战争中唯一天然且绝对的无辜者，他们需要尽快被转移到安全的地方。
E: Let's prioritize escorting the children the Claretwheel Temple rescued. They're just children, after all, and the only natural and absolute innocents of war. They need to be moved to a safe place quickly.

C: 爆笑：哈哈哈哈。哈哈哈哈。
E: Explosive laughter: Hahahaha. Hahahaha.

C: 其他的就交给直觉吧。这就是本姑娘的摄影秘诀！
E: Go with your gut for the rest of it. That's my secret to great photos!

C: 啊啊啊！如假包换的无名客！要不是买不起，我就真要买了！
E: Ahhh! The Nameless in the flesh! I would've bought it in a heartbeat, if I could afford it!

C: 我们去房间里试试吧。
E: Let's do that back in the room.

C: 摄影修行也不会停止！
E: The road to becoming a master photographer never ends, either!

C: 大家一起说——
E: Everyone say...

C: 捕捉到了每个人的笑容……
E: Everyone's smiles are captured...

C: 晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
E: The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...

C: …卷轴纸张窸窣传来久远的话语，一次赴死的和谈得以被闻见：
E: ...The scroll's rustling paper brings words of distant past, and a doomed parley for peace can be heard:

C: 你和风堇带着小奇美拉在奥赫玛吃吃逛逛，度过了段极为愉快的时间……
E: With the chimeras in tow, you and Hyacine stroll around Okhema, enjoying a wonderful time...

C: 这个活就干到这里！泡澡~开心！嗷呜嗷呜！
E: That's it for work! Bath time, happy! Awoo-awoo!

C: 唔…这么关注排名榜，莫非，你们也在陪小奇美拉玩吗？
E: Hmm... Paying so much attention to the rankings, are you guys playing with the chimeras too?

C: 所有奇美拉都能幸福的世界，终究是不可能的吗……
E: A world where all chimeras can be happy, is it impossible...

C: 嗷呜——嗷呜嗷呜……
E: Awooooo, awoo-awoo...

C: 行使冠军的特权！
E: Execute your right as a champion!

C: 别别别！摇一摇，也有广告！你别乱动，我们这就开始！
E: No, please don't! A simple shake will also trigger an ad! Don't move a muscle. Let's start!

C: …究竟是谁会在这里捣乱呢？
E: ...But who would be the one to cause trouble here?

C: 哎哟，小海豹们剑拔弩张啊！让我们期待谁会成为最终的胜者吧！
E: Ouch, the baby seals are at odds! Let's see who will emerge as the ultimate victor!

C: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o「我要跟你豹了！」)∋
E: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "Ready to rumble!")∋

C: 对对对…对吗？不对，哎呀不对不对。
E: Right, yes, that's ri— no wait, oh no, no, that's not right!

C: 缇宁…不是很擅长说话的环节，我们直接开始吧……
E: We are... not much of a talker. Can we just get started...?

C: …它是双色海豹，可靠的伙伴。
E: It's a... Duotone Seal. A reliable partner.

E: My appetite's spoiled now...

C: 最近有什么神奇的事吗？
E: Anything wondrous happened lately?

E: {NICKNAME}, did you like that story?

E: But seeing as you're so curious, then why don't you give this story a listen...

E: "We inquire, who is it? Replies the entire Dreamscape: It's His Excellency, Marshal Tick-Tock!"

C: （小星星不在身边，它的声音是从哪传来的……）
E: (Starlet isn't around. Where is his voice coming from...?)

C: 非得抽到你怕为止！不怕怎么会听话？啊？！
E: I'll punish you until you're scared! You only listen when you're scared, right?

C: 朝眼前的幻象大吼大叫，就能抹消过往，改变未来了么？
E: Do you really think you can erase the past and change the future by yelling at these illusions in front of you?

C: 「所谓*正常*，对我们而言只是奴役。」
E: "The so-called *normal life* is nothing more than just slavery for us."

C: 有我守在这里，它们不会出事。
E: That won't happen to them, not under my watch.

C: ——噼啪！荷官为你表演了一段踢踏舞，骰子转动随脚步的变换越来越快，当你终于跟上节奏摇晃起身体时，它却骤然停住了。
E: *crack* The dealer starts to tap dance for you, and the dice roll faster and faster, keeping in time with the performance. Just as your body catches the rhythm and starts to sway, the dance ends abruptly.

C: …都没有什么僻静的，可以用来约会的地方，好苦恼。
E: ...It's so frustrating. I can't find a good spot for a date.

C: 正常。在这的怪物就没有不喜欢舒翁的，当然不包括我。哼，我根本不怕她。
E: That's typical. All the monsters here are fond of Siobhan, but except for me, of course! Hmph, I'm not afraid of her at all.

C: 呃…是不是人家刚才讲的烦心事影响您的状态了，这杯饮料不像是您的正常水准呀。
E: Um... did my problem bother you? This drink doesn't quite match your usual standards.

C: 哼，想管好这个酒吧，光会做饮料还不够。这里要处理的问题远比预想要多。
E: Well, making great drinks is not all about managing this lounge. There are way more problems to deal with here than you expected.

C: 那只野兽不会相信除舒翁外的任何人，您很难获得谈话的机会！
E: That beast doesn't trust anyone except Siobhan. If I hadn't done that, you wouldn't get a chance to talk to them.

C: …分层？
E: ...Layering?

C: 作为临时顶班的调饮师，你很敏锐。还猜到了什么，都说出来吧，让我听听。

C: 舒翁向你提出的委托，是安抚我们的情绪对吧？
E: The work that Siobhan gave you was to calm us down, right?

C: 我已经发现了…
E: I've figured that out...

E: What about yourself, woof? As the drinksmith, making harsh comments about your customers is rude and inappropriate!

E: When it's submitted, my seniors will probably be flabbergasted. And then they'll recommend it to the IPC for commercial applications. Within five years, no no, it may even be a surefire hit once it gets released on the market! And then my assessment, and my research funding, hee-hee...

C:
母亲莞尔不答，
只是用睡前故事，
为孩童梦中的翁法罗斯，
又镀上一层命运的金光。
E:
The mother smiles and does not answer,
Only using bedtime stories,
To once again gild another golden sheen of destiny,
To the Amphoreus of the child's dreams.

C: 却将最后的希冀与温暖，\n缝进那几只娃娃，\n都留给她那<color=#9e5738>懵懂的挚爱</color>。
E: Yet she leaves her final warmth and hope,\nEmbroidered into those dolls,\nLeaving them behind for her <color=#9e5738>innocent love</color>.

C: 「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹——」
E: "All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle —"

C:
可担忧不无道理——
少女不幸滑入深潭中，
于无天无地的池底，
与死亡行了贴面礼。
E:
But the concern is well-founded —
The girl tripped and fell into a mire,
She gazed directly into the eyes of death,
In that dark pool bottom unperceived.

C: 从沉静渡向喧嚣，\n从清澈渡向肮脏。
E: Ferrying from purity into grime,\nGoing from silence {F#in}to roaring boom.

C: 一阵风拂过，少女揭榜觐见。 等她再出来，已经拎着那袋赏钱。 旁人好奇，她用了何种诡计？ 「扎格列斯只会说谎， 而我正是扎格列斯。」
E: With a gust of wind, the girl emerges before the king's face. And when she leaves, she already has the king's promised gold in a pouch. The others are curious as to what lie she raised. "Zagreus can only tell lies, And I am Zagreus."

C: 少女想起童年的炉火。\n「赛法利娅，唯有诚实讨人喜。」
E: The young girl recalled the hearth fire of her childhood.\n"Cifera, only honesty is well-liked."

C: 你找到了纷争的弱点， 将黑衣剑士困在记忆的往世， 也曾与英雄们重登天空。 「正义的伙伴，就是我啦！」
E: You find Strife's weakness, seal the black-robed swordsman in the ruins of a past life, and soar again with the heroes to the sky. "Justice has a partner, and it's me!"

C: 命运三相殿的门扉，\n在祈祷日轻启，\n人群跪伏，低语如潮。
E: The gates of the Temple of the Three Fates,\nGently open on the day of prayer,\nAnd the crowd crouched, whispering like the tide.

C: 杯中静谧无澜，\n只映出她的形影孤立。
E: The liquid in the cup sat still\nReflecting her loneliness.

C: 「优秀的医师，不合格的学者。」\n绳结学派贤人的评价。
E: "An excellent healer who fails at all scholarly means."\nWas the assessment from the Nodist Sage.

C:
在那画中，
名为塞涅俄丝的「少女」眼眸闪烁，
目送父亲披甲出征，
在烈日照耀中远渡。
E:
In that painted world,
The "girl" Seliose's eyes glowed,
Watching her father, steel-clad and unyielding,
Cross the land beneath the searing sun.

C: 「天空最为温柔……」\n「它宽容地注视万物，」\n「播撒细雨和旭光。」
E: "The sky is the gentlest of all...\nIt watches over all things with compassion,\nShowering them with soft rain and morning light."

C: 「无妨。我的性命本就微不足道。」
E: "No matter. My existence is of little consequence."

C: 「太不吉利了吧。」\n男人故作惊异，回以一笑：\n「不过，倒是很符合我们的宿命。」
E: "That's quite ominous."\nThe man pretended to be surprised, and responded with a smile:\n"Though, it does dovetail with our destiny."

C:
他是强大的士兵，战无不胜，
必须牺牲时，
也总能轻而易举，
将己身的一切献出。
E:
He was a formidable warrior, invincible in battle,
And when it was necessary to sacrifice for fellows,
He could do so with ease,
Giving up everything, without a show.

C:
他的志向太过宏伟，
挫败也如影随形。

于偶见的消沉之中，
学者习得了一事——
E:
His ambitions are too lofty,
And so failure follows him never too softly.

Through moments of defeat, felt increasingly common,
The scholar learned one thing he has never forgotten —

C: 「信仰泰坦，死得畅快。」\n「否定泰坦，死得实在。」
E: "Believe in Titans, and you'll have a happy death."\n"Deny the Titans, and you'll have a fulfilling death."

C:
这漫长而殊异的诱惑，
亦是擢升的试炼——
智者无所不能，
唯独厌恶「捷径」。
E:
This long and abnormal temptation,
Is also a trial of elevation —
For the sage can achieve all things,
But "short-cuts" alone he abhors with silence.

C: 唯独她追求的一桩难事——
E: The only challenge that she relentlessly dedicates herself to is...

C: 低首行礼时，他悄眼觑视，\n因为他所恋慕许久的衣匠，正簇拥着自己的主人，\n静默如托举金花的叶。
E: He casts sideways glances as he bows,\nFor the Garmentmaker he adores is flanking her mistress\nSilent as a leaf accompanying a flower.

C: 红发的孩童面露忧色。 「你闻知众人的命运， 可从未说出你的未来。」
E: The red-haired child appears worried. "You are aware of everyone's fate, Yet never speak of your own future."

C: 蓝发的少女端来一盆水，洗了洗手，而后坐上椅子，拿起一条面包掰成两半。
E: The blue-haired girl brought over a basin of water, washed her hands, then sat down on a chair and broke a loaf of bread in half.

C: *这一页故事，来自第23570001 次永劫轮回，一个永远安宁的哀丽秘榭。请你试想，如果负火的囚徒在无尽苦旅之中，决意保护曾经纯洁的自己，哪怕仅此一次……*
E: *This page of story comes from the 23,570,001st Eternal Recurrence, in an eternally peaceful Aedes Elysiae. Imagine, if the prisoner of flames subjected to ceaseless suffering still resolved to protect himself once pure self, even if just for once...*

C: 「嚯…真香！咱家的葡萄就在老位置，你也去拿点呗。」
E: "Mmm... Smells great! Our grapes are in the usual spot, so why don't you go grab some too?"

C: *这一页故事…来自苦难的回环之外，是我送给你的礼物。请你试想，若翁法罗斯平凡如芸芸众星，众人的悲欢织就日常的笑泪……*
E: *This page of the story... comes from beyond the endless cycle of suffering, a gift I give to you. Imagine, if Amphoreus were as ordinary as the countless stars, where people's joys and sorrows wove the smiles and tears of everyday life...*

C: δ-me13日志中完全消失的记录，表现为翁法罗斯的某段历史出现空白，再也无法识别。 这种现象反复、离散地出现在多次循环中，且有增长趋势。 ██侵入变量█三月七██████PhiLia093███████长夜█月██ 管理员批注：具体原因尚未查明。
E: Records that are completely missing from δ-me13's logs, presenting as blank spaces in Amphoreus's history, never turning readable. These anomalies recur sporadically and randomly across recurrences and show signs of increase. ██Invading Variable█March 7th██████PhiLia093███████Ever█Night██ Admin Note: The exact cause remains unknown.

C: Minphia14，「卡吕普索重建神悟树庭」的历史记录，在迭代后以「瑟希斯赋予人类智慧」的形式在神话中得到继承。其余各电信号的记录，也以类似的形式同步出现在下一循环的神话中。\n\n受限于模拟文明等级，在掺杂大量错误信息后，以神话形式继承的历史数据，往往会出现严重的失真现象，其影响可以忽略不计。
E: The historical record of Minphia14 "Calypso rebuilding the Grove of Epiphany" was, after iteration, inherited in myths in the form of "Cerces granting wisdom to humans." Records of other electrical signals also appeared synchronously in the myths of the next cycle in a similar fashion.\n\nLimited by the simulated civilization level, historical data inherited as myths often experiences severe distortion after being mixed with large amounts of erroneous information, rendering their impact negligible.

C:
权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>原本的演算目标：哺育「自我」的生命形态。遭受星核污染陷入长眠。
受PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>影响，在沉睡中踏上「记忆」命途。后因{NICKNAME}的到来而苏醒，成为依附于{F#她}{M#他}的忆灵迷迷。

第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次死循环末尾，容貌变化为PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>，但母体记忆数据丢失。

第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次死循环末尾，于无名泰坦大墓取回失去的记忆，恢复原貌。

翁法罗斯一战中，因铁墓席卷群星，德谬歌受不可数的「记忆」滋养，成为无漏净子。
为闭合因果，锚定铁墓陨落的事实，她踏上回望的旅程。以德谬歌的「自我」为摇篮，新生的翁法罗斯从忆域中诞生。「生命的第一因」实验成功。
德谬歌自身与权杖一同消陨，心识在时间的起点化为PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>。

其根源为废弃赋值：非毁灭共生微概率。若无管理员介入，该赋值导向第十三枚因子：
路径：创世。原动力：爱。模拟命途：开拓。
E:
Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>'s original extrapolation goal: to nurture a life form with an "Ego." Fell into a long slumber due to contamination by the Stellaron.
Influenced by PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>, it embarked on the Path of "Remembrance" in its sleep. It later awoke due to the arrival of {NICKNAME} and became Mem, the memosprite that became attached to {F#her}{M#him}.

At the end of the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th recursive loop, its appearance changed to that of PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>, but the matrix memory data was lost.

At the end of the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th recursive loop, it retrieved its lost memories at the Great Tomb of the Nameless Titan and reverted to its original appearance.

During the Battle of Amphoreus, as Irontomb swept across the stars, the Demiurge was nourished by uncountable "memories" and became the Pure Child of Anāsrava.
To close the causality loop and anchor the fact of Irontomb's demise, it embarked on a journey of backward gaze. With the Demiurge's "Ego" as a cradle, the newborn Amphoreus was born from the Memory Zone. The experiment on the "prime mover of life" was successful.
The Demiurge itself vanished along with the Scepter, and its consciousness transformed into PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> at the origin of time.

Its root cause is the discarded assignment: non-Destruction symbiotic micro-probability. Without Administrator intervention, this assignment would lead to the thirteenth factor:
Track: Genesis. Primum Mobile: Love. Simulated Path: Trailblaze.

E: Conclusion

C: 口蜜腹剑的公司代表向你提出了一笔交易。\n你意志坚定，洁身自好，绝不会在概率的游戏中丢弃自己的原则。\n这恐怕会是一场巨大的考验。毕竟在某些特定的场合，入局与否和你自身的意愿无关……
E: The silver-tongued IPC spokesperson has offered you a deal.\nYou are firm of will and adamant in your dedication, and will never discard your principles in a game of probability.\nThis might become a huge test for you. After all, under some circumstances, it's not up to you whether you will join a game...

C: 「等等，前方禁止通行…嗯？原来是{NICKNAME}啊。抱歉，为了下层区居民的安全，这里已经被封锁了……帮助铁卫搜查遗迹？这倒是个合规的理由，那就麻烦你了。」
E: "Halt, this place is off-limits... Oh, it you, {NICKNAME}. I'm sorry, this place has been closed up to ensure the safety of the Underworld citizens... Helping the Silvermane Guards to search the ruins? This is a legitimate reason, I guess. I'll leave you to it."

C: 「{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，史瓦罗先生的『家人』就在我们面前，但是…它已经完全失控了。为了大家的安全，史瓦罗先生决定要打倒它——{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，克拉拉不想辜负史瓦罗先生的决心，请帮帮我们吧。」
E: "{F#Big sister}{M#Big brother} {NICKNAME}, Mr. Svarog's family is just ahead, but... but it's completely out of control. For everyone's safety, Mr. Svarog decided to bring it down... I don't want to let Mr. Svarog down, so please help us, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}."

C:
{NICKNAME}：

嗨，我想你啦。

会不会有些突然呢？我只是，想再回头看一眼。

这个时候，{NICKNAME}在做什么呢？是沉浸在回忆中，还是已经启程了？
「开拓」的旅程，一定充满未知吧。所以，我也想在你的生命中，再留下一份惊喜。
一道「记忆」的涟漪，还有，妖精的小小魔法♪

不知不觉中，我们一起走过了好长的路呀。
旅途的下一站，{NICKNAME}又会写下怎样的故事呢？

我会在你的回忆里期待着，只要闭上眼睛，就能看见{NICKNAME}的眼睛，里面装着整个宇宙……
就像清风吹拂的麦浪，就像群星闪耀的明天。

再见啦♪


<align="right">昔涟</align>
E:
{NICKNAME}:

Hey, I miss you.

Maybe this feels a bit out of the blue, but I just wanna take a look back one last time.

What are you doing right now, {NICKNAME}? Are you immersing in the memories, or have you begun your journey?
The journey of Trailblaze must be filled with unknowns. So, I thought... why not leave you one more surprise?
A ripple of memories, along with a touch of fairy magic. ♪

Before we knew it, we've shared such a long walk together.
I wonder what story you'll write at the next stop on your journey?

I will be in your memories, longing... Whenever I close my eyes, I can see yours, carrying the whole universe...
Like waves of wheat rustling in the breeze, or the tomorrow where stars shine.

Farewell ♪

C:
1、本游戏是一款3D角色扮演类回合制游戏，适用于年满<unbreak>12</unbreak>周岁及以上的用户，建议未成年人在家长监护下使用游戏产品。

2、本游戏基于架空背景展开剧情，用户可通过对话、交互、完成任务推进剧情，游戏内还可以自由探索场景地图。游戏中有需要使用游戏角色进行的人机对战，玩法基于一定难度的思考判断，鼓励玩家随机应变、制定策略来取得对战胜利。游戏中有少量自定义文字系统，该社交系统遵循相关法律法规进行管理。

3、<unbreak>PlayStation™Network ("PSN")</unbreak>的中国大陆用户需要进行实名认证，认证为未成年人的用户无法在<unbreak>PlayStation™Store</unbreak>消费，包括且不限于游戏购买，订阅购买/升级/延长，以及游戏内商品购买内容和服务。
未成年人用户仅限于每周五、周六、周日的<unbreak>20</unbreak>时至<unbreak>21</unbreak>时登录及游玩。

4、游戏玩法鼓励玩家积极思考，制定和应用策略来取得对战的胜利。同时，在游戏中呈现了精美细腻的画面效果，能够为玩家提供优质的视觉体验。

3、<unbreak>PlayStation™Network ("PSN")</unbreak>的中国大陆用户需要进行实名认证，认证为未成年人的用户无法在<unbreak>PlayStation™Store</unbreak>消费，包括且不限于游戏购买，订阅购买/升级/延长，以及游戏内商品购买内容和服务。
未成年人用户仅限于每周五、周六、周日的<unbreak>20</unbreak>时至<unbreak>21</unbreak>时登录及游玩。

4、游戏玩法鼓励玩家积极思考，制定和应用策略来取得对战的胜利。同时，在游戏中呈现了精美细腻的画面效果，能够为玩家提供优质的视觉体验。

C: 也许是我的直觉：别惹帕姆。
E: My intuition tells me that it would be unwise to provoke the conductor.

C: 无论他是否能实现自己的梦，能放下一切再次出发，便已足够令人敬佩。
E: Whether he can achieve his dream or not, being able to let go of everything and start again is already admirable enough.

C: 我不会手下留情！
E: I won't go easy on you!

C: 一步、两步…迈向「未来」的路，就在脚下。
E: The path to the future begins right here.

C: 嗯？
E: Huh?

C: 哼，就这速度？太慢了！
E: Hmph, at this speed? Too slow!

C: 以前在防卫科练过几次。
E: Just like my days at the Security Department.

C: 好久没有解题啦！
E: Been a while since I worked on one of these!

C: 作为从者，本该把自己的名字藏起来。但鉴于这个世界根本没人认识我，我还是开诚布公吧——我叫「卫宫士郎」，请多指教。
E: As a Servant, I'm supposed to keep my True Name hidden. But since no one here would recognize me anyway, I might as well be honest — my name is Emiya. It's a pleasure.

C: 你无处可躲！
E: You have nowhere to hide!

C: 我敬重母亲，只是她和我记忆中的模样并不完全相同，或许，只是我把母亲想象成了另一个人……
E: I have deep respect for my mother, but she's no longer how I remember her. Perhaps I never realized who she truly was...

C: 注意敌我形势。
E: The enemy situation has changed.

C: 没想到，天才的道路也是有尽头的~
E: That's it? I've peaked already?

C: 很多人都津津乐道于姐姐离开部队后的转变，其实…她一直都没有变过。
E: Many people seem to like talking about how my sister changed since she left the Guards, but in reality... she's exactly the same person.

C: 这份力量，能用来拯救更多生命。
E: With this strength, I can save more lives.

C: 克拉拉：克拉拉…做得还好么？
E: Clara: I hope I did okay...

C: 老样子，别坑自己人。
E: Same rule as always — no backstabbing, okay?

C: 让我来吧，哥——我已经不是小孩子了。
E: Stop holding me back, Gepard! I'm not a kid anymore...

C: 再不出拳就晚了，伙计。
E: Better throw a punch or it'll be curtains, friend.

C: 搏击俱乐部流行一句话：「谁把你揍得最惨，就和谁做朋友」——喔，怪不得大家都想和我做朋友！
E: A popular Fight Club motto: "Make friends with the one who hurts you the most..." No wonder everyone wants to be my friend!

C: 将军的手段见得不少，总是忘了将军的勇武也是万人之上。
E: People often forget that the general is as brave as he is cunning.

C: 就以奇珍万千，给各位鼓劲啦~
E: A thousand wonders, to raise your spirits~

C: 卡芙卡…不能埋葬我们的，都将被我们埋葬。
E: Those who can't bury us, are waiting to be buried, Kafka.

C: 悉数…奉还！
E: Make good... the loss!

C: 唉，身在军人世家可不好过呀。我娘从小抓我习武，晨钟不响就要起床和她对招，大清早就精疲力尽了，到黉学上课时只能呼呼大睡，先生们都叫我李大枕头……
E: *sigh* It's not easy being born in a military family. My Ma trained me in martial arts since I was a kid and I had to get up to spar with her before the crack of dawn. I'd get so exhausted in the morning that I always fell asleep in class. The teachers all called me Sleepy Sushang...

C: 可要留心些，素裳。战场上容不得半点差错。
E: Be careful, Sushang. The battlefield tolerates no mistakes.

C: 让我回忆起了许久以前的事。
E: This brings back a lot of old memories.

C: 手到擒来。
E: As easy as that.

C: 这一步，是吉是凶呢？
E: Hmm, is this weal or woe?

C: 有龙女在，本座便不虞有患了。
E: With the Dragon Lady here, I have nothing to worry about.

C: 强者当前，不吝赐教。
E: A strong adversary. Help me improve!

C: 这下不用求将军啦！
E: No need to pester the general for a while!

C: 我只恨没有早点结识「帝垣琼玉」的发明者…如此强身健脑的益智活动，理应发扬光大！
E: I just wish I met the inventor of Celestial Jade earlier... This activity is great for both physical and mental health! It needs to get popularized!

C: 免去寒暄，说说来意吧？
E: Let's forgo the pleasantries — what do you want?

C: 成了。
E: It worked.

C: 藿藿，在吾身后援手即可。
E: Huohuo, just stand behind me and do what you can.

C: 判官每落一笔干系万千业报，不得不慎重啊……
E: Every stroke penned by a judge is tied to infinite karmic outcomes — one must proceed with great care...

C: 没想到彦卿兄弟这个年纪，玩具仍然是剑…这个时代似乎同过去没什么不同啊……
E: I didn't expect to see someone his age still using a sword as a toy... From generation to generation, it seems some things never change.

C: 不行。
E: That won't do.

C: 我做随军医士时，主要为朱明部队「曦驭军」的战士们祓除魔念。在承受巨大压力时，人与岁阳间的连结会变得不稳定，这时候就要靠熏香了。
E: When I served as a military healer, I mainly purged evil from the soldiers of the Zhuming's Dawn Army. The connection between a person and a heliobus becomes unstable under immense pressure, and at times like this, we must rely on incense.

C: 青雀加油！放心，躲你身后是开玩笑啦…我会保护你的。
E: Come on, Qingque! Don't worry, I was kidding about hiding behind you... I will protect you.

C: 我来打头阵。
E: I'll be taking point.

C: 即使与骑士团的诸位走向不同行迹，我们也终将于终点相见。
E: Though as knights we may tread different paths, destiny will bring us together at journey's end.

C: 重新入场。
E: Back in the game!

C: 小心头顶！
E: Watch your head!

C: 这就破防了？
E: Call that defense?

C: 秩序、社会规范、人类虚构的道德准绳，我都已经这么努力了，它们还是不肯放过我！
E: Rules, societal dos and don'ts, all these made-up human moral codes — I've given it my all, but I just can't seem to shirk them!

C: 姐姐会尽我所能帮你的。
E: Rest assured, dear, I'll do all that I can to assist you.

C: 又多了一份血债。
E: Another blood debt repaid.

C: 任务…终止……
E: Mission... terminated...

C: 刹那灵光，来自长久的等待。
E: A moment of divine insight arises from enduring patience.

C: 宁静，宛然在目。
E: Serenity stands clear before me.

C: 嗯…装饰有些普通呢。
E: Hmm... Not exactly eye-catching.

C: 再跑快点！
E: Yes, run faster!

C: 推开门吧，远方会是新的世界！
E: Push open the door. A new world lies beyond!

C: 大坏蛋！
E: Big meanie!

C: 人多力量大~
E: There's strength in numbers~

C: 我讨厌下雨天，湿漉漉、黏糊糊的，连尾巴都变得很重……
E: I hate rainy days. They're always so wet and sticky, and my tail gets so heavy...

C: 来一脚~
E: Lemme have a go~

C: 盆满钵满，下次还来！
E: What a big haul. I'll be back~!

C: 这也是「开拓」的馈赠吧？
E: Is this also a blessing of the Trailblaze?

C: 你的棋路，总是出乎意料。两分随意，三分想象…还有五分一往无前的勇气。
E: Your moves on the board are always unexpected. Two parts whimsy, three parts imagination... and five parts unwavering courage.

C: 请你，以身入局吧！
E: Come now, step onto the board!

C: 我以「律法」之名宣判——汝等，满盘皆输！
E: In the name of Law, I declare: Your downfall is absolute!

C: 能在我面前保持镇定的忆者，不超过一掌之数。难道说…她看过更可怕的东西？
E: I can count on one hand the number of Memokeepers who've kept their cool in front of me. Could it be that... she's seen something even more terrifying?

C: 烈腾八荒，荡除凶灾，不灭不朽！
E: Calamity undone. Soaring above the lands. This is permanence!

C: 阿、那、克、萨、戈、拉、斯…一字不差，对不对？
E: A-NA-XA-GO-RAS. Not a single syllable missing. Did I get that right?

C: 炎枪！冲锋！
E: Flaming lance! Forward!

C: 这就是心有灵犀的感觉？
E: Is this how it feels to be in sync?

C: 在岔道之前，珍惜同路的时光。
E: Before our paths diverge, savor the shared journey.

C: 还未到止步的时候。
E: I'm not done yet.

C: 嗯…反正我不急。
E: Well... I'm not in a hurry anyway.

C: 镜头拉远
E: Zoom Out

C: 当场下车
E: Cancel Ride

E: Main Story Replay

E: Okhema Regional Champion

E: Siren Tears

E: Aptitude Showcase

E: Aptitude Showcase

C: 余晖残卷
E: Remnants of Twilight

C: 对敌方全体造成大量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals massive Imaginary DMG to all enemies.

C: 战胜敌方首领的第一阶段
E: Defeat Phase 1 of the enemy boss

C: 无疑之日已至——

C: 进入【基因复制】状态，使自身速度提高，召唤【幼蛰虫】并为其附加【速效进化】状态。我方可选择一名角色及其召唤的目标立即行动，并进入【天敌】状态，使其击破特攻提高。处于【速效进化】状态下的敌方目标受到不处于【天敌】状态下的我方攻击时，无法造成暴击效果。
E: Enters "Gene Duplication" state, increasing this unit's SPD. Summons "Juvenile Sting" and apply "Rapid Evolution" state to it. A target character and their summoned target can immediately take action and enter the "Nemesis" state, increasing their Break Effect. When targets not in the "Nemesis" state attack friendly units in the "Rapid Evolution" state, they cannot deal CRIT Hit effects.

C: 对我方全体造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets.

C: 使所有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」对指定我方单体造成虚数属性伤害。若没有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」则本技能施放失败。技能施放后，恢复「旧梦的回声」的韧性。
E: Makes all "Echoes of Faded Dreams" that can take action deal Imaginary DMG to a single target. If there are no "Echoes of Faded Dreams" that can take action, then this ability will fail to launch. After using this ability, restore Toughness for "Echoes of Faded Dreams".

C: 饕虐外肢
E: Rapacious Appendages

C: 罪血共鸣
E: Hemotort Resonance

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「死灭之蛹」</color>将被「律令」戳破，再度催生寰宇蝗灾。流萤用大丽花留下的焚焰点燃「律令」，并决定以自身挡下这悬河注火般的一击。
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>Chrysalis of Extinction</color> would be ruptured by the "divine law," unleashing the Swarm Disaster anew. Using the flames left behind by The Dahlia, Firefly ignited the "divine law," resolving to shield others from the cascading, fiery blast with her own body.

C: 大丽花扮作黑天鹅，再度为你编织虚景，而你不为所动。大丽花感叹你的「记忆」确实非常特殊，她不得不采取更加直接的手段。
E: The Dahlia disguised herself as Black Swan, weaving illusions for you once again, but you remained unmoved. The Dahlia remarked that your memories were indeed quite special, forcing her to resort to more direct measures.

C: 在狮震八方「困难」难度挑战中，战胜敌方首领的第一阶段
E: Defeat Phase 1 of the Boss Enemy in Earthshaker Leo challenge in Hard mode

C: 被添加的额外风弱点。
E: Additionally implanted Wind Weakness.

C: 幻身
E: Phantom Illusion

C: 知更鸟：坠物之声
E: Robin: Sound of Descent

C: 通过原始忆域非常顺利地潜入了匹诺康尼，尽管代价非小。接下来，要想办法进入「十二时刻」了。
E: You slipped into Penacony through the Primordial Memory Zone without a hitch, though it came at a heavy cost. Now you have to find a way into the "Twelve Hours."

C: AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>的愿望在匹诺康尼迎来终结…她没能得到自己渴求的事物，与歌斐木罪行的联系，也让她的死亡笼上了一层迷雾。
E: AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>'s wish died here in Penacony... She never got what she wanted, and her association to Gopher Wood's crimes makes her death all the more mysterious.

C: 流萤竟然也来到了流梦礁，并且将矛头指向了梦主…这会是一个陷阱吗？还是她们的确发现了什么？
E: Firefly has made her way to Dreamflux Reef and is now targeting the Dreammaster... Could this be a trap? Or have they actually discovered something?

C: 离开房间
E: Leave the room

C: 我的名字是康士坦丝，一名寻常忆者。你若愿意，不妨先委屈一下，和别人一样称呼我为「大丽花」吧。
E: My name is Constance. An ordinary Memokeeper. If you'd like, you can do what everyone else does and call me "The Dahlia" for now.

C: 虽然很冒险，但我有一个计划。
E: It might be risky, but I have a plan.

C: 写那封信时，我还能勉强进行「调律」，可后来，情况却越来越糟……
E: When I wrote that letter, I could still barely manage to "tune", but later, things just kept getting worse...

C: …谢谢。如果没有您出手相助，我真的不知道该怎么办了。
E: ...Thanks. Without your kind help, I wouldn't know what to do.

C: 虽然被猎犬家系的人当成了偷渡犯，但我其实是本地人哦——鸢尾花家系的艺者「流萤」！尽管只是临时演员……
E: Although the Bloodhounds mistook me for a stowaway, I'm actually a local. My name is Firefly, and I'm from the Iris Family. I work as a stage performer, although right now I'm just an extra...

C: 让你见笑了。我只是出来散散心…谐乐大典举办在即，多少有些紧张。
E: Sorry you had to see that. I just came out to clear my head... The Charmony Festival is coming up soon, and I'm a bit nervous.

C: 知更鸟，你是为了什么而歌唱？
E: Robin, what do you sing for?

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 我明白，但我可以向你保证，这不是一个陷阱。如果一定需要理由……
E: I get it, but I can assure you this isn't a trap. If you really need a reason...

C: 难道……
E: Could it be...

C: 这就是大明星的气度么，你让我也产生了一些向往呢。
E: So this is what star power looks like... you've even made me a little star-struck.

C: 所以我才说…你只是自以为懂我。仔细想想吧，作为星核猎手时，我难道没有尽心尽力，让流萤逐步接近真相？
E: That's exactly why I'm saying... you only think you understand me. Think about it carefully. As a Stellaron Hunter, didn't I work my hardest to help Firefly get closer to the truth?

C: 砂金先生，你怎么会在这里？
E: Mr. Aventurine, what are you doing here?

C: 这只是我的猜测，但多半属实——那时他终于完成了最后的「律令」，并借此，抹除了任何计划都会存在的破绽…谋划者本人，他自己。
E: It's just my theory, but I'm pretty sure I'm right. By then he had finally completed the last "law" and used it to eliminate the one weakness that exists in any plan... the mastermind himself.

C: 所以花火大人就改掉了呀。
E: So Miss Sparkle went ahead and changed it!

C: 那不是能被轻易掌控的力量，我们得加快脚步了。
E: That's not a power that can be easily controlled. We need to pick up the pace.

C: …「梦主」怎么会强大到这种程度？
E: ...How did the Dreammaster become this powerful?

C: 为了反抗命运，这是我们愿意承受的代价——不是所有人都会选择举手投降。
E: This is the price we're willing to pay to defy destiny. Not everyone chooses to surrender with their hands up.

C: 那便上前觐见吧，帝国的末裔。我准许你，为我揭示秩序的真容——
E: Come forth and present yourself, last heir of the Empire. I permit you to unveil the true face of Order...

C: 人们无法梦见未曾见过的事物，他们{RUBY_B#没有勇气面对未来}不敢从梦中醒来{RUBY_E#}，是因为美梦本就是由每个人的过去织就，他们还无法释怀。
E: People can't dream of things they've never seen before. They're {RUBY_B#discouraged from facing the future}afraid to wake up{RUBY_E#} because the sweet dream is woven from their own past, a past they still can't let go of.

C: 所以，最终还是回到了你这边，是吗？
E: So, you're the key in the end, I assume?

C: 来不及了，除非有其他星神进行干涉——而那无异于掀起一场寰宇神战。
E: It's too late. Unless another Aeon intervenes... But that would be tantamount to igniting a cosmic war among gods.

C: 亲身到过梦主计划的腹地，难道我不会想办法告知公司？舰队开拔，一开始就不是为了正面冲突。
E: Having personally been to the heartland of the Dreammaster's plans, wouldn't I have already found a way to inform the IPC? The fleet's deployment was never meant for a direct confrontation.

C: …停手吧。
E: ...Stop.

C: 以{RUBY_B#逐梦者}美梦{RUBY_E#}的名义，谐乐大典，就此开幕！
E: In the name of the {RUBY_B#dreamchasers}sweet dream{RUBY_E#}, the Charmony Festival... Now begins!

C: 我喜欢去到处找可爱的裙子，不是为了向别人展示，是因为那会让我自己的心情很好。
E: I love going around looking for cute dresses, not to show off to others, but because it makes me feel good.

C: 现在，该成为新的「钟表匠」了。
E: Now, it's time to become the new "Watchmaker."

C: 话里有话啊，教授…我可没那么有学问。
E: I feel like I need to read between the lines here, professor... But you know I'm not that well-read.

C: 所以…你们还是不欢迎我的加入？
E: So... you still don't want me to join?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那会是一个新的起点，「四末」会因此汇向「毁灭」，而银河会携起手，将其跨越。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It will be a new beginning. The "Four Apocalypses" will converge towards the Destruction because of it, while the cosmos will join hands to overcome that annihilation.</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>因为，我们又能肩并肩，去对抗某些我们认为「不对」的东西，并且，能为对方不顾一切。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>We were standing shoulder to shoulder once again, fighting against things we believed were "wrong," and we'd do anything for each other.</color>

C: 我…还是慢了一步吗……
E: Am I... still one step too late...

C: 而风中传来歌谣——
E: And a song comes on the wind...

C: 多一点爱！
E: More love!

C: 某日 和平的奥赫玛
E: Just another day in peaceful Okhema

C: 什么？居然还有这个设定？
E: What? That's actually a thing?

C: 空虚的桶
E: Empty Can

C: 孤高的桶
E: Arrogant Can

C: 见闻•记忆美学
E: Knowledge: Memory Aesthetics

C: 该去往下一场葬礼了。
E: Time to head to the next funeral.

C: 很大胆呀。也许…我们都会烧成灰哦？
E: Pretty bold. What if... we both end up being burnt to ashes?

C: 成为模因的那一刻，纵然享受无数次日光浴，我那苍白的肤色也不会变化了呐……
E: From the moment I became a memetic entity, no matter how much I sunbathe, this pallid skin never changes...
